### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/chart-engine.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/chart-engine.js`

```js
  1 | import { findColumn, safeNumber } from "./schema-profiler.js";
  2 | 
  3 | function aggregate(values = [], aggregation = "count") {
  4 |   const present = values.filter(
  5 |     (value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== ""
  6 |   );
  7 | 
  8 |   if (aggregation === "count") return present.length;
  9 | 
 10 |   const numbers = present.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
 11 | 
 12 |   if (!numbers.length) return 0;
 13 | 
 14 |   if (aggregation === "sum") return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
 15 |   if (aggregation === "avg") return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / numbers.length;
 16 |   if (aggregation === "min") return Math.min(...numbers);
 17 |   if (aggregation === "max") return Math.max(...numbers);
 18 | 
 19 |   return present.length;
 20 | }
 21 | 
 22 | function groupBy(rows, xKey, yKey, aggregation = "count", limit = 10) {
 23 |   const groups = new Map();
 24 | 
 25 |   for (const row of rows) {
 26 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
 27 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
 28 |     groups.get(label).push(yKey ? row[yKey] : label);
 29 |   }
 30 | 
 31 |   return [...groups.entries()]
 32 |     .map(([label, values]) => ({
 33 |       [xKey]: label,
 34 |       [aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey]: aggregate(values, aggregation),
 35 |     }))
 36 |     .sort((a, b) => Number(Object.values(b).at(-1)) - Number(Object.values(a).at(-1)))
 37 |     .slice(0, limit);
 38 | }
 39 | 
 40 | function histogram(rows, key, bins = 8) {
 41 |   const values = rows
 42 |     .map((row) => safeNumber(row[key]))
 43 |     .filter((value) => value !== null);
 44 | 
 45 |   if (!values.length) return [];
 46 | 
 47 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
 48 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
 49 | 
 50 |   if (min === max) {
 51 |     return [{ range: String(min), count: values.length }];
 52 |   }
 53 | 
 54 |   const step = (max - min) / bins;
 55 | 
 56 |   const buckets = Array.from({ length: bins }, (_, index) => ({
 57 |     start: min + index * step,
 58 |     end: index === bins - 1 ? max : min + (index + 1) * step,
 59 |     count: 0,
 60 |   }));
 61 | 
 62 |   for (const value of values) {
 63 |     const index = Math.min(Math.floor((value - min) / step), bins - 1);
 64 |     buckets[index].count += 1;
 65 |   }
 66 | 
 67 |   return buckets.map((bucket) => ({
 68 |     range: `${Math.round(bucket.start).toLocaleString()}-${Math.round(bucket.end).toLocaleString()}`,
 69 |     count: bucket.count,
 70 |   }));
 71 | }
 72 | 
 73 | function splitCount(rows, key, limit = 10) {
 74 |   const counts = new Map();
 75 | 
 76 |   for (const row of rows) {
 77 |     String(row[key] ?? "")
 78 |       .split(/[,;/|]+/)
 79 |       .map((item) => item.trim())
 80 |       .filter(Boolean)
 81 |       .forEach((item) => counts.set(item, (counts.get(item) || 0) + 1));
 82 |   }
 83 | 
 84 |   return [...counts.entries()]
 85 |     .map(([label, count]) => ({ [key]: label, count }))
 86 |     .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
 87 |     .slice(0, limit);
 88 | }
 89 | 
 90 | function applyFilters(rows, filters = {}) {
 91 |   const entries = Object.entries(filters || {}).filter(
 92 |     ([, value]) => value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== ""
 93 |   );
 94 | 
 95 |   if (!entries.length) return rows;
 96 | 
 97 |   return rows.filter((row) =>
 98 |     entries.every(([column, value]) => {
 99 |       return String(row[column] ?? "").toLowerCase() === String(value).toLowerCase();
100 |     })
101 |   );
102 | }
103 | 
104 | function buildChartFromTemplate(rows, schema, template, filters = {}) {
105 |   const filteredRows = applyFilters(rows, filters);
106 | 
107 |   const xColumn =
108 |     findColumn(schema, template.xAliases || [], template.xRole) ||
109 |     findColumn(schema, [], template.xRole);
110 | 
111 |   const yColumn =
112 |     findColumn(schema, template.yAliases || [], template.yRole) ||
113 |     findColumn(schema, [], template.yRole);
114 | 
115 |   if (template.type === "histogram") {
116 |     const metric = yColumn || findColumn(schema, [], "metric");
117 |     if (!metric) return null;
118 | 
119 |     const data = histogram(filteredRows, metric.name, 8);
120 | 
121 |     if (!data.length) return null;
122 | 
123 |     return {
124 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
125 |       title: template.title,
126 |       type: "histogram",
127 |       xKey: "range",
128 |       yKey: "count",
129 |       aggregation: "count",
130 |       data,
131 |     };
132 |   }
133 | 
134 |   if (template.aggregation === "split_count") {
135 |     if (!xColumn) return null;
136 | 
137 |     const data = splitCount(filteredRows, xColumn.name, 10);
138 | 
139 |     if (!data.length) return null;
140 | 
141 |     return {
142 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
143 |       title: template.title,
144 |       type: "bar",
145 |       xKey: xColumn.name,
146 |       yKey: "count",
147 |       aggregation: "count",
148 |       data,
149 |     };
150 |   }
151 | 
152 |   if (!xColumn) return null;
153 | 
154 |   const aggregation = template.aggregation || "count";
155 |   const yKey = aggregation === "count" ? null : yColumn?.name;
156 | 
157 |   if (aggregation !== "count" && !yKey) return null;
158 | 
159 |   const data = groupBy(
160 |     filteredRows,
161 |     xColumn.name,
162 |     yKey,
163 |     aggregation,
164 |     template.limit || 10
165 |   );
166 | 
167 |   if (!data.length) return null;
168 | 
169 |   return {
170 |     id: crypto.randomUUID(),
171 |     title: template.title,
172 |     type: template.type || "bar",
173 |     xKey: xColumn.name,
174 |     yKey: aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey,
175 |     aggregation,
176 |     data,
177 |   };
178 | }
179 | 
180 | export function buildAutoCharts({ dataset, schema, playbook, memoryMatch }) {
181 |   const rows = dataset.rows || [];
182 | 
183 |   const baseCharts = (playbook.charts || [])
184 |     .map((template) => buildChartFromTemplate(rows, schema, template))
185 |     .filter(Boolean);
186 | 
187 |   const learnedCharts = (memoryMatch?.chartTemplates || [])
188 |     .map((template) =>
189 |       buildChartFromTemplate(rows, schema, {
190 |         title: template.title,
191 |         type: template.type,
192 |         xAliases: [template.xKey],
193 |         yAliases: [template.yKey],
194 |         aggregation: template.aggregation,
195 |       })
196 |     )
197 |     .filter(Boolean);
198 | 
199 |   const merged = [...learnedCharts, ...baseCharts];
200 | 
201 |   const seen = new Set();
202 | 
203 |   return merged
204 |     .filter((chart) => {
205 |       const key = `${chart.title}-${chart.xKey}-${chart.yKey}`;
206 |       if (seen.has(key)) return false;
207 |       seen.add(key);
208 |       return true;
209 |     })
210 |     .slice(0, 10);
211 | }
212 | 
213 | export function buildChartFromCommand({
214 |   dataset,
215 |   schema,
216 |   chartSpec,
217 |   filters = {},
218 | }) {
219 |   if (!chartSpec) return null;
220 | 
221 |   return buildChartFromTemplate(
222 |     dataset.rows || [],
223 |     schema,
224 |     {
225 |       title: chartSpec.title || "Generated Chart",
226 |       type: chartSpec.type || "bar",
227 |       xAliases: chartSpec.xKey ? [chartSpec.xKey] : chartSpec.dimension ? [chartSpec.dimension] : [],
228 |       yAliases: chartSpec.yKey ? [chartSpec.yKey] : chartSpec.metric ? [chartSpec.metric] : [],
229 |       xRole: chartSpec.xRole,
230 |       yRole: chartSpec.yRole,
231 |       aggregation: chartSpec.aggregation || "count",
232 |       limit: chartSpec.limit || 10,
233 |     },
234 |     filters
235 |   );
236 | }
237 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/command-router.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/command-router.js`

```js
  1 | import { findColumn } from "./schema-profiler.js";
  2 | 
  3 | function deterministicCommand(schema, command) {
  4 |   const text = String(command || "").toLowerCase();
  5 | 
  6 |   if (/clear filters|reset filters|remove filter/.test(text)) {
  7 |     return {
  8 |       action: "CLEAR_FILTERS",
  9 |       message: "All filters cleared.",
 10 |     };
 11 |   }
 12 | 
 13 |   if (/remove|delete/.test(text) && /chart|graph|visual/.test(text)) {
 14 |     return {
 15 |       action: "DELETE_CHART",
 16 |       message: "Removed chart.",
 17 |     };
 18 |   }
 19 | 
 20 |   const filterMatch = String(command).match(
 21 |     /(?:filter|where|show only)\s+([\w\s_-]+)\s*(?:=|is|:)\s*["']?([^"']+)["']?/i
 22 |   );
 23 | 
 24 |   if (filterMatch) {
 25 |     const column = findColumn(schema, [filterMatch[1]], "dimension");
 26 | 
 27 |     if (column) {
 28 |       return {
 29 |         action: "FILTER",
 30 |         filters: {
 31 |           [column.name]: filterMatch[2].trim(),
 32 |         },
 33 |         message: `Applied filter ${column.name} = ${filterMatch[2].trim()}`,
 34 |       };
 35 |     }
 36 |   }
 37 | 
 38 |   if (/kpi|summary|card/.test(text)) {
 39 |     return {
 40 |       action: "ADD_KPI",
 41 |       message: "Added KPI summary.",
 42 |     };
 43 |   }
 44 | 
 45 |   return null;
 46 | }
 47 | 
 48 | async function callLlmForPlan(schema, command) {
 49 |   const baseUrl = process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
 50 |   const model = process.env.OLLAMA_MODEL || "llama3.2:latest";
 51 | 
 52 |   const prompt = `
 53 | You are an AI data analyst planner.
 54 | You do not calculate KPI values.
 55 | You do not create chart data.
 56 | You only return JSON dashboard actions.
 57 | 
 58 | Allowed actions:
 59 | GENERATE_CHART, MODIFY_CHART, DELETE_CHART, FILTER, CLEAR_FILTERS, ADD_KPI, ANSWER
 60 | 
 61 | Allowed chart types:
 62 | bar, line, pie, area, histogram, scatter
 63 | 
 64 | Allowed aggregations:
 65 | count, sum, avg, min, max, median
 66 | 
 67 | Use only columns from schema.
 68 | 
 69 | Return JSON only:
 70 | {
 71 |   "action": "GENERATE_CHART",
 72 |   "message": "short message",
 73 |   "chartSpec": {
 74 |     "title": "",
 75 |     "type": "bar",
 76 |     "dimension": "",
 77 |     "metric": "",
 78 |     "aggregation": "avg",
 79 |     "limit": 10
 80 |   },
 81 |   "filters": {}
 82 | }
 83 | 
 84 | User command:
 85 | ${command}
 86 | 
 87 | Schema:
 88 | ${JSON.stringify(schema.safePacket)}
 89 | `;
 90 | 
 91 |   const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/chat`, {
 92 |     method: "POST",
 93 |     headers: {
 94 |       "Content-Type": "application/json",
 95 |     },
 96 |     body: JSON.stringify({
 97 |       model,
 98 |       stream: false,
 99 |       format: "json",
100 |       messages: [
101 |         {
102 |           role: "user",
103 |           content: prompt,
104 |         },
105 |       ],
106 |       options: {
107 |         temperature: 0,
108 |       },
109 |     }),
110 |   });
111 | 
112 |   if (!response.ok) {
113 |     throw new Error(`Ollama failed with ${response.status}`);
114 |   }
115 | 
116 |   const data = await response.json();
117 |   const content = data.message?.content || "{}";
118 | 
119 |   return JSON.parse(content);
120 | }
121 | 
122 | export async function routeAnalystCommand({ schema, command }) {
123 |   const deterministic = deterministicCommand(schema, command);
124 | 
125 |   if (deterministic) return deterministic;
126 | 
127 |   try {
128 |     const plan = await callLlmForPlan(schema, command);
129 | 
130 |     return {
131 |       action: String(plan.action || "ANSWER").toUpperCase(),
132 |       message: plan.message || "Done.",
133 |       chartSpec: plan.chartSpec || plan.chart || null,
134 |       filters: plan.filters || {},
135 |     };
136 |   } catch {
137 |     return {
138 |       action: "GENERATE_CHART",
139 |       message: "Created a chart using local fallback rules.",
140 |       chartSpec: {
141 |         title: "Auto Generated Chart",
142 |         type: command.toLowerCase().includes("pie") ? "pie" : "bar",
143 |         xRole: "dimension",
144 |         yRole: "metric",
145 |         aggregation: command.toLowerCase().includes("average") ? "avg" : "sum",
146 |         limit: 10,
147 |       },
148 |     };
149 |   }
150 | }
151 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/dashboard-plan-engine.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/dashboard-plan-engine.js`

```js
  1 | import { humanize, normalizeColumnName } from "./schema-fingerprint.js";
  2 | 
  3 | const CHART_TYPES = new Set(["bar", "line", "area", "pie", "donut", "histogram", "scatter", "radar", "composed", "heatmap"]);
  4 | const AGGREGATIONS = new Set([
  5 |   "count",
  6 |   "sum",
  7 |   "avg",
  8 |   "min",
  9 |   "max",
 10 |   "median",
 11 |   "count_unique",
 12 | ]);
 13 | 
 14 | function byPriority(profile, roles, nameHints = []) {
 15 |   const columns = profile.columns || [];
 16 |   return columns.find((column) =>
 17 |     roles.includes(column.role) && nameHints.some((hint) => column.normalizedName.includes(hint))
 18 |   ) || columns.find((column) => roles.includes(column.role));
 19 | }
 20 | 
 21 | export function pickPrimaryMetric(profile) {
 22 |   return byPriority(
 23 |     profile,
 24 |     ["money_metric", "score_metric", "rate_metric", "count_metric", "continuous_metric"],
 25 |     ["salary", "revenue", "sales", "amount", "profit", "score", "stress", "anxiety", "depression", "performance"]
 26 |   );
 27 | }
 28 | 
 29 | export function pickSecondaryMetric(profile) {
 30 |   const primary = pickPrimaryMetric(profile);
 31 |   return (profile.columns || []).find((column) =>
 32 |     column.name !== primary?.name && ["continuous_metric", "score_metric", "count_metric", "rate_metric", "money_metric"].includes(column.role)
 33 |   );
 34 | }
 35 | 
 36 | export function pickPrimaryCategory(profile) {
 37 |   return byPriority(
 38 |     profile,
 39 |     ["location", "category", "target", "numeric_category"],
 40 |     ["country", "region", "education", "product", "department", "gender", "platform", "company_size", "status"]
 41 |   );
 42 | }
 43 | 
 44 | export function pickSecondaryCategory(profile) {
 45 |   const primary = pickPrimaryCategory(profile);
 46 |   return (profile.columns || []).find((column) =>
 47 |     column.name !== primary?.name && ["category", "location", "target", "numeric_category"].includes(column.role)
 48 |   );
 49 | }
 50 | 
 51 | export function pickDateColumn(profile) {
 52 |   return (profile.columns || []).find((column) => column.role === "date" || column.type === "date");
 53 | }
 54 | 
 55 | function kpi(id, title, metric, aggregation, options = {}) {
 56 |   return {
 57 |     id,
 58 |     title,
 59 |     metric,
 60 |     aggregation,
 61 |     format: options.format || (aggregation === "count" ? "number" : undefined),
 62 |     description: options.description || "",
 63 |   };
 64 | }
 65 | 
 66 | function chart(id, type, title, xKey, yKey, aggregation = "count", options = {}) {
 67 |   return sanitizeChartSpec({ id, type, title, xKey, yKey, aggregation, limit: options.limit || 10, ...options });
 68 | }
 69 | 
 70 | export function sanitizeChartSpec(spec = {}, profile) {
 71 |   const safe = {
 72 |     id: spec.id || `chart-${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`,
 73 |     type: CHART_TYPES.has(spec.type) ? spec.type : "bar",
 74 |     title: spec.title || "Generated Chart",
 75 |     xKey: spec.xKey || spec.category || spec.dimension || "",
 76 |     yKey: spec.yKey || spec.metric || "count",
 77 |     aggregation: AGGREGATIONS.has(spec.aggregation) ? spec.aggregation : "count",
 78 |     limit: Number.isFinite(Number(spec.limit)) ? Math.max(1, Math.min(50, Number(spec.limit))) : 10,
 79 |     reason: spec.reason || "",
 80 |   };
 81 | 
 82 |   if (profile?.columns?.length) {
 83 |     const names = new Set(profile.columns.map((column) => column.name));
 84 |     const normalizedMap = new Map(profile.columns.map((column) => [column.normalizedName, column.name]));
 85 |     safe.xKey = names.has(safe.xKey) ? safe.xKey : normalizedMap.get(normalizeColumnName(safe.xKey)) || safe.xKey;
 86 |     safe.yKey = safe.yKey === "count" || names.has(safe.yKey) ? safe.yKey : normalizedMap.get(normalizeColumnName(safe.yKey)) || safe.yKey;
 87 |   }
 88 | 
 89 |   if (["pie", "donut"].includes(safe.type)) {
 90 |     safe.aggregation = "count";
 91 |     safe.yKey = "count";
 92 |   }
 93 | 
 94 |   if (safe.type === "histogram") {
 95 |     safe.aggregation = "count";
 96 |   }
 97 | 
 98 |   if (spec.splitValues === true) {
 99 |     safe.splitValues = true;
100 |   }
101 | 
102 |   if (Number.isFinite(Number(spec.bins))) {
103 |     safe.bins = Math.max(2, Math.min(50, Number(spec.bins)));
104 |   }
105 | 
106 |   return safe;
107 | }
108 | 
109 | export function sanitizeKpiSpec(spec = {}, profile) {
110 |   const title = spec.title || humanize(`${spec.aggregation || "count"} ${spec.metric || "records"}`);
111 |   return {
112 |     id: spec.id || `kpi-${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`,
113 |     title,
114 |     metric: spec.metric || "__row_count__",
115 |     aggregation: AGGREGATIONS.has(spec.aggregation) ? spec.aggregation : "count",
116 |     format: spec.format || undefined,
117 |     description: spec.description || "",
118 |   };
119 | }
120 | 
121 | export function buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile) {
122 |   const metric = pickPrimaryMetric(profile);
123 |   const metric2 = pickSecondaryMetric(profile);
124 |   const category = pickPrimaryCategory(profile);
125 |   const category2 = pickSecondaryCategory(profile);
126 |   const date = pickDateColumn(profile);
127 | 
128 |   const kpis = [
129 |     kpi("total-records", "Total Records", "__row_count__", "count", { format: "number" }),
130 |   ];
131 | 
132 |   if (metric) {
133 |     const isMoney = metric.role === "money_metric";
134 |     kpis.push(kpi(`avg-${metric.normalizedName}`, `Average ${metric.title}`, metric.name, "avg", { format: isMoney ? "currency" : "number" }));
135 |     kpis.push(kpi(`median-${metric.normalizedName}`, `Median ${metric.title}`, metric.name, "median", { format: isMoney ? "currency" : "number" }));
136 |     kpis.push(kpi(`max-${metric.normalizedName}`, `Highest ${metric.title}`, metric.name, "max", { format: isMoney ? "currency" : "number" }));
137 |   }
138 | 
139 |   if (category) {
140 |     kpis.push(kpi(`unique-${category.normalizedName}`, `${category.title} Count`, category.name, "count_unique", { format: "number" }));
141 |   }
142 | 
143 |   const charts = [];
144 | 
145 |   if (metric && category) {
146 |     charts.push(chart(`avg-${metric.normalizedName}-by-${category.normalizedName}`, "bar", `Average ${metric.title} by ${category.title}`, category.name, metric.name, "avg"));
147 |   }
148 | 
149 |   if (metric) {
150 |     charts.push(chart(`${metric.normalizedName}-distribution`, "histogram", `${metric.title} Distribution`, metric.name, metric.name, "count", { bins: 12 }));
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   if (category) {
154 |     charts.push(chart(`${category.normalizedName}-distribution`, "donut", `${category.title} Distribution`, category.name, "count", "count"));
155 |   }
156 | 
157 |   if (metric && metric2) {
158 |     charts.push(chart(`${metric.normalizedName}-vs-${metric2.normalizedName}`, "scatter", `${metric.title} vs ${metric2.title}`, metric2.name, metric.name, "count", { limit: 500 }));
159 |   }
160 | 
161 |   if (date && metric) {
162 |     charts.push(chart(`${metric.normalizedName}-trend`, "line", `${metric.title} Trend`, date.name, metric.name, "avg", { limit: 24 }));
163 |   }
164 | 
165 |   if (metric && category2) {
166 |     charts.push(chart(`avg-${metric.normalizedName}-by-${category2.normalizedName}`, "bar", `Average ${metric.title} by ${category2.title}`, category2.name, metric.name, "avg"));
167 |   }
168 | 
169 |   return {
170 |     source: "rules",
171 |     domain: profile.domain,
172 |     kpis: dedupeBy(kpis.map((item) => sanitizeKpiSpec(item, profile)), "title").slice(0, 8),
173 |     charts: dedupeBy(charts.map((item) => sanitizeChartSpec(item, profile)), "title").slice(0, 8),
174 |   };
175 | }
176 | 
177 | function dedupeBy(items, key) {
178 |   const seen = new Set();
179 |   return items.filter((item) => {
180 |     const value = item[key];
181 |     if (seen.has(value)) return false;
182 |     seen.add(value);
183 |     return true;
184 |   });
185 | }
186 | 
187 | function resolveColumn(profile, template = {}, propName, roleName) {
188 |   const raw = template[propName];
189 |   if (raw) {
190 |     const exact = profile.columns.find((column) => column.name === raw || column.normalizedName === normalizeColumnName(raw));
191 |     if (exact) return exact.name;
192 |   }
193 | 
194 |   const role = template[roleName];
195 |   if (role) {
196 |     const byRole = profile.columns.find((column) => column.role === role);
197 |     if (byRole) return byRole.name;
198 |   }
199 | 
200 |   return raw || "";
201 | }
202 | 
203 | export function applyTrainedTemplates(profile, memoryMatch) {
204 |   if (!memoryMatch?.entry?.dashboardPlan) return null;
205 | 
206 |   const plan = memoryMatch.entry.dashboardPlan;
207 |   const kpis = (plan.kpis || []).map((template) => sanitizeKpiSpec({
208 |     ...template,
209 |     metric: template.metric === "__row_count__" ? "__row_count__" : resolveColumn(profile, template, "metric", "metricRole"),
210 |   }, profile));
211 | 
212 |   const charts = (plan.charts || []).map((template) => sanitizeChartSpec({
213 |     ...template,
214 |     xKey: resolveColumn(profile, template, "xKey", "xRole"),
215 |     yKey: template.yKey === "count" ? "count" : resolveColumn(profile, template, "yKey", "yRole"),
216 |   }, profile));
217 | 
218 |   return {
219 |     source: "trained-memory",
220 |     matchedDataset: memoryMatch.entry.name,
221 |     matchScore: memoryMatch.score,
222 |     domain: profile.domain,
223 |     kpis: dedupeBy(kpis, "title").slice(0, 8),
224 |     charts: dedupeBy(charts, "title").slice(0, 8),
225 |   };
226 | }
227 | 
228 | export function mergePlans(profile, ...plans) {
229 |   const validPlans = plans.filter(Boolean);
230 |   const kpis = dedupeBy(validPlans.flatMap((plan) => plan.kpis || []), "title").map((item) => sanitizeKpiSpec(item, profile));
231 |   const charts = dedupeBy(validPlans.flatMap((plan) => plan.charts || []), "title").map((item) => sanitizeChartSpec(item, profile));
232 | 
233 |   return {
234 |     source: validPlans.map((plan) => plan.source).join("+"),
235 |     domain: profile.domain,
236 |     kpis: kpis.slice(0, 8),
237 |     charts: charts.slice(0, 10),
238 |   };
239 | }
240 | 
241 | export function templatePlanForStorage(plan = {}, profile) {
242 |   const columnByName = new Map((profile.columns || []).map((column) => [column.name, column]));
243 | 
244 |   return {
245 |     kpis: (plan.kpis || []).map((item) => {
246 |       const column = columnByName.get(item.metric);
247 |       return {
248 |         title: item.title,
249 |         metric: item.metric === "__row_count__" ? "__row_count__" : item.metric,
250 |         metricRole: column?.role,
251 |         aggregation: item.aggregation || "count",
252 |         format: item.format,
253 |       };
254 |     }),
255 |     charts: (plan.charts || []).map((item) => {
256 |       const x = columnByName.get(item.xKey);
257 |       const y = columnByName.get(item.yKey);
258 |       return {
259 |         title: item.title,
260 |         type: item.type,
261 |         xKey: item.xKey,
262 |         xRole: x?.role,
263 |         yKey: item.yKey || "count",
264 |         yRole: y?.role,
265 |         aggregation: item.aggregation || "count",
266 |         limit: item.limit || 10,
267 |       };
268 |     }),
269 |   };
270 | }
271 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/dashboard-quality-guardian.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/dashboard-quality-guardian.js`

```js
  1 | import {
  2 |   buildRuleDashboardPlan,
  3 |   sanitizeChartSpec,
  4 |   sanitizeKpiSpec,
  5 | } from "./dashboard-plan-engine.js";
  6 | 
  7 | const METRIC_ROLES = new Set([
  8 |   "money_metric",
  9 |   "score_metric",
 10 |   "rate_metric",
 11 |   "count_metric",
 12 |   "continuous_metric",
 13 |   "metric",
 14 | ]);
 15 | 
 16 | const CATEGORY_ROLES = new Set([
 17 |   "location",
 18 |   "category",
 19 |   "target",
 20 |   "numeric_category",
 21 |   "dimension",
 22 |   "date",
 23 | ]);
 24 | 
 25 | const CHART_TYPES = new Set([
 26 |   "bar",
 27 |   "line",
 28 |   "area",
 29 |   "pie",
 30 |   "donut",
 31 |   "histogram",
 32 |   "scatter",
 33 |   "radar",
 34 |   "composed",
 35 |   "heatmap",
 36 | ]);
 37 | 
 38 | const AGGREGATIONS = new Set([
 39 |   "count",
 40 |   "sum",
 41 |   "avg",
 42 |   "min",
 43 |   "max",
 44 |   "median",
 45 |   "count_unique",
 46 | ]);
 47 | 
 48 | function normalize(value = "") {
 49 |   return String(value)
 50 |     .trim()
 51 |     .toLowerCase()
 52 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_")
 53 |     .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
 54 | }
 55 | 
 56 | function getColumns(profile) {
 57 |   return Array.isArray(profile?.columns) ? profile.columns : [];
 58 | }
 59 | 
 60 | function getColumn(profile, name) {
 61 |   const wanted = normalize(name);
 62 |   return getColumns(profile).find((column) => {
 63 |     const ownName = normalize(column.name);
 64 |     const normalizedName = normalize(column.normalizedName || column.name);
 65 |     return ownName === wanted || normalizedName === wanted;
 66 |   });
 67 | }
 68 | 
 69 | function findColumn(profile, aliases = [], roles = []) {
 70 |   const normalizedAliases = aliases.map(normalize).filter(Boolean);
 71 | 
 72 |   const scored = getColumns(profile)
 73 |     .map((column) => {
 74 |       const name = normalize(column.name);
 75 |       const normalizedName = normalize(column.normalizedName || column.name);
 76 |       let score = 0;
 77 | 
 78 |       for (const alias of normalizedAliases) {
 79 |         if (name === alias || normalizedName === alias) score += 30;
 80 |         else if (name.includes(alias) || normalizedName.includes(alias)) score += 14;
 81 |         else if (alias.includes(name) || alias.includes(normalizedName)) score += 6;
 82 |       }
 83 | 
 84 |       if (roles.includes(column.role)) score += 10;
 85 |       if (roles.includes("metric") && METRIC_ROLES.has(column.role)) score += 5;
 86 |       if (roles.includes("category") && CATEGORY_ROLES.has(column.role)) score += 5;
 87 | 
 88 |       return { column, score };
 89 |     })
 90 |     .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
 91 |     .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score);
 92 | 
 93 |   return scored[0]?.column || null;
 94 | }
 95 | 
 96 | function isMetricColumn(column) {
 97 |   return Boolean(column && (METRIC_ROLES.has(column.role) || column.type === "number"));
 98 | }
 99 | 
100 | function isCategoryColumn(column) {
101 |   return Boolean(
102 |     column &&
103 |       (CATEGORY_ROLES.has(column.role) ||
104 |         ["string", "category", "boolean", "date"].includes(column.type))
105 |   );
106 | }
107 | 
108 | function isDateColumn(column) {
109 |   return Boolean(column && (column.role === "date" || column.type === "date"));
110 | }
111 | 
112 | function looksMultiValueColumn(column) {
113 |   const name = normalize(column?.name || column?.normalizedName || "");
114 |   return /(language|languages|framework|frameworks|skill|skills|tag|tags|categor|tools|technolog)/.test(name);
115 | }
116 | 
117 | function uniqBy(items, keyFn) {
118 |   const seen = new Set();
119 |   const output = [];
120 | 
121 |   for (const item of items || []) {
122 |     const key = keyFn(item);
123 |     if (!key || seen.has(key)) continue;
124 |     seen.add(key);
125 |     output.push(item);
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   return output;
129 | }
130 | 
131 | function stripUnsafeChartData(chart) {
132 |   if (!chart || typeof chart !== "object") return chart;
133 |   const { data, value, values, rows, rawRows, sampleRows, calculatedValues, ...safe } = chart;
134 |   return safe;
135 | }
136 | 
137 | function stripUnsafeKpiData(kpi) {
138 |   if (!kpi || typeof kpi !== "object") return kpi;
139 |   const { value, values, data, rows, rawRows, sampleRows, calculatedValues, ...safe } = kpi;
140 |   return safe;
141 | }
142 | 
143 | function normalizeKpiSpec(profile, spec) {
144 |   const safe = sanitizeKpiSpec(stripUnsafeKpiData(spec), profile);
145 |   if (!AGGREGATIONS.has(safe.aggregation)) safe.aggregation = "count";
146 |   return safe;
147 | }
148 | 
149 | function normalizeChartSpec(profile, spec) {
150 |   const input = stripUnsafeChartData(spec || {});
151 |   const safe = sanitizeChartSpec(input, profile);
152 | 
153 |   safe.type = CHART_TYPES.has(safe.type) ? safe.type : "bar";
154 |   safe.aggregation = AGGREGATIONS.has(safe.aggregation) ? safe.aggregation : "count";
155 |   safe.limit = Math.max(
156 |     1,
157 |     Math.min(Number(safe.limit || input.limit || 10), safe.type === "scatter" ? 1000 : 50)
158 |   );
159 | 
160 |   const x = getColumn(profile, safe.xKey);
161 |   if (input.splitValues === true || looksMultiValueColumn(x)) safe.splitValues = true;
162 | 
163 |   if (["pie", "donut"].includes(safe.type)) {
164 |     safe.yKey = "count";
165 |     safe.aggregation = "count";
166 |   }
167 | 
168 |   if (safe.type === "histogram") {
169 |     safe.yKey = safe.xKey;
170 |     safe.aggregation = "count";
171 |   }
172 | 
173 |   if (safe.type === "scatter") {
174 |     safe.aggregation = "count";
175 |     safe.limit = Math.max(safe.limit, 500);
176 |   }
177 | 
178 |   delete safe.data;
179 |   delete safe.rows;
180 |   delete safe.rawRows;
181 |   delete safe.sampleRows;
182 | 
183 |   return safe;
184 | }
185 | 
186 | export function validateChartCombination(profile, chartSpec = {}) {
187 |   const chart = normalizeChartSpec(profile, chartSpec);
188 |   const x = getColumn(profile, chart.xKey);
189 |   const y = chart.yKey === "count" ? null : getColumn(profile, chart.yKey);
190 | 
191 |   if (!CHART_TYPES.has(chart.type)) {
192 |     return { ok: false, reason: `Unsupported chart type: ${chart.type}` };
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   if (chart.type === "histogram") {
196 |     if (!x || !isMetricColumn(x)) return { ok: false, reason: "Histogram needs one numeric metric column." };
197 |     return { ok: true, chart };
198 |   }
199 | 
200 |   if (chart.type === "scatter") {
201 |     if (!x || !y || !isMetricColumn(x) || !isMetricColumn(y)) {
202 |       return { ok: false, reason: "Scatter chart needs two numeric metric columns." };
203 |     }
204 |     return { ok: true, chart };
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   if (["pie", "donut"].includes(chart.type)) {
208 |     if (!x || !isCategoryColumn(x)) return { ok: false, reason: "Pie/donut chart needs a category column." };
209 |     return { ok: true, chart };
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   if (["line", "area"].includes(chart.type)) {
213 |     if (!x) return { ok: false, reason: "Line/area chart needs an X column." };
214 |     if (!isDateColumn(x) && !isCategoryColumn(x)) {
215 |       return { ok: false, reason: "Line/area chart needs date or ordered category on X." };
216 |     }
217 |     if (chart.yKey !== "count" && (!y || !isMetricColumn(y))) {
218 |       return { ok: false, reason: "Line/area chart needs numeric Y metric." };
219 |     }
220 |     return { ok: true, chart };
221 |   }
222 | 
223 |   if (["bar", "radar", "composed", "heatmap"].includes(chart.type)) {
224 |     if (!x) return { ok: false, reason: `Column ${chart.xKey} does not exist.` };
225 |     if (chart.yKey !== "count" && (!y || !isMetricColumn(y))) {
226 |       return { ok: false, reason: "This chart needs numeric metric on Y." };
227 |     }
228 |     return { ok: true, chart };
229 |   }
230 | 
231 |   return { ok: true, chart };
232 | }
233 | 
234 | function isWorkforceSalarySchema(profile) {
235 |   const names = new Set(getColumns(profile).map((column) => normalize(column.name)));
236 |   const hasSalary = [...names].some((name) => /salary|compensation|income|pay/.test(name));
237 |   const hasWorkforceHints = ["experience", "country", "education", "languages", "frameworks", "company_size"]
238 |     .some((hint) => names.has(hint));
239 |   return hasSalary && hasWorkforceHints;
240 | }
241 | 
242 | function workforceSalaryPlan(profile) {
243 |   const salary = findColumn(profile, ["salary_usd", "salary", "annual_salary", "compensation", "income"], ["money_metric", "metric"]);
244 |   const experience = findColumn(profile, ["experience", "years_experience", "years_coding", "exp"], ["continuous_metric", "metric"]);
245 |   const country = findColumn(profile, ["country", "location", "region"], ["location", "category"]);
246 |   const education = findColumn(profile, ["education", "degree", "qualification"], ["category"]);
247 |   const companySize = findColumn(profile, ["company_size", "companysize", "organization_size", "org_size"], ["category"]);
248 |   const languages = findColumn(profile, ["languages", "language", "programming_languages", "skills"], ["category"]);
249 |   const frameworks = findColumn(profile, ["frameworks", "framework", "tools", "libraries"], ["category"]);
250 | 
251 |   if (!salary) return null;
252 | 
253 |   const kpis = [
254 |     { title: "Total Records", metric: "__row_count__", aggregation: "count", format: "number" },
255 |     { title: "Average Salary", metric: salary.name, metricRole: salary.role, aggregation: "avg", format: "currency" },
256 |     { title: "Median Salary", metric: salary.name, metricRole: salary.role, aggregation: "median", format: "currency" },
257 |     { title: "Highest Salary", metric: salary.name, metricRole: salary.role, aggregation: "max", format: "currency" },
258 |   ];
259 | 
260 |   if (country) {
261 |     kpis.push({ title: "Countries", metric: country.name, metricRole: country.role, aggregation: "count_unique", format: "number" });
262 |   }
263 | 
264 |   const charts = [];
265 |   if (country) charts.push({ title: "Average Salary by Country", type: "bar", xKey: country.name, yKey: salary.name, aggregation: "avg", limit: 10 });
266 |   charts.push({ title: "Salary Distribution", type: "histogram", xKey: salary.name, yKey: salary.name, aggregation: "count", limit: 12 });
267 |   if (experience) charts.push({ title: "Salary vs Experience", type: "scatter", xKey: experience.name, yKey: salary.name, aggregation: "count", limit: 500 });
268 |   if (education) charts.push({ title: "Education Distribution", type: "donut", xKey: education.name, yKey: "count", aggregation: "count", limit: 10 });
269 |   if (companySize) charts.push({ title: "Average Salary by Company Size", type: "bar", xKey: companySize.name, yKey: salary.name, aggregation: "avg", limit: 10 });
270 |   if (languages) charts.push({ title: "Average Salary by Language", type: "bar", xKey: languages.name, yKey: salary.name, aggregation: "avg", limit: 10, splitValues: true });
271 |   if (frameworks) charts.push({ title: "Average Salary by Framework", type: "bar", xKey: frameworks.name, yKey: salary.name, aggregation: "avg", limit: 10, splitValues: true });
272 | 
273 |   return {
274 |     source: "guardian-workforce-salary",
275 |     domain: profile.domain || "workforce_salary",
276 |     kpis,
277 |     charts,
278 |   };
279 | }
280 | 
281 | function ensureRuleFallback(profile, dashboardPlan) {
282 |   const rulePlan = buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile);
283 |   return {
284 |     source: [dashboardPlan?.source, "guardian-rules"].filter(Boolean).join("+"),
285 |     domain: dashboardPlan?.domain || profile.domain,
286 |     kpis: [...(dashboardPlan?.kpis || []), ...(rulePlan.kpis || [])],
287 |     charts: [...(dashboardPlan?.charts || []), ...(rulePlan.charts || [])],
288 |     filters: [...(dashboardPlan?.filters || []), ...(rulePlan.filters || [])],
289 |   };
290 | }
291 | 
292 | export function enforceDashboardQuality(profile, dashboardPlan = {}, options = {}) {
293 |   const maxCharts = options.maxCharts || 7;
294 |   const maxKpis = options.maxKpis || 8;
295 | 
296 |   let combined = ensureRuleFallback(profile, dashboardPlan);
297 | 
298 |   if (isWorkforceSalarySchema(profile)) {
299 |     const salaryPlan = workforceSalaryPlan(profile);
300 |     if (salaryPlan) {
301 |       combined = {
302 |         source: [salaryPlan.source, combined.source].filter(Boolean).join("+"),
303 |         domain: combined.domain || salaryPlan.domain,
304 |         kpis: [...salaryPlan.kpis, ...(combined.kpis || [])],
305 |         charts: [...salaryPlan.charts, ...(combined.charts || [])],
306 |         filters: combined.filters || [],
307 |       };
308 |     }
309 |   }
310 | 
311 |   const safeKpis = uniqBy(
312 |     (combined.kpis || [])
313 |       .map((item) => normalizeKpiSpec(profile, item))
314 |       .filter((kpi) => kpi.metric === "__row_count__" || kpi.metric === "__column_count__" || Boolean(getColumn(profile, kpi.metric))),
315 |     (kpi) => normalize(`${kpi.title}-${kpi.metric}-${kpi.aggregation}`)
316 |   ).slice(0, maxKpis);
317 | 
318 |   const safeCharts = uniqBy(
319 |     (combined.charts || [])
320 |       .map((item) => normalizeChartSpec(profile, item))
321 |       .map((chart) => validateChartCombination(profile, chart))
322 |       .filter((result) => result.ok)
323 |       .map((result) => result.chart),
324 |     (chart) => normalize(`${chart.title}-${chart.type}-${chart.xKey}-${chart.yKey}-${chart.aggregation}`)
325 |   ).slice(0, maxCharts);
326 | 
327 |   return {
328 |     source: combined.source || "dashboard-quality-guardian",
329 |     domain: combined.domain || profile.domain,
330 |     schemaOnly: true,
331 |     kpis: safeKpis,
332 |     charts: safeCharts,
333 |     filters: Array.isArray(combined.filters) ? combined.filters.slice(0, 8) : [],
334 |     guardian: {
335 |       enforced: true,
336 |       chartCount: safeCharts.length,
337 |       kpiCount: safeKpis.length,
338 |       maxCharts,
339 |       maxKpis,
340 |       unsafeAiDataRemoved: true,
341 |       schemaOnly: true,
342 |       warnings: [],
343 |       fixes: ["Removed unsafe AI values/data and validated dashboard specs."],
344 |     },
345 |     qualityGuard: {
346 |       applied: true,
347 |       expectedCharts: maxCharts,
348 |       actualCharts: safeCharts.length,
349 |       schemaOnly: true,
350 |       reason: isWorkforceSalarySchema(profile)
351 |         ? "Strict workforce salary dashboard pattern enforced."
352 |         : "Generic dashboard quality rules enforced.",
353 |     },
354 |   };
355 | }
356 | 
357 | export function assessDashboardHealth(profile, dashboardPlan = {}) {
358 |   const issues = [];
359 |   const warnings = [];
360 |   const charts = Array.isArray(dashboardPlan.charts) ? dashboardPlan.charts : [];
361 |   const kpis = Array.isArray(dashboardPlan.kpis) ? dashboardPlan.kpis : [];
362 | 
363 |   if (!kpis.length) issues.push({ type: "missing_kpis", message: "Dashboard has no KPI cards." });
364 |   if (!charts.length) issues.push({ type: "missing_charts", message: "Dashboard has no charts." });
365 |   if (charts.some((chart) => Array.isArray(chart.data))) {
366 |     issues.push({ type: "unsafe_chart_data", message: "Chart data exists in dashboard plan. AI must not provide chart.data." });
367 |   }
368 |   if (kpis.some((kpi) => Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(kpi, "value"))) {
369 |     issues.push({ type: "unsafe_kpi_value", message: "KPI values exist in dashboard plan. Values must be calculated locally." });
370 |   }
371 | 
372 |   for (const chart of charts) {
373 |     const result = validateChartCombination(profile, chart);
374 |     if (!result.ok) issues.push({ type: "invalid_chart", chart: chart.title, message: result.reason });
375 |   }
376 | 
377 |   if (isWorkforceSalarySchema(profile) && charts.length < 7) {
378 |     warnings.push({ type: "incomplete_salary_dashboard", message: "Salary/workforce dataset should have up to 7 useful charts when columns exist." });
379 |   }
380 | 
381 |   const score = Math.max(0, 100 - issues.length * 20 - warnings.length * 8);
382 |   return {
383 |     status: issues.length ? "failed" : warnings.length ? "warning" : "healthy",
384 |     score,
385 |     issues,
386 |     warnings,
387 |   };
388 | }
389 | 
390 | export function getDashboardQualityIssues(profile, dashboardPlan = {}) {
391 |   return assessDashboardHealth(profile, dashboardPlan).issues;
392 | }
393 | 
394 | export function buildGuardianDashboardResponse(profile, dashboardPlan, options = {}) {
395 |   const dashboard = enforceDashboardQuality(profile, dashboardPlan, options);
396 |   return {
397 |     dashboard,
398 |     safePlan: dashboard,
399 |     qualityScore: assessDashboardHealth(profile, dashboard).score,
400 |     dashboardHealth: assessDashboardHealth(profile, dashboard),
401 |     schemaOnly: true,
402 |     warnings: dashboard.guardian?.warnings || [],
403 |     fixes: dashboard.guardian?.fixes || [],
404 |   };
405 | }
406 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/kpi-engine.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/kpi-engine.js`

```js
  1 | import { findColumn, safeNumber } from "./schema-profiler.js";
  2 | 
  3 | function aggregate(values = [], aggregation = "count") {
  4 |   const present = values.filter(
  5 |     (value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== ""
  6 |   );
  7 | 
  8 |   if (aggregation === "count") return present.length;
  9 | 
 10 |   const numbers = present.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
 11 | 
 12 |   if (!numbers.length) return 0;
 13 | 
 14 |   if (aggregation === "sum") return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
 15 |   if (aggregation === "avg") return numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / numbers.length;
 16 |   if (aggregation === "min") return Math.min(...numbers);
 17 |   if (aggregation === "max") return Math.max(...numbers);
 18 | 
 19 |   if (aggregation === "median") {
 20 |     const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 21 |     const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
 22 | 
 23 |     return sorted.length % 2
 24 |       ? sorted[mid]
 25 |       : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2;
 26 |   }
 27 | 
 28 |   return present.length;
 29 | }
 30 | 
 31 | function calculateQualityScore(rows, schema) {
 32 |   const totalCells = Math.max(rows.length * schema.columns.length, 1);
 33 |   const missingCells = schema.columns.reduce(
 34 |     (sum, column) => sum + column.nullCount,
 35 |     0
 36 |   );
 37 | 
 38 |   return ((totalCells - missingCells) / totalCells) * 100;
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | function formatValue(metricName, value) {
 42 |   const name = String(metricName || "").toLowerCase();
 43 | 
 44 |   if (/salary|revenue|sales|amount|price|cost|profit|income/.test(name)) {
 45 |     return `$${Math.round(value).toLocaleString()}`;
 46 |   }
 47 | 
 48 |   if (/rate|percent|margin|quality|attendance/.test(name)) {
 49 |     return `${Number(value).toFixed(1)}%`;
 50 |   }
 51 | 
 52 |   return Number(value.toFixed ? value.toFixed(2) : value).toLocaleString();
 53 | }
 54 | 
 55 | function buildKpiFromTemplate(rows, schema, template) {
 56 |   if (template.aggregation === "count") {
 57 |     return {
 58 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 59 |       title: template.title,
 60 |       value: rows.length.toLocaleString(),
 61 |       metric: "*",
 62 |       aggregation: "count",
 63 |     };
 64 |   }
 65 | 
 66 |   if (template.aggregation === "quality_score") {
 67 |     return {
 68 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 69 |       title: template.title,
 70 |       value: `${calculateQualityScore(rows, schema).toFixed(1)}%`,
 71 |       metric: "*",
 72 |       aggregation: "quality_score",
 73 |     };
 74 |   }
 75 | 
 76 |   const metric =
 77 |     findColumn(schema, template.metricAliases || [], "metric") ||
 78 |     (template.metricRole ? findColumn(schema, [], template.metricRole) : null) ||
 79 |     findColumn(schema, [], "metric");
 80 | 
 81 |   if (!metric) return null;
 82 | 
 83 |   const value = aggregate(
 84 |     rows.map((row) => row[metric.name]),
 85 |     template.aggregation
 86 |   );
 87 | 
 88 |   return {
 89 |     id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 90 |     title: template.title,
 91 |     value: formatValue(metric.name, value),
 92 |     metric: metric.name,
 93 |     aggregation: template.aggregation,
 94 |   };
 95 | }
 96 | 
 97 | export function buildAutoKpis({ dataset, schema, playbook, memoryMatch }) {
 98 |   const rows = dataset.rows || [];
 99 | 
100 |   const baseKpis = (playbook.kpis || [])
101 |     .map((template) => buildKpiFromTemplate(rows, schema, template))
102 |     .filter(Boolean);
103 | 
104 |   const learnedKpis = (memoryMatch?.kpiTemplates || [])
105 |     .map((template) =>
106 |       buildKpiFromTemplate(rows, schema, {
107 |         title: template.title,
108 |         metricAliases: [template.metric],
109 |         aggregation: template.aggregation,
110 |       })
111 |     )
112 |     .filter(Boolean);
113 | 
114 |   const merged = [...learnedKpis, ...baseKpis];
115 | 
116 |   const seen = new Set();
117 | 
118 |   return merged
119 |     .filter((kpi) => {
120 |       if (seen.has(kpi.title)) return false;
121 |       seen.add(kpi.title);
122 |       return true;
123 |     })
124 |     .slice(0, 8);
125 | }
126 | 
```

  8 | function extractJson(text = "") {
  9 |   const trimmed = String(text).trim();
 10 |   if (!trimmed) return null;
 11 | 
 12 |   try {
 13 |     return JSON.parse(trimmed);
 14 |   } catch {}
 15 | 
 16 |   const fenced = trimmed.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/i);
 17 |   if (fenced) {
 18 |     try { return JSON.parse(fenced[1]); } catch {}
 19 |   }
 20 | 
 21 |   const first = trimmed.indexOf("{");
 22 |   const last = trimmed.lastIndexOf("}");
 23 |   if (first >= 0 && last > first) {
 24 |     try { return JSON.parse(trimmed.slice(first, last + 1)); } catch {}
 25 |   }
 26 | 
 27 |   return null;
 28 | }

 30 | async function callOllama({ model, prompt, temperature = 0.1 }) {
 31 |   const controller = new AbortController();
 32 |   const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30000);
 33 | 
 34 |   try {
 35 |     const response = await fetch(`${DEFAULT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/generate`, {
 36 |       method: "POST",
 37 |       headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 38 |       body: JSON.stringify({
 39 |         model,
 40 |         prompt,
 41 |         stream: false,
 42 |         options: {
 43 |           temperature,
 44 |           num_ctx: 8192,
 45 |         },
 46 |       }),
 47 |       signal: controller.signal,
 48 |     });
 49 | 
 50 |     if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Ollama HTTP ${response.status}`);
 51 |     const payload = await response.json();
 52 |     return payload.response || "";
 53 |   } finally {
 54 |     clearTimeout(timer);
 55 |   }
 56 | }
 57 |

103 | function buildDashboardPrompt(schemaProfile, memoryMatch, options = {}) {
104 |   const packet = makeSchemaOnlyPacket(schemaProfile);
105 | 
106 |   const legacyMemory = memoryMatch?.entry
107 |     ? {
108 |         matchedDataset: memoryMatch.entry.name,
109 |         matchScore: memoryMatch.score,
110 |         trainedDashboardPlan: memoryMatch.entry.dashboardPlan,
111 |       }
112 |     : null;
113 | 
114 |   const retrievedRagMemories = safeRagMatchesForPrompt(options.ragMatches);
115 |   const smartUnderstanding = options.schemaUnderstanding || null;
116 | 
117 |   return `You are InsightFlow's senior data analyst and schema-only dashboard planner.
118 | 
119 | YOUR JOB:
120 | Understand the dataset schema and create the best dashboard plan.
121 | 
122 | VERY IMPORTANT:
123 | You do NOT see raw data rows.
124 | You only see schema metadata, profile stats, role detection, and RAG memory.
125 | You must return dashboard specifications only.
126 | The local analytics engine will calculate real values later.
127 | 
128 | NEVER RETURN:
129 | - raw rows
130 | - chart.data
131 | - KPI values
132 | - fake numbers
133 | - sample records
134 | - SQL over private rows
135 | 
136 | ALLOWED OUTPUT:
137 | - action
138 | - message
139 | - kpis
140 | - charts
141 | - schemaOnly
142 | 
143 | ALLOWED CHART TYPES:
144 | bar, line, area, pie, donut, histogram, scatter, radar, composed, heatmap
145 | 
146 | ALLOWED AGGREGATIONS:
147 | count, sum, avg, min, max, median, count_unique
148 | 
149 | DASHBOARD QUALITY RULES:
150 | 1. Always include Total Records KPI.
151 | 2. Prefer 3 to 6 useful KPIs.
152 | 3. Prefer 4 to 7 useful charts.
153 | 4. Use bar chart for metric by category.
154 | 5. Use histogram for numeric distribution.
155 | 6. Use scatter for metric vs metric.
156 | 7. Use line chart for metric by date.
157 | 8. Use donut/pie only for category distribution.
158 | 9. Use count_unique for unique category count.
159 | 10. For language/framework/skill/tag columns, add splitValues: true.
160 | 11. Use only existing column names from the current schema.
161 | 
162 | CURRENT SCHEMA PACKET:
163 | ${JSON.stringify(packet, null, 2)}
164 | 
165 | SMART SCHEMA UNDERSTANDING:
166 | ${JSON.stringify(smartUnderstanding, null, 2)}
167 | 
168 | LEGACY TRAINED MEMORY:
169 | ${JSON.stringify(legacyMemory, null, 2)}
170 | 
171 | RETRIEVED RAG MEMORIES:
172 | ${JSON.stringify(retrievedRagMemories, null, 2)}
173 | 
174 | RETURN STRICT JSON ONLY:
175 | {
176 |   "action": "GENERATE_DASHBOARD",
177 |   "message": "short explanation for the user",
178 |   "kpis": [
179 |     {
180 |       "title": "Total Records",
181 |       "metric": "__row_count__",
182 |       "aggregation": "count",
183 |       "format": "number"
184 |     }
185 |   ],
186 |   "charts": [
187 |     {
188 |       "type": "bar",
189 |       "title": "Average Salary by Country",
190 |       "xKey": "country",
191 |       "yKey": "salary_usd",
192 |       "aggregation": "avg",
193 |       "limit": 10
194 |     }
195 |   ],
196 |   "schemaOnly": true
197 | }`;
198 | }
199 | 
200 | function buildCommandPrompt(query, schemaProfile, memoryMatch, currentDashboard, options = {}) {
201 |   const packet = makeSchemaOnlyPacket(schemaProfile);
202 |   const retrievedRagMemories = safeRagMatchesForPrompt(options.ragMatches);
203 | 
204 |   return `You are InsightFlow's schema-only dashboard command router.
205 | 
206 | Rules:
207 | - Return strict JSON only.
208 | - Never include raw data rows.
209 | - Never include chart.data.
210 | - Never include KPI values.
211 | - Use only schema column names.
212 | - RAG memories are examples only, not real values.
213 | - If user asks a normal question, return action ANSWER with a short answer.
214 | - If user asks chart/KPI/filter change, return action and spec.
215 | 
216 | Allowed actions:
217 | GENERATE_CHART, MODIFY_CHART, DELETE_CHART, GENERATE_KPI, FILTER, CLEAR_FILTERS, GENERATE_DASHBOARD, FIX_DASHBOARD, ANSWER
218 | 
219 | Current schema:
220 | ${JSON.stringify(packet, null, 2)}
221 | 
222 | Legacy trained memory:
223 | ${JSON.stringify(memoryMatch?.entry?.dashboardPlan || null, null, 2)}
224 | 
225 | Retrieved RAG memories:
226 | ${JSON.stringify(retrievedRagMemories, null, 2)}
227 | 
228 | Current dashboard specs:
229 | ${JSON.stringify(currentDashboard || {}, null, 2)}
230 | 
231 | User command:
232 | ${query}
233 | 
234 | Return example:
235 | {"action":"GENERATE_CHART","message":"Created chart.","chartSpec":{"type":"scatter","title":"Salary vs Experience","xKey":"experience","yKey":"salary_usd","aggregation":"count","limit":500},"schemaOnly":true}`;
236 | }
237 | 
238 | export async function planDashboardWithOllama(schemaProfile, memoryMatch, options = {}) {
239 |   try {
240 |     const text = await callOllama({
241 |       model: DASHBOARD_MODEL,
242 |       prompt: buildDashboardPrompt(schemaProfile, memoryMatch, options),
243 |       temperature: 0.1,
244 |     });
245 |     const json = extractJson(text);
246 |     if (!json) return null;
247 | 
248 |     return {
249 |       source: `ollama:${DASHBOARD_MODEL}`,
250 |       message: json.message || "Dashboard plan generated.",
251 |       kpis: (json.kpis || []).map((item) => sanitizeKpiSpec(stripUnsafeSpec(item), schemaProfile)).slice(0, 8),
252 |       charts: (json.charts || json.chartSpecs || []).map((item) => sanitizeChartSpec(stripUnsafeSpec(item), schemaProfile)).slice(0, 10),
253 |       schemaOnly: true,
254 |       model: DASHBOARD_MODEL,
255 |     };
256 |   } catch (error) {
257 |     return {
258 |       source: "ollama-error",
259 |       error: error.message,
260 |       kpis: [],
261 |       charts: [],
262 |       schemaOnly: true,
263 |       model: DASHBOARD_MODEL,
264 |     };
265 |   }
266 | }
267 | 
268 | export async function planCommandWithOllama({
269 |   query,
270 |   schemaProfile,
271 |   memoryMatch,
272 |   ragMatches = [],
273 |   currentDashboard,
274 | }) {
275 |   try {
276 |     const text = await callOllama({ model: DASHBOARD_MODEL, prompt: buildCommandPrompt(query, schemaProfile, memoryMatch, currentDashboard, {
277 |       ragMatches,
278 |     }) });
279 |     const json = extractJson(text);
280 |     if (!json) return null;
281 | 
282 |     return {
283 |       action: json.action || "ANSWER",
284 |       message: json.message || "Command processed.",
285 |       chartSpec: json.chartSpec ? sanitizeChartSpec(stripUnsafeSpec(json.chartSpec), schemaProfile) : undefined,
286 |       kpiSpec: json.kpiSpec ? sanitizeKpiSpec(stripUnsafeSpec(json.kpiSpec), schemaProfile) : undefined,
287 |       filters: json.filters,
288 |       dashboardPlan: json.dashboardPlan
289 |         ? sanitizeDashboardPlan(json.dashboardPlan, schemaProfile)
290 |         : undefined,
291 |       schemaOnly: true,
292 |       provider: "ollama",
293 |       model: DASHBOARD_MODEL,
294 |     };

299 |       schemaOnly: true,
300 |       provider: "local",
301 |       model: DASHBOARD_MODEL,
302 |       aiError: error.message,
303 |     };
304 |   }

310 | Rewrite the local analytics answer in a clear helpful tone.
311 | Do not invent values. Do not ask for raw rows.

314 | ${JSON.stringify(makeSchemaOnlyPacket(schemaProfile), null, 2)}

321 |     return { answer: text.trim() || localAnswer, model: CHAT_MODEL, provider: "ollama" };
322 |   } catch (error) {
323 |     return { answer: localAnswer, model: CHAT_MODEL, provider: "local", aiError: error.message };
324 |   }

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-fingerprint.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-fingerprint.js`

```js
  1 | import { createHash } from "node:crypto";
  2 | 
  3 | const MAX_TOP_VALUES = 15;
  4 | 
  5 | export function normalizeColumnName(value = "") {
  6 |   return String(value)
  7 |     .trim()
  8 |     .toLowerCase()
  9 |     .replace(/^[\ufeff\s]+/, "")
 10 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_")
 11 |     .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
 12 | }
 13 | 
 14 | export function humanize(value = "") {
 15 |   return String(value)
 16 |     .replace(/^_+/, "")
 17 |     .replace(/[_-]+/g, " ")
 18 |     .replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
 19 | }
 20 | 
 21 | export function isMissing(value) {
 22 |   return value === null || value === undefined || String(value).trim() === "";
 23 | }
 24 | 
 25 | export function safeNumber(value) {
 26 |   if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
 27 |   if (typeof value === "bigint") return Number(value);
 28 | 
 29 |   const cleaned = String(value ?? "")
 30 |     .replace(/[₹$€£,%\s]/g, "")
 31 |     .replace(/,/g, "");
 32 | 
 33 |   if (!cleaned || cleaned === "-" || cleaned.toLowerCase() === "nan") return null;
 34 | 
 35 |   const parsed = Number(cleaned);
 36 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
 37 | }
 38 | 
 39 | export function isDateLike(value) {
 40 |   if (value instanceof Date && !Number.isNaN(value.getTime())) return true;
 41 |   if (typeof value !== "string") return false;
 42 |   const text = value.trim();
 43 |   if (!text) return false;
 44 |   if (!/(\d{4}[-/]\d{1,2}[-/]\d{1,2})|(\d{1,2}[-/]\d{1,2}[-/]\d{2,4})/.test(text)) return false;
 45 |   const parsed = Date.parse(text);
 46 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed);
 47 | }
 48 | 
 49 | export function splitMultiValue(value) {
 50 |   if (isMissing(value)) return [];
 51 |   return String(value)
 52 |     .split(/[;,|]/g)
 53 |     .map((item) => item.trim())
 54 |     .filter(Boolean);
 55 | }
 56 | 
 57 | export function cleanDatasetRows(rows = []) {
 58 |   return (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : []).filter((row) => {
 59 |     if (!row || typeof row !== "object") return false;
 60 | 
 61 |     const keys = Object.keys(row).map(normalizeColumnName);
 62 |     const source = String(row._sourceFile || row.sourceFile || row.source || row.fileName || "").toLowerCase();
 63 | 
 64 |     const looksLikeDictionary =
 65 |       keys.includes("column") &&
 66 |       keys.includes("type") &&
 67 |       (keys.includes("description") || keys.includes("desc"));
 68 | 
 69 |     return !source.includes("dictionary") && !source.includes("data_dictionary") && !looksLikeDictionary;
 70 |   });
 71 | }
 72 | 
 73 | function inferColumnType(values = []) {
 74 |   const present = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value)).slice(0, 500);
 75 |   if (!present.length) return "string";
 76 | 
 77 |   const numericCount = present.filter((value) => safeNumber(value) !== null).length;
 78 |   const dateCount = present.filter(isDateLike).length;
 79 | 
 80 |   if (dateCount / present.length >= 0.8) return "date";
 81 |   if (numericCount / present.length >= 0.8) return "number";
 82 |   if (new Set(present.map(String)).size <= Math.max(2, present.length * 0.2)) return "category";
 83 |   return "string";
 84 | }
 85 | 
 86 | function getStats(values = []) {
 87 |   const numbers = values.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null).sort((a, b) => a - b);
 88 |   if (!numbers.length) return null;
 89 | 
 90 |   const sum = numbers.reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0);
 91 |   const mid = Math.floor(numbers.length / 2);
 92 |   const median = numbers.length % 2 ? numbers[mid] : (numbers[mid - 1] + numbers[mid]) / 2;
 93 | 
 94 |   return {
 95 |     min: numbers[0],
 96 |     max: numbers[numbers.length - 1],
 97 |     mean: Math.round((sum / numbers.length) * 100) / 100,
 98 |     median: Math.round(median * 100) / 100,
 99 |   };
100 | }
101 | 
102 | function inferRole(name, type, uniqueCount, rowCount) {
103 |   const n = normalizeColumnName(name);
104 | 
105 |   if (/^(id|uuid|row_id|index|sr_no|serial|customer_code|user_id|student_id)$/.test(n) || n.endsWith("_id")) return "id";
106 |   if (type === "date" || /date|time|year|month|day|created|updated|timestamp/.test(n)) return "date";
107 |   if (/country|state|city|region|location|address|market|territory/.test(n)) return "location";
108 |   if (/salary|revenue|sales|amount|price|cost|profit|income|spend|budget|value|gmv|arr|mrr/.test(n) && !/rate|ratio|percent|margin/.test(n)) return "money_metric";
109 |   if (/score|rating|marks|grade|performance|level|index|rank|gpa/.test(n)) return "score_metric";
110 |   if (/age|experience|years|tenure|duration/.test(n)) return "continuous_metric";
111 |   if (/quantity|qty|units|orders|count|visits|clicks|sessions/.test(n)) return "count_metric";
112 |   if (/rate|ratio|percent|percentage|margin|conversion|churn/.test(n)) return "rate_metric";
113 |   if (/target|label|outcome|class|status|result/.test(n)) return "target";
114 |   if (/language|framework|skill|tag|category|product|education|gender|platform|segment|department|company_size/.test(n)) return "category";
115 | 
116 |   if (type === "number") return uniqueCount <= Math.max(20, rowCount * 0.03) ? "numeric_category" : "continuous_metric";
117 |   if (type === "category") return "category";
118 |   return "text";
119 | }
120 | 
121 | function topValues(values = []) {
122 |   const counts = new Map();
123 |   for (const value of values) {
124 |     if (isMissing(value)) continue;
125 |     const parts = splitMultiValue(value);
126 |     const items = parts.length > 1 ? parts : [String(value).trim()];
127 |     for (const item of items) counts.set(item, (counts.get(item) || 0) + 1);
128 |   }
129 |   return [...counts.entries()]
130 |     .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
131 |     .slice(0, MAX_TOP_VALUES)
132 |     .map(([value, count]) => ({ value, count }));
133 | }
134 | 
135 | export function buildSchemaProfile(dataset = {}) {
136 |   const rows = cleanDatasetRows(dataset.rows || []);
137 |   const suppliedColumns = Array.isArray(dataset.columns) ? dataset.columns : [];
138 |   const dictionaryRows = Array.isArray(dataset.dictionaryRows) ? dataset.dictionaryRows : [];
139 | 
140 |   const names = suppliedColumns.length
141 |     ? suppliedColumns.map((column) => column.name || column.Column || column.column || column)
142 |     : Object.keys(rows[0] || {});
143 | 
144 |   const dictionaryMap = new Map(
145 |     dictionaryRows.map((item) => [
146 |       normalizeColumnName(item.Column || item.column || item.name),
147 |       {
148 |         type: item.Type || item.type,
149 |         description: item.Description || item.description || item.desc,
150 |       },
151 |     ])
152 |   );
153 | 
154 |   const columns = names
155 |     .filter(Boolean)
156 |     .filter((name) => !String(name).startsWith("_"))
157 |     .map((name) => {
158 |       const normalized = normalizeColumnName(name);
159 |       const values = rows.map((row) => row[name]);
160 |       const present = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
161 |       const uniqueCount = new Set(present.map((value) => String(value).trim())).size;
162 |       const dictionary = dictionaryMap.get(normalized) || {};
163 |       const explicitType = suppliedColumns.find((column) => normalizeColumnName(column.name || column.Column || column) === normalized)?.type || dictionary.type;
164 |       const type = explicitType ? normalizeColumnName(explicitType).replace("integer", "number").replace("float", "number") : inferColumnType(values);
165 |       const role = inferRole(name, type, uniqueCount, rows.length);
166 | 
167 |       return {
168 |         name: String(name),
169 |         normalizedName: normalized,
170 |         title: humanize(name),
171 |         type,
172 |         role,
173 |         description: dictionary.description || "",
174 |         uniqueCount,
175 |         missingCount: values.length - present.length,
176 |         missingPct: rows.length ? Math.round(((values.length - present.length) / rows.length) * 10000) / 100 : 0,
177 |         topValues: type === "number" && !["numeric_category", "target"].includes(role) ? [] : topValues(values),
178 |         stats: type === "number" ? getStats(values) : null,
179 |       };
180 |     });
181 | 
182 |   const domain = detectDomain(columns);
183 |   const signature = getSchemaSignature(columns);
184 | 
185 |   return {
186 |     datasetName: dataset.name || dataset.fileName || "Uploaded Dataset",
187 |     rowCount: rows.length,
188 |     columnCount: columns.length,
189 |     domain,
190 |     signature,
191 |     columns,
192 |     roleCounts: columns.reduce((acc, column) => {
193 |       acc[column.role] = (acc[column.role] || 0) + 1;
194 |       return acc;
195 |     }, {}),
196 |   };
197 | }
198 | 
199 | export function detectDomain(columns = []) {
200 |   const text = columns.map((column) => `${column.normalizedName} ${column.role}`).join(" ");
201 | 
202 |   if (/salary|experience|education|framework|language|company_size|developer|employee|hr|department/.test(text)) return "workforce_salary";
203 |   if (/stress|anxiety|depression|sleep|mental|health|screen_time|social_media|addiction/.test(text)) return "health_wellness";
204 |   if (/student|marks|grade|attendance|course|school|exam|gpa|academic/.test(text)) return "education";
205 |   if (/revenue|sales|amount|product|customer|order|quantity|profit|market/.test(text)) return "sales_commerce";
206 |   if (/sentiment|review|rating|text|comment|feedback/.test(text)) return "sentiment_text";
207 |   if (/date|time|year|month/.test(text) && /revenue|sales|amount|price|temperature|traffic|demand|volume/.test(text)) return "time_series";
208 |   return "generic";
209 | }
210 | 
211 | export function getSchemaSignature(columns = []) {
212 |   const compact = columns
213 |     .map((column) => `${column.normalizedName}:${column.type}:${column.role}`)
214 |     .sort()
215 |     .join("|");
216 | 
217 |   return createHash("sha256").update(compact).digest("hex").slice(0, 24);
218 | }
219 | 
220 | export function schemaSimilarity(a, b) {
221 |   if (!a || !b) return 0;
222 |   const colsA = a.columns || [];
223 |   const colsB = b.columns || [];
224 | 
225 |   const nameA = new Set(colsA.map((column) => column.normalizedName));
226 |   const nameB = new Set(colsB.map((column) => column.normalizedName));
227 |   const roleA = new Set(colsA.map((column) => column.role));
228 |   const roleB = new Set(colsB.map((column) => column.role));
229 | 
230 |   const jaccard = (set1, set2) => {
231 |     const intersection = [...set1].filter((value) => set2.has(value)).length;
232 |     const union = new Set([...set1, ...set2]).size || 1;
233 |     return intersection / union;
234 |   };
235 | 
236 |   const nameScore = jaccard(nameA, nameB);
237 |   const roleScore = jaccard(roleA, roleB);
238 |   const domainScore = a.domain && b.domain && a.domain === b.domain ? 1 : 0;
239 | 
240 |   return Math.round((nameScore * 0.5 + roleScore * 0.35 + domainScore * 0.15) * 1000) / 1000;
241 | }
242 | 
243 | export function makeSchemaOnlyPacket(profile, options = {}) {
244 |   const includeTopValues = options.includeTopValues === true;
245 |   const includeStats = options.includeStats === true;
246 | 
247 |   return {
248 |     datasetName: profile.datasetName,
249 |     rowCount: profile.rowCount,
250 |     columnCount: profile.columnCount,
251 |     domain: profile.domain,
252 |     signature: profile.signature,
253 |     columns: profile.columns.map((column) => ({
254 |       name: column.name,
255 |       normalizedName: column.normalizedName,
256 |       type: column.type,
257 |       role: column.role,
258 |       description: column.description,
259 |       uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount,
260 |       missingPct: column.missingPct,
261 |       ...(includeTopValues
262 |         ? {
263 |             topValues: column.topValues?.slice(0, 10)?.map((item) => item.value) || [],
264 |           }
265 |         : {
266 |             topValuesCount: column.topValues?.length || 0,
267 |           }),
268 |       ...(includeStats && column.stats
269 |         ? {
270 |             stats: column.stats,
271 |           }
272 |         : {}),
273 |     })),
274 |   };
275 | }
276 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-profiler.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-profiler.js`

```js
  1 | function normalizeName(value = "") {
  2 |   return String(value)
  3 |     .toLowerCase()
  4 |     .trim()
  5 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_")
  6 |     .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
  7 | }
  8 | 
  9 | export function safeNumber(value) {
 10 |   if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
 11 | 
 12 |   const cleaned = String(value ?? "")
 13 |     .replace(/[₹$,%]/g, "")
 14 |     .replace(/,/g, "")
 15 |     .trim();
 16 | 
 17 |   const parsed = Number(cleaned);
 18 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
 19 | }
 20 | 
 21 | function isDateLike(value) {
 22 |   if (value instanceof Date) return true;
 23 |   if (typeof value !== "string") return false;
 24 |   if (!/\d/.test(value)) return false;
 25 | 
 26 |   const parsed = Date.parse(value);
 27 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed);
 28 | }
 29 | 
 30 | function inferType(values = []) {
 31 |   const sample = values
 32 |     .filter((value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== "")
 33 |     .slice(0, 100);
 34 | 
 35 |   if (!sample.length) return "string";
 36 | 
 37 |   const numeric = sample.filter((value) => safeNumber(value) !== null).length;
 38 |   const date = sample.filter(isDateLike).length;
 39 | 
 40 |   if (numeric / sample.length >= 0.8) return "number";
 41 |   if (date / sample.length >= 0.8) return "date";
 42 | 
 43 |   return "string";
 44 | }
 45 | 
 46 | function getStats(values = []) {
 47 |   const numbers = values.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
 48 | 
 49 |   if (!numbers.length) return null;
 50 | 
 51 |   const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 52 |   const sum = numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
 53 |   const avg = sum / numbers.length;
 54 | 
 55 |   return {
 56 |     min: sorted[0],
 57 |     max: sorted[sorted.length - 1],
 58 |     avg: Number(avg.toFixed(2)),
 59 |     validCount: numbers.length,
 60 |   };
 61 | }
 62 | 
 63 | export function buildSchemaProfile(dataset = {}) {
 64 |   const rows = Array.isArray(dataset.rows) ? dataset.rows : [];
 65 | 
 66 |   const columnNames =
 67 |     Array.isArray(dataset.columns) && dataset.columns.length
 68 |       ? dataset.columns.map((column) => column.name || column)
 69 |       : Object.keys(rows[0] || {});
 70 | 
 71 |   const columns = columnNames
 72 |     .filter((name) => name && !String(name).startsWith("__"))
 73 |     .map((name) => {
 74 |       const values = rows.map((row) => row[name]);
 75 |       const type = inferType(values);
 76 |       const present = values.filter(
 77 |         (value) => value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== ""
 78 |       );
 79 |       const uniqueValues = [...new Set(present.map(String))];
 80 | 
 81 |       const role =
 82 |         type === "number" ? "metric" : type === "date" ? "date" : "dimension";
 83 | 
 84 |       return {
 85 |         name,
 86 |         normalizedName: normalizeName(name),
 87 |         type,
 88 |         role,
 89 |         uniqueCount: uniqueValues.length,
 90 |         nullCount: rows.length - present.length,
 91 |         topValues: role === "dimension" ? uniqueValues.slice(0, 12) : [],
 92 |         stats: type === "number" ? getStats(values) : null,
 93 |       };
 94 |     });
 95 | 
 96 |   const columnSignature = columns
 97 |     .map((column) => column.normalizedName)
 98 |     .sort()
 99 |     .join("|");
100 | 
101 |   return {
102 |     datasetName: dataset.name || dataset.fileName || "Uploaded Dataset",
103 |     rowCount: rows.length,
104 |     columnCount: columns.length,
105 |     columns,
106 |     columnSignature,
107 |     safePacket: {
108 |       datasetName: dataset.name || dataset.fileName || "Uploaded Dataset",
109 |       rowCount: rows.length,
110 |       columnCount: columns.length,
111 |       columns: columns.map((column) => ({
112 |         name: column.name,
113 |         type: column.type,
114 |         role: column.role,
115 |         uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount,
116 |         nullCount: column.nullCount,
117 |         topValues: column.topValues.slice(0, 8),
118 |         stats: column.stats,
119 |       })),
120 |       rawRowsSentToAI: false,
121 |     },
122 |   };
123 | }
124 | 
125 | export function findColumn(schema, aliases = [], role = null) {
126 |   const normalizedAliases = aliases.map(normalizeName);
127 | 
128 |   const candidates = schema.columns
129 |     .map((column) => {
130 |       let score = 0;
131 | 
132 |       for (const alias of normalizedAliases) {
133 |         if (column.normalizedName === alias) score += 10;
134 |         else if (column.normalizedName.includes(alias)) score += 6;
135 |         else if (alias.includes(column.normalizedName)) score += 3;
136 |       }
137 | 
138 |       if (role && column.role === role) score += 2;
139 | 
140 |       return { column, score };
141 |     })
142 |     .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
143 |     .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
144 | 
145 |   if (candidates[0]) return candidates[0].column;
146 | 
147 |   if (role) {
148 |     return schema.columns.find((column) => column.role === role) || null;
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   return null;
152 | }
153 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-embeddings.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-embeddings.js`

```js
  1 | import { createHash } from "node:crypto";
  2 | 
  3 | const DEFAULT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL =
  4 |   process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:11434";
  5 | 
  6 | const DEFAULT_EMBEDDING_MODEL =
  7 |   process.env.RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL || "nomic-embed-text";
  8 | 
  9 | const DEFAULT_VECTOR_SIZE = Number(process.env.RAG_FALLBACK_VECTOR_SIZE || 384);
 10 | 
 11 | function timeoutSignal(ms = 12000) {
 12 |   const controller = new AbortController();
 13 |   const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), ms);
 14 |   return {
 15 |     signal: controller.signal,
 16 |     clear: () => clearTimeout(timer),
 17 |   };
 18 | }
 19 | 
 20 | function tokenize(text = "") {
 21 |   return String(text)
 22 |     .toLowerCase()
 23 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9_]+/g, " ")
 24 |     .split(/\s+/)
 25 |     .map((token) => token.trim())
 26 |     .filter(Boolean);
 27 | }
 28 | 
 29 | export function normalizeVector(vector = []) {
 30 |   const values = Array.isArray(vector) ? vector.map(Number).filter(Number.isFinite) : [];
 31 |   const magnitude = Math.sqrt(values.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value * value, 0));
 32 | 
 33 |   if (!values.length || magnitude === 0) return [];
 34 | 
 35 |   return values.map((value) => value / magnitude);
 36 | }
 37 | 
 38 | export function cosineSimilarity(a = [], b = []) {
 39 |   const left = normalizeVector(a);
 40 |   const right = normalizeVector(b);
 41 |   const length = Math.min(left.length, right.length);
 42 | 
 43 |   if (!length) return 0;
 44 | 
 45 |   let dot = 0;
 46 |   for (let index = 0; index < length; index += 1) {
 47 |     dot += left[index] * right[index];
 48 |   }
 49 | 
 50 |   return dot;
 51 | }
 52 | 
 53 | export function deterministicTextEmbedding(text = "", dimensions = DEFAULT_VECTOR_SIZE) {
 54 |   const vector = Array.from({ length: dimensions }, () => 0);
 55 |   const tokens = tokenize(text);
 56 | 
 57 |   if (!tokens.length) return vector;
 58 | 
 59 |   tokens.forEach((token, index) => {
 60 |     const digest = createHash("sha256")
 61 |       .update(`${token}:${index}`)
 62 |       .digest();
 63 | 
 64 |     const bucket = digest.readUInt16BE(0) % dimensions;
 65 |     const sign = digest[2] % 2 === 0 ? 1 : -1;
 66 |     const weight = 1 + Math.log(1 + token.length);
 67 | 
 68 |     vector[bucket] += sign * weight;
 69 |   });
 70 | 
 71 |   return normalizeVector(vector);
 72 | }
 73 | 
 74 | async function callOllamaEmbedApi(text, model) {
 75 |   const { signal, clear } = timeoutSignal();
 76 | 
 77 |   try {
 78 |     const response = await fetch(`${DEFAULT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/embed`, {
 79 |       method: "POST",
 80 |       headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
 81 |       body: JSON.stringify({ model, input: text }),
 82 |       signal,
 83 |     });
 84 | 
 85 |     if (!response.ok) {
 86 |       throw new Error(`Ollama /api/embed HTTP ${response.status}`);
 87 |     }
 88 | 
 89 |     const payload = await response.json();
 90 | 
 91 |     if (Array.isArray(payload.embeddings?.[0])) {
 92 |       return payload.embeddings[0];
 93 |     }
 94 | 
 95 |     if (Array.isArray(payload.embedding)) {
 96 |       return payload.embedding;
 97 |     }
 98 | 
 99 |     throw new Error("Ollama /api/embed returned no embedding.");
100 |   } finally {
101 |     clear();
102 |   }
103 | }
104 | 
105 | async function callOllamaEmbeddingsApi(text, model) {
106 |   const { signal, clear } = timeoutSignal();
107 | 
108 |   try {
109 |     const response = await fetch(`${DEFAULT_OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/embeddings`, {
110 |       method: "POST",
111 |       headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
112 |       body: JSON.stringify({ model, prompt: text }),
113 |       signal,
114 |     });
115 | 
116 |     if (!response.ok) {
117 |       throw new Error(`Ollama /api/embeddings HTTP ${response.status}`);
118 |     }
119 | 
120 |     const payload = await response.json();
121 | 
122 |     if (Array.isArray(payload.embedding)) {
123 |       return payload.embedding;
124 |     }
125 | 
126 |     throw new Error("Ollama /api/embeddings returned no embedding.");
127 |   } finally {
128 |     clear();
129 |   }
130 | }
131 | 
132 | export async function embedText(text = "", options = {}) {
133 |   const model = options.model || DEFAULT_EMBEDDING_MODEL;
134 |   const cleanText = String(text || "").trim();
135 | 
136 |   if (!cleanText) {
137 |     return {
138 |       embedding: deterministicTextEmbedding("empty-schema"),
139 |       provider: "local-deterministic",
140 |       model: "deterministic-hash",
141 |       fallback: true,
142 |     };
143 |   }
144 | 
145 |   const shouldUseLocalEmbedding =
146 |     options.useOllama === false ||
147 |     process.env.DISABLE_OLLAMA_EMBEDDINGS === "1" ||
148 |     (process.env.NODE_ENV === "test" && process.env.TEST_REAL_OLLAMA !== "1");
149 | 
150 |   if (shouldUseLocalEmbedding) {
151 |     return {
152 |       embedding: deterministicTextEmbedding(cleanText),
153 |       provider: "local-deterministic",
154 |       model: "deterministic-hash",
155 |       fallback: true,
156 |     };
157 |   }
158 | 
159 |   try {
160 |     let embedding;
161 | 
162 |     try {
163 |       embedding = await callOllamaEmbedApi(cleanText, model);
164 |     } catch {
165 |       embedding = await callOllamaEmbeddingsApi(cleanText, model);
166 |     }
167 | 
168 |     return {
169 |       embedding: normalizeVector(embedding),
170 |       provider: "ollama",
171 |       model,
172 |       fallback: false,
173 |     };
174 |   } catch (error) {
175 |     if (options.allowFallback === false) {
176 |       throw error;
177 |     }
178 | 
179 |     return {
180 |       embedding: deterministicTextEmbedding(cleanText),
181 |       provider: "local-deterministic",
182 |       model: "deterministic-hash",
183 |       fallback: true,
184 |       error: error.message,
185 |     };
186 |   }
187 | }
188 | 
```

  9 | function safeTopValues(values = []) {
 10 |   if (!Array.isArray(values)) return [];
 11 | 
 12 |   return values.slice(0, 10).map((item) => {
 13 |     if (item && typeof item === "object") {
 14 |       return {
 15 |         value: item.value ?? item.label ?? item.name ?? String(item),
 16 |         count: Number.isFinite(Number(item.count)) ? Number(item.count) : undefined,
 17 |       };
 18 |     }
 19 | 
 20 |     return { value: item };
 21 |   });

 24 | function memoryColumns(profile) {

 30 |     role: column.role,

 32 |     missingPct: column.missingPct ?? 0,

 36 |   }));

 42 |     values,

 47 |     calculatedValues,
 48 |     chartData,
 49 |     ...safe

 63 |     values,

 71 | export function sanitizeDashboardPlanForRag(dashboardPlan = {}, profile) {
 72 |   const plan =
 73 |     dashboardPlan.dashboard ||
 74 |     dashboardPlan.dashboardPlan ||
 75 |     dashboardPlan.safePlan ||
 76 |     dashboardPlan;
 77 | 
 78 |   const templated = templatePlanForStorage(
 79 |     {
 80 |       kpis: Array.isArray(plan.kpis) ? plan.kpis.map(stripUnsafeKpi) : [],
 81 |       charts: Array.isArray(plan.charts) ? plan.charts.map(stripUnsafeChart) : [],
 82 |     },
 83 |     profile
 84 |   );
 85 | 
 86 |   return {
 87 |     kpis: templated.kpis || [],
 88 |     charts: templated.charts || [],
