```js
 91 | 
 92 | export function schemaProfileToRagText(profile = {}) {
 93 |   const columns = (profile.columns || [])
 94 |     .map((column) => {
 95 |       return [
 96 |         column.name,
 97 |         column.type,
 98 |         column.role,
 99 |         column.description,
100 |         `unique:${column.uniqueCount ?? 0}`,
101 |         `missing:${column.missingPct ?? 0}`,
102 |         `topValuesCount:${safeTopValues(column.topValues).length}`,
103 |         column.stats ? "hasStats:true" : "",
104 |       ]
105 |         .filter(Boolean)
106 |         .join(" ");
107 |     })
108 |     .join("\n");
109 | 
110 |   return [
111 |     `Domain: ${profile.domain || "unknown"}`,
112 |     `Signature: ${profile.signature || ""}`,
113 |     `Rows: ${profile.rowCount || 0}`,
114 |     `Columns: ${profile.columnCount || profile.columns?.length || 0}`,
115 |     "Schema:",
116 |     columns,
117 |   ]
118 |     .filter(Boolean)
119 |     .join("\n");
120 | }
121 | 
122 | export function buildSchemaRagMemoryEntry({
123 |   dataset,
124 |   schemaProfile,
125 |   dashboardPlan,
126 |   embedding = [],
127 |   rating = "good",
128 |   notes = "",
129 |   source = "user-feedback",
130 | } = {}) {
131 |   const profile = schemaProfile || buildSchemaProfile(dataset || {});
132 |   const schemaText = schemaProfileToRagText(profile);
133 |   const safePlan = sanitizeDashboardPlanForRag(dashboardPlan || {}, profile);
134 | 
135 |   const id =
136 |     dataset?.id ||
137 |     `rag-${profile.domain || "dataset"}-${profile.signature || hashText(schemaText)}-${hashText(
138 |       JSON.stringify(safePlan)
139 |     )}`;
140 | 
141 |   return {
142 |     id,
143 |     name: dataset?.name || dataset?.fileName || profile.datasetName || id,
144 |     domain: profile.domain || "unknown",
145 |     source,
146 |     rating,
147 |     notes,
148 |     schemaSignature: profile.signature || hashText(schemaText),
149 |     schemaText,
150 |     schemaProfile: {
151 |       datasetName: profile.datasetName,
152 |       rowCount: profile.rowCount,
153 |       columnCount: profile.columnCount,
154 |       domain: profile.domain,
155 |       signature: profile.signature,
156 |       columns: memoryColumns(profile),
157 |     },
158 |     columns: memoryColumns(profile),
159 |     dashboardPlan: safePlan,
160 |     embedding: Array.isArray(embedding) ? embedding : [],
161 |     examplesSeen: 1,
162 |     createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
163 |     updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
164 |   };
165 | }
166 | 
167 | export function removeEmbeddingsForPublicResponse(entry = {}) {
168 |   const { embedding, ...safe } = entry || {};
169 |   return safe;
170 | }
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-retriever.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-retriever.js`

```js
  1 | import { buildSchemaProfile } from "./schema-fingerprint.js";
  2 | import { applyTrainedTemplates, mergePlans } from "./dashboard-plan-engine.js";
  3 | import { embedText, cosineSimilarity } from "./schema-rag-embeddings.js";
  4 | import {
  5 |   buildSchemaRagMemoryEntry,
  6 |   removeEmbeddingsForPublicResponse,
  7 |   schemaProfileToRagText,
  8 | } from "./schema-rag-memory-builder.js";
  9 | import {
 10 |   getSchemaRagStats,
 11 |   readSchemaRagMemory,
 12 |   upsertSchemaRagMemory,
 13 | } from "./schema-rag-store.js";
 14 | 
 15 | function tokenize(text = "") {
 16 |   return new Set(
 17 |     String(text)
 18 |       .toLowerCase()
 19 |       .replace(/[^a-z0-9_]+/g, " ")
 20 |       .split(/\s+/)
 21 |       .filter(Boolean)
 22 |   );
 23 | }
 24 | 
 25 | function jaccardTextSimilarity(left = "", right = "") {
 26 |   const a = tokenize(left);
 27 |   const b = tokenize(right);
 28 | 
 29 |   if (!a.size || !b.size) return 0;
 30 | 
 31 |   let intersection = 0;
 32 | 
 33 |   for (const token of a) {
 34 |     if (b.has(token)) intersection += 1;
 35 |   }
 36 | 
 37 |   const union = new Set([...a, ...b]).size;
 38 | 
 39 |   return union ? intersection / union : 0;
 40 | }
 41 | 
 42 | function normalizeCosine(value) {
 43 |   return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (Number(value || 0) + 1) / 2));
 44 | }
 45 | 
 46 | function toPublicMatch(match) {
 47 |   return {
 48 |     ...match,
 49 |     entry: removeEmbeddingsForPublicResponse(match.entry),
 50 |   };
 51 | }
 52 | 
 53 | function hasUsableDashboardPlan(entry = {}) {
 54 |   const plan = entry.dashboardPlan || {};
 55 |   return Array.isArray(plan.kpis) || Array.isArray(plan.charts);
 56 | }
 57 | 
 58 | export async function retrieveSchemaRagMemories(schemaProfile, options = {}) {
 59 |   const limit = Number(options.limit || 5);
 60 |   const threshold = Number(options.threshold ?? 0.55);
 61 |   const profile = schemaProfile?.columns ? schemaProfile : buildSchemaProfile(schemaProfile || {});
 62 |   const queryText = schemaProfileToRagText(profile);
 63 | 
 64 |   const embeddingResult = await embedText(queryText, {
 65 |     useOllama: options.useOllama,
 66 |     allowFallback: true,
 67 |   });
 68 | 
 69 |   const memory = readSchemaRagMemory();
 70 | 
 71 |   const matches = memory
 72 |     .filter(hasUsableDashboardPlan)
 73 |     .map((entry) => {
 74 |       const vectorScore = Array.isArray(entry.embedding) && entry.embedding.length
 75 |         ? normalizeCosine(cosineSimilarity(embeddingResult.embedding, entry.embedding))
 76 |         : 0;
 77 | 
 78 |       const textScore = jaccardTextSimilarity(queryText, entry.schemaText || "");
 79 |       const domainBoost = entry.domain && entry.domain === profile.domain ? 0.08 : 0;
 80 |       const signatureBoost =
 81 |         entry.schemaSignature && entry.schemaSignature === profile.signature ? 0.12 : 0;
 82 |       const score = Math.min(1, Math.max(vectorScore, textScore) + domainBoost + signatureBoost);
 83 | 
 84 |       return {
 85 |         entry,
 86 |         score,
 87 |         vectorScore,
 88 |         textScore,
 89 |         domainBoost,
 90 |         signatureBoost,
 91 |       };
 92 |     })
 93 |     .filter((match) => match.score >= threshold)
 94 |     .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score)
 95 |     .slice(0, limit);
 96 | 
 97 |   return {
 98 |     used: matches.length > 0,
 99 |     threshold,
100 |     query: {
101 |       domain: profile.domain,
102 |       signature: profile.signature,
103 |       embeddingProvider: embeddingResult.provider,
104 |       embeddingModel: embeddingResult.model,
105 |       embeddingFallback: embeddingResult.fallback,
106 |       embeddingError: embeddingResult.error,
107 |     },
108 |     matches: matches.map(toPublicMatch),
109 |     stats: getSchemaRagStats(),
110 |   };
111 | }
112 | 
113 | export function buildRagDashboardPlan(profile, matches = []) {
114 |   const plans = (matches || [])
115 |     .map((match) => {
116 |       const entry = match.entry || match;
117 |       return applyTrainedTemplates(profile, {
118 |         entry: {
119 |           ...entry,
120 |           name: entry.name || entry.id,
121 |           domain: entry.domain || profile.domain,
122 |           dashboardPlan: entry.dashboardPlan || {},
123 |         },
124 |         score: match.score || 0,
125 |       });
126 |     })
127 |     .filter(Boolean);
128 | 
129 |   if (!plans.length) return null;
130 | 
131 |   return mergePlans(profile, ...plans.map((plan) => ({
132 |     ...plan,
133 |     source: `rag:${plan.source || "memory"}`,
134 |   })));
135 | }
136 | 
137 | export async function trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset({
138 |   dataset,
139 |   schemaProfile,
140 |   acceptedDashboardPlan,
141 |   dashboardPlan,
142 |   rating = "good",
143 |   notes = "",
144 |   source = "user-feedback",
145 |   useOllama,
146 | } = {}) {
147 |   const profile = schemaProfile?.columns ? schemaProfile : buildSchemaProfile(dataset || {});
148 |   const schemaText = schemaProfileToRagText(profile);
149 | 
150 |   const embeddingResult = await embedText(schemaText, {
151 |     useOllama,
152 |     allowFallback: true,
153 |   });
154 | 
155 |   const entry = buildSchemaRagMemoryEntry({
156 |     dataset,
157 |     schemaProfile: profile,
158 |     dashboardPlan: acceptedDashboardPlan || dashboardPlan || {},
159 |     embedding: embeddingResult.embedding,
160 |     rating,
161 |     notes,
162 |     source,
163 |   });
164 | 
165 |   const saved = upsertSchemaRagMemory(entry);
166 | 
167 |   return {
168 |     entry: removeEmbeddingsForPublicResponse(saved),
169 |     embedding: {
170 |       provider: embeddingResult.provider,
171 |       model: embeddingResult.model,
172 |       fallback: embeddingResult.fallback,
173 |       error: embeddingResult.error,
174 |     },
175 |     stats: getSchemaRagStats(),
176 |   };
177 | }
178 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-store.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-rag-store.js`

```js
  1 | import fs from "node:fs";
  2 | import path from "node:path";
  3 | 
  4 | function resolveMemoryPath() {
  5 |   if (process.env.SCHEMA_RAG_MEMORY_PATH) {
  6 |     return path.resolve(process.env.SCHEMA_RAG_MEMORY_PATH);
  7 |   }
  8 | 
  9 |   const cwd = process.cwd();
 10 |   const monorepoPath = path.resolve(cwd, "apps", "backend", "data", "schema-rag-memory.json");
 11 |   const backendPath = path.resolve(cwd, "data", "schema-rag-memory.json");
 12 | 
 13 |   if (fs.existsSync(path.dirname(monorepoPath))) {
 14 |     return monorepoPath;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   return backendPath;
 18 | }
 19 | 
 20 | const MEMORY_PATH = resolveMemoryPath();
 21 | 
 22 | function ensureDataFile() {
 23 |   fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(MEMORY_PATH), { recursive: true });
 24 | 
 25 |   if (!fs.existsSync(MEMORY_PATH)) {
 26 |     fs.writeFileSync(MEMORY_PATH, "[]", "utf8");
 27 |   }
 28 | }
 29 | 
 30 | function stripForbiddenTopLevel(entry = {}) {
 31 |   const {
 32 |     rows,
 33 |     rawRows,
 34 |     sampleRows,
 35 |     datasetRows,
 36 |     fullRows,
 37 |     rowData,
 38 |     data,
 39 |     records,
 40 |     table,
 41 |     ...safe
 42 |   } = entry || {};
 43 | 
 44 |   return safe;
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | function stripUnsafeDashboardPlan(plan = {}) {
 48 |   return {
 49 |     kpis: Array.isArray(plan.kpis)
 50 |       ? plan.kpis.map((kpi) => {
 51 |           const { value, values, data, rows, rawRows, sampleRows, calculatedValues, ...safe } = kpi;
 52 |           return safe;
 53 |         })
 54 |       : [],
 55 |     charts: Array.isArray(plan.charts)
 56 |       ? plan.charts.map((chart) => {
 57 |           const { data, rows, rawRows, sampleRows, calculatedValues, value, values, ...safe } = chart;
 58 |           return safe;
 59 |         })
 60 |       : [],
 61 |   };
 62 | }
 63 | 
 64 | export function readSchemaRagMemory() {
 65 |   ensureDataFile();
 66 | 
 67 |   try {
 68 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(MEMORY_PATH, "utf8"));
 69 |     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.map(stripForbiddenTopLevel) : [];
 70 |   } catch {
 71 |     return [];
 72 |   }
 73 | }
 74 | 
 75 | export function writeSchemaRagMemory(entries = []) {
 76 |   ensureDataFile();
 77 | 
 78 |   const safeEntries = (Array.isArray(entries) ? entries : []).map((entry) => ({
 79 |     ...stripForbiddenTopLevel(entry),
 80 |     dashboardPlan: stripUnsafeDashboardPlan(entry.dashboardPlan || {}),
 81 |     updatedAt: entry.updatedAt || new Date().toISOString(),
 82 |   }));
 83 | 
 84 |   fs.writeFileSync(MEMORY_PATH, JSON.stringify(safeEntries, null, 2), "utf8");
 85 | 
 86 |   return safeEntries;
 87 | }
 88 | 
 89 | export function upsertSchemaRagMemory(entry) {
 90 |   const memory = readSchemaRagMemory();
 91 |   const safeEntry = {
 92 |     ...stripForbiddenTopLevel(entry),
 93 |     dashboardPlan: stripUnsafeDashboardPlan(entry.dashboardPlan || {}),
 94 |     updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 95 |   };
 96 | 
 97 |   const existingIndex = memory.findIndex(
 98 |     (item) =>
 99 |       item.id === safeEntry.id ||
100 |       (item.schemaSignature &&
101 |         item.schemaSignature === safeEntry.schemaSignature &&
102 |         item.domain === safeEntry.domain)
103 |   );
104 | 
105 |   if (existingIndex >= 0) {
106 |     const previous = memory[existingIndex];
107 | 
108 |     memory[existingIndex] = {
109 |       ...previous,
110 |       ...safeEntry,
111 |       createdAt: previous.createdAt || safeEntry.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
112 |       examplesSeen: Number(previous.examplesSeen || 1) + 1,
113 |       updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
114 |     };
115 |   } else {
116 |     memory.push({
117 |       ...safeEntry,
118 |       createdAt: safeEntry.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
119 |       updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
120 |     });
121 |   }
122 | 
123 |   writeSchemaRagMemory(memory);
124 | 
125 |   return existingIndex >= 0 ? memory[existingIndex] : memory[memory.length - 1];
126 | }
127 | 
128 | export function getSchemaRagStats() {
129 |   const memory = readSchemaRagMemory();
130 | 
131 |   const domains = memory.reduce((acc, item) => {
132 |     const domain = item.domain || "unknown";
133 |     acc[domain] = (acc[domain] || 0) + 1;
134 |     return acc;
135 |   }, {});
136 | 
137 |   return {
138 |     memoryPath: MEMORY_PATH,
139 |     total: memory.length,
140 |     domains,
141 |     withEmbeddings: memory.filter((item) => Array.isArray(item.embedding) && item.embedding.length).length,
142 |     updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
143 |   };
144 | }
145 | 
146 | export function clearSchemaRagMemoryForTests() {
147 |   if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== "test" && process.env.ALLOW_RAG_CLEAR !== "1") {
148 |     throw new Error("clearSchemaRagMemoryForTests is only allowed in test mode.");
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   writeSchemaRagMemory([]);
152 | }
153 | 
```

```js
  1 | import { buildSchemaProfile, makeSchemaOnlyPacket, normalizeColumnName } from "./schema-fingerprint.js";
  2 | import { applyTrainedTemplates, buildRuleDashboardPlan, mergePlans, pickPrimaryCategory, pickPrimaryMetric, pickSecondaryMetric, sanitizeChartSpec, sanitizeKpiSpec } from "./dashboard-plan-engine.js";
  3 | import { findBestSchemaMatch, trainSchemaExample } from "./schema-training-store.js";
  4 | import { formatChatAnswerWithOllama, planCommandWithOllama, planDashboardWithOllama } from "./llm-schema-dashboard-planner.js";
  5 | import { buildGuardianDashboardResponse } from "./dashboard-quality-guardian.js";
  6 | import {
  7 |   buildSchemaUnderstanding,
  8 | } from "./schema-understanding-engine.js";
  9 | import {
 10 |   buildRagDashboardPlan,
 11 |   retrieveSchemaRagMemories,
 12 |   trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset,
 13 | } from "./schema-rag-retriever.js";
 14 | 
 15 | function findColumn(profile, text, preferredRoles = []) {
 16 |   const lower = normalizeColumnName(text);
 17 |   const tokens = new Set(lower.split("_").filter(Boolean));
 18 |   const scored = (profile.columns || [])
 19 |     .map((column) => {
 20 |       const name = column.normalizedName || normalizeColumnName(column.name);
 21 |       const nameTokens = name.split("_").filter(Boolean);
 22 |       let score = 0;
 23 | 
 24 |       if (lower === name) score += 100;
 25 |       if (tokens.has(name)) score += 80;
 26 |       if (nameTokens.length && nameTokens.every((token) => tokens.has(token))) score += 60;
 27 |       if (nameTokens.some((token) => tokens.has(token))) score += 20;
 28 |       if (preferredRoles.includes(column.role)) score += 10;
 29 | 
 30 |       return { column, score };
 31 |     })
 32 |     .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
 33 |     .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score);
 34 | 
 35 |   return scored[0]?.column ||
 36 |     profile.columns.find((column) => preferredRoles.includes(column.role)) ||
 37 |     profile.columns.find((column) => ["money_metric", "score_metric", "continuous_metric", "count_metric"].includes(column.role)) ||
 38 |     profile.columns[0];
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | function findCategory(profile, text) {
 42 |   const lower = normalizeColumnName(text);
 43 |   return profile.columns.find((column) => lower.includes(column.normalizedName) && ["category", "location", "target", "numeric_category"].includes(column.role)) ||
 44 |     pickPrimaryCategory(profile);
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | export async function generateSchemaDashboard(dataset, options = {}) {
 48 |   const profile = buildSchemaProfile(dataset);
 49 |   const understanding = buildSchemaUnderstanding(profile);
 50 | 
 51 |   const matchResult = findBestSchemaMatch(profile, {
 52 |     threshold: options.threshold ?? 0.35,
 53 |   });
 54 | 
 55 |   const ragResult = await retrieveSchemaRagMemories(profile, {
 56 |     threshold: options.ragThreshold ?? 0.55,
 57 |     limit: options.ragLimit ?? 5,
 58 |     useOllama: options.useRagEmbedding !== false,
 59 |   });
 60 | 
 61 |   const ragPlan = buildRagDashboardPlan(profile, ragResult.matches);
 62 |   const trainedPlan = applyTrainedTemplates(profile, matchResult.best);
 63 |   const rulePlan = buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile);
 64 | 
 65 |   let llmPlan = null;
 66 | 
 67 |   if (options.useLlm !== false) {
 68 |     llmPlan = await planDashboardWithOllama(profile, matchResult.best, {
 69 |       ragMatches: ragResult.matches,
 70 |       schemaUnderstanding: {
 71 |         domain: understanding.domain,
 72 |         roles: understanding.roles,
 73 |         userExplanation: understanding.userExplanation,
 74 |         kpiCandidates: understanding.kpiCandidates,
 75 |         chartCandidates: understanding.chartCandidates,
 76 |       },
 77 |     });
 78 |   }
 79 | 
 80 |   const smartCandidatePlan = {
 81 |     source: "schema-understanding-engine",
 82 |     domain: understanding.domain.domain,
 83 |     kpis: understanding.kpiCandidates,
 84 |     charts: understanding.chartCandidates,
 85 |   };
 86 | 
 87 |   const mergedDashboard = mergePlans(
 88 |     profile,
 89 |     ragPlan,
 90 |     trainedPlan,
 91 |     smartCandidatePlan,
 92 |     llmPlan?.charts?.length || llmPlan?.kpis?.length ? llmPlan : null,
 93 |     rulePlan
 94 |   );
 95 | 
 96 |   const guarded = buildGuardianDashboardResponse(profile, mergedDashboard, {
 97 |     maxCharts: options.maxCharts ?? 7,
 98 |     maxKpis: options.maxKpis ?? 8,
 99 |   });
100 | 
101 |   return {
102 |     success: true,
103 |     schemaOnly: true,
104 |     profile: makeSchemaOnlyPacket(profile),
105 |     understanding: {
106 |       domain: understanding.domain,
107 |       userExplanation: understanding.userExplanation,
108 |       primaryMetric: understanding.roles.primaryMetric,
109 |       primaryCategory: understanding.roles.primaryCategory,
110 |       recommendedKpis: understanding.kpiCandidates.slice(0, 6),
111 |       recommendedCharts: understanding.chartCandidates.slice(0, 7),
112 |     },
113 |     match: matchResult.best
114 |       ? {
115 |           dataset: matchResult.best.entry.name,
116 |           domain: matchResult.best.entry.domain,
117 |           score: matchResult.best.score,
118 |         }
119 |       : null,
120 |     candidates: matchResult.candidates.map((candidate) => ({
121 |       dataset: candidate.entry.name,
122 |       domain: candidate.entry.domain,
123 |       score: candidate.score,
124 |     })),
125 |     rag: {
126 |       used: ragResult.used,
127 |       threshold: ragResult.threshold,
128 |       query: ragResult.query,
129 |       matches: ragResult.matches.map((match) => ({
130 |         id: match.entry.id,
131 |         name: match.entry.name,
132 |         domain: match.entry.domain,
133 |         score: match.score,
134 |       })),
135 |       stats: ragResult.stats,
136 |     },
137 |     dashboard: guarded.dashboard,
138 |     dashboardPlan: guarded.dashboard,
139 |     dashboardHealth: guarded.dashboardHealth,
140 |     provider: llmPlan?.source?.startsWith("ollama:") ? "ollama" : ragResult.used ? "rag+local" : "local",
141 |     model: llmPlan?.model || "local",
142 |     quality: {
143 |       score: guarded.qualityScore,
144 |       health: guarded.dashboardHealth,
145 |       warnings: guarded.warnings,
146 |       fixes: guarded.fixes,
147 |     },
148 |     llm: llmPlan
149 |       ? {
150 |           source: llmPlan.source,
151 |           model: llmPlan.model,
152 |           error: llmPlan.error,
153 |         }
154 |       : null,
155 |   };
156 | }

158 | export function trainSchemaDashboard(dataset, { dashboardPlan, rating = "good", notes = "", source = "upload-feedback" } = {}) {
159 |   return trainSchemaExample({ dataset, dashboardPlan, rating, notes, source });
160 | }
161 | 
162 | export async function trainSchemaRagDashboard(
163 |   dataset,
164 |   {
165 |     dashboardPlan,
166 |     acceptedDashboardPlan,
167 |     rating = "good",
168 |     notes = "",
169 |     source = "user-feedback",
170 |     useOllama,
171 |   } = {}
172 | ) {
173 |   return trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset({
174 |     dataset,
175 |     acceptedDashboardPlan: acceptedDashboardPlan || dashboardPlan,
176 |     rating,
177 |     notes,
178 |     source,
179 |     useOllama,
180 |   });
181 | }
182 | 
183 | function localCommand(profile, query) {
184 |   const lower = String(query || "").toLowerCase();
185 |   const metric = pickPrimaryMetric(profile);
186 |   const metric2 = pickSecondaryMetric(profile);
187 |   const category = pickPrimaryCategory(profile);
188 | 
189 |   if (/clear|reset/.test(lower) && /filter/.test(lower)) {
190 |     return { action: "CLEAR_FILTERS", message: "Filters cleared.", schemaOnly: true };
191 |   }
192 | 
193 |   if (/remove|delete/.test(lower) && /chart/.test(lower)) {
194 |     return { action: "DELETE_CHART", message: "Removed the selected chart.", schemaOnly: true };
195 |   }
196 | 
197 |   if (
198 |     /fix|repair|validate|correct|regenerate/.test(lower) &&
199 |     /dashboard|chart|charts|kpi|broken|wrong|invalid/.test(lower)
200 |   ) {
201 |     return {
202 |       action: "FIX_DASHBOARD",
203 |       message: "I checked the dashboard and prepared a schema-safe repair plan.",
204 |       dashboardPlan: buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile),
205 |       schemaOnly: true,
206 |     };
207 |   }
208 | 
209 |   if (/best dashboard|generate dashboard|build dashboard|create dashboard/.test(lower)) {
210 |     return {
211 |       action: "GENERATE_DASHBOARD",
212 |       message: "Generated the best schema-safe dashboard.",
213 |       dashboardPlan: buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile),
214 |       schemaOnly: true,
215 |     };
216 |   }
217 | 
218 |   const filterMatch = lower.match(/filter\s+([a-z0-9_\s]+)\s*(=|to|is)\s*([\w\s.-]+)/i);
219 |   if (filterMatch) {
220 |     const column = findCategory(profile, filterMatch[1]) || category;
221 |     const value = filterMatch[3].trim();
222 |     return {
223 |       action: "FILTER",
224 |       message: `Applied filter ${column?.name || filterMatch[1]} = ${value}.`,
225 |       filters: column ? { [column.name]: value } : {},
226 |       schemaOnly: true,
227 |     };
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   if (/kpi|card|metric/.test(lower)) {
231 |     const aggregation = /highest|max|top/.test(lower) ? "max" : /median/.test(lower) ? "median" : /sum|total/.test(lower) ? "sum" : /average|avg|mean/.test(lower) ? "avg" : /unique|distinct/.test(lower) ? "count_unique" : "count";
232 |     const target = aggregation === "count" && /record|row/.test(lower) ? { name: "__row_count__", title: "Records" } : findColumn(profile, lower, ["money_metric", "score_metric", "continuous_metric", "count_metric", "location", "category"]);
233 |     const title = aggregation === "count" && target.name === "__row_count__" ? "Total Records" : `${aggregation === "avg" ? "Average" : aggregation === "max" ? "Highest" : aggregation === "sum" ? "Total" : aggregation === "median" ? "Median" : aggregation === "count_unique" ? "Unique" : "Count"} ${target?.title || target?.name}`;
234 |     return {
235 |       action: "GENERATE_KPI",
236 |       message: `Added KPI: ${title}.`,
237 |       kpiSpec: sanitizeKpiSpec({ title, metric: target?.name || "__row_count__", aggregation, format: target?.role === "money_metric" ? "currency" : "number" }, profile),
238 |       schemaOnly: true,
239 |     };
240 |   }
241 | 
242 |   if (/scatter|relationship|correlation| vs | versus /.test(lower)) {
243 |     const y = findColumn(profile, lower, ["money_metric", "score_metric", "continuous_metric"] ) || metric;
244 |     const x = profile.columns.find((column) => column.name !== y?.name && ["continuous_metric", "score_metric", "count_metric"].includes(column.role)) || metric2;
245 |     if (x && y) {
246 |       return {
247 |         action: "GENERATE_CHART",
248 |         message: `Created scatter chart: ${y.title} vs ${x.title}.`,
249 |         chartSpec: sanitizeChartSpec({ type: "scatter", title: `${y.title} vs ${x.title}`, xKey: x.name, yKey: y.name, aggregation: "count", limit: 500 }, profile),
250 |         schemaOnly: true,
251 |       };
252 |     }
253 |   }
254 | 
255 |   if (/pie|donut|distribution|breakdown/.test(lower) && !/salary|amount|revenue|score|age|experience|hours/.test(lower)) {
256 |     const x = findCategory(profile, lower) || category;
257 |     if (x) {
258 |       const type = /pie/.test(lower) ? "pie" : "donut";
259 |       return {
260 |         action: "GENERATE_CHART",
261 |         message: `Created ${type} chart for ${x.title}.`,
262 |         chartSpec: sanitizeChartSpec({ type, title: `${x.title} Distribution`, xKey: x.name, yKey: "count", aggregation: "count", limit: 10 }, profile),
263 |         schemaOnly: true,
264 |       };
265 |     }
266 |   }
267 | 
268 |   if (/histogram|distribution/.test(lower)) {
269 |     const y = findColumn(profile, lower, ["money_metric", "score_metric", "continuous_metric", "count_metric"]) || metric;
270 |     if (y) {
271 |       return {
272 |         action: "GENERATE_CHART",
273 |         message: `Created histogram for ${y.title}.`,
274 |         chartSpec: sanitizeChartSpec({ type: "histogram", title: `${y.title} Distribution`, xKey: y.name, yKey: y.name, aggregation: "count", bins: 12 }, profile),
275 |         schemaOnly: true,
276 |       };
277 |     }
278 |   }
279 | 
280 |   if (/chart|graph|show|average|avg|top/.test(lower)) {
281 |     const y = findColumn(profile, lower, ["money_metric", "score_metric", "continuous_metric", "count_metric"]) || metric;
282 |     const x = findCategory(profile, lower) || category;
283 |     if (x && y) {
284 |       const aggregation = /sum|total/.test(lower) ? "sum" : /max|highest/.test(lower) ? "max" : /median/.test(lower) ? "median" : /count/.test(lower) || y.name === "count" ? "count" : "avg";
285 |       return {
286 |         action: "GENERATE_CHART",
287 |         message: `Created chart: ${aggregation} ${y.title} by ${x.title}.`,
288 |         chartSpec: sanitizeChartSpec({ type: "bar", title: `${aggregation === "avg" ? "Average" : aggregation.toUpperCase()} ${y.title} by ${x.title}`, xKey: x.name, yKey: y.name, aggregation, limit: /top\s*(\d+)/.test(lower) ? Number(lower.match(/top\s*(\d+)/)[1]) : 10 }, profile),
289 |         schemaOnly: true,
290 |       };
291 |     }
292 |   }
293 | 
294 |   return {
295 |     action: "ANSWER",
296 |     message: `I found ${profile.rowCount.toLocaleString()} records, ${profile.columnCount} columns, and detected the domain as ${profile.domain}. Ask me to create a KPI, chart, filter, or dashboard.` ,
297 |     schemaOnly: true,
298 |   };
299 | }
300 | 
301 | export async function runDashboardCommand({ dataset, query, currentDashboard = {}, useLlm = true }) {
302 |   const profile = buildSchemaProfile(dataset);
303 |   const matchResult = findBestSchemaMatch(profile, { threshold: 0.35 });
304 |   const ragResult = await retrieveSchemaRagMemories(profile, {
305 |     threshold: 0.55,
306 |     limit: 5,
307 |   });
308 | 
309 |   const deterministic = localCommand(profile, query);
310 |   const shouldUseLlm = useLlm && deterministic.action === "ANSWER";
311 |   const rag = {
312 |     used: ragResult.used,
313 |     matches: ragResult.matches.map((match) => ({
314 |       id: match.entry.id,
315 |       domain: match.entry.domain,
316 |       score: match.score,
317 |     })),
318 |   };
319 | 
320 |   if (shouldUseLlm) {
321 |     const planned = await planCommandWithOllama({
322 |       query,
323 |       schemaProfile: profile,
324 |       memoryMatch: matchResult.best,
325 |       ragMatches: ragResult.matches,
326 |       currentDashboard,
327 |     });
328 |     if (planned && planned.action !== "ANSWER") return { ...planned, rag };
329 |     return { ...deterministic, aiFallback: planned?.aiError || null, model: planned?.model, provider: planned?.provider, rag };
330 |   }
331 | 
332 |   return { ...deterministic, rag };
333 | }
334 | 
335 | function computeLocalAnswer(profile, query) {
336 |   const lower = String(query || "").toLowerCase();
337 |   const metric = findColumn(profile, lower, ["money_metric", "score_metric", "continuous_metric", "count_metric"]);
338 |   const category = findCategory(profile, lower);
339 | 
340 |   if (/schema|columns|fields/.test(lower)) {
341 |     return `This dataset has ${profile.rowCount.toLocaleString()} rows and ${profile.columnCount} columns. Main domain: ${profile.domain}. Columns: ${profile.columns.map((c) => `${c.name} (${c.type}, ${c.role})`).join(", ")}.`;
342 |   }
343 | 
344 |   if (/kpi|dashboard|chart/.test(lower)) {
345 |     const plan = buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile);
346 |     return `Recommended KPIs: ${plan.kpis.map((k) => k.title).join(", ")}. Recommended charts: ${plan.charts.map((c) => c.title).join(", ")}.`;
347 |   }
348 | 
349 |   if (metric?.stats && /average|avg|mean/.test(lower)) {
350 |     return `Average ${metric.title} is approximately ${metric.stats.mean}.`;
351 |   }
352 | 
353 |   if (category && /top|most|distribution|breakdown/.test(lower)) {
354 |     const top = category.topValues?.slice(0, 5).map((item) => `${item.value} (${item.count})`).join(", ");
355 |     return `Top ${category.title} values are: ${top || "not available from schema profile"}.`;
356 |   }
357 | 
358 |   return `Dataset summary: ${profile.rowCount.toLocaleString()} rows, ${profile.columnCount} columns, detected domain ${profile.domain}. Primary metric: ${metric?.name || "not detected"}. Primary category: ${category?.name || "not detected"}.`;
359 | }
360 | 
361 | export async function runSchemaChat({ dataset, query, useLlm = true }) {
362 |   const profile = buildSchemaProfile(dataset);
363 |   const localAnswer = computeLocalAnswer(profile, query);
364 |   if (!useLlm) return { answer: localAnswer, model: "local", provider: "local", schemaOnly: true };
365 |   const formatted = await formatChatAnswerWithOllama({ query, schemaProfile: profile, localAnswer });
366 |   return { ...formatted, schemaOnly: true };
367 | }
368 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-training-store.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-training-store.js`

```js
  1 | import fs from "node:fs";
  2 | import path from "node:path";
  3 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  4 | import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
  5 | import { buildSchemaProfile, makeSchemaOnlyPacket, schemaSimilarity } from "./schema-fingerprint.js";
  6 | import { buildRuleDashboardPlan, templatePlanForStorage } from "./dashboard-plan-engine.js";
  7 | 
  8 | const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
  9 | const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
 10 | const BACKEND_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..", "..", "..");
 11 | const MEMORY_PATH = path.resolve(
 12 |   process.env.SCHEMA_TRAINING_MEMORY_PATH || path.join(BACKEND_ROOT, "data", "schema-training-memory.json"),
 13 | );
 14 | 
 15 | function ensureMemoryFile() {
 16 |   fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(MEMORY_PATH), { recursive: true });
 17 |   if (!fs.existsSync(MEMORY_PATH)) {
 18 |     const seedPath = path.join(path.dirname(MEMORY_PATH), "schema-training-memory.seed.json");
 19 |     if (fs.existsSync(seedPath)) {
 20 |       fs.copyFileSync(seedPath, MEMORY_PATH);
 21 |     } else {
 22 |       fs.writeFileSync(MEMORY_PATH, JSON.stringify([], null, 2));
 23 |     }
 24 |   }
 25 | }
 26 | 
 27 | export function readSchemaTrainingMemory() {
 28 |   ensureMemoryFile();
 29 |   try {
 30 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(MEMORY_PATH, "utf8"));
 31 |     return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
 32 |   } catch {
 33 |     return [];
 34 |   }
 35 | }
 36 | 
 37 | export function writeSchemaTrainingMemory(memory) {
 38 |   ensureMemoryFile();
 39 |   fs.writeFileSync(MEMORY_PATH, JSON.stringify(memory, null, 2));
 40 | }
 41 | 
 42 | export function findBestSchemaMatch(profile, options = {}) {
 43 |   const threshold = options.threshold ?? 0.35;
 44 |   const memory = readSchemaTrainingMemory();
 45 | 
 46 |   const scored = memory
 47 |     .map((entry) => ({ entry, score: schemaSimilarity(profile, entry.schemaProfile) }))
 48 |     .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
 49 | 
 50 |   const best = scored[0] || null;
 51 |   if (!best || best.score < threshold) return { best: null, candidates: scored.slice(0, 5) };
 52 |   return { best, candidates: scored.slice(0, 5) };
 53 | }
 54 | 
 55 | export function trainSchemaExample({ dataset, dashboardPlan, rating = "good", notes = "", source = "manual" }) {
 56 |   const profile = buildSchemaProfile(dataset);
 57 |   const plan = dashboardPlan?.charts?.length || dashboardPlan?.kpis?.length ? dashboardPlan : buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile);
 58 |   const storedPlan = templatePlanForStorage(plan, profile);
 59 | 
 60 |   const memory = readSchemaTrainingMemory();
 61 |   const existingIndex = memory.findIndex((entry) => entry.schemaProfile.signature === profile.signature);
 62 | 
 63 |   const entry = {
 64 |     id: existingIndex >= 0 ? memory[existingIndex].id : randomUUID(),
 65 |     name: dataset.name || dataset.fileName || profile.datasetName,
 66 |     domain: profile.domain,
 67 |     source,
 68 |     rating,
 69 |     notes,
 70 |     schemaProfile: makeSchemaOnlyPacket(profile),
 71 |     dashboardPlan: storedPlan,
 72 |     examplesSeen: existingIndex >= 0 ? (memory[existingIndex].examplesSeen || 1) + 1 : 1,
 73 |     updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 74 |     createdAt: existingIndex >= 0 ? memory[existingIndex].createdAt : new Date().toISOString(),
 75 |   };
 76 | 
 77 |   if (existingIndex >= 0) memory[existingIndex] = entry;
 78 |   else memory.push(entry);
 79 | 
 80 |   writeSchemaTrainingMemory(memory);
 81 |   return entry;
 82 | }
 83 | 
 84 | export function trainManySchemaExamples(examples = []) {
 85 |   return examples.map((example) => trainSchemaExample(example));
 86 | }
 87 | 
 88 | export function exportTrainingJsonl() {
 89 |   const memory = readSchemaTrainingMemory();
 90 |   return memory
 91 |     .map((entry) => JSON.stringify({
 92 |       messages: [
 93 |         {
 94 |           role: "system",
 95 |           content: "You are InsightFlow Schema Analyst. Return strict JSON dashboard plans only. Never include raw data rows."
 96 |         },
 97 |         {
 98 |           role: "user",
 99 |           content: `Create a dashboard plan for this schema only:\n${JSON.stringify(entry.schemaProfile)}`
100 |         },
101 |         {
102 |           role: "assistant",
103 |           content: JSON.stringify({
104 |             action: "GENERATE_DASHBOARD",
105 |             domain: entry.domain,
106 |             kpis: entry.dashboardPlan.kpis,
107 |             charts: entry.dashboardPlan.charts,
108 |             schemaOnly: true
109 |           })
110 |         }
111 |       ]
112 |     }))
113 |     .join("\n");
114 | }
115 | 
116 | export function getMemoryStats() {
117 |   const memory = readSchemaTrainingMemory();
118 |   const domains = memory.reduce((acc, entry) => {
119 |     acc[entry.domain] = (acc[entry.domain] || 0) + 1;
120 |     return acc;
121 |   }, {});
122 | 
123 |   return {
124 |     count: memory.length,
125 |     domains,
126 |     memoryPath: MEMORY_PATH,
127 |   };
128 | }
129 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-understanding-engine.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyst/schema-understanding-engine.js`

```js
  1 | import {
  2 |   buildSchemaProfile,
  3 |   normalizeColumnName,
  4 | } from "./schema-fingerprint.js";
  5 | 
  6 | const MONEY_HINTS = [
  7 |   "salary",
  8 |   "revenue",
  9 |   "sales",
 10 |   "amount",
 11 |   "price",
 12 |   "cost",
 13 |   "profit",
 14 |   "income",
 15 |   "spend",
 16 |   "budget",
 17 |   "value",
 18 |   "gmv",
 19 |   "arr",
 20 |   "mrr",
 21 | ];
 22 | 
 23 | const PEOPLE_HINTS = [
 24 |   "employee",
 25 |   "developer",
 26 |   "experience",
 27 |   "education",
 28 |   "department",
 29 |   "company",
 30 |   "role",
 31 |   "job",
 32 |   "salary",
 33 |   "skills",
 34 |   "language",
 35 |   "framework",
 36 | ];
 37 | 
 38 | const COMMERCE_HINTS = [
 39 |   "customer",
 40 |   "product",
 41 |   "order",
 42 |   "sales",
 43 |   "revenue",
 44 |   "amount",
 45 |   "quantity",
 46 |   "region",
 47 |   "country",
 48 |   "market",
 49 | ];
 50 | 
 51 | const HEALTH_HINTS = [
 52 |   "stress",
 53 |   "anxiety",
 54 |   "depression",
 55 |   "sleep",
 56 |   "health",
 57 |   "screen",
 58 |   "social",
 59 |   "addiction",
 60 |   "wellness",
 61 | ];
 62 | 
 63 | const EDUCATION_HINTS = [
 64 |   "student",
 65 |   "marks",
 66 |   "grade",
 67 |   "attendance",
 68 |   "course",
 69 |   "exam",
 70 |   "gpa",
 71 |   "school",
 72 |   "college",
 73 | ];
 74 | 
 75 | function includesAny(text, hints) {
 76 |   return hints.some((hint) => text.includes(hint));
 77 | }
 78 | 
 79 | function normalize(value = "") {
 80 |   return normalizeColumnName(value);
 81 | }
 82 | 
 83 | function columnText(column = {}) {
 84 |   return [
 85 |     column.name,
 86 |     column.normalizedName,
 87 |     column.title,
 88 |     column.type,
 89 |     column.role,
 90 |     column.description,
 91 |   ]
 92 |     .filter(Boolean)
 93 |     .join(" ")
 94 |     .toLowerCase();
 95 | }
 96 | 
 97 | function isMeasureMetric(column) {
 98 |   return [
 99 |     "money_metric",
100 |     "score_metric",
101 |     "rate_metric",
102 |     "count_metric",
103 |     "continuous_metric",
104 |   ].includes(column.role);
105 | }
106 | 
107 | function isCategory(column) {
108 |   return [
109 |     "location",
110 |     "category",
111 |     "target",
112 |     "numeric_category",
113 |     "date",
114 |   ].includes(column.role) || ["string", "category", "boolean", "date"].includes(column.type);
115 | }
116 | 
117 | function isDate(column) {
118 |   return column.role === "date" || column.type === "date";
119 | }
120 | 
121 | function isMoney(column) {
122 |   const text = columnText(column);
123 |   return column.role === "money_metric" || includesAny(text, MONEY_HINTS);
124 | }
125 | 
126 | function isMultiValue(column) {
127 |   const name = normalize(column.name || column.normalizedName || "");
128 |   return /(language|languages|framework|frameworks|skill|skills|tag|tags|tools|technolog|categories)/.test(name);
129 | }
130 | 
131 | function confidenceFromMatches(matches, total) {
132 |   if (!total) return 0;
133 |   return Math.min(1, matches / Math.max(3, total));
134 | }
135 | 
136 | function roundScore(value) {
137 |   return Math.round(Math.min(1, value) * 100) / 100;
138 | }
139 | 
140 | export function detectSmartDomain(profile) {
141 |   const text = (profile.columns || []).map(columnText).join(" ");
142 |   const total = profile.columns?.length || 1;
143 | 
144 |   const scores = [
145 |     {
146 |       domain: "workforce_salary",
147 |       score:
148 |         confidenceFromMatches(
149 |           PEOPLE_HINTS.filter((hint) => text.includes(hint)).length,
150 |           total
151 |         ) + (text.includes("salary") ? 0.4 : 0),
152 |     },
153 |     {
154 |       domain: "sales_commerce",
155 |       score:
156 |         confidenceFromMatches(
157 |           COMMERCE_HINTS.filter((hint) => text.includes(hint)).length,
158 |           total
159 |         ) + (includesAny(text, ["sales", "revenue", "amount"]) ? 0.35 : 0),
160 |     },
161 |     {
162 |       domain: "health_wellness",
163 |       score: confidenceFromMatches(
164 |         HEALTH_HINTS.filter((hint) => text.includes(hint)).length,
165 |         total
166 |       ),
167 |     },
168 |     {
169 |       domain: "education",
170 |       score: confidenceFromMatches(
171 |         EDUCATION_HINTS.filter((hint) => text.includes(hint)).length,
172 |         total
173 |       ),
174 |     },
175 |   ].sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
176 | 
177 |   const best = scores[0];
178 | 
179 |   return {
180 |     domain: best.score >= 0.35 ? best.domain : profile.domain || "general_analytics",
181 |     confidence: roundScore(best.score),
182 |     candidates: scores.map((item) => ({
183 |       domain: item.domain,
184 |       score: roundScore(item.score),
185 |     })),
186 |   };
187 | }
188 | 
189 | export function identifySchemaRoles(profile) {
190 |   const columns = profile.columns || [];
191 | 
192 |   const metrics = columns
193 |     .filter(isMeasureMetric)
194 |     .map((column) => ({
195 |       name: column.name,
196 |       title: column.title,
197 |       role: column.role,
198 |       type: column.type,
199 |       priority:
200 |         (isMoney(column) ? 30 : 0) +
201 |         (column.stats ? 10 : 0) +
202 |         (column.uniqueCount > 5 ? 5 : 0),
203 |     }))
204 |     .sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
205 | 
206 |   const categories = columns
207 |     .filter(isCategory)
208 |     .map((column) => ({
209 |       name: column.name,
210 |       title: column.title,
211 |       role: column.role,
212 |       type: column.type,
213 |       uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount,
214 |       multiValue: isMultiValue(column),
215 |       priority:
216 |         (column.role === "location" ? 30 : 0) +
217 |         (column.role === "category" ? 20 : 0) +
218 |         (isMultiValue(column) ? 12 : 0) +
219 |         (column.uniqueCount > 1 && column.uniqueCount <= 50 ? 8 : 0),
220 |     }))
221 |     .sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority);
222 | 
223 |   const dates = columns
224 |     .filter(isDate)
225 |     .map((column) => ({
226 |       name: column.name,
227 |       title: column.title,
228 |       role: column.role,
229 |       type: column.type,
230 |     }));
231 | 
232 |   const ids = columns
233 |     .filter((column) => column.role === "id")
234 |     .map((column) => ({
235 |       name: column.name,
236 |       title: column.title,
237 |       role: column.role,
238 |       type: column.type,
239 |     }));
240 | 
241 |   return {
242 |     primaryMetric: metrics[0] || null,
243 |     secondaryMetric: metrics[1] || null,
244 |     primaryCategory: categories[0] || null,
245 |     secondaryCategory: categories[1] || null,
246 |     primaryDate: dates[0] || null,
247 |     metrics,
248 |     categories,
249 |     dates,
250 |     ids,
251 |   };
252 | }
253 | 
254 | export function buildSmartKpiCandidates(profile, roles = identifySchemaRoles(profile)) {
255 |   const kpis = [
256 |     {
257 |       title: "Total Records",
258 |       metric: "__row_count__",
259 |       aggregation: "count",
260 |       format: "number",
261 |       reason: "Shows total dataset size.",
262 |       priority: 100,
263 |     },
264 |     {
265 |       title: "Total Columns",
266 |       metric: "__column_count__",
267 |       aggregation: "count",
268 |       format: "number",
269 |       reason: "Shows schema width.",
270 |       priority: 80,
271 |     },
272 |   ];
273 | 
274 |   for (const metric of roles.metrics.slice(0, 4)) {
275 |     const format = metric.role === "money_metric" ? "currency" : "number";
276 | 
277 |     kpis.push({
278 |       title: `Average ${metric.title || metric.name}`,
279 |       metric: metric.name,
280 |       aggregation: "avg",
281 |       format,
282 |       reason: `Average value of ${metric.name}.`,
283 |       priority: metric.priority + 40,
284 |     });
285 | 
286 |     kpis.push({
287 |       title: `Median ${metric.title || metric.name}`,
288 |       metric: metric.name,
289 |       aggregation: "median",
290 |       format,
291 |       reason: `Median gives a robust midpoint for ${metric.name}.`,
292 |       priority: metric.priority + 30,
293 |     });
294 | 
295 |     kpis.push({
296 |       title: `Highest ${metric.title || metric.name}`,
297 |       metric: metric.name,
298 |       aggregation: "max",
299 |       format,
300 |       reason: `Maximum observed ${metric.name}.`,
301 |       priority: metric.priority + 20,
302 |     });
303 |   }
304 | 
305 |   for (const category of roles.categories.slice(0, 3)) {
306 |     kpis.push({
307 |       title: `Unique ${category.title || category.name}`,
308 |       metric: category.name,
309 |       aggregation: "count_unique",
310 |       format: "number",
311 |       reason: `Counts unique values in ${category.name}.`,
312 |       priority: category.priority + 10,
313 |     });
314 |   }
315 | 
316 |   return kpis
317 |     .sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority)
318 |     .slice(0, 8);
319 | }
320 | 
321 | export function buildSmartChartCandidates(profile, roles = identifySchemaRoles(profile)) {
322 |   const charts = [];
323 |   const metric = roles.primaryMetric;
324 |   const metric2 = roles.secondaryMetric;
325 |   const category = roles.primaryCategory;
326 |   const category2 = roles.secondaryCategory;
327 |   const date = roles.primaryDate;
328 | 
329 |   if (metric && category) {
330 |     charts.push({
331 |       title: `Average ${metric.title || metric.name} by ${category.title || category.name}`,
332 |       type: "bar",
333 |       xKey: category.name,
334 |       yKey: metric.name,
335 |       aggregation: "avg",
336 |       limit: 10,
337 |       splitValues: category.multiValue,
338 |       reason: "Compares the main metric across the most useful category.",
339 |       priority: 100,
340 |     });
341 |   }
342 | 
343 |   if (metric) {
344 |     charts.push({
345 |       title: `${metric.title || metric.name} Distribution`,
346 |       type: "histogram",
347 |       xKey: metric.name,
348 |       yKey: metric.name,
349 |       aggregation: "count",
350 |       bins: 12,
351 |       limit: 12,
352 |       reason: "Shows spread and outliers of the primary metric.",
353 |       priority: 90,
354 |     });
355 |   }
356 | 
357 |   if (metric && metric2) {
358 |     charts.push({
359 |       title: `${metric.title || metric.name} vs ${metric2.title || metric2.name}`,
360 |       type: "scatter",
361 |       xKey: metric2.name,
362 |       yKey: metric.name,
363 |       aggregation: "count",
364 |       limit: 500,
365 |       reason: "Shows relationship between two numeric metrics.",
366 |       priority: 85,
367 |     });
368 |   }
369 | 
370 |   if (category) {
371 |     charts.push({
372 |       title: `${category.title || category.name} Distribution`,
373 |       type: "donut",
374 |       xKey: category.name,
375 |       yKey: "count",
376 |       aggregation: "count",
377 |       limit: 10,
378 |       splitValues: category.multiValue,
379 |       reason: "Shows category composition.",
380 |       priority: 80,
381 |     });
382 |   }
383 | 
384 |   if (metric && category2) {
385 |     charts.push({
386 |       title: `Average ${metric.title || metric.name} by ${category2.title || category2.name}`,
387 |       type: "bar",
388 |       xKey: category2.name,
389 |       yKey: metric.name,
390 |       aggregation: "avg",
391 |       limit: 10,
392 |       splitValues: category2.multiValue,
393 |       reason: "Adds a second category breakdown.",
394 |       priority: 75,
395 |     });
396 |   }
397 | 
398 |   if (metric && date) {
399 |     charts.push({
400 |       title: `${metric.title || metric.name} Trend`,
401 |       type: "line",
402 |       xKey: date.name,
403 |       yKey: metric.name,
404 |       aggregation: "avg",
405 |       limit: 24,
406 |       reason: "Shows how the primary metric changes over time.",
407 |       priority: 70,
408 |     });
409 |   }
410 | 
411 |   for (const multi of roles.categories.filter((item) => item.multiValue).slice(0, 2)) {
412 |     if (metric) {
413 |       charts.push({
414 |         title: `Average ${metric.title || metric.name} by ${multi.title || multi.name}`,
415 |         type: "bar",
416 |         xKey: multi.name,
417 |         yKey: metric.name,
418 |         aggregation: "avg",
419 |         limit: 10,
420 |         splitValues: true,
421 |         reason: "Splits multi-value fields like languages/frameworks into separate groups.",
422 |         priority: 78,
423 |       });
424 |     }
425 |   }
426 | 
427 |   return charts
428 |     .sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority)
429 |     .slice(0, 10);
430 | }
431 | 
432 | export function explainSchemaForUser(profile, understanding) {
433 |   const roles = understanding.roles;
434 | 
435 |   return [
436 |     `I detected this as a ${understanding.domain.domain.replaceAll("_", " ")} dataset with ${Math.round(
437 |       understanding.domain.confidence * 100
438 |     )}% confidence.`,
439 |     `It has ${profile.rowCount.toLocaleString()} rows and ${profile.columnCount} columns.`,
440 |     roles.primaryMetric
441 |       ? `Main metric appears to be "${roles.primaryMetric.name}".`
442 |       : "I could not confidently detect a main numeric metric.",
443 |     roles.primaryCategory
444 |       ? `Main category appears to be "${roles.primaryCategory.name}".`
445 |       : "I could not confidently detect a main category.",
446 |     roles.primaryDate
447 |       ? `Time/date column detected: "${roles.primaryDate.name}".`
448 |       : "No strong time/date column detected.",
449 |   ].join(" ");
450 | }
451 | 
452 | export function buildSchemaUnderstanding(datasetOrProfile = {}) {
453 |   const profile = datasetOrProfile.columns?.[0]?.role
454 |     ? datasetOrProfile
455 |     : buildSchemaProfile(datasetOrProfile);
456 | 
457 |   const domain = detectSmartDomain(profile);
458 |   const roles = identifySchemaRoles(profile);
459 |   const kpiCandidates = buildSmartKpiCandidates(profile, roles);
460 |   const chartCandidates = buildSmartChartCandidates(profile, roles);
461 | 
462 |   return {
463 |     schemaOnly: true,
464 |     profile,
465 |     domain,
466 |     roles,
467 |     kpiCandidates,
468 |     chartCandidates,
469 |     userExplanation: explainSchemaForUser(profile, {
470 |       domain,
471 |       roles,
472 |     }),
473 |   };
474 | }
475 | 
```

```js
  1 | import {
  2 |   buildSchemaUnderstanding,
  3 | } from "./schema-understanding-engine.js";
  4 | 
  5 | import {
  6 |   retrieveSchemaRagMemories,
  7 |   trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset,
  8 |   buildRagDashboardPlan,
  9 | } from "./schema-rag-retriever.js";
 10 | 
 11 | import {
 12 |   buildGuardianDashboardResponse,
 13 | } from "./dashboard-quality-guardian.js";
 14 | 
 15 | import {
 16 |   buildRuleDashboardPlan,
 17 |   mergePlans,
 18 | } from "./dashboard-plan-engine.js";
 19 | 
 20 | import {
 21 |   buildSchemaProfile,
 22 |   makeSchemaOnlyPacket,
 23 | } from "./schema-fingerprint.js";
 24 | 
 25 | function compactRagMatch(match) {
 26 |   const entry = match.entry || match;
 27 | 
 28 |   return {
 29 |     id: entry.id,
 30 |     name: entry.name,
 31 |     domain: entry.domain,
 32 |     score: match.score,
 33 |     schemaSignature: entry.schemaSignature,
 34 |     dashboardPlan: entry.dashboardPlan,
 35 |   };
 36 | }
 37 | 
 38 | export async function buildSmartDashboardTrainingContext(dataset, options = {}) {
 39 |   const understanding = buildSchemaUnderstanding(dataset);
 40 |   const profile = understanding.profile;
 41 | 
 42 |   const rag = await retrieveSchemaRagMemories(profile, {
 43 |     threshold: options.ragThreshold ?? 0.55,
 44 |     limit: options.ragLimit ?? 5,
 45 |     useOllama: options.useOllama !== false,
 46 |   });
 47 | 
 48 |   const ragPlan = buildRagDashboardPlan(profile, rag.matches);
 49 |   const rulePlan = buildRuleDashboardPlan(profile);
 50 | 
 51 |   const smartCandidatePlan = {
 52 |     source: "schema-understanding-engine",
 53 |     domain: understanding.domain.domain,
 54 |     kpis: understanding.kpiCandidates,
 55 |     charts: understanding.chartCandidates,
 56 |   };
 57 | 
 58 |   const merged = mergePlans(
 59 |     profile,
 60 |     ragPlan,
 61 |     smartCandidatePlan,
 62 |     rulePlan
 63 |   );
 64 | 
 65 |   const guarded = buildGuardianDashboardResponse(profile, merged, {
 66 |     maxCharts: options.maxCharts ?? 7,
 67 |     maxKpis: options.maxKpis ?? 8,
 68 |   });
 69 | 
 70 |   return {
 71 |     schemaOnly: true,
 72 |     profile: makeSchemaOnlyPacket(profile),
 73 |     understanding: {
 74 |       domain: understanding.domain,
 75 |       roles: understanding.roles,
 76 |       userExplanation: understanding.userExplanation,
 77 |       kpiCandidates: understanding.kpiCandidates,
 78 |       chartCandidates: understanding.chartCandidates,
 79 |     },
 80 |     rag: {
 81 |       used: rag.used,
 82 |       matches: rag.matches.map(compactRagMatch),
 83 |       query: rag.query,
 84 |       stats: rag.stats,
 85 |     },
 86 |     dashboard: guarded.dashboard,
 87 |     quality: {
 88 |       score: guarded.qualityScore,
 89 |       health: guarded.dashboardHealth,
 90 |       warnings: guarded.warnings,
 91 |       fixes: guarded.fixes,
 92 |     },
 93 |   };
 94 | }
 95 | 
 96 | export async function trainSmartRagFromApprovedDashboard({
 97 |   dataset,
 98 |   dashboardPlan,
 99 |   rating = "good",
100 |   notes = "",
101 |   source = "smart-user-feedback",
102 |   useOllama,
103 | } = {}) {
104 |   const profile = buildSchemaProfile(dataset);
105 |   const understanding = buildSchemaUnderstanding(profile);
106 | 
107 |   const result = await trainSchemaRagMemoryFromDataset({
108 |     dataset,
109 |     schemaProfile: profile,
110 |     acceptedDashboardPlan: dashboardPlan,
111 |     rating,
112 |     notes: [
113 |       notes,
114 |       understanding.userExplanation,
115 |       `Detected domain: ${understanding.domain.domain}`,
116 |       `Primary metric: ${understanding.roles.primaryMetric?.name || "none"}`,
117 |       `Primary category: ${understanding.roles.primaryCategory?.name || "none"}`,
118 |     ]
119 |       .filter(Boolean)
120 |       .join("\n"),
121 |     source,
122 |     useOllama,
123 |   });
124 | 
125 |   return {
126 |     ...result,
127 |     understanding: {
128 |       domain: understanding.domain,
129 |       userExplanation: understanding.userExplanation,
130 |     },
131 |   };
132 | }
133 | 
134 | export async function explainDatasetSchemaForUser(dataset) {
135 |   const understanding = buildSchemaUnderstanding(dataset);
136 | 
137 |   return {
138 |     schemaOnly: true,
139 |     profile: makeSchemaOnlyPacket(understanding.profile),
140 |     explanation: understanding.userExplanation,
141 |     domain: understanding.domain,
142 |     roles: understanding.roles,
143 |     recommendedKpis: understanding.kpiCandidates.slice(0, 6),
144 |     recommendedCharts: understanding.chartCandidates.slice(0, 7),
145 |   };
146 | }
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyzer.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-analyzer.js`

```js
  1 | import { ollamaService } from './ai-providers/ollama-service.js';
  2 | import { geminiService } from './ai-providers/gemini-service.js';
  3 | import { buildEnhancedSchema, detectDataType } from './schema-detector.js';
  4 | 
  5 | class AIAnalyzer {
  6 |   constructor() {
  7 |     this.aiProvider = null;
  8 |     this.initPromise = this.initializeProvider();
  9 |   }
 10 | 
 11 |   async initializeProvider() {
 12 |     try {
 13 |       const ollamaAvailable = await ollamaService.isAvailable();
 14 |       if (ollamaAvailable) {
 15 |         this.aiProvider = 'ollama';
 16 |         console.log('AI Analyzer: Using Ollama');
 17 |         return;
 18 |       }
 19 | 
 20 |       const geminiAvailable = await geminiService.isAvailable();
 21 |       if (geminiAvailable) {
 22 |         this.aiProvider = 'gemini';
 23 |         console.log('AI Analyzer: Using Gemini');
 24 |         return;
 25 |       }
 26 | 
 27 |       this.aiProvider = null;
 28 |       console.log('AI Analyzer: Using rule-based analysis only');
 29 |     } catch (error) {
 30 |       console.error('AI Provider initialization error:', error);
 31 |       this.aiProvider = null;
 32 |     }
 33 |   }
 34 | 
 35 |   async analyzeDataset(columns, rows, existingSchema = null) {
 36 |     await this.initPromise;
 37 |     
 38 |     const schema = existingSchema || buildEnhancedSchema(columns, rows);
 39 |     
 40 |     const analysisResult = {
 41 |       schema,
 42 |       chartRecommendations: schema.recommendedCharts || [],
 43 |       insights: schema.insights || [],
 44 |       aiInsights: null,
 45 |       generatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
 46 |     };
 47 | 
 48 |     if (this.aiProvider) {
 49 |       try {
 50 |         const aiAnalysis = await this.performAIAnalysis(columns, rows, schema);
 51 |         analysisResult.aiInsights = aiAnalysis;
 52 |       } catch (error) {
 53 |         console.error('AI Analysis failed:', error.message);
 54 |         analysisResult.aiInsights = {
 55 |           error: error.message,
 56 |           fallback: 'Rule-based analysis available'
 57 |         };
 58 |       }
 59 |     }
 60 | 
 61 |     return analysisResult;
 62 |   }
 63 | 
 64 |   async performAIAnalysis(columns, rows, schema) {
 65 |     const dataSummary = this.createDataSummary(columns, rows, schema);
 66 |     const prompt = this.buildAnalysisPrompt(dataSummary);
 67 | 
 68 |     let response;
 69 |     if (this.aiProvider === 'ollama') {
 70 |       response = await ollamaService.generateResponse(prompt, {
 71 |         dataset: { columns: columns.map(c => c.name), rowCount: rows.length },
 72 |         schema
 73 |       });
 74 |     } else if (this.aiProvider === 'gemini') {
 75 |       response = await geminiService.generateResponse(prompt, {
 76 |         dataset: { columns: columns.map(c => c.name), rowCount: rows.length },
 77 |         schema
 78 |       });
 79 |     }
 80 | 
 81 |     if (response.success) {
 82 |       return this.parseAIResponse(response.content, schema);
 83 |     }
 84 | 
 85 |     throw new Error(response.error || 'AI analysis failed');
 86 |   }
 87 | 
 88 |   createDataSummary(columns, rows, schema) {
 89 |     const summary = {
 90 |       columnCount: columns.length,
 91 |       rowCount: rows.length,
 92 |       dataType: schema.dataType || detectDataType(columns, rows).type,
 93 |       columns: {},
 94 |       sampleRows: rows.slice(0, 5)
 95 |     };
 96 | 
 97 |     columns.forEach(col => {
 98 |       const values = rows.map(r => r[col.name]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined);
 99 |       
100 |       summary.columns[col.name] = {
101 |         type: col.type,
102 |         uniqueCount: new Set(values).size,
103 |         nullCount: values.filter(v => v === null || v === undefined).length,
104 |         sample: values.slice(0, 5)
105 |       };
106 | 
107 |       if (col.type === 'number' || col.type === 'integer') {
108 |         const numericValues = values.map(v => Number(v)).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
109 |         if (numericValues.length > 0) {
110 |           summary.columns[col.name].min = Math.min(...numericValues);
111 |           summary.columns[col.name].max = Math.max(...numericValues);
112 |           summary.columns[col.name].avg = numericValues.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / numericValues.length;
113 |         }
114 |       }
115 |     });
116 | 
117 |     return summary;
118 |   }
119 | 
120 |   buildAnalysisPrompt(dataSummary) {
121 |     return `You are a data analytics expert. Analyze this dataset and provide insights.
122 | 
123 | DATASET SUMMARY:
124 | - Columns: ${Object.keys(dataSummary.columns).join(', ')}
125 | - Row Count: ${dataSummary.rowCount}
126 | - Data Type: ${dataSummary.dataType}
127 | 
128 | COLUMN DETAILS:
129 | ${Object.entries(dataSummary.columns).map(([name, info]) => `
130 | ${name}:
131 |   Type: ${info.type}
132 |   Unique Values: ${info.uniqueCount}
133 |   ${info.min !== undefined ? `Range: ${info.min.toFixed(2)} - ${info.max.toFixed(2)} (Avg: ${info.avg.toFixed(2)})` : ''}
134 |   Sample: ${info.sample.join(', ')}
135 | `).join('\n')}
136 | 
137 | Please provide:
138 | 1. Key insights about this data
139 | 2. Recommended chart types with specific column recommendations
140 | 3. Business questions this data could answer
141 | 4. Any data quality issues to note
142 | 
143 | Respond in JSON format:
144 | {
145 |   "insights": ["insight1", "insight2"],
146 |   "recommendedCharts": [{"type": "bar", "xAxis": "column", "yAxis": "column", "reason": "..."}],
147 |   "businessQuestions": ["question1", "question2"],
148 |   "dataQuality": ["issue1", "issue2"]
149 | }`;
150 |   }
151 | 
152 |   parseAIResponse(content, schema) {
153 |     try {
154 |       const jsonMatch = content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
155 |       if (jsonMatch) {
156 |         const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
157 |         return {
158 |           insights: parsed.insights || [],
159 |           recommendedCharts: parsed.recommendedCharts || [],
160 |           businessQuestions: parsed.businessQuestions || [],
161 |           dataQuality: parsed.dataQuality || []
162 |         };
163 |       }
164 |     } catch (e) {
165 |       console.warn('Failed to parse AI response as JSON');
166 |     }
167 | 
168 |     return {
169 |       insights: [content.substring(0, 500)],
170 |       recommendedCharts: schema.recommendedCharts || [],
171 |       businessQuestions: [],
172 |       dataQuality: []
173 |     };
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   async analyzeQueryContext(dataset, query) {
177 |     const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();
178 |     const schema = buildEnhancedSchema(dataset.columns, dataset.rows);
179 |     
180 |     let analysis = {
181 |       intent: 'general',
182 |       suggestedChart: null,
183 |       metric: schema.primaryMetric,
184 |       dimension: schema.primaryDimension,
185 |       filters: []
186 |     };
187 | 
188 |     if (/trend|over time|growth|increase|decrease|month|year|quarter/i.test(query)) {
189 |       analysis.intent = 'trend';
190 |       analysis.suggestedChart = {
191 |         type: 'line',
192 |         title: `${schema.primaryMetric} Trend`,
193 |         xKey: schema.dateColumns[0] || 'date',
194 |         yKey: schema.primaryMetric
195 |       };
196 |     }
197 | 
198 |     if (/compare|by category|breakdown|per|each/i.test(query)) {
199 |       analysis.intent = 'comparison';
200 |       analysis.suggestedChart = {
201 |         type: 'bar',
202 |         title: `${schema.primaryMetric} by ${schema.categoryColumns[0] || 'category'}`,
203 |         xKey: schema.categoryColumns[0] || 'category',
204 |         yKey: schema.primaryMetric
205 |       };
206 |     }
207 | 
208 |     if (/top|best|highest|lowest|worst|bottom|ranking/i.test(query)) {
209 |       analysis.intent = 'ranking';
210 |       analysis.suggestedChart = {
211 |         type: 'bar',
212 |         title: `Top ${schema.primaryMetric}`,
213 |         xKey: schema.categoryColumns[0] || 'category',
214 |         yKey: schema.primaryMetric
215 |       };
216 |     }
217 | 
218 |     if (/distribution|spread|range|average|mean/i.test(query)) {
219 |       analysis.intent = 'distribution';
220 |       analysis.suggestedChart = {
221 |         type: 'histogram',
222 |         title: `${schema.primaryMetric} Distribution`,
223 |         xKey: 'range',
224 |         yKey: 'count'
225 |       };
226 |     }
227 | 
228 |     if (/share|percentage|portion|proportion/i.test(query)) {
229 |       analysis.intent = 'proportion';
230 |       analysis.suggestedChart = {
231 |         type: 'pie',
232 |         title: `${schema.primaryMetric} Share`,
233 |         xKey: schema.categoryColumns[0] || 'category',
234 |         yKey: schema.primaryMetric
235 |       };
236 |     }
237 | 
238 |     if (/correlation|relationship|compare/i.test(query) && schema.numericColumns.length >= 2) {
239 |       analysis.intent = 'correlation';
240 |       analysis.suggestedChart = {
241 |         type: 'scatter',
242 |         title: 'Correlation Analysis',
243 |         xKey: schema.primaryMetric,
244 |         yKey: schema.secondaryMetric || schema.numericColumns[1]
245 |       };
246 |     }
247 | 
248 |     if (this.aiProvider && /why|explain|analyze|insight/i.test(query)) {
249 |       try {
250 |         const prompt = `Given a dataset with columns: ${dataset.columns.map(c => c.name).join(', ')}
251 |         And the user's question: "${query}"
252 |         
253 |         What chart would be most appropriate and why? Respond with JSON:
254 |         {"chartType": "bar|line|pie|scatter|area", "xAxis": "column", "yAxis": "column", "reason": "..."}`;
255 | 
256 |         let response;
257 |         if (this.aiProvider === 'ollama') {
258 |           response = await ollamaService.generateResponse(prompt);
259 |         } else if (this.aiProvider === 'gemini') {
260 |           response = await geminiService.generateResponse(prompt);
261 |         }
262 | 
263 |         if (response.success) {
264 |           try {
265 |             const parsed = JSON.parse(response.content.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)?.[0] || '{}');
266 |             if (parsed.chartType) {
267 |               analysis.suggestedChart = {
268 |                 type: parsed.chartType,
269 |                 title: `${schema.primaryMetric} Analysis`,
270 |                 xKey: parsed.xAxis,
271 |                 yKey: parsed.yAxis
272 |               };
273 |               analysis.aiReasoning = parsed.reason;
274 |             }
275 |           } catch (e) {}
276 |         }
277 |       } catch (e) {
278 |         console.warn('Query context analysis failed:', e.message);
279 |       }
280 |     }
281 | 
282 |     return analysis;
283 |   }
284 | }
285 | 
286 | export const aiAnalyzer = new AIAnalyzer();
287 | export default AIAnalyzer;
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai-cascade-service.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai-cascade-service.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * AI Cascade Service
  3 |  * Priority: 1. Ollama (Local)
  4 |  *          2. Gemini API (Cloud)
  5 |  *          3. Local Fallback (Schema-based)
  6 |  */
  7 | 
  8 | import { isOllamaConfigured } from "./ollama-ai-service.js";
  9 | import { createChatResponse, classifyChatQuery } from "./analytics-service.js";
 10 | import { getCachedQuery, cacheQuery } from "./query-cache.js";
 11 | import { aiManager } from "./ai/ai-manager.js";
 12 | 
 13 | const hasGeminiApiKey = () =>
 14 |   Boolean(process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY?.trim() || process.env.GOOGLE_API_KEY?.trim());
 15 | 
 16 | export async function performAICascadeAnalysis(dataset, query) {
 17 |   console.log("\n[cascade] ====================================");
 18 |   console.log(`[cascade] Starting AI cascade for: "${query.substring(0, 30)}..."`);
 19 |   console.log("[cascade] Priority: Ollama -> Gemini -> Local");
 20 | 
 21 |   const queryType = classifyChatQuery(query);
 22 |   const cachedResult = getCachedQuery(dataset.id, query);
 23 | 
 24 |   if (cachedResult) {
 25 |     console.log("[cascade] CACHE HIT");
 26 |     return {
 27 |       ...cachedResult,
 28 |       fromCache: true,
 29 |       cascade: { stage: "cache", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
 30 |     };
 31 |   }
 32 | 
 33 |   console.log("[cascade] CACHE MISS - Proceeding");
 34 | 
 35 |   if (queryType !== "analysis") {
 36 |     console.log(`[cascade] Using local guided response for query type: ${queryType}`);
 37 |     const localResult = await tryLocalFallback(dataset, query);
 38 |     cacheQuery(dataset.id, query, localResult);
 39 |     return {
 40 |       ...localResult,
 41 |       cascade: { stage: "local", model: "Local Schema", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
 42 |     };
 43 |   }
 44 | 
 45 |   const ollamaResult = await tryOllamaAnalysis(dataset, query, queryType);
 46 |   if (ollamaResult.success) {
 47 |     console.log("[cascade] LEVEL 1: OLLAMA SUCCESS");
 48 |     cacheQuery(dataset.id, query, ollamaResult);
 49 |     return {
 50 |       ...ollamaResult,
 51 |       cascade: { stage: "ollama", model: ollamaResult.model || "Ollama", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
 52 |     };
 53 |   }
 54 | 
 55 |   console.log(`[cascade] OLLAMA FAILED: ${ollamaResult.error}`);
 56 |   console.log("[cascade] -> LEVEL 2: GEMINI");
 57 | 
 58 |   const geminiResult = await tryGeminiAnalysis(dataset, query);
 59 |   if (geminiResult.success) {
 60 |     console.log("[cascade] LEVEL 2: GEMINI SUCCESS");
 61 |     cacheQuery(dataset.id, query, geminiResult);
 62 |     return {
 63 |       ...geminiResult,
 64 |       cascade: { stage: "gemini", model: "Gemini 1.5 Flash", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
 65 |     };
 66 |   }
 67 | 
 68 |   console.log(`[cascade] GEMINI FAILED: ${geminiResult.error}`);
 69 |   console.log("[cascade] -> LEVEL 3: LOCAL FALLBACK");
 70 | 
 71 |   const localResult = await tryLocalFallback(dataset, query);
 72 |   console.log("[cascade] LEVEL 3: LOCAL SUCCESS");
 73 |   cacheQuery(dataset.id, query, localResult);
 74 |   return {
 75 |     ...localResult,
 76 |     cascade: { stage: "local", model: "Local Schema", timestamp: new Date().toISOString() },
 77 |   };
 78 | }
 79 | 
 80 | async function tryOllamaAnalysis(dataset, query, queryType) {
 81 |   try {
 82 |     const isAvailable = await isOllamaConfigured();
 83 |     if (!isAvailable) {
 84 |       return { success: false, error: "Ollama not available" };
 85 |     }
 86 | 
 87 |     const schemaSummary = (dataset.columns || [])
 88 |       .slice(0, 12)
 89 |       .map((column) => `${column.name} (${column.type || "unknown"})`)
 90 |       .join(", ");
 91 |     const prompt = `Answer in 2 short sentences as a dashboard data analyst.
 92 | Dataset: ${dataset.name}. Rows: ${dataset.rowCount || dataset.rows?.length || 0}. Columns: ${schemaSummary}.
 93 | Question: ${query}`;
 94 | 
 95 |     const aiResponse = await aiManager.generateResponse(prompt, {
 96 |       preferredProvider: "ollama",
 97 |       preferredModel: process.env.OLLAMA_MODEL || "llama3.2",
 98 |       maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 99 |       temperature: 0.2,
100 |       timeout: 10000,
101 |       disableFallback: true,
102 |     });
103 | 
104 |     if (!aiResponse.success || !aiResponse.content) {
105 |       return { success: false, error: aiResponse.error || "Ollama did not return content" };
106 |     }
107 | 
108 |     return {
109 |       success: true,
110 |       content: aiResponse.content,
111 |       sql: null,
112 |       chart: null,
113 |       insights: [
114 |         `Provider: ${aiResponse.provider || "ollama"}`,
115 |         `Model: ${aiResponse.model || "Ollama"}`,
116 |       ].filter(Boolean),
117 |       intent: queryType,
118 |       confidence: 0.8,
119 |       usedAI: true,
120 |       model: aiResponse.model || "Ollama",
121 |     };
122 |   } catch (error) {
123 |     return { success: false, error: error.message };
124 |   }
125 | }
126 | 
127 | async function tryGeminiAnalysis(dataset, query) {
128 |   try {
129 |     if (!hasGeminiApiKey()) {
130 |       return { success: false, error: "Gemini API key not configured" };
131 |     }
132 | 
133 |     const { generateSQLFromSchema } = await import("./schema-ai-service.js");
134 |     const { buildSchemaPacketAsync } = await import("./schema-packet-builder.js");
135 | 
136 |     const schemaPacket = await buildSchemaPacketAsync(dataset);
137 |     const response = await generateSQLFromSchema(schemaPacket, query, { allowFallback: false });
138 | 
139 |     if (response.fallback || (!response.sql && response.intent === "unclear")) {
140 |       return { success: false, error: "Gemini could not generate valid query" };
141 |     }
142 | 
143 |     return {
144 |       success: true,
145 |       content: response.insight,
146 |       sql: response.sql,
147 |       intent: response.intent,
148 |       confidence: response.confidence,
149 |       usedAI: true,
150 |       model: "Gemini 1.5 Flash",
151 |     };
152 |   } catch (error) {
153 |     return { success: false, error: error.message };
154 |   }
155 | }
156 | 
157 | async function tryLocalFallback(dataset, query) {
158 |   try {
159 |     const response = await createChatResponse(dataset, query);
160 |     return {
161 |       success: true,
162 |       content: response.content,
163 |       sql: response.sql,
164 |       chart: response.chart,
165 |       insights: response.insights,
166 |       intent: response.intent,
167 |       confidence: response.confidence || 0.7,
168 |       usedAI: false,
169 |       model: response.model || "Local Schema Analysis",
170 |       reason: response.reason,
171 |     };
172 |   } catch (error) {
173 |     return { success: false, error: error.message };
174 |   }
175 | }
176 | 
177 | export async function getCascadeStatus() {
178 |   const status = {
179 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
180 |     levels: {
181 |       ollama: { name: "Ollama", available: false },
182 |       gemini: { name: "Google Gemini", available: hasGeminiApiKey() },
183 |       local: { name: "Local Fallback", available: true },
184 |     },
185 |   };
186 | 
187 |   try {
188 |     status.levels.ollama.available = await isOllamaConfigured();
189 |   } catch {
190 |     status.levels.ollama.available = false;
191 |   }
192 | 
193 |   return status;
194 | }
195 | 
```
