### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/insightflowMasterPlanner.ts

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/insightflowMasterPlanner.ts`

```ts
  1 | type ColumnType = "number" | "string" | "date" | "boolean";
  2 | type ColumnRole = "metric" | "dimension" | "date" | "id" | "text";
  3 | 
  4 | type ChartType =
  5 |   | "bar"
  6 |   | "line"
  7 |   | "area"
  8 |   | "pie"
  9 |   | "donut"
 10 |   | "histogram"
 11 |   | "scatter"
 12 |   | "heatmap";
 13 | 
 14 | type Aggregation =
 15 |   | "count"
 16 |   | "sum"
 17 |   | "avg"
 18 |   | "min"
 19 |   | "max"
 20 |   | "median"
 21 |   | "count_unique";
 22 | 
 23 | export interface SchemaColumn {
 24 |   name: string;
 25 |   type: ColumnType;
 26 |   role: ColumnRole;
 27 |   description?: string;
 28 |   uniqueCount?: number;
 29 |   missingPct?: number;
 30 |   topValues?: string[];
 31 |   stats?: {
 32 |     min?: number;
 33 |     max?: number;
 34 |     avg?: number;
 35 |     median?: number;
 36 |   };
 37 | }
 38 | 
 39 | export interface SchemaProfile {
 40 |   datasetName: string;
 41 |   rowCount: number;
 42 |   columnCount: number;
 43 |   domain?: string;
 44 |   columns: SchemaColumn[];
 45 | }
 46 | 
 47 | export interface ChartSpec {
 48 |   id?: string;
 49 |   type: ChartType;
 50 |   title: string;
 51 |   xKey: string;
 52 |   yKey?: string;
 53 |   aggregation: Aggregation;
 54 |   limit?: number;
 55 | }
 56 | 
 57 | export interface KpiSpec {
 58 |   id?: string;
 59 |   title: string;
 60 |   metric?: string;
 61 |   aggregation: Aggregation;
 62 |   format?: "number" | "currency" | "percent" | "text";
 63 | }
 64 | 
 65 | export interface DashboardPlan {
 66 |   kpis: KpiSpec[];
 67 |   charts: ChartSpec[];
 68 |   filters: Array<{
 69 |     key: string;
 70 |     label: string;
 71 |     type: "select" | "dateRange" | "numberRange";
 72 |   }>;
 73 | }
 74 | 
 75 | export interface MasterPlannerResponse {
 76 |   action: "BUILD_DASHBOARD" | "MODIFY_DASHBOARD" | "ANSWER";
 77 |   schemaOnly: true;
 78 |   message: string;
 79 |   dashboardPlan?: DashboardPlan;
 80 | }
 81 | 
 82 | const OLLAMA_BASE_URL =
 83 |   process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
 84 | 
 85 | const MASTER_MODEL =
 86 |   process.env.DASHBOARD_MASTER_MODEL || "insightflow-master";
 87 | 
 88 | const dashboardPlanSchema = {
 89 |   type: "object",
 90 |   additionalProperties: false,
 91 |   required: ["action", "schemaOnly", "message", "dashboardPlan"],
 92 |   properties: {
 93 |     action: {
 94 |       type: "string",
 95 |       enum: ["BUILD_DASHBOARD", "MODIFY_DASHBOARD", "ANSWER"],
 96 |     },
 97 |     schemaOnly: {
 98 |       type: "boolean",
 99 |     },
100 |     message: {
101 |       type: "string",
102 |     },
103 |     dashboardPlan: {
104 |       type: "object",
105 |       additionalProperties: false,
106 |       required: ["kpis", "charts", "filters"],
107 |       properties: {
108 |         kpis: {
109 |           type: "array",
110 |           maxItems: 6,
111 |           items: {
112 |             type: "object",
113 |             additionalProperties: false,
114 |             required: ["title", "aggregation"],
115 |             properties: {
116 |               id: { type: "string" },
117 |               title: { type: "string" },
118 |               metric: { type: "string" },
119 |               aggregation: {
120 |                 type: "string",
121 |                 enum: [
122 |                   "count",
123 |                   "sum",
124 |                   "avg",
125 |                   "min",
126 |                   "max",
127 |                   "median",
128 |                   "count_unique",
129 |                 ],
130 |               },
131 |               format: {
132 |                 type: "string",
133 |                 enum: ["number", "currency", "percent", "text"],
134 |               },
135 |             },
136 |           },
137 |         },
138 |         charts: {
139 |           type: "array",
140 |           maxItems: 7,
141 |           items: {
142 |             type: "object",
143 |             additionalProperties: false,
144 |             required: ["type", "title", "xKey", "aggregation"],
145 |             properties: {
146 |               id: { type: "string" },
147 |               type: {
148 |                 type: "string",
149 |                 enum: [
150 |                   "bar",
151 |                   "line",
152 |                   "area",
153 |                   "pie",
154 |                   "donut",
155 |                   "histogram",
156 |                   "scatter",
157 |                   "heatmap",
158 |                 ],
159 |               },
160 |               title: { type: "string" },
161 |               xKey: { type: "string" },
162 |               yKey: { type: "string" },
163 |               aggregation: {
164 |                 type: "string",
165 |                 enum: [
166 |                   "count",
167 |                   "sum",
168 |                   "avg",
169 |                   "min",
170 |                   "max",
171 |                   "median",
172 |                   "count_unique",
173 |                 ],
174 |               },
175 |               limit: { type: "number" },
176 |             },
177 |           },
178 |         },
179 |         filters: {
180 |           type: "array",
181 |           maxItems: 6,
182 |           items: {
183 |             type: "object",
184 |             additionalProperties: false,
185 |             required: ["key", "label", "type"],
186 |             properties: {
187 |               key: { type: "string" },
188 |               label: { type: "string" },
189 |               type: {
190 |                 type: "string",
191 |                 enum: ["select", "dateRange", "numberRange"],
192 |               },
193 |             },
194 |           },
195 |         },
196 |       },
197 |     },
198 |   },
199 | };
200 | 
201 | function compactSchema(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
202 |   return {
203 |     datasetName: schemaProfile.datasetName,
204 |     rowCount: schemaProfile.rowCount,
205 |     columnCount: schemaProfile.columnCount,
206 |     domain: schemaProfile.domain || "unknown",
207 |     columns: schemaProfile.columns.map((column) => ({
208 |       name: column.name,
209 |       type: column.type,
210 |       role: column.role,
211 |       description: column.description || "",
212 |       uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount ?? 0,
213 |       missingPct: column.missingPct ?? 0,
214 |       topValues: Array.isArray(column.topValues)
215 |         ? column.topValues.slice(0, 8)
216 |         : [],
217 |       stats: column.stats || null,
218 |     })),
219 |   };
220 | }
221 | 
222 | function getColumnSet(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
223 |   return new Set(schemaProfile.columns.map((column) => column.name));
224 | }
225 | 
226 | function getMetricColumns(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
227 |   return schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "metric");
228 | }
229 | 
230 | function getDimensionColumns(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
231 |   return schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "dimension");
232 | }
233 | 
234 | function getDateColumns(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile) {
235 |   return schemaProfile.columns.filter((column) => column.role === "date");
236 | }
237 | 
238 | function removeUnsafeChartData(value: unknown): unknown {
239 |   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
240 |     return value.map(removeUnsafeChartData);
241 |   }
242 | 
243 |   if (value && typeof value === "object") {
244 |     const cleaned: Record<string, unknown> = {};
245 | 
246 |     for (const [key, item] of Object.entries(value)) {
247 |       if (key.toLowerCase() === "data") continue;
248 |       cleaned[key] = removeUnsafeChartData(item);
249 |     }
250 | 
251 |     return cleaned;
252 |   }
253 | 
254 |   return value;
255 | }
256 | 
257 | function validatePlan(
258 |   response: MasterPlannerResponse,
259 |   schemaProfile: SchemaProfile
260 | ): MasterPlannerResponse {
261 |   const columns = getColumnSet(schemaProfile);
262 | 
263 |   const safeCharts = (response.dashboardPlan?.charts || [])
264 |     .filter((chart) => columns.has(chart.xKey))
265 |     .filter((chart) => !chart.yKey || columns.has(chart.yKey))
266 |     .slice(0, 7)
267 |     .map((chart, index) => ({
268 |       ...chart,
269 |       id: chart.id || `chart-${index + 1}`,
270 |       limit: chart.limit || 10,
271 |     }));
272 | 
273 |   const safeKpis = (response.dashboardPlan?.kpis || [])
274 |     .filter((kpi) => !kpi.metric || columns.has(kpi.metric))
275 |     .slice(0, 6)
276 |     .map((kpi, index) => ({
277 |       ...kpi,
278 |       id: kpi.id || `kpi-${index + 1}`,
279 |       format: kpi.format || "number",
280 |     }));
281 | 
282 |   const safeFilters = (response.dashboardPlan?.filters || [])
283 |     .filter((filter) => columns.has(filter.key))
284 |     .slice(0, 6);
285 | 
286 |   return {
287 |     action: response.action || "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
288 |     schemaOnly: true,
289 |     message: response.message || "Dashboard plan generated.",
290 |     dashboardPlan: {
291 |       kpis: safeKpis,
292 |       charts: safeCharts,
293 |       filters: safeFilters,
294 |     },
295 |   };
296 | }
297 | 
298 | function fallbackPlan(schemaProfile: SchemaProfile): MasterPlannerResponse {
299 |   const metrics = getMetricColumns(schemaProfile);
300 |   const dimensions = getDimensionColumns(schemaProfile);
301 |   const dates = getDateColumns(schemaProfile);
302 | 
303 |   const metric = metrics[0];
304 |   const metric2 = metrics[1];
305 |   const dimension = dimensions[0];
306 |   const dimension2 = dimensions[1];
307 |   const date = dates[0];
308 | 
309 |   const kpis: KpiSpec[] = [
310 |     {
311 |       id: "kpi-total-records",
312 |       title: "Total Records",
313 |       aggregation: "count",
314 |       format: "number",
315 |     },
316 |   ];
317 | 
318 |   if (metric) {
319 |     kpis.push(
320 |       {
321 |         id: "kpi-average",
322 |         title: `Average ${metric.name}`,
323 |         metric: metric.name,
324 |         aggregation: "avg",
325 |         format: "number",
326 |       },
327 |       {
328 |         id: "kpi-highest",
329 |         title: `Highest ${metric.name}`,
330 |         metric: metric.name,
331 |         aggregation: "max",
332 |         format: "number",
333 |       }
334 |     );
335 |   }
336 | 
337 |   if (dimension) {
338 |     kpis.push({
339 |       id: "kpi-unique-dimension",
340 |       title: `Unique ${dimension.name}`,
341 |       metric: dimension.name,
342 |       aggregation: "count_unique",
343 |       format: "number",
344 |     });
345 |   }
346 | 
347 |   const charts: ChartSpec[] = [];
348 | 
349 |   if (dimension && metric) {
350 |     charts.push({
351 |       id: "chart-metric-by-dimension",
352 |       type: "bar",
353 |       title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
354 |       xKey: dimension.name,
355 |       yKey: metric.name,
356 |       aggregation: "avg",
357 |       limit: 10,
358 |     });
359 |   }
360 | 
361 |   if (metric) {
362 |     charts.push({
363 |       id: "chart-distribution",
364 |       type: "histogram",
365 |       title: `${metric.name} Distribution`,
366 |       xKey: metric.name,
367 |       yKey: metric.name,
368 |       aggregation: "count",
369 |       limit: 10,
370 |     });
371 |   }
372 | 
373 |   if (dimension) {
374 |     charts.push({
375 |       id: "chart-category-share",
376 |       type: "donut",
377 |       title: `Records by ${dimension.name}`,
378 |       xKey: dimension.name,
379 |       aggregation: "count",
380 |       limit: 8,
381 |     });
382 |   }
383 | 
384 |   if (date && metric) {
385 |     charts.push({
386 |       id: "chart-trend",
387 |       type: "line",
388 |       title: `${metric.name} Trend`,
389 |       xKey: date.name,
390 |       yKey: metric.name,
391 |       aggregation: "sum",
392 |       limit: 30,
393 |     });
394 |   }
395 | 
396 |   if (dimension2 && metric) {
397 |     charts.push({
398 |       id: "chart-second-dimension",
399 |       type: "bar",
400 |       title: `Average ${metric.name} by ${dimension2.name}`,
401 |       xKey: dimension2.name,
402 |       yKey: metric.name,
403 |       aggregation: "avg",
404 |       limit: 10,
405 |     });
406 |   }
407 | 
408 |   if (metric && metric2) {
409 |     charts.push({
410 |       id: "chart-scatter",
411 |       type: "scatter",
412 |       title: `${metric.name} vs ${metric2.name}`,
413 |       xKey: metric.name,
414 |       yKey: metric2.name,
415 |       aggregation: "count",
416 |       limit: 200,
417 |     });
418 |   }
419 | 
420 |   for (const dim of dimensions) {
421 |     if (charts.length >= 7) break;
422 | 
423 |     charts.push({
424 |       id: `chart-top-${dim.name}`,
425 |       type: "bar",
426 |       title: `Top ${dim.name}`,
427 |       xKey: dim.name,
428 |       aggregation: "count",
429 |       limit: 10,
430 |     });
431 |   }
432 | 
433 |   return {
434 |     action: "BUILD_DASHBOARD",
435 |     schemaOnly: true,
436 |     message: "Dashboard generated using local fallback rules.",
437 |     dashboardPlan: {
438 |       kpis: kpis.slice(0, 6),
439 |       charts: charts.slice(0, 7),
440 |       filters: [
441 |         ...dimensions.slice(0, 4).map((column) => ({
442 |           key: column.name,
443 |           label: column.name,
444 |           type: "select" as const,
445 |         })),
446 |         ...dates.slice(0, 1).map((column) => ({
447 |           key: column.name,
448 |           label: column.name,
449 |           type: "dateRange" as const,
450 |         })),
451 |       ],
452 |     },
453 |   };
454 | }
455 | 
456 | export async function generateMasterDashboardPlan({
457 |   schemaProfile,
458 |   userGoal = "Generate a complete dashboard with KPIs, filters, and 7 useful charts.",
459 | }: {
460 |   schemaProfile: SchemaProfile;
461 |   userGoal?: string;
462 | }): Promise<MasterPlannerResponse> {
463 |   const schemaOnlyPacket = compactSchema(schemaProfile);
464 | 
465 |   try {
466 |     const response = await fetch(`${OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/chat`, {
467 |       method: "POST",
468 |       headers: {
469 |         "Content-Type": "application/json",
470 |       },
471 |       body: JSON.stringify({
472 |         model: MASTER_MODEL,
473 |         stream: false,
474 |         keep_alive: "2m",
475 |         format: dashboardPlanSchema,
476 |         options: {
477 |           temperature: 0.05,
478 |           num_ctx: 4096,
479 |           num_predict: 1200,
480 |         },
481 |         messages: [
482 |           {
483 |             role: "system",
484 |             content:
485 |               "Return strict JSON only. Never include chart.data. Use only schema columns.",
486 |           },
487 |           {
488 |             role: "user",
489 |             content: JSON.stringify(
490 |               {
491 |                 userGoal,
492 |                 schemaOnly: true,
493 |                 schemaProfile: schemaOnlyPacket,
494 |               },
495 |               null,
496 |               2
497 |             ),
498 |           },
499 |         ],
500 |       }),
501 |     });
502 | 
503 |     if (!response.ok) {
504 |       return fallbackPlan(schemaProfile);
505 |     }
506 | 
507 |     const payload = await response.json();
508 |     const content = payload?.message?.content || "{}";
509 | 
510 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(content);
511 |     const cleaned = removeUnsafeChartData(parsed) as MasterPlannerResponse;
512 | 
513 |     return validatePlan(cleaned, schemaProfile);
514 |   } catch {
515 |     return fallbackPlan(schemaProfile);
516 |   }
517 | }
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/ollamaClient.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/ollamaClient.js`

```js
 1 | const OLLAMA_BASE_URL =
 2 |   process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
 3 | 
 4 | export async function callOllamaJson({
 5 |   model,
 6 |   messages,
 7 |   schema,
 8 |   temperature = 0.05,
 9 |   numCtx = 4096,
10 |   numPredict = 1200,
11 |   timeoutMs = Number(process.env.DASHBOARD_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS || 45000),
12 | }) {
13 |   const controller = new AbortController();
14 |   const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
15 | 
16 |   const response = await fetch(`${OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/chat`, {
17 |     method: "POST",
18 |     signal: controller.signal,
19 |     headers: {
20 |       "Content-Type": "application/json",
21 |     },
22 |     body: JSON.stringify({
23 |       model,
24 |       stream: false,
25 |       keep_alive: "60s",
26 |       format: schema,
27 |       options: {
28 |         temperature,
29 |         num_ctx: numCtx,
30 |         num_predict: numPredict,
31 |       },
32 |       messages,
33 |     }),
34 |   }).finally(() => clearTimeout(timeout));
35 | 
36 |   if (!response.ok) {
37 |     throw new Error(`Ollama HTTP ${response.status}`);
38 |   }
39 | 
40 |   const payload = await response.json();
41 |   const content = payload?.message?.content || "{}";
42 | 
43 |   try {
44 |     return JSON.parse(content);
45 |   } catch {
46 |     return {
47 |       action: "ANSWER",
48 |       message: "AI returned invalid JSON.",
49 |       schemaOnly: true,
50 |     };
51 |   }
52 | }
53 | 
54 | export async function createEmbedding(text) {
55 |   const model = process.env.EMBEDDING_MODEL || "nomic-embed-text:latest";
56 | 
57 |   const response = await fetch(`${OLLAMA_BASE_URL}/api/embeddings`, {
58 |     method: "POST",
59 |     headers: {
60 |       "Content-Type": "application/json",
61 |     },
62 |     body: JSON.stringify({
63 |       model,
64 |       prompt: text,
65 |     }),
66 |   });
67 | 
68 |   if (!response.ok) {
69 |     throw new Error(`Embedding HTTP ${response.status}`);
70 |   }
71 | 
72 |   const payload = await response.json();
73 |   return payload.embedding || [];
74 | }
75 | 
```

```js
  1 | // Anthropic Claude API provider
  2 | import Anthropic from '@anthropic-ai/sdk';
  3 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export class AnthropicProvider {
  6 |   constructor(config) {
  7 |     this.name = 'Anthropic Claude';
  8 |     this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
  9 |     this.model = config.model;
 10 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 11 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 12 |     this.available = false;
 13 |     this.client = null;
 14 |     this.initialized = false;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   async initialize() {
 18 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 19 | 
 20 |     if (!this.apiKey) {
 21 |       console.warn('⚠️  Anthropic API key not configured');
 22 |       this.available = false;
 23 |       this.initialized = true;
 24 |       return;
 25 |     }
 26 | 
 27 |     try {
 28 |       console.log('🧠 Initializing Anthropic Provider...');
 29 |       this.client = new Anthropic({
 30 |         apiKey: this.apiKey,
 31 |         timeout: this.timeout
 32 |       });
 33 |       this.available = true;
 34 |       this.initialized = true;
 35 |       console.log('✅ Anthropic initialized successfully');
 36 |     } catch (error) {
 37 |       console.error('❌ Anthropic initialization failed:', error.message);
 38 |       this.available = false;
 39 |       this.initialized = true;
 40 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Anthropic initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'anthropic');
 41 |     }
 42 |   }
 43 | 
 44 |   async checkAvailability() {
 45 |     if (!this.apiKey) return false;
 46 | 
 47 |     try {
 48 |       // Test with a simple message
 49 |       await this.client.messages.create({
 50 |         model: this.model,
 51 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 52 |         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Hi' }]
 53 |       });
 54 |       this.available = true;
 55 |       return true;
 56 |     } catch (error) {
 57 |       console.warn('⚠️  Anthropic availability check failed:', error.message);
 58 |       this.available = false;
 59 |       return false;
 60 |     }
 61 |   }
 62 | 
 63 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 64 |     if (!this.available) {
 65 |       throw new AIProviderError('Anthropic service not available', 'anthropic');
 66 |     }
 67 | 
 68 |     try {
 69 |       console.log('🧠 Anthropic generating response...');
 70 |       const startTime = Date.now();
 71 | 
 72 |       const message = await this.client.messages.create({
 73 |         model: this.model,
 74 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 75 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
 76 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
 77 |         top_k: options.topK,
 78 |         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],
 79 |         stream: false
 80 |       });
 81 | 
 82 |       const text = message.content[0]?.text || '';
 83 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
 84 |       
 85 |       console.log(`✅ Anthropic response received in ${duration}s`);
 86 | 
 87 |       return {
 88 |         success: true,
 89 |         content: text,
 90 |         model: this.model,
 91 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
 92 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 93 |         provider: 'anthropic',
 94 |         error: null
 95 |       };
 96 |     } catch (error) {
 97 |       console.error('❌ Anthropic generation error:', error.message);
 98 |       
 99 |       // Handle specific Anthropic errors
100 |       if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
101 |         throw new AIProviderError('Invalid Anthropic API key', 'anthropic');
102 |       } else if (error.message.includes('rate limit')) {
103 |         throw new AIProviderError('Anthropic rate limit exceeded', 'anthropic');
104 |       } else if (error.message.includes('content filter')) {
105 |         throw new AIProviderError('Content blocked by Anthropic content filter', 'anthropic');
106 |       } else {
107 |         throw new AIProviderError(`Anthropic generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'anthropic');
108 |       }
109 |     }
110 |   }
111 | 
112 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
113 |     if (!this.available) {
114 |       throw new AIProviderError('Anthropic service not available', 'anthropic');
115 |     }
116 | 
117 |     try {
118 |       console.log('💬 Anthropic chat with messages...');
119 |       const startTime = Date.now();
120 | 
121 |       const message = await this.client.messages.create({
122 |         model: this.model,
123 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
124 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
125 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
126 |         top_k: options.topK,
127 |         messages: messages,
128 |         stream: false
129 |       });
130 | 
131 |       const text = message.content[0]?.text || '';
132 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
133 |       
134 |       console.log(`✅ Anthropic chat response received in ${duration}s`);
135 | 
136 |       return {
137 |         success: true,
138 |         content: text,
139 |         model: this.model,
140 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
141 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
142 |         provider: 'anthropic',
143 |         error: null
144 |       };
145 |     } catch (error) {
146 |       console.error('❌ Anthropic chat error:', error.message);
147 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Anthropic chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'anthropic');
148 |     }
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   async health() {
152 |     try {
153 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
154 |       return {
155 |         name: this.name,
156 |         available: isAvailable,
157 |         model: this.model,
158 |         apiKey: this.apiKey ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
159 |         initialized: this.initialized,
160 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
161 |       };
162 |     } catch (error) {
163 |       return {
164 |         name: this.name,
165 |         available: false,
166 |         error: error.message,
167 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
168 |       };
169 |     }
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   async isAvailable() {
173 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   getCapabilities() {
177 |     return {
178 |       textGeneration: true,
179 |       chat: true,
180 |       streaming: true,
181 |       models: [this.model, 'claude-3-haiku-20240307'],
182 |       features: ['large_context_window', 'reliable_output', 'safety_focused'],
183 |       limits: {
184 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
185 |         timeout: this.timeout,
186 |         rateLimit: '1000 requests per hour'
187 |       }
188 |     };
189 |   }
190 | }
191 | 
192 | export default AnthropicProvider;
193 |
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/providers/gemini-provider.js

```js
  1 | // Google Gemini API provider
  2 | import { GoogleGenerativeAI } from '@google/generative-ai';
  3 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export class GeminiProvider {
  6 |   constructor(config) {
  7 |     this.name = 'Google Gemini';
  8 |     this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
  9 |     this.model = config.model;
 10 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 11 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 12 |     this.available = false;
 13 |     this.client = null;
 14 |     this.initialized = false;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   async initialize() {
 18 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 19 | 
 20 |     if (!this.apiKey) {
 21 |       console.warn('⚠️  Google Gemini API key not configured');
 22 |       this.available = false;
 23 |       this.initialized = true;
 24 |       return;
 25 |     }
 26 | 
 27 |     try {
 28 |       console.log('🤖 Initializing Google Gemini Provider...');
 29 |       this.client = new GoogleGenerativeAI(this.apiKey);
 30 |       this.available = true;
 31 |       this.initialized = true;
 32 |       console.log('✅ Google Gemini initialized successfully');
 33 |     } catch (error) {
 34 |       console.error('❌ Gemini initialization failed:', error.message);
 35 |       this.available = false;
 36 |       this.initialized = true;
 37 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Gemini initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'gemini');
 38 |     }
 39 |   }
 40 | 
 41 |   async checkAvailability() {
 42 |     if (!this.apiKey) return false;
 43 | 
 44 |     try {
 45 |       // Test with a simple generation
 46 |       const model = this.client.getGenerativeModel({ model: this.model });
 47 |       const result = await model.generateContent('Hello');
 48 |       this.available = true;
 49 |       return true;
 50 |     } catch (error) {
 51 |       console.warn('⚠️  Gemini availability check failed:', error.message);
 52 |       this.available = false;
 53 |       return false;
 54 |     }
 55 |   }
 56 | 
 57 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 58 |     if (!this.available) {
 59 |       throw new AIProviderError('Gemini service not available', 'gemini');
 60 |     }
 61 | 
 62 |     try {
 63 |       console.log('🤖 Gemini generating response...');
 64 |       const startTime = Date.now();
 65 | 
 66 |       const model = this.client.getGenerativeModel({ 
 67 |         model: this.model,
 68 |         generationConfig: {
 69 |           temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
 70 |           maxOutputTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 71 |           topP: options.topP || 0.9,
 72 |           topK: options.topK || 40
 73 |         }
 74 |       });
 75 | 
 76 |       const result = await model.generateContent(prompt);
 77 |       const text = result.response.text();
 78 |       
 79 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
 80 |       console.log(`✅ Gemini response received in ${duration}s`);
 81 | 
 82 |       return {
 83 |         success: true,
 84 |         content: text,
 85 |         model: this.model,
 86 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
 87 |         provider: 'gemini',
 88 |         error: null
 89 |       };
 90 |     } catch (error) {
 91 |       console.error('❌ Gemini generation error:', error.message);
 92 |       
 93 |       // Handle specific Gemini errors
 94 |       if (error.message.includes('API_KEY')) {
 95 |         throw new AIProviderError('Invalid Gemini API key', 'gemini');
 96 |       } else if (error.message.includes('quota')) {
 97 |         throw new AIProviderError('Gemini API quota exceeded', 'gemini');
 98 |       } else if (error.message.includes('safety')) {
 99 |         throw new AIProviderError('Content blocked by Gemini safety filters', 'gemini');
100 |       } else {
101 |         throw new AIProviderError(`Gemini generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'gemini');
102 |       }
103 |     }
104 |   }
105 | 
106 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
107 |     if (!this.available) {
108 |       throw new AIProviderError('Gemini service not available', 'gemini');
109 |     }
110 | 
111 |     try {
112 |       console.log('💬 Gemini chat with messages...');
113 |       const startTime = Date.now();
114 | 
115 |       // Convert messages to Gemini format
116 |       const history = [];
117 |       const lastMessage = messages[messages.length - 1];
118 |       
119 |       // Build conversation history (excluding last message)
120 |       for (let i = 0; i < messages.length - 1; i++) {
121 |         const msg = messages[i];
122 |         if (msg.role === 'user') {
123 |           history.push({
124 |             role: 'user',
125 |             parts: [{ text: msg.content }]
126 |           });
127 |         } else if (msg.role === 'assistant') {
128 |           history.push({
129 |             role: 'model',
130 |             parts: [{ text: msg.content }]
131 |           });
132 |         }
133 |       }
134 | 
135 |       const model = this.client.getGenerativeModel({ 
136 |         model: this.model,
137 |         generationConfig: {
138 |           temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
139 |           maxOutputTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
140 |           topP: options.topP || 0.9,
141 |           topK: options.topK || 40
142 |         }
143 |       });
144 | 
145 |       const chat = model.startChat({ history });
146 |       const result = await chat.sendMessage(lastMessage.content);
147 |       const text = await result.response.text();
148 |       
149 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
150 |       console.log(`✅ Gemini chat response received in ${duration}s`);
151 | 
152 |       return {
153 |         success: true,
154 |         content: text,
155 |         model: this.model,
156 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
157 |         provider: 'gemini',
158 |         error: null
159 |       };
160 |     } catch (error) {
161 |       console.error('❌ Gemini chat error:', error.message);
162 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Gemini chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'gemini');
163 |     }
164 |   }
165 | 
166 |   async health() {
167 |     try {
168 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
169 |       return {
170 |         name: this.name,
171 |         available: isAvailable,
172 |         model: this.model,
173 |         apiKey: this.apiKey ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
174 |         initialized: this.initialized,
175 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
176 |       };
177 |     } catch (error) {
178 |       return {
179 |         name: this.name,
180 |         available: false,
181 |         error: error.message,
182 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
183 |       };
184 |     }
185 |   }
186 | 
187 |   async isAvailable() {
188 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   getCapabilities() {
192 |     return {
193 |       textGeneration: true,
194 |       chat: true,
195 |       streaming: false,
196 |       models: [this.model],
197 |       features: ['multimodal', 'safety_filters', 'context_window_large'],
198 |       limits: {
199 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
200 |         timeout: this.timeout,
201 |         rateLimit: '60 requests per minute'
202 |       }
203 |     };
204 |   }
205 | }
206 | 
207 | export default GeminiProvider;
208 | 
```

```js
  1 | // Ollama provider for local LLMs (Llama 3.2 & NeuralChat 7B)
  2 | import axios from 'axios';
  3 | import { performance } from 'perf_hooks';
  4 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  5 | 
  6 | export class OllamaProvider {
  7 |   constructor(config) {
  8 |     this.name = 'Ollama';
  9 |     this.baseUrl = config.baseUrl;
 10 |     this.primaryModel = config.primaryModel;
 11 |     this.chatModel = config.chatModel;
 12 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 13 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 14 |     this.temperature = config.temperature;
 15 |     this.topP = config.topP;
 16 |     this.frequencyPenalty = config.frequencyPenalty;
 17 |     this.available = false;
 18 |     this.models = [];
 19 |     this.initialized = false;
 20 |   }
 21 | 
 22 |   async initialize() {
 23 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 24 |     
 25 |     console.log('🦙 Initializing Ollama Provider...');
 26 |     console.log(`   Base URL: ${this.baseUrl}`);
 27 |     console.log(`   Primary Model: ${this.primaryModel}`);
 28 |     console.log(`   Chat Model: ${this.chatModel}`);
 29 |     
 30 |     try {
 31 |       await this.checkAvailability();
 32 |       await this.listModels();
 33 |       this.initialized = true;
 34 |       console.log('✅ Ollama Provider initialized successfully');
 35 |     } catch (error) {
 36 |       console.error('❌ Ollama initialization failed:', error.message);
 37 |       this.available = false;
 38 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Ollama initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
 39 |     }
 40 |   }
 41 | 
 42 |   async checkAvailability() {
 43 |     try {
 44 |       const response = await axios.get(`${this.baseUrl}/api/tags`, {
 45 |         timeout: 5000,
 46 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
 47 |       });
 48 |       this.available = response.status === 200;
 49 |       console.log(`✅ Ollama is available (${response.status})`);
 50 |       return this.available;
 51 |     } catch (error) {
 52 |       console.warn(`⚠️  Ollama not available at ${this.baseUrl}:`, error.message);
 53 |       this.available = false;
 54 |       return false;
 55 |     }
 56 |   }
 57 | 
 58 |   async listModels() {
 59 |     try {
 60 |       const response = await axios.get(`${this.baseUrl}/api/tags`, {
 61 |         timeout: 5000,
 62 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
 63 |       });
 64 |       this.models = response.data.models || [];
 65 |       console.log(`📦 Available Ollama models: ${this.models.map(m => m.name).join(', ')}`);
 66 |       return this.models;
 67 |     } catch (error) {
 68 |       console.error('Error listing Ollama models:', error.message);
 69 |       return [];
 70 |     }
 71 |   }
 72 | 
 73 |   getAvailableModel(preferredModel = null) {
 74 |     if (!this.available || this.models.length === 0) return null;
 75 | 
 76 |     if (preferredModel) {
 77 |       const found = this.models.find(m => 
 78 |         m.name.includes(preferredModel) || m.name === preferredModel
 79 |       );
 80 |       if (found) return found.name;
 81 |     }
 82 | 
 83 |     // Try primary model
 84 |     if (this.models.some(m => m.name.includes(this.primaryModel))) {
 85 |       return this.primaryModel;
 86 |     }
 87 | 
 88 |     // Try chat model
 89 |     if (this.models.some(m => m.name.includes(this.chatModel))) {
 90 |       return this.chatModel;
 91 |     }
 92 | 
 93 |     // Return first available model
 94 |     return this.models[0]?.name || null;
 95 |   }
 96 | 
 97 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 98 |     if (!this.available) {
 99 |       throw new AIProviderError('Ollama service not available', 'ollama');
100 |     }
101 | 
102 |     const model = this.getAvailableModel(options.preferredModel);
103 |     if (!model) {
104 |       throw new AIProviderError('No Ollama models available', 'ollama');
105 |     }
106 | 
107 |     try {
108 |       console.log(`🦙 Ollama generating with model: ${model}`);
109 |       const startTime = performance.now();
110 | 
111 |       const response = await axios.post(
112 |         `${this.baseUrl}/api/generate`,
113 |         {
114 |           model,
115 |           prompt,
116 |           stream: false,
117 |           options: {
118 |             temperature: options.temperature || this.temperature,
119 |             top_p: options.topP || this.topP,
120 |             num_predict: options.maxTokens || this.maxTokens,
121 |             num_ctx: 4096,
122 |             repeat_penalty: 1.0 - (options.frequencyPenalty || this.frequencyPenalty)
123 |           }
124 |         },
125 |         {
126 |           timeout: options.timeout || this.timeout,
127 |           headers: {
128 |             'Content-Type': 'application/json'
129 |           }
130 |         }
131 |       );
132 | 
133 |       const endTime = performance.now();
134 |       const duration = ((endTime - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
135 | 
136 |       console.log(`✅ Ollama response received in ${duration}s`);
137 | 
138 |       return {
139 |         success: true,
140 |         content: response.data.response || '',
141 |         model,
142 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
143 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
144 |         provider: 'ollama',
145 |         error: null
146 |       };
147 |     } catch (error) {
148 |       console.error('❌ Ollama generation error:', error.message);
149 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Ollama generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
150 |     }
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
154 |     if (!this.available) {
155 |       throw new AIProviderError('Ollama service not available', 'ollama');
156 |     }
157 | 
158 |     const model = this.getAvailableModel(options.preferredModel || this.chatModel);
159 |     if (!model) {
160 |       throw new AIProviderError('No Ollama models available for chat', 'ollama');
161 |     }
162 | 
163 |     try {
164 |       console.log(`💬 Ollama chat with model: ${model}`);
165 |       const startTime = performance.now();
166 | 
167 |       const response = await axios.post(
168 |         `${this.baseUrl}/api/chat`,
169 |         {
170 |           model,
171 |           messages,
172 |           stream: false,
173 |           options: {
174 |             temperature: options.temperature || this.temperature,
175 |             top_p: options.topP || this.topP,
176 |             num_predict: options.maxTokens || this.maxTokens,
177 |             repeat_penalty: 1.0 - (options.frequencyPenalty || this.frequencyPenalty)
178 |           }
179 |         },
180 |         {
181 |           timeout: options.timeout || this.timeout,
182 |           headers: {
183 |             'Content-Type': 'application/json'
184 |           }
185 |         }
186 |       );
187 | 
188 |       const endTime = performance.now();
189 |       const duration = ((endTime - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
190 | 
191 |       console.log(`✅ Ollama chat response received in ${duration}s`);
192 | 
193 |       return {
194 |         success: true,
195 |         content: response.data.message?.content || '',
196 |         model,
197 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
198 |         provider: 'ollama',
199 |         error: null
200 |       };
201 |     } catch (error) {
202 |       console.error('❌ Ollama chat error:', error.message);
203 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Ollama chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
204 |     }
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   async pullModel(modelName) {
208 |     try {
209 |       console.log(`📥 Pulling model: ${modelName}`);
210 |       const response = await axios.post(
211 |         `${this.baseUrl}/api/pull`,
212 |         { name: modelName },
213 |         {
214 |           timeout: 600000, // 10 minutes for download
215 |           headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
216 |         }
217 |       );
218 |       console.log(`✅ Model pulled: ${modelName}`);
219 |       await this.listModels();
220 |       return true;
221 |     } catch (error) {
222 |       console.error(`❌ Failed to pull model ${modelName}:`, error.message);
223 |       throw new AIProviderError(`Failed to pull model ${modelName}: ${error.message}`, 'ollama');
224 |     }
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   async health() {
228 |     try {
229 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
230 |       return {
231 |         name: this.name,
232 |         available: isAvailable,
233 |         baseUrl: this.baseUrl,
234 |         models: this.models.map(m => m.name),
235 |         primaryModel: this.primaryModel,
236 |         chatModel: this.chatModel,
237 |         initialized: this.initialized,
238 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
239 |       };
240 |     } catch (error) {
241 |       return {
242 |         name: this.name,
243 |         available: false,
244 |         error: error.message,
245 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
246 |       };
247 |     }
248 |   }
249 | 
250 |   async isAvailable() {
251 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
252 |   }
253 | 
254 |   getCapabilities() {
255 |     return {
256 |       textGeneration: true,
257 |       chat: true,
258 |       streaming: true,
259 |       models: this.models.map(m => m.name),
260 |       features: ['local_inference', 'no_api_keys', 'privacy_focused'],
261 |       limits: {
262 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
263 |         timeout: this.timeout
264 |       }
265 |     };

267 | }
```

```js
  1 | // OpenAI API provider (GPT-4)
  2 | import OpenAI from 'openai';
  3 | import { AIProviderError } from '../../../middleware/error-handler.js';
  4 | 
  5 | export class OpenAIProvider {
  6 |   constructor(config) {
  7 |     this.name = 'OpenAI GPT-4';
  8 |     this.apiKey = config.apiKey;
  9 |     this.model = config.model;
 10 |     this.timeout = config.timeout;
 11 |     this.maxTokens = config.maxTokens;
 12 |     this.available = false;
 13 |     this.client = null;
 14 |     this.initialized = false;
 15 |   }
 16 | 
 17 |   async initialize() {
 18 |     if (this.initialized) return;
 19 | 
 20 |     if (!this.apiKey) {
 21 |       console.warn('⚠️  OpenAI API key not configured');
 22 |       this.available = false;
 23 |       this.initialized = true;
 24 |       return;
 25 |     }
 26 | 
 27 |     try {
 28 |       console.log('🧠 Initializing OpenAI Provider...');
 29 |       this.client = new OpenAI({
 30 |         apiKey: this.apiKey,
 31 |         timeout: this.timeout
 32 |       });
 33 |       this.available = true;
 34 |       this.initialized = true;
 35 |       console.log('✅ OpenAI initialized successfully');
 36 |     } catch (error) {
 37 |       console.error('❌ OpenAI initialization failed:', error.message);
 38 |       this.available = false;
 39 |       this.initialized = true;
 40 |       throw new AIProviderError(`OpenAI initialization failed: ${error.message}`, 'openai');
 41 |     }
 42 |   }
 43 | 
 44 |   async checkAvailability() {
 45 |     if (!this.apiKey) return false;
 46 | 
 47 |     try {
 48 |       // Test with a simple API call
 49 |       await this.client.models.list();
 50 |       this.available = true;
 51 |       return true;
 52 |     } catch (error) {
 53 |       console.warn('⚠️  OpenAI availability check failed:', error.message);
 54 |       this.available = false;
 55 |       return false;
 56 |     }
 57 |   }
 58 | 
 59 |   async generate(prompt, options = {}) {
 60 |     if (!this.available) {
 61 |       throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI service not available', 'openai');
 62 |     }
 63 | 
 64 |     try {
 65 |       console.log('🧠 OpenAI generating response...');
 66 |       const startTime = Date.now();
 67 | 
 68 |       const completion = await this.client.chat.completions.create({
 69 |         model: this.model,
 70 |         messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }],
 71 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 72 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
 73 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
 74 |         frequency_penalty: options.frequencyPenalty || 0,
 75 |         presence_penalty: options.presencePenalty || 0,
 76 |         stream: false
 77 |       });
 78 | 
 79 |       const text = completion.choices[0]?.message?.content || '';
 80 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
 81 |       
 82 |       console.log(`✅ OpenAI response received in ${duration}s`);
 83 | 
 84 |       return {
 85 |         success: true,
 86 |         content: text,
 87 |         model: this.model,
 88 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
 89 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
 90 |         provider: 'openai',
 91 |         error: null
 92 |       };
 93 |     } catch (error) {
 94 |       console.error('❌ OpenAI generation error:', error.message);
 95 |       
 96 |       // Handle specific OpenAI errors
 97 |       if (error.message.includes('API key')) {
 98 |         throw new AIProviderError('Invalid OpenAI API key', 'openai');
 99 |       } else if (error.message.includes('quota')) {
100 |         throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI API quota exceeded', 'openai');
101 |       } else if (error.message.includes('rate limit')) {
102 |         throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI rate limit exceeded', 'openai');
103 |       } else if (error.message.includes('content filter')) {
104 |         throw new AIProviderError('Content blocked by OpenAI content filter', 'openai');
105 |       } else {
106 |         throw new AIProviderError(`OpenAI generation failed: ${error.message}`, 'openai');
107 |       }
108 |     }
109 |   }
110 | 
111 |   async chat(messages, options = {}) {
112 |     if (!this.available) {
113 |       throw new AIProviderError('OpenAI service not available', 'openai');
114 |     }
115 | 
116 |     try {
117 |       console.log('💬 OpenAI chat with messages...');
118 |       const startTime = Date.now();
119 | 
120 |       const completion = await this.client.chat.completions.create({
121 |         model: this.model,
122 |         messages: messages,
123 |         max_tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
124 |         temperature: options.temperature || 0.7,
125 |         top_p: options.topP || 1,
126 |         frequency_penalty: options.frequencyPenalty || 0,
127 |         presence_penalty: options.presencePenalty || 0,
128 |         stream: false
129 |       });
130 | 
131 |       const text = completion.choices[0]?.message?.content || '';
132 |       const duration = ((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000).toFixed(2);
133 |       
134 |       console.log(`✅ OpenAI chat response received in ${duration}s`);
135 | 
136 |       return {
137 |         success: true,
138 |         content: text,
139 |         model: this.model,
140 |         duration: parseFloat(duration),
141 |         tokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
142 |         provider: 'openai',
143 |         error: null
144 |       };
145 |     } catch (error) {
146 |       console.error('❌ OpenAI chat error:', error.message);
147 |       throw new AIProviderError(`OpenAI chat failed: ${error.message}`, 'openai');
148 |     }
149 |   }
150 | 
151 |   async health() {
152 |     try {
153 |       const isAvailable = await this.checkAvailability();
154 |       return {
155 |         name: this.name,
156 |         available: isAvailable,
157 |         model: this.model,
158 |         apiKey: this.apiKey ? 'configured' : 'not_configured',
159 |         initialized: this.initialized,
160 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
161 |       };
162 |     } catch (error) {
163 |       return {
164 |         name: this.name,
165 |         available: false,
166 |         error: error.message,
167 |         lastChecked: new Date().toISOString()
168 |       };
169 |     }
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   async isAvailable() {
173 |     return this.available && this.initialized;
174 |   }
175 | 
176 |   getCapabilities() {
177 |     return {
178 |       textGeneration: true,
179 |       chat: true,
180 |       streaming: true,
181 |       models: [this.model, 'gpt-4-turbo', 'gpt-3.5-turbo'],
182 |       features: ['function_calling', 'json_mode', 'system_messages'],
183 |       limits: {
184 |         maxTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
185 |         timeout: this.timeout,
186 |         rateLimit: '3500 requests per hour'
187 |       }
188 |     };
189 |   }
190 | }
191 |
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/prompt-templates.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/prompt-templates.js`

```js
  1 | // AI Prompt Templates for different use cases
  2 | 
  3 | export const PROMPT_TEMPLATES = {
  4 |   // Dataset analysis prompts
  5 |   datasetAnalysis: {
  6 |     schemaDetection: `Analyze this dataset and identify:
  7 | 1. Column types (numeric, categorical, date, text)
  8 | 2. Potential primary keys
  9 | 3. Relationships between columns
 10 | 4. Data quality issues
 11 | 5. Recommended visualizations
 12 | 
 13 | Dataset sample:
 14 | {data}
 15 | 
 16 | Respond in JSON format with keys: columns, relationships, quality, visualizations`,
 17 | 
 18 |     correlationAnalysis: `Find correlations and patterns in this dataset:
 19 | {data}
 20 | 
 21 | Focus on:
 22 | 1. Strong correlations (r > 0.7)
 23 | 2. Interesting patterns
 24 | 3. Anomalies or outliers
 25 | 4. Business insights
 26 | 
 27 | Respond in JSON format with keys: correlations, patterns, anomalies, insights`,
 28 | 
 29 |     summaryGeneration: `Generate a comprehensive summary of this dataset:
 30 | {data}
 31 | 
 32 | Include:
 33 | 1. Overview (row count, column count, memory usage)
 34 | 2. Key statistics
 35 | 3. Data distribution
 36 | 4. Notable patterns
 37 | 5. Recommendations for analysis
 38 | 
 39 | Respond in JSON format.`,
 40 | 
 41 |     outlierDetection: `Identify outliers in this dataset using statistical methods:
 42 | {data}
 43 | 
 44 | Methods to apply:
 45 | 1. Z-score analysis
 46 | 2. IQR method
 47 | 3. Isolation forest (if applicable)
 48 | 
 49 | Respond in JSON format with keys: outliers, method, threshold, affected_rows`
 50 |   },
 51 | 
 52 |   // Chat prompts
 53 |   chat: {
 54 |     systemPrompt: `You are an AI data analyst assistant for InsightFlow. You help users:
 55 | 1. Understand their data
 56 | 2. Generate insights
 57 | 3. Create visualizations
 58 | 4. Answer questions about datasets
 59 | 5. Provide recommendations
 60 | 
 61 | Always be helpful, accurate, and concise. When discussing data, reference specific values and patterns.`,
 62 | 
 63 |     contextPrompt: `Current dataset context:
 64 | - Dataset ID: {datasetId}
 65 | - Rows: {rowCount}
 66 | - Columns: {columnCount}
 67 | - Schema: {schema}
 68 | 
 69 | Previous conversation:
 70 | {conversationHistory}`,
 71 | 
 72 |     followUpPrompt: `Based on the previous analysis:
 73 | {previousAnalysis}
 74 | 
 75 | Answer this follow-up question:
 76 | {question}
 77 | 
 78 | Provide a detailed, data-driven response.`
 79 |   },
 80 | 
 81 |   // Visualization prompts
 82 |   visualization: {
 83 |     chartRecommendation: `Based on this dataset schema:
 84 | {schema}
 85 | 
 86 | Recommend the best charts to visualize:
 87 | 1. Distribution of values
 88 | 2. Relationships between variables
 89 | 3. Trends over time (if applicable)
 90 | 4. Comparisons
 91 | 
 92 | Respond in JSON format with keys: recommended_charts, reasoning, config`,
 93 | 
 94 |     colorScheme: `Suggest a color scheme for visualizing this data:
 95 | {data}
 96 | 
 97 | Consider:
 98 | 1. Data type (categorical, sequential, diverging)
 99 | 2. Accessibility (colorblind-friendly)
100 | 3. Aesthetic appeal
101 | 
102 | Respond with hex color codes in JSON format.`
103 |   },
104 | 
105 |   // Predictive analytics prompts
106 |   predictive: {
107 |     forecasting: `Analyze this time series data and forecast future values:
108 | {data}
109 | 
110 | Consider:
111 | 1. Trend analysis
112 | 2. Seasonality
113 | 3. Stationarity
114 | 4. Appropriate forecasting method
115 | 
116 | Provide forecast for next {periods} periods with confidence intervals.`,
117 | 
118 |     classification: `Based on this labeled dataset:
119 | {data}
120 | 
121 | Build a classification model to predict {target}.
122 | 
123 | Suggest:
124 | 1. Best algorithm
125 | 2. Feature importance
126 | 3. Expected accuracy
127 | 4. Potential issues`
128 |   },
129 | 
130 |   // Export prompts
131 |   export: {
132 |     reportGeneration: `Generate a professional report for this dataset analysis:
133 | {analysis}
134 | 
135 | Include:
136 | 1. Executive summary
137 | 2. Methodology
138 | 3. Key findings
139 | 4. Visualizations
140 | 5. Recommendations
141 | 6. Appendix with technical details
142 | 
143 | Format in Markdown.`
144 |   }
145 | };
146 | 
147 | // Helper function to fill templates
148 | export function fillTemplate(template, variables) {
149 |   let filled = template;
150 |   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(variables)) {
151 |     const placeholder = `{${key}}`;
152 |     filled = filled.replace(new RegExp(placeholder, 'g'), value);
153 |   }
154 |   return filled;
155 | }
156 | 
157 | // Get prompt by path
158 | export function getPrompt(path, variables = {}) {
159 |   const parts = path.split('.');
160 |   let current = PROMPT_TEMPLATES;
161 |   
162 |   for (const part of parts) {
163 |     if (current[part] === undefined) {
164 |       throw new Error(`Prompt template not found: ${path}`);
165 |     }
166 |     current = current[part];
167 |   }
168 |   
169 |   if (typeof current !== 'string') {
170 |     throw new Error(`Prompt template is not a string: ${path}`);
171 |   }
172 |   
173 |   return fillTemplate(current, variables);
174 | }
175 | 
176 | // Export default
177 | export default PROMPT_TEMPLATES;
178 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/response-parser.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/response-parser.js`

```js
  1 | // AI Response Parser Utilities
  2 | 
  3 | /**
  4 |  * Parse JSON from AI response, handling various formats
  5 |  */
  6 | export function parseJSONFromResponse(response) {
  7 |   if (!response || typeof response !== 'string') {
  8 |     return null;
  9 |   }
 10 | 
 11 |   // Try direct JSON parse first
 12 |   try {
 13 |     return JSON.parse(response);
 14 |   } catch (e) {
 15 |     // Continue to other methods
 16 |   }
 17 | 
 18 |   // Try extracting JSON from markdown code blocks
 19 |   const jsonMatch = response.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 20 |   if (jsonMatch) {
 21 |     try {
 22 |       return JSON.parse(jsonMatch[1].trim());
 23 |     } catch (e) {
 24 |       // Continue
 25 |     }
 26 |   }
 27 | 
 28 |   // Try finding JSON object in response
 29 |   const objectMatch = response.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
 30 |   if (objectMatch) {
 31 |     try {
 32 |       return JSON.parse(objectMatch[0]);
 33 |     } catch (e) {
 34 |       // Continue
 35 |     }
 36 |   }
 37 | 
 38 |   // Try finding JSON array in response
 39 |   const arrayMatch = response.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
 40 |   if (arrayMatch) {
 41 |     try {
 42 |       return JSON.parse(arrayMatch[0]);
 43 |     } catch (e) {
 44 |       // Continue
 45 |     }
 46 |   }
 47 | 
 48 |   console.warn('Failed to parse JSON from response');
 49 |   return null;
 50 | }
 51 | 
 52 | /**
 53 |  * Extract structured data from AI response
 54 |  */
 55 | export function extractStructuredData(response, schema = {}) {
 56 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
 57 |   
 58 |   if (!parsed) {
 59 |     return {
 60 |       success: false,
 61 |       data: null,
 62 |       raw: response
 63 |     };
 64 |   }
 65 | 
 66 |   // Validate against schema if provided
 67 |   if (Object.keys(schema).length > 0) {
 68 |     const validated = validateAgainstSchema(parsed, schema);
 69 |     return {
 70 |       success: true,
 71 |       data: validated,
 72 |       raw: response
 73 |     };
 74 |   }
 75 | 
 76 |   return {
 77 |     success: true,
 78 |     data: parsed,
 79 |     raw: response
 80 |   };
 81 | }
 82 | 
 83 | /**
 84 |  * Validate parsed data against schema
 85 |  */
 86 | function validateAgainstSchema(data, schema) {
 87 |   const result = {};
 88 |   
 89 |   for (const [key, type] of Object.entries(schema)) {
 90 |     if (data[key] !== undefined) {
 91 |       // Type checking
 92 |       if (type === 'number' && typeof data[key] === 'number') {
 93 |         result[key] = data[key];
 94 |       } else if (type === 'string' && typeof data[key] === 'string') {
 95 |         result[key] = data[key];
 96 |       } else if (type === 'boolean' && typeof data[key] === 'boolean') {
 97 |         result[key] = data[key];
 98 |       } else if (type === 'array' && Array.isArray(data[key])) {
 99 |         result[key] = data[key];
100 |       } else if (type === 'object' && typeof data[key] === 'object') {
101 |         result[key] = data[key];
102 |       } else {
103 |         console.warn(`Type mismatch for ${key}: expected ${type}, got ${typeof data[key]}`);
104 |         result[key] = data[key]; // Keep it anyway
105 |       }
106 |     }
107 |   }
108 |   
109 |   return result;
110 | }
111 | 
112 | /**
113 |  * Parse analysis results from AI response
114 |  */
115 | export function parseAnalysisResponse(response) {
116 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
117 |   
118 |   if (!parsed) {
119 |     return {
120 |       success: false,
121 |       summary: response,
122 |       insights: [],
123 |       recommendations: [],
124 |       raw: response
125 |     };
126 |   }
127 | 
128 |   return {
129 |     success: true,
130 |     summary: parsed.summary || parsed.overview || '',
131 |     insights: parsed.insights || parsed.findings || [],
132 |     recommendations: parsed.recommendations || parsed.suggestions || [],
133 |     statistics: parsed.statistics || {},
134 |     visualizations: parsed.visualizations || parsed.charts || [],
135 |     raw: response
136 |   };
137 | }
138 | 
139 | /**
140 |  * Parse correlation results
141 |  */
142 | export function parseCorrelationResponse(response) {
143 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
144 |   
145 |   if (!parsed) {
146 |     return {
147 |       success: false,
148 |       correlations: [],
149 |       raw: response
150 |     };
151 |   }
152 | 
153 |   // Normalize correlation data
154 |   const correlations = (parsed.correlations || []).map(corr => ({
155 |     variable1: corr.variable1 || corr.x || corr[0],
156 |     variable2: corr.variable2 || corr.y || corr[1],
157 |     coefficient: parseFloat(corr.coefficient || corr.r || corr.correlation || corr[2]),
158 |     strength: getCorrelationStrength(Math.abs(corr.coefficient || corr.r || corr.correlation || corr[2])),
159 |     type: (corr.coefficient || corr.r || corr.correlation || 0) >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'
160 |   }));
161 | 
162 |   return {
163 |     success: true,
164 |     correlations,
165 |     patterns: parsed.patterns || [],
166 |     anomalies: parsed.anomalies || [],
167 |     raw: response
168 |   };
169 | }
170 | 
171 | /**
172 |  * Get correlation strength description
173 |  */
174 | function getCorrelationStrength(value) {
175 |   if (value >= 0.7) return 'strong';
176 |   if (value >= 0.4) return 'moderate';
177 |   if (value >= 0.2) return 'weak';
178 |   return 'very weak';
179 | }
180 | 
181 | /**
182 |  * Parse visualization recommendations
183 |  */
184 | export function parseVisualizationResponse(response) {
185 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
186 |   
187 |   if (!parsed) {
188 |     return {
189 |       success: false,
190 |       charts: [],
191 |       raw: response
192 |     };
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   const charts = (parsed.recommended_charts || parsed.charts || parsed.visualizations || []).map(chart => ({
196 |     type: chart.type || chart.chartType,
197 |     title: chart.title || chart.name,
198 |     xAxis: chart.xAxis || chart.x,
199 |     yAxis: chart.yAxis || chart.y,
200 |     reasoning: chart.reasoning || chart.description || '',
201 |     config: chart.config || chart.options || {}
202 |   }));
203 | 
204 |   return {
205 |     success: true,
206 |     charts,
207 |     reasoning: parsed.reasoning || '',
208 |     raw: response
209 |   };
210 | }
211 | 
212 | /**
213 |  * Parse chat response
214 |  */
215 | export function parseChatResponse(response) {
216 |   // For chat, we usually want the raw text
217 |   // But try to extract structured data if present
218 |   
219 |   const parsed = parseJSONFromResponse(response);
220 |   
221 |   if (parsed && parsed.response) {
222 |     return {
223 |       success: true,
224 |       message: parsed.response,
225 |       data: parsed,
226 |       raw: response
227 |     };
228 |   }
229 | 
230 |   return {
231 |     success: true,
232 |     message: response,
233 |     data: null,
234 |     raw: response
235 |   };
236 | }
237 | 
238 | /**
239 |  * Clean and normalize AI response text
240 |  */
241 | export function cleanResponseText(text) {
242 |   if (!text) return '';
243 |   
244 |   return text
245 |     .replace(/```[\s\S]*?```/g, '') // Remove code blocks
246 |     .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '$1') // Remove bold markdown
247 |     .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '$1') // Remove italic markdown
248 |     .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n') // Normalize line breaks
249 |     .trim();
250 | }
251 | 
252 | /**
253 |  * Extract key-value pairs from response
254 |  */
255 | export function extractKeyValuePairs(response) {
256 |   const pairs = {};
257 |   
258 |   // Match patterns like "key: value" or "key = value"
259 |   const regex = /([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_\s]*?)[:=]\s*(.+?)(?:\n|$)/g;
260 |   let match;
261 |   
262 |   while ((match = regex.exec(response)) !== null) {
263 |     const key = match[1].trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_');
264 |     const value = match[2].trim();
265 |     pairs[key] = value;
266 |   }
267 |   
268 |   return pairs;
269 | }
270 | 
271 | export default {
272 |   parseJSONFromResponse,
273 |   extractStructuredData,
274 |   parseAnalysisResponse,
275 |   parseCorrelationResponse,
276 |   parseVisualizationResponse,
277 |   parseChatResponse,
278 |   cleanResponseText,
279 |   extractKeyValuePairs
280 | };
281 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/token-counter.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/ai/utils/token-counter.js`

```js
  1 | // Token Counter Utilities for AI providers
  2 | 
  3 | /**
  4 |  * Estimate token count for text (rough approximation)
  5 |  * Different models use different tokenizers, this is a general approximation
  6 |  */
  7 | export function estimateTokenCount(text, model = 'gpt-4') {
  8 |   if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return 0;
  9 | 
 10 |   // Different models have different token ratios
 11 |   const ratios = {
 12 |     'gpt-4': 0.25,        // ~4 chars per token
 13 |     'gpt-3.5-turbo': 0.25,
 14 |     'claude': 0.25,
 15 |     'gemini': 0.25,
 16 |     'llama': 0.33,        // ~3 chars per token
 17 |     'llama3.2': 0.33,
 18 |     'neural-chat': 0.33,
 19 |     'default': 0.25
 20 |   };
 21 | 
 22 |   const ratio = ratios[model] || ratios.default;
 23 |   
 24 |   // Count characters and apply ratio
 25 |   const charCount = text.length;
 26 |   const estimatedTokens = Math.ceil(charCount * ratio);
 27 | 
 28 |   // Add overhead for special tokens, formatting, etc.
 29 |   const overhead = 10;
 30 | 
 31 |   return estimatedTokens + overhead;
 32 | }
 33 | 
 34 | /**
 35 |  * Estimate tokens for messages array (chat format)
 36 |  */
 37 | export function estimateMessagesTokenCount(messages, model = 'gpt-4') {
 38 |   if (!Array.isArray(messages)) return 0;
 39 | 
 40 |   let totalTokens = 0;
 41 | 
 42 |   // Each message has overhead for role, content structure
 43 |   const messageOverhead = 4; // tokens per message
 44 | 
 45 |   for (const message of messages) {
 46 |     // Count role tokens
 47 |     if (message.role) {
 48 |       totalTokens += estimateTokenCount(message.role, model);
 49 |     }
 50 | 
 51 |     // Count content tokens
 52 |     if (message.content) {
 53 |       totalTokens += estimateTokenCount(message.content, model);
 54 |     }
 55 | 
 56 |     // Add message overhead
 57 |     totalTokens += messageOverhead;
 58 |   }
 59 | 
 60 |   // Add conversation overhead
 61 |   totalTokens += 3; // Every reply is primed with <im_start>assistant
 62 | 
 63 |   return totalTokens;
 64 | }
 65 | 
 66 | /**
 67 |  * Check if text fits within token limit
 68 |  */
 69 | export function fitsWithinLimit(text, maxTokens, model = 'gpt-4') {
 70 |   const estimatedTokens = estimateTokenCount(text, model);
 71 |   return estimatedTokens <= maxTokens;
 72 | }
 73 | 
 74 | /**
 75 |  * Truncate text to fit within token limit
 76 |  */
 77 | export function truncateToFit(text, maxTokens, model = 'gpt-4', suffix = '...') {
 78 |   if (!text) return text;
 79 | 
 80 |   const estimatedTokens = estimateTokenCount(text, model);
 81 |   
 82 |   if (estimatedTokens <= maxTokens) {
 83 |     return text;
 84 |   }
 85 | 
 86 |   // Calculate approximate character limit
 87 |   const ratios = {
 88 |     'gpt-4': 4,
 89 |     'claude': 4,
 90 |     'gemini': 4,
 91 |     'llama': 3,
 92 |     'default': 4
 93 |   };
 94 | 
 95 |   const charsPerToken = ratios[model] || ratios.default;
 96 |   const targetChars = (maxTokens - 10) * charsPerToken; // Leave room for suffix
 97 | 
 98 |   if (text.length <= targetChars) {
 99 |     return text;
100 |   }
101 | 
102 |   // Truncate and add suffix
103 |   return text.substring(0, targetChars - suffix.length) + suffix;
104 | }
105 | 
106 | /**
107 |  * Split text into chunks that fit within token limit
108 |  */
109 | export function splitIntoChunks(text, maxTokensPerChunk, model = 'gpt-4') {
110 |   if (!text) return [];
111 | 
112 |   const estimatedTokens = estimateTokenCount(text, model);
113 |   
114 |   if (estimatedTokens <= maxTokensPerChunk) {
115 |     return [text];
116 |   }
117 | 
118 |   const chunks = [];
119 |   const ratios = {
120 |     'gpt-4': 4,
121 |     'claude': 4,
122 |     'gemini': 4,
123 |     'llama': 3,
124 |     'default': 4
125 |   };
126 | 
127 |   const charsPerToken = ratios[model] || ratios.default;
128 |   const charsPerChunk = maxTokensPerChunk * charsPerToken;
129 | 
130 |   // Split by paragraphs first
131 |   const paragraphs = text.split(/\n\n+/);
132 |   let currentChunk = '';
133 | 
134 |   for (const paragraph of paragraphs) {
135 |     const testChunk = currentChunk + '\n\n' + paragraph;
136 |     
137 |     if (estimateTokenCount(testChunk, model) <= maxTokensPerChunk) {
138 |       currentChunk = testChunk;
139 |     } else {
140 |       if (currentChunk) {
141 |         chunks.push(currentChunk.trim());
142 |       }
143 |       
144 |       // If single paragraph is too large, split it
145 |       if (estimateTokenCount(paragraph, model) > maxTokensPerChunk) {
146 |         const subChunks = splitLargeParagraph(paragraph, charsPerChunk);
147 |         chunks.push(...subChunks);
148 |         currentChunk = '';
149 |       } else {
150 |         currentChunk = paragraph;
151 |       }
152 |     }
153 |   }
154 | 
155 |   if (currentChunk) {
156 |     chunks.push(currentChunk.trim());
157 |   }
158 | 
159 |   return chunks;
160 | }
161 | 
162 | /**
163 |  * Split a large paragraph into smaller chunks
164 |  */
165 | function splitLargeParagraph(paragraph, maxChars) {
166 |   const chunks = [];
167 |   const sentences = paragraph.match(/[^.!?]+[.!?]+/g) || [paragraph];
168 |   
169 |   let currentChunk = '';
170 | 
171 |   for (const sentence of sentences) {
172 |     if (currentChunk.length + sentence.length <= maxChars) {
173 |       currentChunk += sentence;
174 |     } else {
175 |       if (currentChunk) {
176 |         chunks.push(currentChunk.trim());
177 |       }
178 |       
179 |       // If single sentence is too large, just split by characters
180 |       if (sentence.length > maxChars) {
181 |         for (let i = 0; i < sentence.length; i += maxChars) {
182 |           chunks.push(sentence.substring(i, i + maxChars).trim());
183 |         }
184 |         currentChunk = '';
185 |       } else {
186 |         currentChunk = sentence;
187 |       }
188 |     }
189 |   }
190 | 
191 |   if (currentChunk) {
192 |     chunks.push(currentChunk.trim());
193 |   }
194 | 
195 |   return chunks;
196 | }
197 | 
198 | /**
199 |  * Calculate cost estimate for tokens (approximate)
200 |  */
201 | export function estimateCost(tokenCount, model = 'gpt-4') {
202 |   // Pricing per 1K tokens (as of 2024, approximate)
203 |   const pricing = {
204 |     'gpt-4': { input: 0.03, output: 0.06 },
205 |     'gpt-3.5-turbo': { input: 0.0015, output: 0.002 },
206 |     'claude-3-opus': { input: 0.015, output: 0.075 },
207 |     'claude-3-sonnet': { input: 0.003, output: 0.015 },
208 |     'gemini-1.5-pro': { input: 0.007, output: 0.021 },
209 |     'llama': { input: 0, output: 0 }, // Local, free
210 |     'default': { input: 0, output: 0 }
211 |   };
212 | 
213 |   const prices = pricing[model] || pricing.default;
214 |   
215 |   return {
216 |     input: (tokenCount * prices.input) / 1000,
217 |     output: (tokenCount * prices.output) / 1000,
218 |     total: (tokenCount * (prices.input + prices.output)) / 1000,
219 |     currency: 'USD'
220 |   };
221 | }
222 | 
223 | /**
224 |  * Get token usage statistics
225 |  */
226 | export function getTokenStats(text, model = 'gpt-4') {
227 |   const tokens = estimateTokenCount(text, model);
228 |   const cost = estimateCost(tokens, model);
229 |   
230 |   return {
231 |     text,
232 |     model,
233 |     estimatedTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
234 |     characterCount: text.length,
235 |     wordCount: text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
236 |     estimatedCost: cost,
237 |     fitsInContext: {
238 |       '4k': tokens <= 4096,
239 |       '8k': tokens <= 8192,
240 |       '16k': tokens <= 16384,
241 |       '32k': tokens <= 32768,
242 |       '128k': tokens <= 131072
243 |     }
244 |   };
245 | }
246 | 
247 | export default {
248 |   estimateTokenCount,
249 |   estimateMessagesTokenCount,
250 |   fitsWithinLimit,
251 |   truncateToFit,
252 |   splitIntoChunks,
253 |   estimateCost,
254 |   getTokenStats
255 | };
256 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/alert-service.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/alert-service.js`

```js
  1 | import { toNumber } from '@insightflow/shared-analytics';
  2 | 
  3 | export class AlertService {
  4 |   constructor() {
  5 |     this.alerts = new Map();
  6 |     this.alertHistory = [];
  7 |   }
  8 | 
  9 |   createAlert(config) {
 10 |     const {
 11 |       id = `alert_${Date.now()}`,
 12 |       name,
 13 |       datasetId,
 14 |       condition,
 15 |       threshold,
 16 |       metric,
 17 |       operator = 'gt',
 18 |       enabled = true
 19 |     } = config;
 20 | 
 21 |     const alert = {
 22 |       id,
 23 |       name: name || `${metric} ${operator} ${threshold}`,
 24 |       datasetId,
 25 |       condition: condition || { metric, operator, threshold },
 26 |       enabled,
 27 |       createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 28 |       triggeredCount: 0,
 29 |       lastTriggered: null
 30 |     };
 31 | 
 32 |     this.alerts.set(id, alert);
 33 |     return alert;
 34 |   }
 35 | 
 36 |   evaluateCondition(value, operator, threshold) {
 37 |     switch (operator) {
 38 |       case 'gt': return value > threshold;
 39 |       case 'gte': return value >= threshold;
 40 |       case 'lt': return value < threshold;
 41 |       case 'lte': return value <= threshold;
 42 |       case 'eq': return value === threshold;
 43 |       case 'neq': return value !== threshold;
 44 |       case 'change_gt': return value > threshold;
 45 |       case 'change_lt': return value < threshold;
 46 |       default: return false;
 47 |     }
 48 |   }
 49 | 
 50 |   async checkAlert(alert, dataset) {
 51 |     const { metric, operator, threshold } = alert.condition;
 52 |     
 53 |     if (!dataset?.rows) return { triggered: false };
 54 | 
 55 |     const values = dataset.rows.map(r => toNumber(r[metric])?.valueOf()).filter(v => v !== null);
 56 |     if (values.length === 0) return { triggered: false };
 57 | 
 58 |     const current = values[values.length - 1];
 59 |     const previous = values.length > 1 ? values[values.length - 2] : values[0];
 60 |     const change = previous ? ((current - previous) / previous) * 100 : 0;
 61 | 
 62 |     const checkValue = operator.includes('change') ? change : current;
 63 |     const triggered = this.evaluateCondition(checkValue, operator, threshold);
 64 | 
 65 |     if (triggered) {
 66 |       alert.triggeredCount++;
 67 |       alert.lastTriggered = new Date().toISOString();
 68 |       
 69 |       this.alertHistory.push({
 70 |         alertId: alert.id,
 71 |         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
 72 |         value: current,
 73 |         change,
 74 |         threshold
 75 |       });
 76 |     }
 77 | 
 78 |     return {
 79 |       triggered,
 80 |       current,
 81 |       change,
 82 |       threshold,
 83 |       message: triggered 
 84 |         ? `Alert: ${metric} ${operator} ${threshold} (current: ${current.toFixed(2)})`
 85 |         : null
 86 |     };
 87 |   }
 88 | 
 89 |   async checkAllAlerts(dataset) {
 90 |     const results = [];
 91 |     
 92 |     for (const [id, alert] of this.alerts) {
 93 |       if (!alert.enabled) continue;
 94 |       if (alert.datasetId && alert.datasetId !== dataset.id) continue;
 95 |       
 96 |       const result = await this.checkAlert(alert, dataset);
 97 |       if (result.triggered) {
 98 |         results.push({ alertId: id, ...result });
 99 |       }
100 |     }
101 | 
102 |     return results;
103 |   }
104 | 
105 |   async detectAnomalies(rows, column, options = {}) {
106 |     const { threshold = 1.5 } = options;
107 |     
108 |     const values = rows.map(r => toNumber(r[column])?.valueOf()).filter(v => v !== null);
109 |     if (values.length < 10) return { error: 'Insufficient data' };
110 | 
111 |     values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
112 |     const q1 = values[Math.floor(values.length * 0.25)];
113 |     const q3 = values[Math.floor(values.length * 0.75)];
114 |     const iqr = q3 - q1;
115 |     const lower = q1 - threshold * iqr;
116 |     const upper = q3 + threshold * iqr;
117 | 
118 |     const anomalies = [];
119 |     rows.forEach((row, index) => {
120 |       const value = toNumber(row[column])?.valueOf();
121 |       if (value !== null && (value < lower || value > upper)) {
122 |         anomalies.push({
123 |           rowIndex: index,
124 |           value,
125 |           type: value < lower ? 'below' : 'above',
126 |           deviation: value < lower ? lower - value : value - upper
127 |         });
128 |       }
129 |     });
130 | 
131 |     return {
132 |       column,
133 |       threshold,
134 |       bounds: { lower, upper },
135 |       count: anomalies.length,
136 |       percentage: ((anomalies.length / values.length) * 100).toFixed(2),
137 |       anomalies: anomalies.slice(0, 20)
138 |     };
139 |   }
140 | 
141 |   createThresholdAlerts(dataset, options = {}) {
142 |     const { sensitivity = 1.5 } = options;
143 |     const alerts = [];
144 |     const numericCols = dataset.columns?.filter(c => c.type === 'number') || [];
145 |     
146 |     for (const col of numericCols) {
147 |       const values = dataset.rows.map(r => toNumber(r[col.name])?.valueOf()).filter(v => v !== null);
148 |       if (values.length < 10) continue;
149 | 
150 |       values.sort((a, b) => a - b);
151 |       const q1 = values[Math.floor(values.length * 0.25)];
152 |       const q3 = values[Math.floor(values.length * 0.75)];
153 |       const mean = values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length;
154 |       const iqr = q3 - q1;
155 |       
156 |       const highAlert = this.createAlert({
157 |         name: `${col.name} unusually high`,
158 |         datasetId: dataset.id,
159 |         metric: col.name,
160 |         operator: 'gt',
161 |         threshold: q3 + sensitivity * iqr
162 |       });
163 |       alerts.push(highAlert);
164 | 
165 |       const lowAlert = this.createAlert({
166 |         name: `${col.name} unusually low`,
167 |         datasetId: dataset.id,
168 |         metric: col.name,
169 |         operator: 'lt',
170 |         threshold: q1 - sensitivity * iqr
171 |       });
172 |       alerts.push(lowAlert);
173 |     }
174 | 
175 |     return alerts;
176 |   }
177 | 
178 |   getAlertHistory(limit = 50) {
179 |     return this.alertHistory.slice(-limit);
180 |   }
181 | 
182 |   getAlerts() {
183 |     return Array.from(this.alerts.values());
184 |   }
185 | 
186 |   deleteAlert(alertId) {
187 |     return this.alerts.delete(alertId);
188 |   }
189 | 
190 |   toggleAlert(alertId, enabled) {
191 |     const alert = this.alerts.get(alertId);
192 |     if (alert) {
193 |       alert.enabled = enabled;
194 |       return alert;
195 |     }
196 |     return null;
197 |   }
198 | }
199 | 
200 | export const alertService = new AlertService();
```

```js
 10 | function ensureMemoryFile() {
```
