230 | function buildPlannerPrompt(schemaPacket, query, mode = "command") {
231 |   const schemaText = formatSchemaForPrompt(schemaPacket);
232 | 
233 |   return `
234 | You are a dashboard planning LLM.
235 | 
236 | IMPORTANT RULES:
237 | - You never generate chart data arrays.
238 | - You only choose valid columns from the schema.
239 | - Return JSON only.
240 | - Use uploaded data schema only.
241 | - If the requested chart is impossible, return action "ANSWER" and explain why.
242 | - Backend code will calculate chart data.
243 | 
244 | MODE: ${mode}
245 | 
246 | USER_QUERY:
247 | ${query}
248 | 
249 | SCHEMA:
250 | ${schemaText}
251 | 
252 | Return this JSON shape:
253 | {
254 |   "action": "GENERATE_CHART" | "MODIFY_CHART" | "DELETE_CHART" | "FILTER" | "CLEAR_FILTERS" | "GENERATE_KPI" | "ANSWER",
255 |   "message": "short useful message",
256 |   "chart": {
257 |     "type": "bar" | "line" | "area" | "pie" | "scatter" | "histogram",
258 |     "xKey": "column name",
259 |     "yKey": "column name",
260 |     "aggregation": "sum" | "avg" | "count" | "min" | "max",
261 |     "limit": 10,
262 |     "title": "chart title"
263 |   },
264 |   "filters": {
265 |     "column name": "value"
266 |   },
267 |   "kpis": [
268 |     {
269 |       "title": "KPI title",
270 |       "metric": "column name",
271 |       "aggregation": "sum" | "avg" | "count" | "min" | "max"
272 |     }
273 |   ]
274 | }
275 | `.trim();
276 | }
277 | 
278 | async function callOllamaPlanner(schemaPacket, query, mode = "command") {
279 |   const model = process.env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || "llama3.2";
280 |   const baseUrl = process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
281 |   const timeoutMs = Number(process.env.DASHBOARD_AI_TIMEOUT_MS || 45000);
282 | 
283 |   const controller = new AbortController();
284 |   const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
285 | 
286 |   try {
287 |     const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/chat`, {
288 |       method: "POST",
289 |       signal: controller.signal,
290 |       headers: {
291 |         "Content-Type": "application/json",
292 |       },
293 |       body: JSON.stringify({
294 |         model,
295 |         stream: false,
296 |         format: "json",
297 |         messages: [
298 |           {
299 |             role: "user",
300 |             content: buildPlannerPrompt(schemaPacket, query, mode),
301 |           },
302 |         ],
303 |         options: {
304 |           temperature: 0,
305 |           num_predict: 700,
306 |         },
307 |       }),
308 |     });
309 | 
310 |     if (!response.ok) {
311 |       throw new Error(`Ollama returned HTTP ${response.status}`);
312 |     }
313 | 
314 |     const payload = await response.json();
315 |     const parsed = safeJsonParse(payload?.message?.content);
316 | 
317 |     if (!parsed) {
318 |       throw new Error("LLM did not return valid JSON");
319 |     }
320 | 
321 |     return {
322 |       plan: parsed,
323 |       provider: "ollama",
324 |       model,
325 |     };
326 |   } finally {
327 |     clearTimeout(timeout);
328 |   }
329 | }
330 | 
331 | function normalizeAction(action, query) {
332 |   const raw = String(action || "").toUpperCase();
333 | 
334 |   if (raw.includes("MODIFY") || raw.includes("CHANGE") || raw.includes("SWITCH")) return "MODIFY_CHART";
335 |   if (raw.includes("DELETE") || raw.includes("REMOVE")) return "DELETE_CHART";
336 |   if (raw.includes("CLEAR") && raw.includes("FILTER")) return "CLEAR_FILTERS";
337 |   if (raw.includes("FILTER")) return "FILTER";
338 |   if (raw.includes("KPI") || raw.includes("METRIC")) return "GENERATE_KPI";
339 |   if (raw.includes("CHART") || raw.includes("VISUAL")) return "GENERATE_CHART";
340 |   if (raw.includes("ANSWER")) return "ANSWER";
341 | 
342 |   return detectLocalAction(query);
343 | }
344 | 
345 | function normalizeChartSpec(dataset, schema, query, rawChart = {}) {
346 |   const type = detectChartType(query, rawChart.type);
347 |   const aggregation = detectAggregation(query, rawChart.aggregation);
348 | 
349 |   let xColumn = findColumn(schema, rawChart.xKey, ["dimension", "date", "metric"]);
350 |   let yColumn = findColumn(schema, rawChart.yKey, ["metric", "dimension", "date"]);
351 | 
352 |   if (type === "scatter") {
353 |     const metrics = schema.metricColumns || [];
354 |     const xMetric = findColumn(schema, rawChart.xKey, ["metric"]) || metrics[0];
355 |     const yMetric =
356 |       findColumn(schema, rawChart.yKey, ["metric"]) ||
357 |       metrics.find((metric) => metric.name !== xMetric?.name);
358 | 
359 |     return {
360 |       type,
361 |       xKey: xMetric?.name || "",
362 |       yKey: yMetric?.name || "",
363 |       aggregation: "none",
364 |       limit: Number(rawChart.limit || 300),
365 |       title: rawChart.title || `${humanize(yMetric?.name)} vs ${humanize(xMetric?.name)}`,
366 |     };
367 |   }
368 | 
369 |   if (type === "histogram") {
370 |     const metric = findColumn(schema, rawChart.xKey || rawChart.yKey, ["metric"]) || pickDefaultMetric(schema, query);
371 | 
372 |     return {
373 |       type,
374 |       xKey: metric?.name || "",
375 |       yKey: "count",
376 |       aggregation: "count",
377 |       limit: Number(rawChart.limit || 12),
378 |       title: rawChart.title || `Distribution of ${humanize(metric?.name)}`,
379 |     };
380 |   }
381 | 
382 |   if (!xColumn || xColumn.role === "metric") {
383 |     xColumn = pickDefaultDimension(schema, query);
384 |   }
385 | 
386 |   if ((!yColumn || yColumn.role !== "metric") && aggregation !== "count") {
387 |     yColumn = pickDefaultMetric(schema, query);
388 |   }
389 | 
390 |   const yKey = aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yColumn?.name || "";
391 | 
392 |   return {
393 |     type,
394 |     xKey: xColumn?.name || "",
395 |     yKey,
396 |     sourceMetric: yColumn?.name || "",
397 |     aggregation,
398 |     limit: Math.max(1, Math.min(Number(rawChart.limit || 10), 50)),
399 |     title:
400 |       rawChart.title ||
401 |       `${aggregation === "avg" ? "Average" : aggregation === "count" ? "Count" : humanize(aggregation)} ${
402 |         aggregation === "count" ? "Records" : humanize(yColumn?.name)
403 |       } by ${humanize(xColumn?.name)}`,
404 |   };
405 | }
406 | 
407 | function validateChartSpec(schema, chart) {
408 |   const x = findColumn(schema, chart.xKey);
409 |   const y = chart.sourceMetric ? findColumn(schema, chart.sourceMetric) : findColumn(schema, chart.yKey);
410 | 
411 |   if (!CHART_TYPES.has(chart.type)) {
412 |     return {
413 |       ok: false,
414 |       reason: `Unsupported chart type "${chart.type}".`,
415 |     };
416 |   }
417 | 
418 |   if (chart.type === "scatter") {
419 |     const xMetric = findColumn(schema, chart.xKey, ["metric"]);
420 |     const yMetric = findColumn(schema, chart.yKey, ["metric"]);
421 | 
422 |     if (!xMetric || !yMetric) {
423 |       return {
424 |         ok: false,
425 |         reason: "Scatter chart needs two numeric columns.",
426 |       };
427 |     }
428 | 
429 |     return { ok: true };
430 |   }
431 | 
432 |   if (chart.type === "histogram") {
433 |     const metric = findColumn(schema, chart.xKey, ["metric"]);
434 | 
435 |     if (!metric) {
436 |       return {
437 |         ok: false,
438 |         reason: "Histogram needs one numeric column.",
439 |       };
440 |     }
441 | 
442 |     return { ok: true };
443 |   }
444 | 
445 |   if (!x) {
446 |     return {
447 |       ok: false,
448 |       reason: `Column "${chart.xKey}" does not exist.`,
449 |     };
450 |   }
451 | 
452 |   if (chart.aggregation !== "count" && !y) {
453 |     return {
454 |       ok: false,
455 |       reason: `Column "${chart.yKey}" does not exist.`,
456 |     };
457 |   }
458 | 
459 |   if (chart.aggregation !== "count" && y?.role !== "metric") {
460 |     return {
461 |       ok: false,
462 |       reason: `"${chart.yKey}" is not numeric, so it cannot be used as a metric.`,
463 |     };
464 |   }
465 | 
466 |   if (["pie", "bar", "line", "area"].includes(chart.type) && x.role === "metric") {
467 |     return {
468 |       ok: false,
469 |       reason: `${chart.type} chart needs a category/date column on X-axis.`,
470 |     };
471 |   }
472 | 
473 |   return { ok: true };
474 | }
475 | 
476 | function applyFilters(rows, filters = {}) {
477 |   const entries = Object.entries(filters || {}).filter(([, value]) => value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== "");
478 | 
479 |   if (!entries.length) return rows;
480 | 
481 |   return rows.filter((row) => {
482 |     return entries.every(([key, value]) => {
483 |       return String(row[key] ?? "").toLowerCase() === String(value).toLowerCase();
484 |     });
485 |   });
486 | }
487 | 
488 | function executeHistogram(dataset, chart, rows) {
489 |   const values = rows
490 |     .map((row) => Number(row[chart.xKey]))
491 |     .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
492 | 
493 |   if (!values.length) {
494 |     return {
495 |       ...chart,
496 |       yKey: "count",
497 |       data: [],
498 |     };
499 |   }
500 | 
501 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
502 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
503 |   const bucketCount = Math.max(5, Math.min(chart.limit || 12, 20));
504 |   const step = (max - min) / bucketCount || 1;
505 | 
506 |   const buckets = Array.from({ length: bucketCount }, (_, index) => {
507 |     const start = min + index * step;
508 |     const end = index === bucketCount - 1 ? max : start + step;
509 | 
510 |     return {
511 |       range: `${Number(start.toFixed(2))} - ${Number(end.toFixed(2))}`,
512 |       count: 0,
513 |       start,
514 |       end,
515 |     };
516 |   });
517 | 
518 |   for (const value of values) {
519 |     const index = Math.min(Math.floor((value - min) / step), bucketCount - 1);
520 |     buckets[index].count += 1;
521 |   }
522 | 
523 |   return {
524 |     id: randomUUID(),
525 |     type: "bar",
526 |     title: chart.title,
527 |     xKey: "range",
528 |     yKey: "count",
529 |     data: buckets.map(({ range, count }) => ({ range, count })),
530 |   };
531 | }
532 | 
533 | function executeChartSpec(dataset, chart, filters = {}) {
534 |   const rows = applyFilters(Array.isArray(dataset.rows) ? dataset.rows : [], filters);
535 | 
536 |   if (chart.type === "histogram") {
537 |     return executeHistogram(dataset, chart, rows);
538 |   }
539 | 
540 |   if (chart.type === "scatter") {
541 |     const data = rows
542 |       .map((row) => ({
543 |         [chart.xKey]: Number(row[chart.xKey]),
544 |         [chart.yKey]: Number(row[chart.yKey]),
545 |       }))
546 |       .filter((row) => Number.isFinite(row[chart.xKey]) && Number.isFinite(row[chart.yKey]))
547 |       .slice(0, chart.limit || 300);
548 | 
549 |     return {
550 |       id: randomUUID(),
551 |       type: "scatter",
552 |       title: chart.title,
553 |       xKey: chart.xKey,
554 |       yKey: chart.yKey,
555 |       data,
556 |     };
557 |   }
558 | 
559 |   const valueKey = chart.aggregation === "count" ? "count" : chart.yKey;
560 |   const metricKey = chart.sourceMetric || chart.yKey;
561 |   const groups = new Map();
562 | 
563 |   for (const row of rows) {
564 |     const label = String(row[chart.xKey] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
565 |     const rawValue = chart.aggregation === "count" ? 1 : Number(row[metricKey]);
566 | 
567 |     if (chart.aggregation !== "count" && !Number.isFinite(rawValue)) {
568 |       continue;
569 |     }
570 | 
571 |     const current = groups.get(label) || {
572 |       sum: 0,
573 |       count: 0,
574 |       min: Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY,
575 |       max: Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY,
576 |     };
577 | 
578 |     current.sum += rawValue;
579 |     current.count += 1;
580 |     current.min = Math.min(current.min, rawValue);
581 |     current.max = Math.max(current.max, rawValue);
582 | 
583 |     groups.set(label, current);
584 |   }
585 | 
586 |   let data = [...groups.entries()].map(([label, group]) => {
587 |     let value = group.sum;
588 | 
589 |     if (chart.aggregation === "avg") value = group.count > 0 ? group.sum / group.count : 0;
590 |     if (chart.aggregation === "count") value = group.count;
591 |     if (chart.aggregation === "min") value = group.min;
592 |     if (chart.aggregation === "max") value = group.max;
593 | 
594 |     return {
595 |       [chart.xKey]: label,
596 |       [valueKey]: Number(value.toFixed(2)),
597 |     };
598 |   });
599 | 
600 |   if (chart.type === "line" || chart.type === "area") {
601 |     data = data.sort((a, b) => String(a[chart.xKey]).localeCompare(String(b[chart.xKey])));
602 |   } else {
603 |     data = data.sort((a, b) => Number(b[valueKey]) - Number(a[valueKey]));
604 |   }
605 | 
606 |   data = data.slice(0, chart.limit || 10);
607 | 
608 |   return {
609 |     id: randomUUID(),
610 |     type: chart.type,
611 |     title: chart.title,
612 |     xKey: chart.xKey,
613 |     yKey: valueKey,
614 |     data,
615 |   };
616 | }
617 | 
618 | function computeMetric(dataset, metricName, aggregation = "sum") {
619 |   const rows = Array.isArray(dataset.rows) ? dataset.rows : [];
620 |   const values = rows
621 |     .map((row) => Number(row[metricName]))
622 |     .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value));
623 | 
624 |   if (aggregation === "count") return rows.length;
625 |   if (!values.length) return 0;
626 |   if (aggregation === "avg") return values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / values.length;
627 |   if (aggregation === "min") return Math.min(...values);
628 |   if (aggregation === "max") return Math.max(...values);
629 | 
630 |   return values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
631 | }
632 | 
633 | function buildKpis(dataset, schema, requestedKpis = []) {
634 |   const kpis = [];
635 |   const metric = schema.metricColumns?.[0];
636 |   const dimension = schema.dimensionColumns?.[0];
637 | 
638 |   kpis.push({
639 |     title: "Total Records",
640 |     value: String(dataset.rowCount || dataset.rows?.length || 0),
641 |     icon: "rows",
642 |     status: "good",
643 |   });
644 | 
645 |   if (metric) {
646 |     const total = computeMetric(dataset, metric.name, "sum");
647 |     const avg = computeMetric(dataset, metric.name, "avg");
648 | 
649 |     kpis.push({
650 |       title: `Total ${humanize(metric.name)}`,
651 |       value: Number(total.toFixed(2)).toLocaleString(),
652 |       icon: "chart",
653 |       status: "good",
654 |     });
655 | 
656 |     kpis.push({
657 |       title: `Avg ${humanize(metric.name)}`,
658 |       value: Number(avg.toFixed(2)).toLocaleString(),
659 |       icon: "chart",
660 |       status: "good",
661 |     });
662 |   }
663 | 
664 |   if (dimension) {
665 |     const counts = new Map();
666 | 
667 |     for (const row of dataset.rows || []) {
668 |       const label = String(row[dimension.name] ?? "Unknown");
669 |       counts.set(label, (counts.get(label) || 0) + 1);
670 |     }
671 | 
672 |     const top = [...counts.entries()].sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0];
673 | 
674 |     if (top) {
675 |       kpis.push({
676 |         title: `Top ${humanize(dimension.name)}`,
677 |         value: top[0],
678 |         icon: "pie-chart",
679 |         status: "good",
680 |         insight: `${top[0]} appears in ${top[1]} records.`,
681 |       });
682 |     }
683 |   }
684 | 
685 |   for (const requested of requestedKpis || []) {
686 |     const requestedMetric = findColumn(schema, requested.metric, ["metric"]);
687 |     if (!requestedMetric) continue;
688 | 
689 |     const aggregation = detectAggregation("", requested.aggregation);
690 |     const value = computeMetric(dataset, requestedMetric.name, aggregation);
691 | 
692 |     kpis.push({
693 |       title: requested.title || `${humanize(aggregation)} ${humanize(requestedMetric.name)}`,
694 |       value: Number(value.toFixed(2)).toLocaleString(),
695 |       icon: "chart",
696 |       status: "good",
697 |     });
698 |   }
699 | 
700 |   return kpis.slice(0, 6);
701 | }
702 | 
703 | function buildFallbackPlan(schema, query) {
704 |   const action = detectLocalAction(query);
705 |   const filters = parseFilterFromQuery(query, schema);
706 | 
707 |   if (action === "FILTER" && filters) {
708 |     return {
709 |       action: "FILTER",
710 |       filters,
711 |       message: `Applied filter: ${Object.entries(filters)[0][0]} = ${Object.entries(filters)[0][1]}.`,
712 |     };
713 |   }
714 | 
715 |   return {
716 |     action,
717 |     message: "Generated using schema-based local planner.",
718 |     chart: {},
719 |     filters,
720 |     kpis: [],
721 |   };
722 | }
723 | 
724 | function buildInsightsFromKpis(kpis, schemaPacket, qualityScore) {
725 |   const metrics = {
726 |     totalRecords: schemaPacket.rowCount,
727 |   };
728 | 
729 |   return [
730 |     {
731 |       type: "summary",
732 |       title: "Dataset Summary",
733 |       message: `Detected ${schemaPacket.rowCount.toLocaleString()} rows and ${schemaPacket.columnCount} columns.`,
734 |       metrics,
735 |     },
736 |     {
737 |       type: "data_quality",
738 |       title: "Data Quality",
739 |       message: `Schema quality score is ${qualityScore}/100.`,
740 |       score: qualityScore,
741 |     },
742 |     ...kpis.slice(0, 3).map((kpi) => ({
743 |       type: "kpi",
744 |       title: kpi.title,
745 |       message: `${kpi.title}: ${kpi.value}`,
746 |       value: kpi.value,
747 |     })),
748 |   ];
749 | }
750 | 
751 | export async function planAndExecuteDashboardCommand(dataset, query) {
752 |   const rawSchemaPacket = await buildSchemaPacketAsync(dataset);
753 |   const schema = enrichSchemaPacket(rawSchemaPacket);
754 | 
755 |   const localPlan = buildFallbackPlan(schema, query);
756 | 
757 |   if (localPlan.action === "DELETE_CHART" || localPlan.action === "CLEAR_FILTERS") {
758 |     return {
759 |       ...localPlan,
760 |       provider: "local",
761 |     };
762 |   }
763 | 
764 |   let aiPlan = null;
765 |   let provider = "local";
766 |   let model;
767 |   let aiError;
768 | 
769 |   try {
770 |     const result = await callOllamaPlanner(schema, query, "command");
771 |     aiPlan = result.plan;
772 |     provider = result.provider;
773 |     model = result.model;
774 |   } catch (error) {
775 |     aiError = error.message;
776 |     aiPlan = localPlan;
777 |   }
778 | 
779 |   const action = normalizeAction(aiPlan?.action, query);
780 | 
781 |   if (action === "FILTER") {
782 |     const filters = aiPlan?.filters && Object.keys(aiPlan.filters).length
783 |       ? aiPlan.filters
784 |       : parseFilterFromQuery(query, schema);
785 | 
786 |     return {
787 |       action: "FILTER",
788 |       filters: filters || {},
789 |       message: filters ? "Filter applied." : "I could not identify the filter column/value.",
790 |       provider,
791 |       model,
792 |       aiError,
793 |     };
794 |   }
795 | 
796 |   if (action === "GENERATE_KPI") {
797 |     const kpis = buildKpis(dataset, schema, aiPlan?.kpis || []);
798 | 
799 |     return {
800 |       action: "GENERATE_KPI",
801 |       kpis,
802 |       message: "Generated KPI suggestions from schema.",
803 |       provider,
804 |       model,
805 |       aiError,
806 |     };
807 |   }
808 | 
809 |   if (action !== "GENERATE_CHART" && action !== "MODIFY_CHART") {
810 |     return {
811 |       action: "ANSWER",
812 |       message:
813 |         aiPlan?.message ||
814 |         "Ask me to create a chart, modify chart, delete chart, filter data, or generate KPIs.",
815 |       provider,
816 |       model,
817 |       aiError,
818 |     };
819 |   }
820 | 
821 |   const chartSpec = normalizeChartSpec(dataset, schema, query, aiPlan?.chart || {});
822 |   const validation = validateChartSpec(schema, chartSpec);
823 | 
824 |   if (!validation.ok) {
825 |     return {
826 |       action: "ANSWER",
827 |       message: `That chart is not possible: ${validation.reason}`,
828 |       provider,
829 |       model,
830 |       aiError,
831 |     };
832 |   }
833 | 
834 |   const chart = executeChartSpec(dataset, chartSpec, aiPlan?.filters || {});
835 |   const kpis = buildKpis(dataset, schema, aiPlan?.kpis || []);
836 | 
837 |   return {
838 |     action,
839 |     chart,
840 |     kpis,
841 |     filters: aiPlan?.filters || undefined,
842 |     message:
843 |       aiPlan?.message ||
844 |       `${action === "MODIFY_CHART" ? "Modified" : "Generated"} ${chart.type} chart: ${chart.title}.`,
845 |     provider,
846 |     model,
847 |     aiError,
848 |   };
849 | }
850 | 
851 | export async function buildInitialDashboardAnalysis(dataset) {
852 |   const rawSchemaPacket = await buildSchemaPacketAsync(dataset);
853 |   const schema = enrichSchemaPacket(rawSchemaPacket);
854 |   const qualityScore = getDataQualityScore(rawSchemaPacket);
855 | 
856 |   const chartRecommendations = [];
857 | 
858 |   const primaryMetric = pickDefaultMetric(schema);
859 |   const primaryDimension = pickDefaultDimension(schema);
860 |   const dateColumn = schema.dateColumns?.[0];
861 | 
862 |   if (primaryMetric && primaryDimension) {
863 |     const barSpec = normalizeChartSpec(dataset, schema, "", {
864 |       type: "bar",
865 |       xKey: primaryDimension.name,
866 |       yKey: primaryMetric.name,
867 |       aggregation: "sum",
868 |       title: `${humanize(primaryMetric.name)} by ${humanize(primaryDimension.name)}`,
869 |       limit: 10,
870 |     });
871 | 
872 |     chartRecommendations.push(executeChartSpec(dataset, barSpec));
873 |   }
874 | 
875 |   if (primaryMetric && dateColumn) {
876 |     const lineSpec = normalizeChartSpec(dataset, schema, "trend over time", {
877 |       type: "line",
878 |       xKey: dateColumn.name,
879 |       yKey: primaryMetric.name,
880 |       aggregation: "sum",
881 |       title: `${humanize(primaryMetric.name)} Trend`,
882 |       limit: 20,
883 |     });
884 | 
885 |     chartRecommendations.push(executeChartSpec(dataset, lineSpec));
886 |   }
887 | 
888 |   if (primaryDimension) {
889 |     const pieSpec = normalizeChartSpec(dataset, schema, "distribution", {
890 |       type: "pie",
891 |       xKey: primaryDimension.name,
892 |       aggregation: "count",
893 |       title: `${humanize(primaryDimension.name)} Distribution`,
894 |       limit: 8,
895 |     });
896 | 
897 |     chartRecommendations.push(executeChartSpec(dataset, pieSpec));
898 |   }
899 | 
900 |   const kpis = buildKpis(dataset, schema);
901 | 
902 |   return {
903 |     dataType: "SCHEMA_DRIVEN",
904 |     dataTypeLabel: "Schema Driven Dashboard",
905 |     chartRecommendations: chartRecommendations.filter(Boolean),
906 |     insights: buildInsightsFromKpis(kpis, rawSchemaPacket, qualityScore),
907 |     aiInsights: {
908 |       schemaPacket: {
909 |         name: rawSchemaPacket.name,
910 |         rowCount: rawSchemaPacket.rowCount,
911 |         columnCount: rawSchemaPacket.columnCount,
912 |         columns: schema.columns.map((column) => ({
913 |           name: column.name,
914 |           type: column.chartType,
915 |           role: column.role,
916 |           uniqueCount: column.uniqueCount,
917 |           nullCount: column.nullCount,
918 |         })),
919 |       },
920 |       kpis,
921 |       qualityScore,
922 |     },
923 |   };
924 | }
```

  93 | export function detectDataType(columns, rows) {
  94 |   const columnNames = columns.map(c => c.name.toLowerCase());
  95 |   const columnTypes = columns.reduce((acc, c) => {
  96 |     acc[c.name.toLowerCase()] = c.type;
  97 |     return acc;
  98 |   }, {});
  99 | 
 100 |   let bestMatch = { type: 'GENERAL', score: 0, confidence: 'low' };
 101 | 
 102 |   for (const [dataType, pattern] of Object.entries(DataTypePatterns)) {
 103 |     if (dataType === 'GENERAL') continue;
 104 | 
 105 |     let score = 0;
 106 |     let matches = 0;
 107 | 
 108 |     for (const keyword of pattern.keywords) {
 109 |       const found = columnNames.some(name => name.includes(keyword));
 110 |       if (found) {
 111 |         score += 1;
 112 |         matches++;
 113 |       }
 114 |     }
 115 | 
 116 |     const requiredMatches = pattern.requiredFields.filter(
 117 |       field => columnNames.some(name => name.includes(field))
 118 |     ).length;
 119 |     
 120 |     const requiredScore = requiredMatches / pattern.requiredFields.length;
 121 |     if (pattern.requiredFields.length > 0) {
 122 |       score += requiredScore * 3;
 123 |     }
 124 | 
 125 |     if (score > bestMatch.score) {
 126 |       bestMatch = {
 127 |         type: dataType,
 128 |         score,
 129 |         confidence: score >= 5 ? 'high' : score >= 3 ? 'medium' : 'low'
 130 |       };
 131 |     }
 132 |   }
 133 | 
 134 |   return bestMatch;
 135 | }
 136 | 
 137 | export function detectSalesSchema(columns, rows) {
 138 |   const columnNames = columns.map(c => c.name.toLowerCase());
 139 |   const result = {
 140 |     dataType: 'SALES',
 141 |     detectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 142 |     primaryDimension: null,
 143 |     secondaryDimension: null,
 144 |     primaryMetric: null,
 145 |     secondaryMetric: null,
 146 |     dateColumns: [],
 147 |     categoryColumns: [],
 148 |     numericColumns: [],
 149 |     recommendedCharts: [],
 150 |     insights: [],
 151 |     dataTypeLabel: 'Sales Data'
 152 |   };
 153 | 
 154 |   const dataTypeLabels = {
 155 |     SALES: 'Sales Data',
 156 |     INVENTORY: 'Inventory Data',
 157 |     MARKETING: 'Marketing Data',
 158 |     FINANCE: 'Finance Data',
 159 |     HR: 'HR Data',
 160 |     GENERAL: 'Generic Data'
 161 |   };
 162 |   result.dataTypeLabel = dataTypeLabels[result.dataType] || 'Generic Data';
 163 | 
 164 |   for (const col of columns) {
 165 |     const name = col.name.toLowerCase();
 166 |     const type = col.type;
 167 | 
 168 |     if (['date', 'datetime', 'timestamp'].includes(type) || name.includes('date') || name.includes('month') || name.includes('year') || name.includes('quarter')) {
 169 |       result.dateColumns.push(col.name);
 170 |       if (!result.primaryDimension) result.primaryDimension = col.name;
 171 |     } else if (name.includes('region') || name.includes('territory') || name.includes('location') || name.includes('country') || name.includes('city')) {
 172 |       result.categoryColumns.push(col.name);
 173 |       if (!result.primaryDimension) result.primaryDimension = col.name;
 174 |       if (!result.secondaryDimension) result.secondaryDimension = col.name;
 175 |     } else if (name.includes('category') || name.includes('product') || name.includes('channel') || name.includes('segment')) {
 176 |       result.categoryColumns.push(col.name);
 177 |       if (!result.primaryDimension) result.primaryDimension = col.name;
 178 |       if (!result.secondaryDimension && result.primaryDimension) result.secondaryDimension = col.name;
 179 |     } else if (type === 'number' || type === 'integer') {
 180 |       result.numericColumns.push(col.name);
 181 |       if (name.includes('revenue') || name.includes('sales') || name.includes('profit') || name.includes('amount')) {
 182 |         if (!result.primaryMetric) result.primaryMetric = col.name;
 183 |         else if (!result.secondaryMetric) result.secondaryMetric = col.name;
 184 |       } else if (!result.primaryMetric) {
 185 |         result.primaryMetric = col.name;
 186 |       } else if (!result.secondaryMetric) {
 187 |         result.secondaryMetric = col.name;
 188 |       }
 189 |     }
 190 |   }
 191 | 
 192 |   return result;
 193 | }

 377 | export function generateChartRecommendations(schema, rows) {
 378 |   const recommendations = [];
 379 |   const hasDate = schema.dateColumns.length > 0;
 380 |   const hasCategory = schema.categoryColumns.length > 0;
 381 |   const hasNumeric = schema.numericColumns.length > 0;
 382 |   const numericCount = schema.numericColumns.length;
 383 | 
 384 |   if (hasDate && hasNumeric) {
 385 |     recommendations.push({
 386 |       type: 'line',
 387 |       title: `${schema.primaryMetric || 'Value'} Over Time`,
 388 |       xKey: schema.dateColumns[0],
 389 |       yKey: schema.primaryMetric,
 390 |       data: generateTimeSeriesData(rows, schema.dateColumns[0], schema.primaryMetric),
 391 |       priority: 'high',
 392 |       reason: 'Time series data detected - ideal for trend analysis'
 393 |     });
 394 | 
 395 |     recommendations.push({
 396 |       type: 'area',
 397 |       title: `Cumulative ${schema.primaryMetric || 'Metric'}`,
 398 |       xKey: schema.dateColumns[0],
 399 |       yKey: schema.primaryMetric,
 400 |       data: generateTimeSeriesData(rows, schema.dateColumns[0], schema.primaryMetric, 'cumulative'),
 401 |       priority: 'medium',
 402 |       reason: 'Shows growth trajectory over time'
 403 |     });
 404 |   }
 405 | 
 406 |   if (hasCategory && hasNumeric) {
 407 |     const categoryCol = schema.categoryColumns[0];
 408 |     const categoryData = aggregateByCategory(rows, categoryCol, schema.primaryMetric);
 409 |     
 410 |     recommendations.push({
 411 |       type: 'bar',
 412 |       title: `${schema.primaryMetric} by ${categoryCol}`,
 413 |       xKey: categoryCol,
 414 |       yKey: 'total',
 415 |       data: categoryData.sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total).slice(0, 10),
 416 |       priority: 'high',
 417 |       reason: 'Category comparison - shows top performers'
 418 |     });
 419 | 
 420 |     if (categoryData.length <= 6) {
 421 |       recommendations.push({
 422 |         type: 'pie',
 423 |         title: `${schema.primaryMetric} Distribution`,
 424 |         xKey: categoryCol,
 425 |         yKey: 'total',
 426 |         data: categoryData,
 427 |         priority: 'medium',
 428 |         reason: 'Part-to-whole visualization for small number of categories'
 429 |       });
 430 |     }
 431 |   }
 432 | 
 433 |   if (hasNumeric && numericCount >= 2) {
 434 |     recommendations.push({
 435 |       type: 'scatter',
 436 |       title: `${schema.primaryMetric} vs ${schema.secondaryMetric}`,
 437 |       xKey: schema.primaryMetric,
 438 |       yKey: schema.secondaryMetric,
 439 |       data: rows.slice(0, 100).map(row => ({
 440 |         x: Number(row[schema.primaryMetric]) || 0,
 441 |         y: Number(row[schema.secondaryMetric]) || 0
 442 |       })),
 443 |       priority: 'medium',
 444 |       reason: 'Correlation analysis between two metrics'
 445 |     });
 446 |   }
 447 | 
 448 |   if (hasCategory && schema.categoryColumns.length >= 2) {
 449 |     const pivotData = generatePivotData(rows, schema.categoryColumns[0], schema.categoryColumns[1], schema.primaryMetric);
 450 |     recommendations.push({
 451 |       type: 'heatmap',
 452 |       title: `${schema.categoryColumns[0]} vs ${schema.categoryColumns[1]}`,
 453 |       xKey: schema.categoryColumns[0],
 454 |       yKey: schema.categoryColumns[1],
 455 |       zKey: 'value',
 456 |       data: pivotData,
 457 |       priority: 'low',
 458 |       reason: 'Cross-category analysis'
 459 |     });
 460 |   }
 461 | 
 462 |   if (hasNumeric) {
 463 |     recommendations.push({
 464 |       type: 'histogram',
 465 |       title: `${schema.primaryMetric} Distribution`,
 466 |       xKey: 'range',
 467 |       yKey: 'count',
 468 |       data: generateHistogramData(rows, schema.primaryMetric),
 469 |       priority: 'medium',
 470 |       reason: 'Statistical distribution of values'
 471 |     });
 472 |   }
 473 | 
 474 |   return recommendations;
 475 | }
 476 | 
 477 | function generateTimeSeriesData(rows, dateCol, metricCol, mode = 'normal') {
 478 |   const grouped = {};
 479 |   
 480 |   rows.forEach(row => {
 481 |     const date = row[dateCol];
 482 |     const value = Number(row[metricCol]) || 0;
 483 |     if (!grouped[date]) grouped[date] = 0;
 484 |     grouped[date] += value;
 485 |   });
 486 | 
 487 |   const result = Object.entries(grouped).map(([date, value]) => ({
 488 |     [dateCol]: date,
 489 |     [metricCol]: mode === 'cumulative' ? value : value
 490 |   }));
 491 | 
 492 |   if (mode === 'cumulative') {
 493 |     let sum = 0;
 494 |     result.forEach(item => {
 495 |       sum += item[metricCol];
 496 |       item[metricCol] = sum;
 497 |     });
 498 |   }
 499 | 
 500 |   return result;
 501 | }
 502 | 
 503 | function aggregateByCategory(rows, categoryCol, metricCol) {
 504 |   const grouped = {};
 505 |   
 506 |   rows.forEach(row => {
 507 |     const category = row[categoryCol];
 508 |     const value = Number(row[metricCol]) || 0;
 509 |     if (!grouped[category]) grouped[category] = 0;
 510 |     grouped[category] += value;
 511 |   });
 512 | 
 513 |   return Object.entries(grouped).map(([category, total]) => ({
 514 |     [categoryCol]: category,
 515 |     total
 516 |   }));
 517 | }
 518 | 
 519 | function generateHistogramData(rows, metricCol) {
 520 |   const values = rows.map(row => Number(row[metricCol])).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
 521 |   if (values.length === 0) return [];
 522 | 
 523 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
 524 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
 525 |   const binCount = Math.min(10, Math.ceil(Math.sqrt(values.length)));
 526 |   const binSize = (max - min) / binCount;
 527 | 
 528 |   const bins = Array(binCount).fill(0).map((_, i) => ({
 529 |     range: `${(min + i * binSize).toFixed(0)}-${(min + (i + 1) * binSize).toFixed(0)}`,
 530 |     count: 0,
 531 |     min: min + i * binSize,
 532 |     max: min + (i + 1) * binSize
 533 |   }));
 534 | 
 535 |   values.forEach(v => {
 536 |     const binIndex = Math.min(Math.floor((v - min) / binSize), binCount - 1);
 537 |     bins[binIndex].count++;
 538 |   });
 539 | 
 540 |   return bins;
 541 | }
 542 | 
 543 | function generatePivotData(rows, rowCol, colCol, metricCol) {
 544 |   const pivot = {};
 545 |   
 546 |   rows.forEach(row => {
 547 |     const rowKey = row[rowCol];
 548 |     const colKey = row[colCol];
 549 |     const value = Number(row[metricCol]) || 0;
 550 |     
 551 |     if (!pivot[rowKey]) pivot[rowKey] = {};
 552 |     if (!pivot[rowKey][colKey]) pivot[rowKey][colKey] = 0;
 553 |     pivot[rowKey][colKey] += value;
 554 |   });
 555 | 
 556 |   const result = [];
 557 |   Object.entries(pivot).forEach(([rowKey, cols]) => {
 558 |     Object.entries(cols).forEach(([colKey, value]) => {
 559 |       result.push({
 560 |         [rowCol]: rowKey,
 561 |         [colCol]: colKey,
 562 |         value
 563 |       });
 564 |     });
 565 |   });
 566 | 
 567 |   return result;
 568 | }
 569 | 
 570 | export function generateSalesInsights(schema, rows, chartRecommendations) {
 571 |   const insights = [];
 572 | 
 573 |   if (!schema.primaryMetric || !schema.primaryDimension) {
 574 |     insights.push({
 575 |       type: 'warning',
 576 |       message: 'Incomplete schema - unable to generate full analytics'
 577 |     });
 578 |     return insights;
 579 |   }
 580 | 
 581 |   const totalValue = rows.reduce((sum, row) => sum + (Number(row[schema.primaryMetric]) || 0), 0);
 582 |   const avgValue = totalValue / rows.length;
 583 | 
 584 |   insights.push({
 585 |     type: 'summary',
 586 |     title: 'Overview',
 587 |     metrics: {
 588 |       totalRecords: rows.length,
 589 |       totalValue: Math.round(totalValue * 100) / 100,
 590 |       averageValue: Math.round(avgValue * 100) / 100,
 591 |       primaryMetric: schema.primaryMetric,
 592 |       primaryDimension: schema.primaryDimension
 593 |     }
 594 |   });
 595 | 
 596 |   if (schema.categoryColumns.length > 0) {
 597 |     const categoryCol = schema.categoryColumns[0];
 598 |     const categoryTotals = {};
 599 |     
 600 |     rows.forEach(row => {
 601 |       const cat = row[categoryCol];
 602 |       const value = Number(row[schema.primaryMetric]) || 0;
 603 |       if (!categoryTotals[cat]) categoryTotals[cat] = 0;
 604 |       categoryTotals[cat] += value;
 605 |     });
 606 | 
 607 |     const sorted = Object.entries(categoryTotals).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
 608 |     const topCategory = sorted[0];
 609 |     const bottomCategory = sorted[sorted.length - 1];
 610 | 
 611 |     insights.push({
 612 |       type: 'top_performer',
 613 |       title: 'Top Performer',
 614 |       message: `${topCategory[0]} leads with ${Math.round(topCategory[1] * 100) / 100} (${Math.round(topCategory[1] / totalValue * 100)}% of total)`,
 615 |       metric: topCategory[1],
 616 |       category: topCategory[0]
 617 |     });
 618 | 
 619 |     if (sorted.length > 1) {
 620 |       const top3 = sorted.slice(0, 3);
 621 |       const top3Total = top3.reduce((sum, [, v]) => sum + v, 0);
 622 |       insights.push({
 623 |         type: 'concentration',
 624 |         title: 'Concentration Analysis',
 625 |         message: `Top 3 ${categoryCol} accounts for ${Math.round(top3Total / totalValue * 100)}% of total ${schema.primaryMetric}`,
 626 |         percentage: Math.round(top3Total / totalValue * 100)
 627 |       });
 628 |     }
 629 |   }
 630 | 
 631 |   if (schema.dateColumns.length > 0) {
 632 |     const dateCol = schema.dateColumns[0];
 633 |     const timePeriods = {};
 634 |     
 635 |     rows.forEach(row => {
 636 |       const period = row[dateCol];
 637 |       const value = Number(row[schema.primaryMetric]) || 0;
 638 |       if (!timePeriods[period]) timePeriods[period] = 0;
 639 |       timePeriods[period] += value;
 640 |     });
 641 | 
 642 |     const sorted = Object.entries(timePeriods).sort((a, b) => a[0].localeCompare(b[0]));
 643 |     if (sorted.length >= 2) {
 644 |       const first = sorted[0][1];
 645 |       const last = sorted[sorted.length - 1][1];
 646 |       const growth = ((last - first) / first * 100);
 647 |       
 648 |       insights.push({
 649 |         type: 'trend',
 650 |         title: 'Trend Analysis',
 651 |         message: growth > 0 ? `Growing by ${Math.round(growth)}% from first to last period` : `Declining by ${Math.abs(Math.round(growth))}% from first to last period`,
 652 |         growth: Math.round(growth * 100) / 100
 653 |       });
 654 |     }
 655 |   }
 656 | 
 657 |   if (schema.numericColumns.length >= 2) {
 658 |     const correlations = [];
 659 |     for (let i = 0; i < schema.numericColumns.length; i++) {
 660 |       for (let j = i + 1; j < schema.numericColumns.length; j++) {
 661 |         const col1 = schema.numericColumns[i];
 662 |         const col2 = schema.numericColumns[j];
 663 |         const correlation = calculateCorrelation(rows, col1, col2);
 664 |         if (Math.abs(correlation) > 0.5) {
 665 |           correlations.push({
 666 |             columns: [col1, col2],
 667 |             coefficient: correlation,
 668 |             strength: Math.abs(correlation) > 0.7 ? 'strong' : 'moderate'
 669 |           });
 670 |         }
 671 |       }
 672 |     }
 673 |     
 674 |     if (correlations.length > 0) {
 675 |       insights.push({
 676 |         type: 'correlation',
 677 |         title: 'Key Correlations Found',
 678 |         message: `${correlations.length} significant correlation(s) detected between metrics`,
 679 |         correlations
 680 |       });
 681 |     }
 682 |   }
 683 | 
 684 |   return insights;
 685 | }
 686 | 
 687 | function calculateCorrelation(rows, col1, col2) {
 688 |   const pairs = rows
 689 |     .map(row => [Number(row[col1]), Number(row[col2])])
 690 |     .filter(([a, b]) => !isNaN(a) && !isNaN(b));
 691 | 
 692 |   if (pairs.length < 2) return 0;
 693 | 
 694 |   const n = pairs.length;
 695 |   const sumX = pairs.reduce((s, [x]) => s + x, 0);
 696 |   const sumY = pairs.reduce((s, [, y]) => s + y, 0);
 697 |   const sumXY = pairs.reduce((s, [x, y]) => s + x * y, 0);
 698 |   const sumX2 = pairs.reduce((s, [x]) => s + x * x, 0);
 699 |   const sumY2 = pairs.reduce((s, [, y]) => s + y * y, 0);
 700 | 
 701 |   const numerator = n * sumXY - sumX * sumY;
 702 |   const denominator = Math.sqrt((n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX) * (n * sumY2 - sumY * sumY));
 703 | 
 704 |   return denominator === 0 ? 0 : numerator / denominator;
 705 | }
 706 | 
 707 | export function buildEnhancedSchema(columns, rows) {
 708 |   const dataTypeInfo = detectDataType(columns, rows);
 709 |   
 710 |   let schema;
 711 |   const dataTypeLabels = {
 712 |     SALES: 'Sales Data',
 713 |     INVENTORY: 'Inventory Data',
 714 |     MARKETING: 'Marketing Data',
 715 |     FINANCE: 'Finance Data',
 716 |     HR: 'HR Data',
 717 |     GENERAL: 'Generic Data'
 718 |   };
 719 | 
 720 |   switch (dataTypeInfo.type) {
 721 |     case 'SALES':
 722 |       schema = detectSalesSchema(columns, rows);
 723 |       break;
 724 |     case 'INVENTORY':
 725 |       schema = detectInventorySchema(columns, rows);
 726 |       break;
 727 |     case 'MARKETING':
 728 |       schema = detectMarketingSchema(columns, rows);
 729 |       break;
 730 |     case 'FINANCE':
 731 |       schema = detectFinanceSchema(columns, rows);
 732 |       break;
 733 |     case 'HR':
 734 |       schema = detectHRSchema(columns, rows);
 735 |       break;
 736 |     default:
 737 |       schema = {
 738 |         dataType: dataTypeInfo.type,
 739 |         detectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
 740 |         confidence: dataTypeInfo.confidence,
 741 |         primaryDimension: null,
 742 |         secondaryDimension: null,
 743 |         primaryMetric: null,
 744 |         secondaryMetric: null,
 745 |         dateColumns: [],
 746 |         categoryColumns: [],
 747 |         numericColumns: [],
 748 |         recommendedCharts: [],
 749 |         insights: [],
 750 |         dataTypeLabel: 'Generic Data',
 751 |         columns: columns.map(col => ({
 752 |           name: col.name,
 753 |           type: col.type,
 754 |           role: ['number', 'integer'].includes(col.type) ? 'metric' : 'dimension'
 755 |         }))
 756 |       };
 757 |       for (const col of columns) {
 758 |         const name = col.name.toLowerCase();
 759 |         if (col.type === 'date' || name.includes('date')) {
 760 |           schema.dateColumns.push(col.name);
 761 |           if (!schema.primaryDimension) schema.primaryDimension = col.name;
 762 |         } else if (col.type !== 'number') {
 763 |           schema.categoryColumns.push(col.name);
 764 |           if (!schema.primaryDimension) schema.primaryDimension = col.name;
 765 |           if (!schema.secondaryDimension) schema.secondaryDimension = col.name;
 766 |         } else {
 767 |           schema.numericColumns.push(col.name);
 768 |           if (!schema.primaryMetric) schema.primaryMetric = col.name;
 769 |           else if (!schema.secondaryMetric) schema.secondaryMetric = col.name;
 770 |         }
 771 |       }
 772 |   }
 773 | 
 774 |   schema.dataTypeInfo = dataTypeInfo;
 775 |   schema.dataTypeLabel = dataTypeLabels[schema.dataType] || 'Generic Data';
 776 |   schema.recommendedCharts = generateChartRecommendations(schema, rows);
 777 |   schema.insights = generateTypeSpecificInsights(schema, rows, dataTypeInfo.type);
 778 | 
 779 |   return schema;
 780 | }
 781 | 
 782 | function generateTypeSpecificInsights(schema, rows, dataType) {
 783 |   const insights = [];
 784 |   
 785 |   if (!schema.primaryMetric || !schema.primaryDimension) {
 786 |     insights.push({
 787 |       type: 'warning',
 788 |       message: 'Incomplete schema - unable to generate full analytics'
 789 |     });
 790 |     return insights;
 791 |   }
 792 | 
 793 |   const totalValue = rows.reduce((sum, row) => sum + (Number(row[schema.primaryMetric]) || 0), 0);
 794 |   const avgValue = totalValue / rows.length;
 795 |   const rowCount = rows.length;
 796 | 
 797 |   insights.push({
 798 |     type: 'summary',
 799 |     title: 'Overview',
 800 |     dataType,
 801 |     metrics: {
 802 |       totalRecords: rowCount,
 803 |       totalValue: Math.round(totalValue * 100) / 100,
 804 |       averageValue: Math.round(avgValue * 100) / 100,
 805 |       primaryMetric: schema.primaryMetric,
 806 |       primaryDimension: schema.primaryDimension
 807 |     }
 808 |   });
 809 | 
 810 |   if (schema.categoryColumns.length > 0) {
 811 |     const categoryCol = schema.categoryColumns[0];
 812 |     const categoryTotals = {};
 813 |     
 814 |     rows.forEach(row => {
 815 |       const cat = row[categoryCol];
 816 |       const value = Number(row[schema.primaryMetric]) || 0;
 817 |       if (!categoryTotals[cat]) categoryTotals[cat] = 0;
 818 |       categoryTotals[cat] += value;
 819 |     });
 820 | 
 821 |     const sorted = Object.entries(categoryTotals).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);
 822 |     const topCategory = sorted[0];
 823 |     
 824 |     if (topCategory) {
 825 |       insights.push({
 826 |         type: 'top_performer',
 827 |         title: dataType === 'HR' ? 'Highest Paid' : dataType === 'MARKETING' ? 'Best Performing' : 'Top Performer',
 828 |         message: `${topCategory[0]} leads with ${Math.round(topCategory[1] * 100) / 100} (${Math.round(topCategory[1] / totalValue * 100)}% of total)`,
 829 |         metric: topCategory[1],
 830 |         category: topCategory[0]
 831 |       });
 832 |     }
 833 |   }
 834 | 
 835 |   if (schema.numericColumns.length >= 2) {
 836 |     const correlations = [];
 837 |     for (let i = 0; i < Math.min(schema.numericColumns.length, 3); i++) {
 838 |       for (let j = i + 1; j < Math.min(schema.numericColumns.length, 3); j++) {
 839 |         const col1 = schema.numericColumns[i];
 840 |         const col2 = schema.numericColumns[j];
 841 |         const correlation = calculateCorrelation(rows, col1, col2);
 842 |         if (Math.abs(correlation) > 0.3) {
 843 |           correlations.push({
 844 |             columns: [col1, col2],
 845 |             coefficient: Math.round(correlation * 1000) / 1000,
 846 |             strength: Math.abs(correlation) > 0.6 ? 'strong' : 'moderate'
 847 |           });
 848 |         }
 849 |       }
 850 |     }
 851 |     
 852 |     if (correlations.length > 0) {
 853 |       insights.push({
 854 |         type: 'correlation',
 855 |         title: 'Key Correlations',
 856 |         message: `${correlations.length} correlation(s) detected between metrics`,
 857 |         correlations
 858 |       });
 859 |     }
 860 |   }
 861 | 
 862 |   const typeSpecificMessages = {
 863 |     INVENTORY: generateInventoryInsights(schema, rows),
 864 |     MARKETING: generateMarketingInsights(schema, rows),
 865 |     FINANCE: generateFinanceInsights(schema, rows),
 866 |     HR: generateHRInsights(schema, rows)
 867 |   };
 868 | 
 869 |   if (typeSpecificMessages[dataType]) {
 870 |     insights.push(...typeSpecificMessages[dataType]);
 871 |   }
 872 | 
 873 |   return insights;
 874 | }
 875 | 
 876 | function generateInventoryInsights(schema, rows) {
 877 |   const insights = [];
 878 |   const stockCol = schema.numericColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('quantity') || c.toLowerCase().includes('stock'));
 879 |   
 880 |   if (stockCol) {
 881 |     const lowStock = rows.filter(row => Number(row[stockCol]) < 10).length;
 882 |     if (lowStock > 0) {
 883 |       insights.push({
 884 |         type: 'alert',
 885 |         title: 'Low Stock Alert',
 886 |         message: `${lowStock} items may need reordering (below threshold)`,
 887 |         alertLevel: 'warning'
 888 |       });
 889 |     }
 890 |   }
 891 |   
 892 |   return insights;
 893 | }
 894 | 
 895 | function generateMarketingInsights(schema, rows) {
 896 |   const insights = [];
 897 |   const clickCol = schema.numericColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('click'));
 898 |   const impressionCol = schema.numericColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('impression'));
 899 |   
 900 |   if (clickCol && impressionCol) {
 901 |     const ctr = rows.reduce((sum, row) => {
 902 |       const clicks = Number(row[clickCol]) || 0;
 903 |       const imps = Number(row[impressionCol]) || 0;
 904 |       return sum + (imps > 0 ? clicks / imps : 0);
 905 |     }, 0) / rows.length;
 906 |     
 907 |     insights.push({
 908 |       type: 'performance',
 909 |       title: 'Average CTR',
 910 |       message: `Click-through rate: ${(ctr * 100).toFixed(2)}%`,
 911 |       value: Math.round(ctr * 10000) / 100
 912 |     });
 913 |   }
 914 |   
 915 |   return insights;
 916 | }
 917 | 
 918 | function generateFinanceInsights(schema, rows) {
 919 |   const insights = [];
 920 |   const expenseCol = schema.numericColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('expense') || c.toLowerCase().includes('cost'));
 921 |   const budgetCol = schema.numericColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('budget'));
 922 |   
 923 |   if (expenseCol && budgetCol) {
 924 |     const overBudget = rows.filter(row => Number(row[expenseCol]) > Number(row[budgetCol])).length;
 925 |     if (overBudget > 0) {
 926 |       insights.push({
 927 |         type: 'alert',
 928 |         title: 'Budget Alert',
 929 |         message: `${overBudget} entries exceed budget`,
 930 |         alertLevel: 'warning'
 931 |       });
 932 |     }
 933 |   }
 934 |   
 935 |   return insights;
 936 | }
 937 | 
 938 | function generateHRInsights(schema, rows) {
 939 |   const insights = [];
 940 |   const salaryCol = schema.numericColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('salary') || c.toLowerCase().includes('compensation'));
 941 |   const deptCol = schema.categoryColumns.find(c => c.toLowerCase().includes('department'));
 942 |   
 943 |   if (salaryCol && deptCol) {
 944 |     const deptAverages = {};
 945 |     rows.forEach(row => {
 946 |       const dept = row[deptCol];
 947 |       const salary = Number(row[salaryCol]) || 0;
 948 |       if (!deptAverages[dept]) deptAverages[dept] = { total: 0, count: 0 };
 949 |       deptAverages[dept].total += salary;
 950 |       deptAverages[dept].count += 1;
 951 |     });
 952 |     
 953 |     const avgByDept = Object.entries(deptAverages).map(([dept, data]) => ({
 954 |       department: dept,
 955 |       average: Math.round(data.total / data.count)
 956 |     })).sort((a, b) => b.average - a.average);
 957 |     
 958 |     if (avgByDept.length > 0) {
 959 |       insights.push({
 960 |         type: 'comparison',
 961 |         title: 'Department Salary Comparison',
 962 |         message: `Highest avg: ${avgByDept[0].department} ($${avgByDept[0].average.toLocaleString()})`,
 963 |         departments: avgByDept.slice(0, 3)
 964 |       });
 965 |     }
 966 |   }
 967 |   
 968 |   return insights;
 969 | }
 970 | 
 971 | export function classifyColumns(rows) {
 972 |   if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
 973 |     return { numeric: [], categorical: [], datetime: [], unusable: [] };
 974 |   }
 975 | 
 976 |   const sample = rows[0];
 977 |   const columnStats = {};
 978 | 
 979 |   Object.keys(sample).forEach(key => {
 980 |     const values = rows.map(row => row[key]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && v !== '');
 981 |     const totalRows = rows.length;
 982 |     const missingRatio = 1 - (values.length / totalRows);
 983 |     const uniqueValues = new Set(values);
 984 |     const isConstant = uniqueValues.size <= 1;
 985 |     const isMostlyNumeric = values.length > 0 && values.filter(v => !isNaN(Number(v))).length / values.length > 0.7;
 986 |     const isDateLike = values.length > 0 && (typeof values[0] === 'string' && (
 987 |       values[0].match(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/) ||
 988 |       values[0].match(/^\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{4}/) ||
 989 |       values[0].match(/^\d{1,2}-[A-Za-z]{3}-\d{4}/)
 990 |     ));
 991 | 
 992 |     columnStats[key] = {
 993 |       missingRatio,
 994 |       isConstant,
 995 |       uniqueCount: uniqueValues.size,
 996 |       isMostlyNumeric,
 997 |       isDateLike,
 998 |       sampleValue: values[0]
 999 |     };
1000 |   });
1001 | 
1002 |   const numeric = [];
1003 |   const categorical = [];
1004 |   const datetime = [];
1005 |   const unusable = [];
1006 | 
1007 |   Object.keys(columnStats).forEach(key => {
1008 |     if (key.startsWith('__') || key.toLowerCase() === 'rowid' || key.toLowerCase() === 'id') {
1009 |       unusable.push(key);
1010 |       return;
1011 |     }
1012 |     const stats = columnStats[key];
1013 |     if (stats.isConstant || stats.missingRatio > 0.8) {
1014 |       unusable.push(key);
1015 |     } else if (stats.isDateLike || key.toLowerCase().includes('date') || key.toLowerCase().includes('year') || key.toLowerCase().includes('month')) {
1016 |       datetime.push(key);
1017 |     } else if (stats.isMostlyNumeric && stats.uniqueCount > 10) {
1018 |       numeric.push(key);
1019 |     } else {
1020 |       categorical.push(key);
1021 |     }
1022 |   });
1023 | 
1024 |   return { numeric, categorical, datetime, unusable };
1025 | }
1026 | 
1027 | function cleanNumericData(values) {
1028 |   if (values.length === 0) return [];
1029 |   const valid = values.filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && !isNaN(v) && v !== '');
1030 |   if (valid.length === 0) return [];
1031 |   const sorted = [...valid].sort((a, b) => a - b);
1032 |   const q1 = sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length * 0.25)];
1033 |   const q3 = sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length * 0.75)];
1034 |   const iqr = q3 - q1;
1035 |   const lowerBound = q1 - 1.5 * iqr;
1036 |   const upperBound = q3 + 1.5 * iqr;
1037 |   return valid.filter(v => v >= lowerBound && v <= upperBound);
1038 | }
1039 | 
1040 | export function smartAutoChartGeneration(rows, columnClassification = null) {
1041 |   return smartAutoChartGenerationForSingle(rows, columnClassification);
1042 | }
1043 | 
1044 | function getCleanColumnClassification(rows) {
1045 |   if (!rows || rows.length === 0) {
1046 |     return { numeric: [], categorical: [], datetime: [], unusable: [] };
1047 |   }
1048 | 
1049 |   const sample = rows[0];
1050 |   const columnStats = {};
1051 | 
1052 |   Object.keys(sample).forEach(key => {
1053 |     if (key.startsWith('__')) {
1054 |       columnStats[key] = { usable: false, reason: 'system_column' };
1055 |       return;
1056 |     }
1057 |     
1058 |     const values = rows.map(row => row[key]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && v !== '');
1059 |     const totalRows = rows.length;
1060 |     const missingRatio = values.length === 0 ? 1 : 1 - (values.length / totalRows);
1061 |     
1062 |     if (missingRatio > 0.7) {
1063 |       columnStats[key] = { usable: false, reason: 'too_many_missing' };
1064 |       return;
1065 |     }
1066 | 
1067 |     const uniqueValues = new Set(values);
1068 |     if (uniqueValues.size <= 1) {
1069 |       columnStats[key] = { usable: false, reason: 'constant_value' };
1070 |       return;
1071 |     }
1072 | 
1073 |     const numericValues = values.filter(v => !isNaN(Number(v)));
1074 |     const numericRatio = numericValues.length / values.length;
1075 |     
1076 |     const isLongText = values.length > 0 && values.some(v => String(v).length > 200);
1077 |     if (isLongText && numericRatio < 0.3) {
1078 |       columnStats[key] = { usable: false, reason: 'irrelevant_text' };
1079 |       return;
1080 |     }
1081 | 
1082 |     const isDateLike = values.length > 0 && (
1083 |       String(values[0]).match(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}/) ||
1084 |       String(values[0]).match(/^\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{4}/) ||
1085 |       key.toLowerCase().includes('date') || 
1086 |       key.toLowerCase().includes('year') || 
1087 |       key.toLowerCase().includes('month')
1088 |     );
1089 | 
1090 |     columnStats[key] = {
1091 |       usable: true,
1092 |       isNumeric: numericRatio > 0.5,
1093 |       isDateLike,
1094 |       uniqueCount: uniqueValues.size,
1095 |       missingRatio
1096 |     };
1097 |   });
1098 | 
1099 |   const numeric = [];
1100 |   const categorical = [];
1101 |   const datetime = [];
1102 | 
1103 |   Object.keys(columnStats).forEach(key => {
1104 |     const stats = columnStats[key];
1105 |     if (!stats.usable) return;
1106 |     
1107 |     if (stats.isDateLike) {
1108 |       datetime.push(key);
1109 |     } else if (stats.isNumeric && stats.uniqueCount > 5) {
1110 |       numeric.push(key);
1111 |     } else {
1112 |       categorical.push(key);
1113 |     }
1114 |   });
1115 | 
1116 |   return { numeric, categorical, datetime, unusable: [] };
1117 | }
1118 | 
1119 | export function smartAutoChartGenerationForSingle(rows, columnClassification = null) {
1120 |   const cols = columnClassification || getCleanColumnClassification(rows);
1121 |   const numericCols = cols.numeric;
1122 |   const categoricalCols = cols.categorical;
1123 |   
1124 |   if (numericCols.length === 0 && categoricalCols.length === 0) {
1125 |     return [];
1126 |   }
1127 | 
1128 |   const charts = [];
1129 |   const addedKeys = new Set();
1130 | 
1131 |   function isDuplicate(xKey, yKey, type) {
1132 |     const key = `${type}:${xKey}:${yKey || ''}`;
1133 |     if (addedKeys.has(key)) return true;
1134 |     addedKeys.add(key);
1135 |     return false;
1136 |   }
1137 | 
1138 |   function addChart(chart) {
1139 |     if (!chart || !chart.title) return false;
1140 |     if (!chart.data || chart.data.length === 0) return false;
1141 |     if (isDuplicate(chart.xKey, chart.yKey, chart.type)) return false;
1142 |     charts.push(chart);
1143 |     return true;
1144 |   }
1145 | 
1146 |   const salaryCol = findColumnByPattern(numericCols, ['salary', 'compensation', 'wage', 'pay', 'income', 'remuneration']);
1147 |   const experienceCol = findColumnByPattern(numericCols, ['experience', 'years', 'seniority', 'tenure', 'exp']);
1148 |   const ageCol = findColumnByPattern(numericCols, ['age', 'age_years']);
1149 |   const countryCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['country', 'location', 'region', 'nation', 'geo']);
1150 |   const educationCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['education', 'degree', 'qualification', 'qualification']);
1151 |   const companySizeCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['company_size', 'size', 'employees', 'staff', 'company_type']);
1152 |   const jobTitleCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['job_title', 'title', 'role', 'position', 'job']);
1153 |   const languageCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['language', 'tech', 'skills', 'technology']);
1154 |   const frameworkCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['framework', 'tools', 'library', 'platform']);
1155 |   const industryCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['industry', 'sector', 'field']);
1156 | 
1157 |   const distributionCharts = [];
1158 |   if (salaryCol) {
1159 |     const chart = generateHistogramChart(rows, salaryCol, 'Distribution', 'salary_dist');
1160 |     if (chart) distributionCharts.push(chart);
1161 |   }
1162 |   if (experienceCol) {
1163 |     const chart = generateHistogramChart(rows, experienceCol, 'Distribution', 'experience_dist');
1164 |     if (chart) distributionCharts.push(chart);
1165 |   }
1166 |   if (ageCol && distributionCharts.length < 2) {
1167 |     const chart = generateHistogramChart(rows, ageCol, 'Distribution', 'age_dist');
1168 |     if (chart) distributionCharts.push(chart);
1169 |   }
1170 |   distributionCharts.slice(0, 2).forEach(c => addChart(c));
1171 | 
1172 |   const relationshipCharts = [];
1173 |   // Skip salary vs experience scatter chart - handled by analytics engine
1174 |   // if (salaryCol && experienceCol) {
1175 |   //   const chart = generateScatterChart(rows, experienceCol, salaryCol, 'Relationship', 'salary_exp_scatter');
1176 |   //   if (chart && experienceCol !== salaryCol) relationshipCharts.push(chart);
1177 |   // }
1178 |   if (salaryCol && ageCol && ageCol !== salaryCol && ageCol !== experienceCol) {
1179 |     const chart = generateScatterChart(rows, ageCol, salaryCol, 'Relationship', 'salary_age_scatter');
1180 |     if (chart) relationshipCharts.push(chart);
1181 |   }
1182 |   for (let i = 0; i < numericCols.length && relationshipCharts.length < 2; i++) {
1183 |     for (let j = i + 1; j < numericCols.length; j++) {
1184 |       if (numericCols[i] !== numericCols[j]) {
1185 |         const existingX = relationshipCharts.map(c => c.xKey);
1186 |         if (!existingX.includes(numericCols[i])) {
1187 |           const chart = generateScatterChart(rows, numericCols[i], numericCols[j], 'Relationship', `${numericCols[i]}_${numericCols[j]}_scatter`);
1188 |           if (chart) relationshipCharts.push(chart);
1189 |           break;
1190 |         }
1191 |       }
1192 |     }
1193 |   }
1194 |   relationshipCharts.slice(0, 2).forEach(c => addChart(c));
1195 | 
1196 |   const categoryCharts = [];
1197 |   if (countryCol && salaryCol) {
1198 |     const chart = generateCategoryBarChart(rows, countryCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical Comparison', 'salary_country_bar', 'avg');
1199 |     if (chart) categoryCharts.push(chart);
1200 |   }
1201 |   if (educationCol && salaryCol) {
1202 |     const chart = generateCategoryBarChart(rows, educationCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical Comparison', 'salary_education_bar', 'avg');
1203 |     if (chart) categoryCharts.push(chart);
1204 |   }
1205 |   if (jobTitleCol && salaryCol) {
1206 |     const chart = generateCategoryBarChart(rows, jobTitleCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical Comparison', 'salary_jobtitle_bar', 'avg');
1207 |     if (chart) categoryCharts.push(chart);
1208 |   }
1209 |   if (companySizeCol && salaryCol) {
1210 |     const chart = generateCategoryBarChart(rows, companySizeCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical Comparison', 'salary_companysize_bar', 'avg');
1211 |     if (chart) categoryCharts.push(chart);
1212 |   }
1213 |   if (industryCol && salaryCol) {
1214 |     const chart = generateCategoryBarChart(rows, industryCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical Comparison', 'salary_industry_bar', 'avg');
1215 |     if (chart) categoryCharts.push(chart);
1216 |   }
1217 |   categoryCharts.slice(0, 2).forEach(c => addChart(c));
1218 | 
1219 |   const freqCharts = [];
1220 |   if (languageCol) {
1221 |     const chart = generateFrequencyChart(rows, languageCol, 'Frequency', 'language_freq');
1222 |     if (chart) freqCharts.push(chart);
1223 |   }
1224 |   if (frameworkCol && freqCharts.length === 0) {
1225 |     const chart = generateFrequencyChart(rows, frameworkCol, 'Frequency', 'framework_freq');
1226 |     if (chart) freqCharts.push(chart);
1227 |   }
1228 |   if (jobTitleCol && freqCharts.length === 0) {
1229 |     const chart = generateFrequencyChart(rows, jobTitleCol, 'Frequency', 'jobtitle_freq');
1230 |     if (chart) freqCharts.push(chart);
1231 |   }
1232 |   if (countryCol && freqCharts.length === 0) {
1233 |     const chart = generateFrequencyChart(rows, countryCol, 'Frequency', 'country_freq');
1234 |     if (chart) freqCharts.push(chart);
1235 |   }
1236 |   freqCharts.slice(0, 2).forEach(c => addChart(c));
1237 | 
1238 |   const fallbackCharts = [];
1239 |   if (charts.length < 7 && numericCols.length >= 2) {
1240 |     for (let i = 0; i < numericCols.length && fallbackCharts.length < 3; i++) {
1241 |       for (let j = i + 1; j < numericCols.length; j++) {
1242 |         const xCol = numericCols[i];
1243 |         const yCol = numericCols[j];
1244 |         if (xCol !== yCol) {

1246 |           if (chart && addChart(chart)) {

1249 |           }
1250 |         }

1252 |     }
1253 |   }

1259 |         if (chart && addChart(chart)) {

1261 |           if (charts.length >= 7) break;
1262 |         }
1263 |       }
1264 |       if (charts.length >= 7) break;
1265 |     }
1266 |   }
1267 | 
1268 |   return charts.filter(c => c && c.data && c.data.length > 0).slice(0, 10);
1269 | }

1271 | export function smartAutoChartGenerationForMerged(rows, columnClassification = null) {
1272 |   const cols = columnClassification || getCleanColumnClassification(rows);
1273 |   const numericCols = cols.numeric;
1274 |   const categoricalCols = cols.categorical;
1275 |   
1276 |   if (numericCols.length === 0 && categoricalCols.length === 0) {
1277 |     return [];
1278 |   }
1279 | 
1280 |   const charts = [];
1281 |   const addedKeys = new Set();
1282 | 
1283 |   function isDuplicate(xKey, yKey, type) {
1284 |     const key = `${type}:${xKey}:${yKey || ''}`;
1285 |     if (addedKeys.has(key)) return true;
1286 |     addedKeys.add(key);
1287 |     return false;
1288 |   }
1289 | 
1290 |   function addChart(chart) {
1291 |     if (!chart || !chart.title) return false;
1292 |     if (!chart.data || chart.data.length === 0) return false;
1293 |     if (isDuplicate(chart.xKey, chart.yKey, chart.type)) return false;
1294 |     charts.push(chart);
1295 |     return true;
1296 |   }

1300 |   const ageCol = findColumnByPattern(numericCols, ['age']);

1302 |   const educationCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['education', 'degree', 'qualification']);
1303 |   const companySizeCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['company_size', 'size', 'employees', 'staff']);
1304 |   const jobTitleCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['job_title', 'title', 'role', 'position']);
1305 |   const sourceCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['source', 'sourcefile', '__sourcefile']);
1306 |   const languageCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['language', 'tech', 'skills']);
1307 |   const frameworkCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['framework', 'tools', 'library']);
1308 |   const industryCol = findColumnByPattern(categoricalCols, ['industry', 'sector']);
1309 | 
1310 |   const distributionCharts = [];

1312 |   if (experienceCol) distributionCharts.push(generateHistogramChart(rows, experienceCol, 'Distribution', 'experience_dist_m'));
1313 |   if (ageCol && distributionCharts.length < 2) distributionCharts.push(generateHistogramChart(rows, ageCol, 'Distribution', 'age_dist_m'));
1314 |   distributionCharts.slice(0, 2).forEach(c => addChart(c));
1315 | 
1316 |   const relationshipCharts = [];

1318 |   if (salaryCol && ageCol && ageCol !== salaryCol && ageCol !== experienceCol) relationshipCharts.push(generateScatterChart(rows, ageCol, salaryCol, 'Relationship', 'salary_age_scatter_m'));
1319 |   relationshipCharts.slice(0, 2).forEach(c => addChart(c));
1320 | 
1321 |   const categoryCharts = [];
1322 |   if (countryCol && salaryCol) categoryCharts.push(generateCategoryBarChart(rows, countryCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical', 'salary_country_m', 'avg'));
1323 |   if (educationCol && salaryCol) categoryCharts.push(generateCategoryBarChart(rows, educationCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical', 'salary_education_m', 'avg'));
1324 |   if (jobTitleCol && salaryCol) categoryCharts.push(generateCategoryBarChart(rows, jobTitleCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical', 'salary_jobtitle_m', 'avg'));
1325 |   if (companySizeCol && salaryCol) categoryCharts.push(generateCategoryBarChart(rows, companySizeCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical', 'salary_companysize_m', 'avg'));
1326 |   if (industryCol && salaryCol) categoryCharts.push(generateCategoryBarChart(rows, industryCol, salaryCol, 'Categorical', 'salary_industry_m', 'avg'));

1333 |   if (jobTitleCol && freqCharts.length === 0) freqCharts.push(generateFrequencyChart(rows, jobTitleCol, 'Frequency', 'jobtitle_freq_m'));

1341 |           if (chart && addChart(chart) && charts.length >= 7) break;

1352 |         if (chart && addChart(chart) && charts.length >= 7) break;

1354 |       if (charts.length >= 7) break;

1360 | 
1361 | function findColumnByPattern(columns, patterns) {
1362 |   for (const pattern of patterns) {
1363 |     const found = columns.find(col => col.toLowerCase().includes(pattern));
1364 |     if (found) return found;
1365 |   }
1366 |   return columns[0] || null;
1367 | }
1368 | 
1369 | function generateHistogramChart(rows, column, category, id) {
1370 |   const values = rows.map(r => Number(r[column])).filter(v => !isNaN(v) && v !== null);
1371 |   if (values.length === 0) return null;
1372 | 
1373 |   const min = Math.min(...values);
1374 |   const max = Math.max(...values);
1375 |   const binCount = Math.min(10, Math.ceil(Math.sqrt(values.length)));
1376 |   const binSize = (max - min) / binCount || 1;
1377 | 
1378 |   const formatBinLabel = (val) => {
1379 |     if (val >= 1000000) return `$${(val / 1000000).toFixed(1)}M`;
1380 |     if (val >= 1000) return `$${(val / 1000).toFixed(0)}K`;
1381 |     return Math.round(val).toLocaleString();
1382 |   };
1383 | 
1384 |   const bins = Array(binCount).fill(0).map((_, i) => ({
1385 |     range: `${formatBinLabel(min + i * binSize)}-${formatBinLabel(min + (i + 1) * binSize)}`,
1386 |     rangeStart: min + i * binSize,
1387 |     rangeEnd: min + (i + 1) * binSize,
1388 |     count: 0
1389 |   }));
1390 | 
1391 |   values.forEach(v => {
1392 |     const binIndex = Math.min(Math.floor((v - min) / binSize), binCount - 1);
1393 |     bins[binIndex].count++;
1394 |   });
1395 | 
1396 |   return {
1397 |     type: 'bar',
1398 |     category,
1399 |     title: `${formatColumnName(column)} Distribution`,
1400 |     xKey: 'range',
1401 |     yKey: 'count',
1402 |     xLabel: formatColumnName(column),
1403 |     yLabel: 'Count',
1404 |     data: bins.filter(b => b.count > 0),
1405 |     id
1406 |   };
1407 | }
1408 | 
1409 | function cleanForOutliers(values, maxPercentile = 99) {
1410 |   if (values.length < 10) return values;
1411 |   const sorted = [...values].sort((a, b) => a - b);
1412 |   const pLower = sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length * 0.01)] || sorted[0];
1413 |   const pUpper = sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length * maxPercentile / 100)] || sorted[sorted.length - 1];
1414 |   return values.filter(v => v >= pLower && v <= pUpper);
1415 | }
1416 | 
1417 | function generateScatterChart(rows, xColumn, yColumn, category, id) {
1418 |   if (xColumn === yColumn) return null;
1419 | 
1420 |   const rawData = rows
1421 |     .map(row => ({
1422 |       x: Number(row[xColumn]),
1423 |       y: Number(row[yColumn])
1424 |     }))
1425 |     .filter(point => !isNaN(point.x) && !isNaN(point.y) && point.x !== null && point.y !== null);
1426 | 
1427 |   if (rawData.length < 2) return null;
1428 | 
1429 |   const xVals = rawData.map(d => d.x);
1430 |   const yVals = rawData.map(d => d.y);
1431 |   const cleanX = cleanForOutliers(xVals);
1432 |   const cleanY = cleanForOutliers(yVals);
1433 | 
1434 |   const data = rawData
1435 |     .filter(point => cleanX.includes(point.x) && cleanY.includes(point.y))
1436 |     .slice(0, 500)
1437 |     .map(point => ({
1438 |       [xColumn]: point.x,
1439 |       [yColumn]: point.y
1440 |     }));
1441 | 
1442 |   if (data.length < 2) return null;
1443 | 
1444 |   return {
1445 |     type: 'scatter',
1446 |     category,
1447 |     title: `${formatColumnName(yColumn)} vs ${formatColumnName(xColumn)}`,
1448 |     xKey: xColumn,
1449 |     yKey: yColumn,
1450 |     xLabel: formatColumnName(xColumn),
1451 |     yLabel: formatColumnName(yColumn),
1452 |     data,
1453 |     id
1454 |   };
1455 | }
1456 | 
1457 | function generateCategoryBarChart(rows, categoryCol, metricCol, category, id, aggregation = 'avg') {
1458 |   const grouped = {};
1459 | 
1460 |   rows.forEach(row => {
1461 |     const cat = row[categoryCol];
1462 |     const val = Number(row[metricCol]);
1463 |     if (!cat || isNaN(val)) return;
1464 | 
1465 |     if (!grouped[cat]) {
1466 |       grouped[cat] = { sum: 0, count: 0 };
1467 |     }
1468 |     grouped[cat].sum += val;
1469 |     grouped[cat].count++;
1470 |   });
1471 | 
1472 |   const data = Object.entries(grouped)
1473 |     .map(([key, vals]) => ({
1474 |       [categoryCol]: key,
1475 |       value: aggregation === 'avg' ? vals.sum / vals.count : vals.sum,
1476 |       count: vals.count
1477 |     }))
1478 |     .sort((a, b) => b.value - a.value)
1479 |     .slice(0, 10);
1480 | 
1481 |   if (data.length === 0) return null;
1482 | 
1483 |   return {
1484 |     type: 'bar',
1485 |     category,
1486 |     title: `${aggregation === 'avg' ? 'Average ' : ''}${formatColumnName(metricCol)} by ${formatColumnName(categoryCol)}`,
1487 |     xKey: categoryCol,
1488 |     yKey: 'value',
1489 |     xLabel: formatColumnName(categoryCol),
1490 |     yLabel: aggregation === 'avg' ? `Avg ${formatColumnName(metricCol)}` : formatColumnName(metricCol),
1491 |     data,
1492 |     id
1493 |   };
1494 | }
1495 | 
1496 | function generateFrequencyChart(rows, column, category, id) {
1497 |   const grouped = {};
1498 | 
1499 |   rows.forEach(row => {
1500 |     const value = row[column];
1501 |     if (!value) return;
1502 | 
1503 |     const items = String(value).split(/[,;|]/).map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
1504 |     items.forEach(item => {
1505 |       grouped[item] = (grouped[item] || 0) + 1;
1506 |     });
1507 |   });
1508 | 
1509 |   const data = Object.entries(grouped)
1510 |     .map(([name, count]) => ({ name, count }))
1511 |     .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
1512 |     .slice(0, 10);
1513 | 
1514 |   if (data.length === 0) return null;
1515 | 
1516 |   return {
1517 |     type: 'bar',
1518 |     category,
1519 |     title: `Top ${formatColumnName(column)}`,
1520 |     xKey: 'name',
1521 |     yKey: 'count',
1522 |     xLabel: formatColumnName(column),
1523 |     yLabel: 'Count',
1524 |     data,
1525 |     id
1526 |   };
1527 | }
1528 | 
1529 | function generateHeatmapData(rows, rowCol, colCol, metricCol, category, id) {
1530 |   const pivot = {};
1531 | 
1532 |   rows.forEach(row => {
1533 |     const rowKey = row[rowCol];
1534 |     const colKey = row[colCol];
1535 |     const value = Number(row[metricCol]);
1536 |     if (!rowKey || !colKey || isNaN(value)) return;
1537 | 
1538 |     if (!pivot[rowKey]) pivot[rowKey] = {};
1539 |     if (!pivot[rowKey][colKey]) pivot[rowKey][colKey] = { sum: 0, count: 0 };
1540 |     pivot[rowKey][colKey].sum += value;
1541 |     pivot[rowKey][colKey].count++;
1542 |   });
1543 | 
1544 |   const data = [];
1545 |   Object.entries(pivot).forEach(([rowKey, cols]) => {
1546 |     Object.entries(cols).forEach(([colKey, vals]) => {
1547 |       data.push({
1548 |         [rowCol]: rowKey,
1549 |         [colCol]: colKey,
1550 |         value: vals.sum / vals.count
1551 |       });
1552 |     });
1553 |   });
1554 | 
1555 |   if (data.length === 0) return null;
1556 | 
1557 |   return {
1558 |     type: 'heatmap',
1559 |     category,
1560 |     title: `${formatColumnName(rowCol)} vs ${formatColumnName(colCol)}`,
1561 |     xKey: rowCol,
1562 |     yKey: colCol,
1563 |     zKey: 'value',
1564 |     xLabel: formatColumnName(rowCol),
1565 |     yLabel: formatColumnName(colCol),
1566 |     data: data.slice(0, 50),
1567 |     id
1568 |   };
1569 | }
1570 | 
1571 | function formatColumnName(name) {
1572 |   if (!name) return '';
1573 |   return name
1574 |     .replace(/_/g, ' ')
1575 |     .replace(/([a-z])([A-Z])/g, '$1 $2')
1576 |     .replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
1577 | }
1578 | 
1579 | export default {
1580 |   detectDataType,
1581 |   detectSalesSchema,
1582 |   detectInventorySchema,
1583 |   detectMarketingSchema,
1584 |   detectFinanceSchema,
1585 |   detectHRSchema,
1586 |   generateChartRecommendations,
1587 |   generateSalesInsights,
1588 |   buildEnhancedSchema,
1589 |   DataTypePatterns,
1590 |   SalesChartRecommendations,
1591 |   classifyColumns,
1592 |   smartAutoChartGeneration,
1593 |   smartAutoChartGenerationForSingle,
1594 |   smartAutoChartGenerationForMerged
1595 | };
```
