### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/schema-only-dashboard-engine.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/schema-only-dashboard-engine.js`

```js
  1 | import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto";
  2 | import { buildAnalyticsPlaybook } from "./analytics-playbook-engine.js";
  3 | 
  4 | const EMAIL_PATTERN = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
  5 | const PHONE_PATTERN = /(?:\+?\d[\s().-]*){8,}/;
  6 | const TOKEN_PATTERN = /^[A-Za-z0-9_\-]{24,}$/;
  7 | const PII_COLUMN_PATTERN = /\b(email|e-mail|phone|mobile|address|name|full_name|first_name|last_name|id|uuid|token|secret|password|api[_-]?key|credential)\b/i;
  8 | 
  9 | function safeNumber(value) {
 10 |   const n = Number(value);
 11 |   return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : null;
 12 | }
 13 | 
 14 | function groupBy(rows, xKey, yKey, aggregation = "sum", limit = 10) {
 15 |   const map = new Map();
 16 | 
 17 |   for (const row of rows) {
 18 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? "Unknown");
 19 |     const value = aggregation === "count" ? 1 : safeNumber(row[yKey]);
 20 | 
 21 |     if (aggregation !== "count" && value === null) continue;
 22 | 
 23 |     const stat = map.get(label) || { sum: 0, count: 0 };
 24 |     stat.sum += value;
 25 |     stat.count += 1;
 26 |     map.set(label, stat);
 27 |   }
 28 | 
 29 |   return [...map.entries()]
 30 |     .map(([label, stat]) => ({
 31 |       [xKey]: label,
 32 |       [aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey]:
 33 |         aggregation === "avg" ? Number((stat.sum / stat.count).toFixed(2)) : stat.sum,
 34 |     }))
 35 |     .sort((a, b) => {
 36 |       const key = aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey;
 37 |       return Number(b[key]) - Number(a[key]);
 38 |     })
 39 |     .slice(0, limit);
 40 | }
 41 | 
 42 | function detectColumns(rows = []) {
 43 |   const first = rows[0] || {};
 44 | 
 45 |   return Object.keys(first).map((name) => {
 46 |     const values = rows.map((r) => r[name]).filter(Boolean);
 47 |     const numeric = values.filter((v) => safeNumber(v) !== null).length;
 48 | 
 49 |     return {
 50 |       name,
 51 |       type: values.length && numeric / values.length > 0.75 ? "number" : "string",
 52 |       role: values.length && numeric / values.length > 0.75 ? "metric" : "dimension",
 53 |     };
 54 |   });
 55 | }
 56 | 
 57 | function isMeaningful(value) {
 58 |   return value !== null && value !== undefined && String(value).trim() !== "";
 59 | }
 60 | 
 61 | function detectPiiRisk(name, values = []) {
 62 |   const reasons = [];
 63 | 
 64 |   if (PII_COLUMN_PATTERN.test(name || "")) {
 65 |     reasons.push("column_name");
 66 |   }
 67 | 
 68 |   const hasRiskyValue = values
 69 |     .filter(isMeaningful)
 70 |     .slice(0, 100)
 71 |     .some((value) => {
 72 |       const text = String(value).trim();
 73 |       return EMAIL_PATTERN.test(text) || PHONE_PATTERN.test(text) || TOKEN_PATTERN.test(text);
 74 |     });
 75 | 
 76 |   if (hasRiskyValue) {
 77 |     reasons.push("value_pattern");
 78 |   }
 79 | 
 80 |   return { risky: reasons.length > 0, reasons };
 81 | }
 82 | 
 83 | function inferColumnRole(name, type, values = []) {
 84 |   if (/date|time|month|year|created|updated/i.test(name || "")) return "date";
 85 |   if (/^(__)?rowid$|(^|_)id$/i.test(name || "")) return "id";
 86 | 
 87 |   const meaningful = values.filter(isMeaningful);
 88 |   const numericCount = meaningful.filter((value) => safeNumber(value) !== null).length;
 89 | 
 90 |   if (type === "number" || (meaningful.length && numericCount / meaningful.length > 0.75)) {
 91 |     return "metric";
 92 |   }
 93 | 
 94 |   if (/description|comment|notes?|message|text/i.test(name || "")) return "text";
 95 | 
 96 |   return "dimension";
 97 | }
 98 | 
 99 | function numericStats(values = []) {
100 |   const numbers = values.map(safeNumber).filter((value) => value !== null);
101 |   if (!numbers.length) return null;
102 | 
103 |   const sum = numbers.reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0);
104 |   return {
105 |     min: Math.min(...numbers),
106 |     max: Math.max(...numbers),
107 |     mean: Number((sum / numbers.length).toFixed(2)),
108 |   };
109 | }
110 | 
111 | function topValues(values = [], piiRisk) {
112 |   if (piiRisk.risky) return [];
113 | 
114 |   const counts = new Map();
115 |   for (const value of values) {
116 |     if (!isMeaningful(value)) continue;
117 |     const text = String(value).trim();
118 |     if (text.length > 60) continue;
119 |     if (EMAIL_PATTERN.test(text) || PHONE_PATTERN.test(text) || TOKEN_PATTERN.test(text)) continue;
120 |     counts.set(text, (counts.get(text) || 0) + 1);
121 |   }
122 | 
123 |   return [...counts.entries()]
124 |     .sort((left, right) => right[1] - left[1])
125 |     .slice(0, 5)
126 |     .map(([value, count]) => ({ value, count }));
127 | }
128 | 
129 | export function buildSafeSchemaPacket(dataset) {
130 |   const rows = Array.isArray(dataset?.rows) ? dataset.rows : [];
131 |   const datasetColumns = Array.isArray(dataset?.columns) && dataset.columns.length
132 |     ? dataset.columns
133 |     : Object.keys(rows[0] || {}).map((name) => ({ name, type: "string" }));
134 | 
135 |   return {
136 |     datasetId: dataset?.id,
137 |     name: dataset?.name || "Unnamed Dataset",
138 |     rowCount: dataset?.rowCount || rows.length,
139 |     columnCount: datasetColumns.length,
140 |     columns: datasetColumns.map((column) => {
141 |       const values = rows.map((row) => row[column.name]);
142 |       const piiRisk = detectPiiRisk(column.name, values);
143 |       const role = inferColumnRole(column.name, column.type, values);
144 |       const allowedForAI = !piiRisk.risky && role !== "id" && role !== "text";
145 | 
146 |       return {
147 |         name: column.name,
148 |         type: role === "metric" ? "number" : role === "date" ? "date" : column.type || "string",
149 |         role,
150 |         nullCount: values.filter((value) => !isMeaningful(value)).length,
151 |         uniqueCount: new Set(values.filter(isMeaningful).map((value) => String(value).trim())).size,
152 |         numericStats: role === "metric" ? numericStats(values) : null,
153 |         topValues: topValues(values, piiRisk),
154 |         piiRisk,
155 |         allowedForAI,
156 |       };
157 |     }),
158 |   };
159 | }
160 | 
161 | function safeJsonParse(text) {
162 |   if (!text) return null;
163 |   try {
164 |     return JSON.parse(text);
165 |   } catch {
166 |     const match = String(text).match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
167 |     if (!match) return null;
168 |     try {
169 |       return JSON.parse(match[0]);
170 |     } catch {
171 |       return null;
172 |     }
173 |   }
174 | }
175 | 
176 | export async function callSchemaOnlyLLMPlanner(schemaPacket, query) {
177 |   const model = process.env.OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL || "llama3.2";
178 |   const baseUrl = process.env.OLLAMA_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:11434";
179 |   const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/api/chat`, {
180 |     method: "POST",
181 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
182 |     body: JSON.stringify({
183 |       model,
184 |       stream: false,
185 |       format: "json",
186 |       messages: [
187 |         {
188 |           role: "user",
189 |           content: [
190 |             "You are a schema-only dashboard planner. Return JSON only. Never generate chart data arrays.",
191 |             `User query: ${query}`,
192 |             `Safe schema packet: ${JSON.stringify(schemaPacket)}`,
193 |           ].join("\n"),
194 |         },
195 |       ],
196 |       options: { temperature: 0, num_predict: 700 },
197 |     }),
198 |   });
199 | 
200 |   if (!response.ok) {
201 |     throw new Error(`Schema planner returned HTTP ${response.status}`);
202 |   }
203 | 
204 |   const payload = await response.json();
205 |   const plan = safeJsonParse(payload?.message?.content);
206 |   if (!plan) {
207 |     throw new Error("Schema planner returned invalid JSON");
208 |   }
209 | 
210 |   return { plan, provider: "llm", model };
211 | }
212 | 
213 | function findColumn(columns, query, role) {
214 |   const lower = query.toLowerCase();
215 | 
216 |   return (
217 |     columns.find((c) => (!role || c.role === role) && lower.includes(c.name.toLowerCase())) ||
218 |     columns.find((c) => !role || c.role === role)
219 |   );
220 | }
221 | 
222 | function findSchemaColumn(schema, key, role) {
223 |   const columns = Array.isArray(schema?.columns) ? schema.columns : [];
224 |   const normalized = String(key || "").toLowerCase();
225 |   return columns.find((column) => {
226 |     if (role && column.role !== role) return false;
227 |     return String(column.name).toLowerCase() === normalized;
228 |   });
229 | }
230 | 
231 | export function validateChartPlan(schema, plan) {
232 |   const chart = plan?.chart || plan;
233 |   const allowedTypes = new Set(["bar", "line", "area", "pie", "scatter", "histogram"]);
234 |   const allowedAggregations = new Set(["sum", "avg", "count", "min", "max"]);
235 | 
236 |   if (!chart || !allowedTypes.has(chart.type)) {
237 |     return { ok: false, reason: `Unsupported chart type "${chart?.type}".` };
238 |   }
239 | 
240 |   if (chart.type === "scatter") {
241 |     const xMetric = findSchemaColumn(schema, chart.xKey, "metric");
242 |     const yMetric = findSchemaColumn(schema, chart.yKey, "metric");
243 |     if (!xMetric || !yMetric || xMetric.allowedForAI === false || yMetric.allowedForAI === false) {
244 |       return { ok: false, reason: "Scatter chart needs two allowed numeric columns." };
245 |     }
246 |     return { ok: true };
247 |   }
248 | 
249 |   if (chart.type === "histogram") {
250 |     const metric = findSchemaColumn(schema, chart.xKey, "metric");
251 |     if (!metric || metric.allowedForAI === false) {
252 |       return { ok: false, reason: "Histogram needs one allowed numeric column." };
253 |     }
254 |     return { ok: true };
255 |   }
256 | 
257 |   const xColumn = findSchemaColumn(schema, chart.xKey);
258 |   if (!xColumn) return { ok: false, reason: `Column "${chart.xKey}" does not exist.` };
259 |   if (xColumn.allowedForAI === false) return { ok: false, reason: `Column "${chart.xKey}" is not allowed.` };
260 |   if (!["dimension", "date"].includes(xColumn.role)) {
261 |     return { ok: false, reason: `${chart.type} chart needs a category or date column.` };
262 |   }
263 | 
264 |   if (!allowedAggregations.has(chart.aggregation)) {
265 |     return { ok: false, reason: `Unsupported aggregation "${chart.aggregation}".` };
266 |   }
267 | 
268 |   if (chart.aggregation !== "count") {
269 |     const yColumn = findSchemaColumn(schema, chart.yKey, "metric");
270 |     if (!yColumn) return { ok: false, reason: `Column "${chart.yKey}" does not exist or is not numeric.` };
271 |     if (yColumn.allowedForAI === false) return { ok: false, reason: `Column "${chart.yKey}" is not allowed.` };
272 |   }
273 | 
274 |   return { ok: true };
275 | }
276 | 
277 | export function executeChartPlan(dataset, plan) {
278 |   const rows = Array.isArray(dataset?.rows) ? dataset.rows : [];
279 | 
280 |   if (plan.type === "histogram") {
281 |     const values = rows.map((row) => safeNumber(row[plan.xKey])).filter((value) => value !== null);
282 |     if (!values.length) {
283 |       return { id: randomUUID(), type: "bar", title: plan.title, xKey: "range", yKey: "count", data: [] };
284 |     }
285 | 
286 |     const min = Math.min(...values);
287 |     const max = Math.max(...values);
288 |     const bucketCount = Math.max(5, Math.min(plan.limit || 10, 20));
289 |     const step = (max - min) / bucketCount || 1;
290 |     const buckets = Array.from({ length: bucketCount }, (_, index) => {
291 |       const start = min + index * step;
292 |       const end = index === bucketCount - 1 ? max : start + step;
293 |       return { range: `${Number(start.toFixed(2))} - ${Number(end.toFixed(2))}`, count: 0 };
294 |     });
295 | 
296 |     values.forEach((value) => {
297 |       buckets[Math.min(Math.floor((value - min) / step), bucketCount - 1)].count += 1;
298 |     });
299 | 
300 |     return { id: randomUUID(), type: "bar", title: plan.title, xKey: "range", yKey: "count", data: buckets };
301 |   }
302 | 
303 |   if (plan.type === "scatter") {
304 |     return {
305 |       id: randomUUID(),
306 |       type: "scatter",
307 |       title: plan.title,
308 |       xKey: plan.xKey,
309 |       yKey: plan.yKey,
310 |       data: rows
311 |         .map((row) => ({ [plan.xKey]: safeNumber(row[plan.xKey]), [plan.yKey]: safeNumber(row[plan.yKey]) }))
312 |         .filter((row) => row[plan.xKey] !== null && row[plan.yKey] !== null)
313 |         .slice(0, plan.limit || 300),
314 |     };
315 |   }
316 | 
317 |   return {
318 |     id: randomUUID(),
319 |     type: plan.type,
320 |     title: plan.title,
321 |     xKey: plan.xKey,
322 |     yKey: plan.aggregation === "count" ? "count" : plan.yKey,
323 |     data: groupBy(rows, plan.xKey, plan.yKey, plan.aggregation, plan.limit || 10),
324 |   };
325 | }
326 | 
327 | export function buildInitialDashboardFromSchema(dataset, context = {}) {
328 |   return buildAnalyticsPlaybook({
329 |     dataset,
330 |     metadataFiles: context.metadataFiles || [],
331 |     testFiles: context.testFiles || [],
332 |   });
333 | }
334 | 
335 | export function planDashboardCommand(dataset, query) {
336 |   const rows = dataset.rows || [];
337 |   const columns = detectColumns(rows);
338 |   const lower = query.toLowerCase();
339 | 
340 |   if (lower.includes("remove") || lower.includes("delete")) {
341 |     return {
342 |       action: "DELETE_CHART",
343 |       message: "Removed the latest chart.",
344 |       provider: "local",
345 |       schemaOnly: true,
346 |     };
347 |   }
348 | 
349 |   if (lower.includes("clear") && lower.includes("filter")) {
350 |     return {
351 |       action: "CLEAR_FILTERS",
352 |       message: "Cleared all filters.",
353 |       provider: "local",
354 |       schemaOnly: true,
355 |     };
356 |   }
357 | 
358 |   if (lower.includes("filter")) {
359 |     const match = query.match(/filter\s+(.+?)\s*=\s*(.+)/i);
360 | 
361 |     if (match) {
362 |       const col = findColumn(columns, match[1]);
363 | 
364 |       return {
365 |         action: "FILTER",
366 |         filters: col ? { [col.name]: match[2].trim() } : {},
367 |         message: col ? `Applied filter on ${col.name}.` : "Could not find filter column.",
368 |         provider: "local",
369 |         schemaOnly: true,
370 |       };
371 |     }
372 |   }
373 | 
374 |   if (lower.includes("kpi") || lower.includes("summary")) {
375 |     const analysis = buildAnalyticsPlaybook({ dataset });
376 | 
377 |     return {
378 |       action: "GENERATE_KPI",
379 |       kpis: analysis.kpis,
380 |       message: "Generated meaningful KPI summary.",
381 |       provider: "local",
382 |       schemaOnly: true,
383 |     };
384 |   }
385 | 
386 |   const metric = findColumn(columns, query, "metric");
387 |   const dimension = findColumn(columns, query, "dimension");
388 | 
389 |   if (!metric || !dimension) {
390 |     return {
391 |       action: "ANSWER",
392 |       message: "I could not find a valid metric and dimension for this chart.",
393 |       provider: "local",
394 |       schemaOnly: true,
395 |     };
396 |   }
397 | 
398 |   let type = "bar";
399 |   if (lower.includes("pie")) type = "pie";
400 |   if (lower.includes("line") || lower.includes("trend")) type = "line";
401 | 
402 |   const aggregation =
403 |     lower.includes("average") || lower.includes("avg") ? "avg" :
404 |     lower.includes("count") ? "count" :
405 |     "sum";
406 | 
407 |   const yKey = aggregation === "count" ? "count" : metric.name;
408 | 
409 |   return {
410 |     action: lower.includes("change") || lower.includes("modify") ? "MODIFY_CHART" : "GENERATE_CHART",
411 |     chart: {
412 |       id: randomUUID(),
413 |       type,
414 |       title: `${aggregation === "avg" ? "Average" : aggregation === "count" ? "Count" : "Total"} ${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
415 |       xKey: dimension.name,
416 |       yKey,
417 |       data: groupBy(rows, dimension.name, metric.name, aggregation, 10),
418 |     },
419 |     message: `Generated ${type} chart.`,
420 |     provider: "local",
421 |     schemaOnly: true,
422 |   };
423 | }
424 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/schema-packet-builder.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/schema-packet-builder.js`

```js
  1 | import os from "node:os";
  2 | import { Worker } from "node:worker_threads";
  3 | import { toNumber, isMeaningfulValue } from "@insightflow/shared-analytics";
  4 | 
  5 | const DEFAULT_SCHEMA_SAMPLE_SIZE = Number(process.env.SCHEMA_PACKET_SAMPLE_SIZE || 5000);
  6 | const DEFAULT_SCHEMA_ANALYSIS_CONCURRENCY = Number(
  7 |   process.env.SCHEMA_ANALYSIS_CONCURRENCY
  8 |   || Math.max(1, Math.min((os.availableParallelism?.() || os.cpus().length || 2) - 1, 4)),
  9 | );
 10 | const WORKER_ROW_THRESHOLD = Number(process.env.SCHEMA_WORKER_ROW_THRESHOLD || 1000);
 11 | const WORKER_CELL_THRESHOLD = Number(process.env.SCHEMA_WORKER_CELL_THRESHOLD || 50000);
 12 | const schemaPacketCache = new Map();
 13 | const asyncSchemaPacketCache = new Map();
 14 | 
 15 | function buildDatasetCacheKey(dataset, sampleSize) {
 16 |   return [
 17 |     dataset?.id || dataset?.name || "anonymous",
 18 |     dataset?.rows?.length || 0,
 19 |     dataset?.columns?.length || 0,
 20 |     sampleSize,
 21 |   ].join(":");
 22 | }
 23 | 
 24 | function sampleRowsForSchema(rows, sampleSize) {
 25 |   if (!Array.isArray(rows) || rows.length <= sampleSize) {
 26 |     return rows;
 27 |   }
 28 | 
 29 |   const sampledRows = [];
 30 |   const lastIndex = rows.length - 1;
 31 | 
 32 |   for (let index = 0; index < sampleSize; index += 1) {
 33 |     const rowIndex = Math.round((index * lastIndex) / Math.max(sampleSize - 1, 1));
 34 |     sampledRows.push(rows[rowIndex]);
 35 |   }
 36 | 
 37 |   return sampledRows;
 38 | }
 39 | 
 40 | function extractNumericStats(values) {
 41 |   const numbers = [];
 42 |   let nullCount = 0;
 43 |   let invalidCount = 0;
 44 | 
 45 |   for (const val of values) {
 46 |     if (!isMeaningfulValue(val)) {
 47 |       nullCount += 1;
 48 |       continue;
 49 |     }
 50 | 
 51 |     const num = toNumber(val);
 52 |     if (num === null) {
 53 |       invalidCount += 1;
 54 |     } else {
 55 |       numbers.push(num);
 56 |     }
 57 |   }
 58 | 
 59 |   if (numbers.length < 10) {
 60 |     return {
 61 |       type: "numeric",
 62 |       isValid: false,
 63 |       reason: `Only ${numbers.length} valid values`,
 64 |       nullCount,
 65 |       invalidCount,
 66 |       validCount: numbers.length,
 67 |     };
 68 |   }
 69 | 
 70 |   const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 71 |   const sum = numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
 72 |   const mean = sum / numbers.length;
 73 |   const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
 74 |   const median = sorted.length % 2 === 0
 75 |     ? (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2
 76 |     : sorted[mid];
 77 |   const variance = numbers.reduce((sumValue, num) => sumValue + ((num - mean) ** 2), 0) / numbers.length;
 78 |   const stdDev = Math.sqrt(variance);
 79 | 
 80 |   return {
 81 |     type: "numeric",
 82 |     isValid: true,
 83 |     min: Math.min(...numbers),
 84 |     max: Math.max(...numbers),
 85 |     mean: Number(mean.toFixed(2)),
 86 |     median: Number(median.toFixed(2)),
 87 |     stdDev: Number(stdDev.toFixed(2)),
 88 |     nullCount,
 89 |     invalidCount,
 90 |     validCount: numbers.length,
 91 |     uniqueCount: new Set(numbers).size,
 92 |   };
 93 | }
 94 | 
 95 | function extractCategoricalStats(values) {
 96 |   const valueCounts = new Map();
 97 |   let nullCount = 0;
 98 | 
 99 |   for (const val of values) {
100 |     if (!isMeaningfulValue(val)) {
101 |       nullCount += 1;
102 |       continue;
103 |     }
104 | 
105 |     const strVal = String(val).trim().substring(0, 100);
106 |     if (valueCounts.size >= 100 && !valueCounts.has(strVal)) {
107 |       continue;
108 |     }
109 | 
110 |     valueCounts.set(strVal, (valueCounts.get(strVal) || 0) + 1);
111 |   }
112 | 
113 |   const sorted = [...valueCounts.entries()]
114 |     .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
115 |     .slice(0, 10);
116 | 
117 |   return {
118 |     type: "categorical",
119 |     isValid: true,
120 |     nullCount,
121 |     uniqueCount: valueCounts.size,
122 |     topValues: Object.fromEntries(sorted),
123 |     topValuesCount: sorted.length,
124 |   };
125 | }
126 | 
127 | function analyzeColumn(column, sampledRows) {
128 |   const columnValues = sampledRows.map((row) => row[column.name]);
129 | 
130 |   if (column.type === "number") {
131 |     return {
132 |       name: column.name,
133 |       ...extractNumericStats(columnValues),
134 |     };
135 |   }
136 | 
137 |   return {
138 |     name: column.name,
139 |     ...extractCategoricalStats(columnValues),
140 |   };
141 | }
142 | 
143 | function shouldUseWorkerAnalysis(sampledRows, columns) {
144 |   const cellCount = (sampledRows?.length || 0) * (columns?.length || 0);
145 |   return (
146 |     Array.isArray(sampledRows)
147 |     && Array.isArray(columns)
148 |     && sampledRows.length >= WORKER_ROW_THRESHOLD
149 |     && columns.length > 1
150 |     && cellCount >= WORKER_CELL_THRESHOLD
151 |     && DEFAULT_SCHEMA_ANALYSIS_CONCURRENCY > 1
152 |   );
153 | }
154 | 
155 | function chunkColumns(columns, chunkCount) {
156 |   const actualChunkCount = Math.max(1, Math.min(chunkCount, columns.length));
157 |   const chunks = Array.from({ length: actualChunkCount }, () => []);
158 | 
159 |   columns.forEach((column, index) => {
160 |     chunks[index % actualChunkCount].push(column);
161 |   });
162 | 
163 |   return chunks.filter((chunk) => chunk.length > 0);
164 | }
165 | 
166 | function runWorkerBatch(columns, sampledRows) {
167 |   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
168 |     const worker = new Worker(new URL("./schema-packet-worker.js", import.meta.url), {
169 |       workerData: { columns, sampledRows },
170 |     });
171 | 
172 |     worker.once("message", (message) => {
173 |       worker.terminate().catch(() => {});
174 |       if (message?.error) {
175 |         reject(new Error(message.error));
176 |         return;
177 |       }
178 |       resolve(Array.isArray(message?.columns) ? message.columns : []);
179 |     });
180 | 
181 |     worker.once("error", (error) => {
182 |       worker.terminate().catch(() => {});
183 |       reject(error);
184 |     });
185 | 
186 |     worker.once("exit", (code) => {
187 |       if (code !== 0) {
188 |         reject(new Error(`Schema worker exited with code ${code}`));
189 |       }
190 |     });
191 |   });
192 | }
193 | 
194 | async function analyzeColumnsAsync(columns, sampledRows) {
195 |   if (!shouldUseWorkerAnalysis(sampledRows, columns)) {
196 |     return Promise.all(columns.map(async (column) => {
197 |       try {
198 |         return analyzeColumn(column, sampledRows);
199 |       } catch (error) {
200 |         return {
201 |           name: column.name,
202 |           type: column.type,
203 |           isValid: false,
204 |           error: error.message,
205 |         };
206 |       }
207 |     }));
208 |   }
209 | 
210 |   const batches = chunkColumns(columns, DEFAULT_SCHEMA_ANALYSIS_CONCURRENCY);
211 |   const results = await Promise.all(
212 |     batches.map((batch) => runWorkerBatch(batch, sampledRows)),
213 |   );
214 | 
215 |   return results.flat();
216 | }
217 | 
218 | function createSchemaPacketSkeleton(dataset, sampledRows) {
219 |   return {
220 |     name: dataset.name || "Unnamed Dataset",
221 |     rowCount: dataset.rows.length,
222 |     columnCount: dataset.columns.length,
223 |     sampledRowCount: sampledRows.length,
224 |     columns: [],
225 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
226 |   };
227 | }
228 | 
229 | function sortColumnsByDatasetOrder(analyzedColumns, datasetColumns) {
230 |   const order = new Map(datasetColumns.map((column, index) => [column.name, index]));
231 |   return [...analyzedColumns].sort((left, right) => (order.get(left.name) || 0) - (order.get(right.name) || 0));
232 | }
233 | 
234 | /**
235 |  * Build schema packet (NO raw data, only metadata)
236 |  */
237 | export function buildSchemaPacket(dataset, options = {}) {
238 |   if (!dataset || !Array.isArray(dataset.rows) || dataset.rows.length === 0) {
239 |     throw new Error("Invalid dataset");
240 |   }
241 | 
242 |   const sampleSize = Number(options.sampleSize || DEFAULT_SCHEMA_SAMPLE_SIZE);
243 |   const cacheKey = buildDatasetCacheKey(dataset, sampleSize);
244 |   const cachedPacket = schemaPacketCache.get(cacheKey);
245 | 
246 |   if (cachedPacket) {
247 |     return cachedPacket;
248 |   }
249 | 
250 |   const sampledRows = sampleRowsForSchema(dataset.rows, sampleSize);
251 |   const schemaPacket = createSchemaPacketSkeleton(dataset, sampledRows);
252 | 
253 |   for (const column of dataset.columns) {
254 |     try {
255 |       schemaPacket.columns.push(analyzeColumn(column, sampledRows));
256 |     } catch (error) {
257 |       console.warn(`Error processing column "${column.name}":`, error.message);
258 |       schemaPacket.columns.push({
259 |         name: column.name,
260 |         type: column.type,
261 |         isValid: false,
262 |         error: error.message,
263 |       });
264 |     }
265 |   }
266 | 
267 |   schemaPacketCache.set(cacheKey, schemaPacket);
268 |   return schemaPacket;
269 | }
270 | 
271 | export async function buildSchemaPacketAsync(dataset, options = {}) {
272 |   if (!dataset || !Array.isArray(dataset.rows) || dataset.rows.length === 0) {
273 |     throw new Error("Invalid dataset");
274 |   }
275 | 
276 |   const sampleSize = Number(options.sampleSize || DEFAULT_SCHEMA_SAMPLE_SIZE);
277 |   const cacheKey = buildDatasetCacheKey(dataset, sampleSize);
278 | 
279 |   if (schemaPacketCache.has(cacheKey)) {
280 |     return schemaPacketCache.get(cacheKey);
281 |   }
282 | 
283 |   if (asyncSchemaPacketCache.has(cacheKey)) {
284 |     return asyncSchemaPacketCache.get(cacheKey);
285 |   }
286 | 
287 |   const packetPromise = (async () => {
288 |     const sampledRows = sampleRowsForSchema(dataset.rows, sampleSize);
289 |     const schemaPacket = createSchemaPacketSkeleton(dataset, sampledRows);
290 |     const analyzedColumns = await analyzeColumnsAsync(dataset.columns, sampledRows);
291 |     schemaPacket.columns = sortColumnsByDatasetOrder(analyzedColumns, dataset.columns);
292 |     schemaPacketCache.set(cacheKey, schemaPacket);
293 |     return schemaPacket;
294 |   })();
295 | 
296 |   asyncSchemaPacketCache.set(cacheKey, packetPromise);
297 | 
298 |   try {
299 |     return await packetPromise;
300 |   } finally {
301 |     asyncSchemaPacketCache.delete(cacheKey);
302 |   }
303 | }
304 | 
305 | /**
306 |  * Format schema as text for AI
307 |  */
308 | export function formatSchemaForPrompt(schemaPacket) {
309 |   let text = `DATASET: "${schemaPacket.name}"\n`;
310 |   text += `ROWS: ${schemaPacket.rowCount}\n`;
311 |   text += `COLUMNS: ${schemaPacket.columnCount}\n\n`;
312 |   text += `SCHEMA_SAMPLE_ROWS: ${schemaPacket.sampledRowCount || schemaPacket.rowCount}\n\n`;
313 |   text += "COLUMN DEFINITIONS:\n";
314 | 
315 |   for (const col of schemaPacket.columns) {
316 |     if (!col.isValid) {
317 |       text += `\n${col.name} (${col.type}): [INVALID - ${col.error || col.reason}]\n`;
318 |       continue;
319 |     }
320 | 
321 |     text += `\n${col.name} (${col.type}):\n`;
322 | 
323 |     if (col.type === "numeric") {
324 |       text += `  Range: ${col.min} to ${col.max}\n`;
325 |       text += `  Mean: ${col.mean}, Median: ${col.median}\n`;
326 |       text += `  Values: ${col.validCount} valid, ${col.nullCount} nulls\n`;
327 |       text += `  Unique: ${col.uniqueCount}\n`;
328 |     } else {
329 |       text += `  Unique: ${col.uniqueCount}, Nulls: ${col.nullCount}\n`;
330 |       text += `  Top values: ${Object.entries(col.topValues)
331 |         .slice(0, 3)
332 |         .map(([key, value]) => `${key}(${value})`)
333 |         .join(", ")}\n`;
334 |     }
335 |   }
336 | 
337 |   return text;
338 | }
339 | 
340 | export function getDataQualityScore(schemaPacket) {
341 |   if (!schemaPacket || !Array.isArray(schemaPacket.columns) || schemaPacket.columns.length === 0) {
342 |     return 0;
343 |   }
344 | 
345 |   const rowCount = Math.max(Number(schemaPacket.sampledRowCount || schemaPacket.rowCount || 0), 0);
346 |   const columnCount = schemaPacket.columns.length;
347 |   const totalCells = rowCount * columnCount;
348 | 
349 |   if (totalCells === 0) {
350 |     return 0;
351 |   }
352 | 
353 |   let problemCells = 0;
354 |   let invalidColumns = 0;
355 | 
356 |   for (const column of schemaPacket.columns) {
357 |     if (!column?.isValid) {
358 |       invalidColumns += 1;
359 |     }
360 | 
361 |     problemCells += Number(column?.nullCount || 0);
362 |     problemCells += Number(column?.invalidCount || 0);
363 |   }
364 | 
365 |   const completenessScore = 100 - ((problemCells / totalCells) * 100);
366 |   const validityPenalty = (invalidColumns / columnCount) * 25;
367 |   const score = completenessScore - validityPenalty;
368 | 
369 |   return Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Number(score.toFixed(1))));
370 | }
371 | 
372 | /**
373 |  * Validate columns exist in schema
374 |  */
375 | export function validateColumnsExist(mentionedColumns, schemaPacket) {
376 |   if (!Array.isArray(mentionedColumns)) {
377 |     throw new Error("mentionedColumns must be an array");
378 |   }
379 | 
380 |   const validColumns = new Set(
381 |     schemaPacket.columns.filter((column) => column.isValid).map((column) => column.name),
382 |   );
383 | 
384 |   const invalidColumns = [];
385 |   for (const col of mentionedColumns) {
386 |     if (!validColumns.has(col)) {
387 |       invalidColumns.push(col);
388 |     }
389 |   }
390 | 
391 |   if (invalidColumns.length > 0) {
392 |     throw new Error(
393 |       `Invalid columns: ${invalidColumns.join(", ")}. Valid: ${Array.from(validColumns).join(", ")}`,
394 |     );
395 |   }
396 | }
397 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/schema-packet-worker.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/schema-packet-worker.js`

```js
  1 | import { parentPort, workerData } from "node:worker_threads";
  2 | import { toNumber, isMeaningfulValue } from "@insightflow/shared-analytics";
  3 | 
  4 | function extractNumericStats(values) {
  5 |   const numbers = [];
  6 |   let nullCount = 0;
  7 |   let invalidCount = 0;
  8 | 
  9 |   for (const val of values) {
 10 |     if (!isMeaningfulValue(val)) {
 11 |       nullCount += 1;
 12 |       continue;
 13 |     }
 14 | 
 15 |     const num = toNumber(val);
 16 |     if (num === null) {
 17 |       invalidCount += 1;
 18 |     } else {
 19 |       numbers.push(num);
 20 |     }
 21 |   }
 22 | 
 23 |   if (numbers.length < 10) {
 24 |     return {
 25 |       type: "numeric",
 26 |       isValid: false,
 27 |       reason: `Only ${numbers.length} valid values`,
 28 |       nullCount,
 29 |       invalidCount,
 30 |       validCount: numbers.length,
 31 |     };
 32 |   }
 33 | 
 34 |   const sorted = [...numbers].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 35 |   const sum = numbers.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
 36 |   const mean = sum / numbers.length;
 37 |   const mid = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
 38 |   const median = sorted.length % 2 === 0
 39 |     ? (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2
 40 |     : sorted[mid];
 41 |   const variance = numbers.reduce((sumValue, num) => sumValue + ((num - mean) ** 2), 0) / numbers.length;
 42 |   const stdDev = Math.sqrt(variance);
 43 | 
 44 |   return {
 45 |     type: "numeric",
 46 |     isValid: true,
 47 |     min: Math.min(...numbers),
 48 |     max: Math.max(...numbers),
 49 |     mean: Number(mean.toFixed(2)),
 50 |     median: Number(median.toFixed(2)),
 51 |     stdDev: Number(stdDev.toFixed(2)),
 52 |     nullCount,
 53 |     invalidCount,
 54 |     validCount: numbers.length,
 55 |     uniqueCount: new Set(numbers).size,
 56 |   };
 57 | }
 58 | 
 59 | function extractCategoricalStats(values) {
 60 |   const valueCounts = new Map();
 61 |   let nullCount = 0;
 62 | 
 63 |   for (const val of values) {
 64 |     if (!isMeaningfulValue(val)) {
 65 |       nullCount += 1;
 66 |       continue;
 67 |     }
 68 | 
 69 |     const strVal = String(val).trim().substring(0, 100);
 70 |     if (valueCounts.size >= 100 && !valueCounts.has(strVal)) {
 71 |       continue;
 72 |     }
 73 | 
 74 |     valueCounts.set(strVal, (valueCounts.get(strVal) || 0) + 1);
 75 |   }
 76 | 
 77 |   const sorted = [...valueCounts.entries()]
 78 |     .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 79 |     .slice(0, 10);
 80 | 
 81 |   return {
 82 |     type: "categorical",
 83 |     isValid: true,
 84 |     nullCount,
 85 |     uniqueCount: valueCounts.size,
 86 |     topValues: Object.fromEntries(sorted),
 87 |     topValuesCount: sorted.length,
 88 |   };
 89 | }
 90 | 
 91 | function analyzeColumn(column, sampledRows) {
 92 |   const columnValues = sampledRows.map((row) => row[column.name]);
 93 | 
 94 |   if (column.type === "number") {
 95 |     return {
 96 |       name: column.name,
 97 |       ...extractNumericStats(columnValues),
 98 |     };
 99 |   }
100 | 
101 |   return {
102 |     name: column.name,
103 |     ...extractCategoricalStats(columnValues),
104 |   };
105 | }
106 | 
107 | try {
108 |   const columns = Array.isArray(workerData?.columns) ? workerData.columns : [];
109 |   const sampledRows = Array.isArray(workerData?.sampledRows) ? workerData.sampledRows : [];
110 | 
111 |   const analyzed = columns.map((column) => {
112 |     try {
113 |       return analyzeColumn(column, sampledRows);
114 |     } catch (error) {
115 |       return {
116 |         name: column.name,
117 |         type: column.type,
118 |         isValid: false,
119 |         error: error.message,
120 |       };
121 |     }
122 |   });
123 | 
124 |   parentPort?.postMessage({ columns: analyzed });
125 | } catch (error) {
126 |   parentPort?.postMessage({ error: error.message });
127 | }
128 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/services/smart-query-handler.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/services/smart-query-handler.js`

```js
  1 | import { prepareDatasetForAnalytics, groupMetricByDimension, countRowsByDimension, buildDatasetSchema } from "@insightflow/shared-analytics";
  2 | import { buildEnhancedSchema, generateChartRecommendations } from "./schema-detector.js";
  3 | 
  4 | const QUERY_INTENTS = {
  5 |   GREETING: ['hello', 'hi', 'hey', 'good morning', 'good afternoon', 'good evening', 'greetings'],
  6 |   DATASET_INFO: ['about this dataset', 'describe this dataset', 'tell me about this', 'what does this contain', 'overview of dataset', 'what is this dataset about', 'what does this data represent'],
  7 |   HIGHEST: ['highest', 'maximum', 'top 5', 'top 10', 'largest', 'biggest', 'most'],
  8 |   LOWEST: ['lowest', 'minimum', 'bottom 5', 'bottom 10', 'smallest', 'least', 'worst'],
  9 |   BREAKDOWN: ['breakdown', 'by category', 'per category', 'by region', 'per region', 'by month', 'per month', 'each category', 'each region', 'group by category', 'group by region', 'split by'],
 10 |   TREND: ['trend', 'over time', 'growth over time', 'increase over time', 'decrease over time', 'change over time', 'history', 'timeline', 'monthly trend', 'yearly trend'],
 11 |   COMPARISON: ['compare', 'versus', 'vs', 'difference between', 'which is better', 'higher than', 'lower than', 'more than', 'less than'],
 12 |   CORRELATION: ['correlation', 'related to', 'relationship', 'associated with', 'connected to', 'affect', 'impact'],
 13 |   DISTRIBUTION: ['distribution', 'spread', 'range', 'percentile', 'quartile', 'frequency', 'histogram'],
 14 |   STATISTICS: ['how many', 'count of', 'total', 'number of', 'how much', 'average', 'mean', 'minimum', 'maximum', 'min', 'max', 'sum of', 'statistics', 'summarize', 'what is the average', 'what is the total'],
 15 |   ANALYTICAL: [],
 16 | };
 17 | 
 18 | function classifyQueryIntent(query) {
 19 |   const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase().trim();
 20 |   
 21 |   // Sort patterns by length (longer = more specific = higher priority)
 22 |   const sortedIntents = Object.entries(QUERY_INTENTS).sort((a, b) => {
 23 |     const aMaxLen = Math.max(...a[1].map(p => p.length));
 24 |     const bMaxLen = Math.max(...b[1].map(p => p.length));
 25 |     return bMaxLen - aMaxLen;
 26 |   });
 27 |   
 28 |   for (const [intent, patterns] of sortedIntents) {
 29 |     // Sort patterns by length within each intent
 30 |     const sortedPatterns = [...patterns].sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length);
 31 |     for (const pattern of sortedPatterns) {
 32 |       if (lowerQuery.includes(pattern)) {
 33 |         return intent;
 34 |       }
 35 |     }
 36 |   }
 37 |   
 38 |   return 'ANALYTICAL';
 39 | }
 40 | 
 41 | function detectColumnsFromQuery(query, schema) {
 42 |   const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();
 43 |   const columns = schema.columns || [];
 44 |   
 45 |   const mentionedDimension = columns.find(col => 
 46 |     col.role === 'dimension' && lowerQuery.includes(col.name.toLowerCase())
 47 |   );
 48 |   
 49 |   const mentionedMetric = columns.find(col => 
 50 |     col.role === 'metric' && lowerQuery.includes(col.name.toLowerCase())
 51 |   );
 52 |   
 53 |   return {
 54 |     dimension: mentionedDimension || schema.primaryDimension || columns.find(c => c.role === 'dimension'),
 55 |     metric: mentionedMetric || schema.primaryMetric || columns.find(c => c.role === 'metric'),
 56 |   };
 57 | }
 58 | 
 59 | function handleGreetingQuery(dataset, schema) {
 60 |   const columnList = schema.columns?.map(c => c.name).join(', ') || 'various columns';
 61 |   const rowCount = dataset.rowCount?.toLocaleString() || 'many';
 62 |   
 63 |   return {
 64 |     content: `Hello! I'm your data analytics assistant. This dataset "${dataset.name}" contains ${rowCount} records with ${columnList}. What would you like to explore?`,
 65 |     sql: null,
 66 |     chart: null,
 67 |     insights: [
 68 |       `Dataset: ${dataset.name}`,
 69 |       `Records: ${rowCount}`,
 70 |       `Columns: ${schema.columnCount || schema.columns?.length || 0}`,
 71 |       schema.dataType ? `Data Type: ${schema.dataType}` : null,
 72 |     ].filter(Boolean),
 73 |   };
 74 | }
 75 | 
 76 | function handleDatasetInfoQuery(dataset, schema) {
 77 |   const columns = schema.columns || [];
 78 |   const dimensions = columns.filter(c => c.role === 'dimension').map(c => c.name);
 79 |   const metrics = columns.filter(c => c.role === 'metric').map(c => c.name);
 80 |   
 81 |   let content = `This is a **${dataset.name}** dataset with **${dataset.rowCount?.toLocaleString()}** rows and **${columns.length}** columns.\n\n`;
 82 |   
 83 |   if (dimensions.length > 0) {
 84 |     content += `**Dimensions (Categories):** ${dimensions.join(', ')}\n`;
 85 |   }
 86 |   if (metrics.length > 0) {
 87 |     content += `**Metrics (Numbers):** ${metrics.join(', ')}\n`;
 88 |   }
 89 |   
 90 |   if (schema.dataType) {
 91 |     content += `\n**Detected Data Type:** ${schema.dataType}`;
 92 |   }
 93 |   
 94 |   const insights = [
 95 |     `Dataset: ${dataset.name}`,
 96 |     `Total Rows: ${dataset.rowCount?.toLocaleString()}`,
 97 |     `Total Columns: ${columns.length}`,
 98 |     dimensions.length > 0 ? `Dimensions: ${dimensions.join(', ')}` : null,
 99 |     metrics.length > 0 ? `Metrics: ${metrics.join(', ')}` : null,
100 |     schema.dataType ? `Data Type: ${schema.dataType}` : null,
101 |   ].filter(Boolean);
102 |   
103 |   return {
104 |     content,
105 |     sql: null,
106 |     chart: null,
107 |     insights,
108 |   };
109 | }
110 | 
111 | function handleStatisticsQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query) {
112 |   const { dimension, metric } = detectColumnsFromQuery(query, schema);
113 |   const lowerQuery = query.toLowerCase();
114 |   
115 |   let result = { content: '', chart: null, sql: '' };
116 |   
117 |   if (lowerQuery.includes('count') || lowerQuery.includes('how many')) {
118 |     if (dimension) {
119 |       const grouped = countRowsByDimension(analyticsDataset.rows, dimension);
120 |       const total = grouped.reduce((sum, row) => sum + Number(row.count || 0), 0);
121 |       const breakdown = grouped
122 |         .sort((a, b) => Number(b.count || 0) - Number(a.count || 0))
123 |         .slice(0, 5)
124 |         .map((row) => `${row[dimension.name]}: ${Number(row.count || 0).toLocaleString()}`)
125 |         .join('\n');
126 |       
127 |       result.content = `Total records: **${total.toLocaleString()}**. Here's the breakdown by ${dimension.name}:\n${breakdown}`;
128 |       result.chart = {
129 |         type: 'bar',
130 |         title: `Count by ${dimension.name}`,
131 |         data: grouped,
132 |       };
133 |       result.sql = `SELECT ${dimension.name}, COUNT(*) as count FROM dataset_rows GROUP BY ${dimension.name}`;
134 |     }
135 |   } else if (metric) {
136 |     const values = analyticsDataset.rows.map(row => Number(row[metric.name])).filter(v => !isNaN(v));
137 |     if (values.length > 0) {
138 |       const sum = values.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
139 |       const avg = sum / values.length;
140 |       const min = Math.min(...values);
141 |       const max = Math.max(...values);
142 |       
143 |       result.content = `Statistics for **${metric.name}:**\n- Sum: ${sum.toLocaleString()}\n- Average: ${avg.toLocaleString()}\n- Minimum: ${min.toLocaleString()}\n- Maximum: ${max.toLocaleString()}\n- Total Records: ${values.length.toLocaleString()}`;
144 |       result.sql = `SELECT SUM(${metric.name}), AVG(${metric.name}), MIN(${metric.name}), MAX(${metric.name}) FROM dataset_rows`;
145 |     }
146 |   }
147 |   
148 |   result.insights = [`Analysis based on ${metric?.name || 'available metrics'}`];
149 |   return result;
150 | }
151 | 
152 | function handleComparisonQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query, intent) {
153 |   const { dimension, metric } = detectColumnsFromQuery(query, schema);
154 |   
155 |   if (!dimension || !metric) {
156 |     return {
157 |       content: "I need more specific information about which dimensions and metrics you'd like to compare. Could you clarify?",
158 |       sql: null,
159 |       chart: null,
160 |       insights: ['Please specify the columns to compare'],
161 |     };
162 |   }
163 |   
164 |   const grouped = groupMetricByDimension(analyticsDataset.rows, dimension, metric, 'sum');
165 |   const sorted = [...grouped].sort((a, b) => Number(b[metric.name] || 0) - Number(a[metric.name] || 0));
166 |   
167 |   const isHighest = intent === 'HIGHEST';
168 |   const isLowest = intent === 'LOWEST';
169 |   const topN = isHighest || isLowest ? 5 : sorted.length;
170 |   const slice = isHighest ? sorted.slice(0, topN) : sorted.slice(-topN).reverse();
171 |   
172 |   const total = grouped.reduce((sum, row) => sum + Number(row[metric.name] || 0), 0);
173 |   const topValue = Number(slice[0]?.[metric.name] || 0);
174 |   const topLabel = slice[0]?.[dimension.name] || 'N/A';
175 |   
176 |   let content = '';
177 |   if (isHighest) {
178 |     content = `Top ${topN} ${dimension.name} by **${metric.name}:**\n`;
179 |     content += slice.map((row, i) => {
180 |       const value = Number(row[metric.name] || 0);
181 |       const percentage = total > 0 ? ((value / total) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
182 |       return `${i + 1}. ${row[dimension.name]}: ${value.toLocaleString()} (${percentage}%)`;
183 |     }).join('\n');
184 |   } else if (isLowest) {
185 |     content = `Lowest ${topN} ${dimension.name} by **${metric.name}:**\n`;
186 |     content += slice.map((row, i) => {
187 |       const value = Number(row[metric.name] || 0);
188 |       const percentage = total > 0 ? ((value / total) * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0';
189 |       return `${i + 1}. ${row[dimension.name]}: ${value.toLocaleString()} (${percentage}%)`;
190 |     }).join('\n');
191 |   } else {
192 |     content = `**${metric.name}** by ${dimension.name}:\n`;
193 |     content += sorted.slice(0, 10).map((row) => `${row[dimension.name]}: ${Number(row[metric.name] || 0).toLocaleString()}`).join('\n');
194 |   }
195 |   
196 |   return {
197 |     content,
198 |     sql: `SELECT ${dimension.name}, SUM(${metric.name}) as ${metric.name} FROM dataset_rows GROUP BY ${dimension.name} ORDER BY ${metric.name} ${isHighest ? 'DESC' : 'ASC'}`,
199 |     chart: {
200 |       type: 'bar',
201 |       title: `${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
202 |       xKey: dimension.name,
203 |       yKey: metric.name,
204 |       data: slice,
205 |     },
206 |     insights: [
207 |       `Top performer: ${topLabel} with ${topValue.toLocaleString()}`,
208 |       `Total: ${total.toLocaleString()}`,
209 |     ],
210 |   };
211 | }
212 | 
213 | function handleTrendQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query) {
214 |   const { dimension, metric } = detectColumnsFromQuery(query, schema);
215 |   const dateColumns = schema.dateColumns || schema.columns?.filter(c => 
216 |     c.type === 'date' || c.name.toLowerCase().includes('date') || c.name.toLowerCase().includes('month') || c.name.toLowerCase().includes('year')
217 |   ) || [];
218 |   
219 |   const timeDim = dimension?.name && dateColumns.find(d => d.toLowerCase() === dimension.name.toLowerCase()) 
220 |     ? dimension 
221 |     : { name: dateColumns[0] || 'month', role: 'dimension' };
222 |   
223 |   if (!timeDim.name || !metric) {
224 |     return {
225 |       content: "I couldn't identify a time dimension and metric for trend analysis. Could you specify which columns to use?",
226 |       sql: null,
227 |       chart: null,
228 |       insights: ['Please specify time column and metric'],
229 |     };
230 |   }
231 |   
232 |   const grouped = groupMetricByDimension(analyticsDataset.rows, { name: timeDim.name, role: 'dimension' }, metric, 'sum');
233 |   const sorted = [...grouped].sort((a, b) => String(a[timeDim.name]).localeCompare(String(b[timeDim.name])));
234 |   
235 |   const firstValue = Number(sorted[0]?.[metric.name] || 0);
236 |   const lastValue = Number(sorted[sorted.length - 1]?.[metric.name] || 0);
237 |   const change = firstValue > 0 ? ((lastValue - firstValue) / firstValue * 100) : 0;
238 |   
239 |   return {
240 |     content: `**${metric.name}** trend over **${timeDim.name}:**\n${sorted.map((row) => `${row[timeDim.name]}: ${Number(row[metric.name] || 0).toLocaleString()}`).join('\n')}\n\nOverall change: ${change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${change.toFixed(1)}%`,
241 |     sql: `SELECT ${timeDim.name}, SUM(${metric.name}) as ${metric.name} FROM dataset_rows GROUP BY ${timeDim.name} ORDER BY ${timeDim.name}`,
242 |     chart: {
243 |       type: 'line',
244 |       title: `${metric.name} Over Time`,
245 |       xKey: timeDim.name,
246 |       yKey: metric.name,
247 |       data: sorted,
248 |     },
249 |     insights: [
250 |       `First period: ${firstValue.toLocaleString()}`,
251 |       `Last period: ${lastValue.toLocaleString()}`,
252 |       `Change: ${change >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${change.toFixed(1)}%`,
253 |     ],
254 |   };
255 | }
256 | 
257 | function handleBreakdownQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query) {
258 |   const { dimension, metric } = detectColumnsFromQuery(query, schema);
259 |   
260 |   if (!dimension || !metric) {
261 |     return handleComparisonQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query, 'BREAKDOWN');
262 |   }
263 |   
264 |   const grouped = groupMetricByDimension(analyticsDataset.rows, dimension, metric, 'sum');
265 |   const total = grouped.reduce((sum, row) => sum + Number(row[metric.name] || 0), 0);
266 |   const breakdown = grouped
267 |     .sort((a, b) => Number(b[metric.name] || 0) - Number(a[metric.name] || 0))
268 |     .map((row) => {
269 |       const value = Number(row[metric.name] || 0);
270 |       return {
271 |         label: row[dimension.name],
272 |         value,
273 |         percentage: total > 0 ? (value / total * 100).toFixed(1) : '0.0',
274 |       };
275 |     });
276 |   
277 |   return {
278 |     content: `**${metric.name}** breakdown by **${dimension.name}:**\n${breakdown.map(b => `${b.label}: ${b.value.toLocaleString()} (${b.percentage}%)`).join('\n')}`,
279 |     sql: `SELECT ${dimension.name}, SUM(${metric.name}) as ${metric.name} FROM dataset_rows GROUP BY ${dimension.name}`,
280 |     chart: {
281 |       type: 'pie',
282 |       title: `${metric.name} by ${dimension.name}`,
283 |       xKey: dimension.name,
284 |       yKey: 'value',
285 |       data: breakdown.map(b => ({ [dimension.name]: b.label, value: b.value })),
286 |     },
287 |     insights: [
288 |       `Total ${metric.name}: ${total.toLocaleString()}`,
289 |       `Categories: ${breakdown.length}`,
290 |     ],
291 |   };
292 | }
293 | 
294 | function handleCorrelationQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query) {
295 |   const numericColumns = analyticsDataset.columns.filter(c => c.type === 'number' || c.type === 'integer');
296 |   
297 |   if (numericColumns.length < 2) {
298 |     return {
299 |       content: "I need at least two numeric columns to analyze correlations. This dataset doesn't seem to have enough numeric data.",
300 |       sql: null,
301 |       chart: null,
302 |       insights: ['Need multiple numeric columns for correlation'],
303 |     };
304 |   }
305 |   
306 |   const { metric } = detectColumnsFromQuery(query, schema);
307 |   const xMetric = metric || numericColumns[0];
308 |   const yMetric = numericColumns.find(c => c.name !== xMetric.name) || numericColumns[1];
309 |   
310 |   if (!xMetric || !yMetric) {
311 |     return {
312 |       content: "I couldn't identify the metrics to compare. Please specify which columns to analyze.",
313 |       sql: null,
314 |       chart: null,
315 |       insights: ['Please specify the metrics to compare'],
316 |     };
317 |   }
318 |   
319 |   const data = analyticsDataset.rows.slice(0, 100).map(row => ({
320 |     x: Number(row[xMetric.name]) || 0,
321 |     y: Number(row[yMetric.name]) || 0,
322 |   })).filter(p => p.x !== 0 && p.y !== 0);
323 |   
324 |   const n = data.length;
325 |   const sumX = data.reduce((s, p) => s + p.x, 0);
326 |   const sumY = data.reduce((s, p) => s + p.y, 0);
327 |   const sumXY = data.reduce((s, p) => s + p.x * p.y, 0);
328 |   const sumX2 = data.reduce((s, p) => s + p.x * p.x, 0);
329 |   const sumY2 = data.reduce((s, p) => s + p.y * p.y, 0);
330 |   
331 |   const numerator = n * sumXY - sumX * sumY;
332 |   const denominator = Math.sqrt((n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX) * (n * sumY2 - sumY * sumY));
333 |   const correlation = denominator === 0 ? 0 : numerator / denominator;
334 |   
335 |   const strength = Math.abs(correlation) > 0.7 ? 'strong' : Math.abs(correlation) > 0.4 ? 'moderate' : 'weak';
336 |   const direction = correlation > 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative';
337 |   
338 |   return {
339 |     content: `Correlation between **${xMetric.name}** and **${yMetric.name}:**\n- Correlation coefficient: ${correlation.toFixed(3)}\n- Strength: ${strength}\n- Direction: ${direction}\n\nThis ${strength} ${direction} correlation indicates that as one variable ${direction === 'positive' ? 'increases' : 'decreases'}, the other tends to ${direction === 'positive' ? 'increase' : 'decrease'}.`,
340 |     sql: null,
341 |     chart: {
342 |       type: 'scatter',
343 |       title: `${xMetric.name} vs ${yMetric.name}`,
344 |       xKey: xMetric.name,
345 |       yKey: yMetric.name,
346 |       data,
347 |     },
348 |     insights: [
349 |       `Correlation: ${correlation.toFixed(3)}`,
350 |       `Interpretation: ${strength} ${direction} relationship`,
351 |       `Data points: ${n}`,
352 |     ],
353 |   };
354 | }
355 | 
356 | export function handleSmartQuery(dataset, query) {
357 |   try {
358 |     console.log(`[smart-query] Processing: "${query}"`);
359 |     
360 |     if (!dataset || !dataset.columns || !dataset.rows) {
361 |       console.log('[smart-query] Invalid dataset - using fallback response');
362 |       return {
363 |         content: `This dataset has ${dataset?.rowCount || 0} rows and ${dataset?.columns?.length || 0} columns. I can help you analyze it - try asking about statistics, trends, or comparisons!`,
364 |         sql: null,
365 |         chart: null,
366 |         insights: ['Dataset info'],
367 |       };
368 |     }
369 |     
370 |     console.log('[smart-query] Step 1: prepareDatasetForAnalytics');
371 |     const analyticsDataset = prepareDatasetForAnalytics(dataset);
372 |     console.log('[smart-query] Step 2: analyticsDataset ready');
373 |     
374 |     if (!analyticsDataset) {
375 |       console.log('[smart-query] Failed to prepare analytics dataset - using fallback');
376 |       return {
377 |         content: `I see you have a dataset called "${dataset.name}" with ${dataset.rowCount} rows. What would you like to know about it?`,
378 |         sql: null,
379 |         chart: null,
380 |         insights: ['Fallback response'],
381 |       };
382 |     }
383 |     
384 |     console.log('[smart-query] Step 3: buildDatasetSchema');
385 |     const basicSchema = buildDatasetSchema(analyticsDataset);
386 |     console.log('[smart-query] Step 4: buildEnhancedSchema');
387 |     const enhancedSchema = buildEnhancedSchema(dataset.columns, dataset.rows);
388 |     
389 |     const schema = {
390 |       ...enhancedSchema,
391 |       ...basicSchema,
392 |       columns: enhancedSchema.columns || basicSchema.columns || dataset.columns,
393 |     };
394 |     
395 |     const intent = classifyQueryIntent(query);
396 |     console.log(`[smart-query] Intent: ${intent}`);
397 |     
398 |     let result = null;
399 |     
400 |     if (intent === 'GREETING') {
401 |       result = handleGreetingQuery(dataset, schema);
402 |     } else if (intent === 'DATASET_INFO') {
403 |       result = handleDatasetInfoQuery(dataset, schema);
404 |     } else if (intent === 'STATISTICS') {
405 |       result = handleStatisticsQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query);
406 |     } else if (['HIGHEST', 'LOWEST', 'COMPARISON'].includes(intent)) {
407 |       result = handleComparisonQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query, intent);
408 |     } else if (intent === 'TREND') {
409 |       result = handleTrendQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query);
410 |     } else if (intent === 'BREAKDOWN') {
411 |       result = handleBreakdownQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query);
412 |     } else if (intent === 'CORRELATION') {
413 |       result = handleCorrelationQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query);
414 |     } else {
415 |       result = handleBreakdownQuery(dataset, analyticsDataset, schema, query);
416 |     }
417 |     
418 |     // If no valid result, create a fallback
419 |     if (!result || !result.content) {
420 |       console.log('[smart-query] No result, creating fallback');
421 |       const primaryMetric = schema.primaryMetric || 'revenue';
422 |       const primaryDim = schema.primaryDimension || 'category';
423 |       result = {
424 |         content: `Based on your query about "${query}", I can see you want to analyze the ${primaryMetric} by ${primaryDim}. Here's what I found in your ${dataset.name} dataset.`,
425 |         sql: `SELECT ${primaryDim}, SUM(${primaryMetric}) as ${primaryMetric} FROM dataset_rows GROUP BY ${primaryDim}`,
426 |         chart: {
427 |           type: 'bar',
428 |           title: `${primaryMetric} by ${primaryDim}`,
429 |           xKey: primaryDim,
430 |           yKey: primaryMetric,
431 |           data: [],
432 |         },
433 |         insights: [`Dataset: ${dataset.name}`, `Rows: ${dataset.rowCount}`, `Query intent: ${intent}`],
434 |       };
435 |     }
436 |     
437 |     return result;
438 |     
439 |   } catch (error) {
440 |     console.error('[smart-query] Error:', error.message, error.stack);
441 |     console.error('[smart-query] Dataset keys:', dataset ? Object.keys(dataset) : 'null');
442 |     console.error('[smart-query] Columns sample:', dataset?.columns?.slice(0, 2));
443 |     console.error('[smart-query] Rows sample:', dataset?.rows?.slice(0, 1));
444 |     return {
445 |       content: `I encountered an issue processing your query. This dataset has ${dataset?.rowCount || 0} rows. How can I help you analyze it?`,
446 |       sql: null,
447 |       chart: null,
448 |       insights: ['Error fallback'],
449 |     };
450 |   }
451 | }
452 | 
453 | export default handleSmartQuery;
454 | 
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/utils/helpers.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/utils/helpers.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Utility Helpers
  3 |  * Common helper functions
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | /**
  7 |  * Sleep for specified milliseconds
  8 |  * @param {number} ms - Milliseconds to sleep
  9 |  * @returns {Promise} Resolves after timeout
 10 |  */
 11 | export function sleep(ms) {
 12 |   return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
 13 | }
 14 | 
 15 | /**
 16 |  * Retry a function with exponential backoff
 17 |  * @param {Function} fn - Function to retry
 18 |  * @param {number} maxRetries - Maximum number of retries
 19 |  * @param {number} initialDelay - Initial delay in ms
 20 |  * @returns {Promise} Result of function
 21 |  */
 22 | export async function retry(fn, maxRetries = 3, initialDelay = 1000) {
 23 |   let lastError;
 24 |   
 25 |   for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) {
 26 |     try {
 27 |       return await fn();
 28 |     } catch (error) {
 29 |       lastError = error;
 30 |       if (attempt < maxRetries) {
 31 |         const delay = initialDelay * Math.pow(2, attempt);
 32 |         await sleep(delay);
 33 |       }
 34 |     }
 35 |   }
 36 |   
 37 |   throw lastError;
 38 | }
 39 | 
 40 | /**
 41 |  * Debounce function
 42 |  * @param {Function} fn - Function to debounce
 43 |  * @param {number} delay - Delay in ms
 44 |  * @returns {Function} Debounced function
 45 |  */
 46 | export function debounce(fn, delay) {
 47 |   let timeoutId;
 48 |   return (...args) => {
 49 |     clearTimeout(timeoutId);
 50 |     timeoutId = setTimeout(() => fn(...args), delay);
 51 |   };
 52 | }
 53 | 
 54 | /**
 55 |  * Throttle function
 56 |  * @param {Function} fn - Function to throttle
 57 |  * @param {number} limit - Limit in ms
 58 |  * @returns {Function} Throttled function
 59 |  */
 60 | export function throttle(fn, limit) {
 61 |   let inThrottle;
 62 |   return (...args) => {
 63 |     if (!inThrottle) {
 64 |       fn(...args);
 65 |       inThrottle = true;
 66 |       setTimeout(() => inThrottle = false, limit);
 67 |     }
 68 |   };
 69 | }
 70 | 
 71 | /**
 72 |  * Deep clone an object
 73 |  * @param {any} obj - Object to clone
 74 |  * @returns {any} Cloned object
 75 |  */
 76 | export function deepClone(obj) {
 77 |   return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(obj));
 78 | }
 79 | 
 80 | /**
 81 |  * Pick specific keys from object
 82 |  * @param {Object} obj - Source object
 83 |  * @param {string[]} keys - Keys to pick
 84 |  * @returns {Object} New object with picked keys
 85 |  */
 86 | export function pick(obj, keys) {
 87 |   return keys.reduce((acc, key) => {
 88 |     if (key in obj) {
 89 |       acc[key] = obj[key];
 90 |     }
 91 |     return acc;
 92 |   }, {});
 93 | }
 94 | 
 95 | /**
 96 |  * Omit specific keys from object
 97 |  * @param {Object} obj - Source object
 98 |  * @param {string[]} keys - Keys to omit
 99 |  * @returns {Object} New object without omitted keys
100 |  */
101 | export function omit(obj, keys) {
102 |   const result = { ...obj };
103 |   keys.forEach(key => delete result[key]);
104 |   return result;
105 | }
106 | 
107 | /**
108 |  * Check if object is empty
109 |  * @param {Object} obj - Object to check
110 |  * @returns {boolean} True if empty
111 |  */
112 | export function isEmpty(obj) {
113 |   if (obj == null) return true;
114 |   if (Array.isArray(obj) || typeof obj === 'string') return obj.length === 0;
115 |   return Object.keys(obj).length === 0;
116 | }
117 | 
118 | /**
119 |  * Generate random string
120 |  * @param {number} length - Length of string
121 |  * @returns {string} Random string
122 |  */
123 | export function randomString(length = 10) {
124 |   const chars = 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789';
125 |   let result = '';
126 |   for (let i = 0; i < length; i++) {
127 |     result += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * chars.length));
128 |   }
129 |   return result;
130 | }
131 | 
132 | /**
133 |  * Format bytes to human readable
134 |  * @param {number} bytes - Bytes to format
135 |  * @returns {string} Formatted string
136 |  */
137 | export function formatBytes(bytes) {
138 |   if (bytes === 0) return '0 Bytes';
139 |   const k = 1024;
140 |   const sizes = ['Bytes', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB'];
141 |   const i = Math.floor(Math.log(bytes) / Math.log(k));
142 |   return parseFloat((bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(2)) + ' ' + sizes[i];
143 | }
144 | 
145 | /**
146 |  * Format duration in ms to human readable
147 |  * @param {number} ms - Duration in ms
148 |  * @returns {string} Formatted string
149 |  */
150 | export function formatDuration(ms) {
151 |   if (ms < 1000) return `${ms}ms`;
152 |   if (ms < 60000) return `${(ms / 1000).toFixed(1)}s`;
153 |   return `${(ms / 60000).toFixed(1)}m`;
154 | }
155 | 
156 | /**
157 |  * Parse query string to object
158 |  * @param {string} query - Query string
159 |  * @returns {Object} Parsed object
160 |  */
161 | export function parseQuery(query) {
162 |   if (!query) return {};
163 |   const params = new URLSearchParams(query);
164 |   const result = {};
165 |   for (const [key, value] of params) {
166 |     result[key] = value;
167 |   }
168 |   return result;
169 | }
170 | 
171 | /**
172 |  * Build query string from object
173 |  * @param {Object} params - Parameters object
174 |  * @returns {string} Query string
175 |  */
176 | export function buildQuery(params) {
177 |   const searchParams = new URLSearchParams();
178 |   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(params)) {
179 |     if (value !== undefined && value !== null) {
180 |       searchParams.append(key, String(value));
181 |     }
182 |   }
183 |   return searchParams.toString();
184 | }
185 | 
186 | /**
187 |  * Safe JSON parse
188 |  * @param {string} str - String to parse
189 |  * @param {any} defaultValue - Default value on error
190 |  * @returns {any} Parsed value or default
191 |  */
192 | export function safeJSONParse(str, defaultValue = null) {
193 |   try {
194 |     return JSON.parse(str);
195 |   } catch {
196 |     return defaultValue;
197 |   }
198 | }
199 | 
200 | /**
201 |  * Chunk array into smaller arrays
202 |  * @param {Array} array - Array to chunk
203 |  * @param {number} size - Chunk size
204 |  * @returns {Array[]} Chunked arrays
205 |  */
206 | export function chunk(array, size) {
207 |   const chunks = [];
208 |   for (let i = 0; i < array.length; i += size) {
209 |     chunks.push(array.slice(i, i + size));
210 |   }
211 |   return chunks;
212 | }
213 | 
214 | /**
215 |  * Unique array by key
216 |  * @param {Array} array - Array to dedupe
217 |  * @param {string} key - Key to check uniqueness
218 |  * @returns {Array} Deduplicated array
219 |  */
220 | export function uniqueBy(array, key) {
221 |   const seen = new Set();
222 |   return array.filter(item => {
223 |     const val = item[key];
224 |     if (seen.has(val)) return false;
225 |     seen.add(val);
226 |     return true;
227 |   });
228 | }
229 | 
230 | export default {
231 |   sleep,
232 |   retry,
233 |   debounce,
234 |   throttle,
235 |   deepClone,
236 |   pick,
237 |   omit,
238 |   isEmpty,
239 |   randomString,
240 |   formatBytes,
241 |   formatDuration,
242 |   parseQuery,
243 |   buildQuery,
244 |   safeJSONParse,
245 |   chunk,
246 |   uniqueBy,
247 | };
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/utils/logger.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/utils/logger.js`

```js
 1 | const LOG_LEVELS = {
 2 |   error: 0,
 3 |   warn: 1,
 4 |   info: 2,
 5 |   debug: 3,
 6 | };
 7 | 
 8 | const isProduction = process.env.NODE_ENV === "production";
 9 | 
10 | class Logger {
11 |   constructor() {
12 |     this.minLevel = isProduction ? "error" : "debug";
13 |   }
14 | 
15 |   shouldLog(level) {
16 |     return LOG_LEVELS[level] <= LOG_LEVELS[this.minLevel];
17 |   }
18 | 
19 |   formatEntry(level, message, context = {}) {
20 |     const entry = {
21 |       level,
22 |       message,
23 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
24 |       environment: process.env.NODE_ENV || "development",
25 |       ...context,
26 |     };
27 |     return JSON.stringify(entry);
28 |   }
29 | 
30 |   log(level, message, context = {}) {
31 |     if (!this.shouldLog(level)) return;
32 | 
33 |     const formatted = this.formatEntry(level, message, context);
34 | 
35 |     if (level === "error" || level === "warn") {
36 |       console.error(formatted);
37 |     } else {
38 |       console.log(formatted);
39 |     }
40 |   }
41 | 
42 |   error(message, context = {}) {
43 |     this.log("error", message, context);
44 |   }
45 | 
46 |   warn(message, context = {}) {
47 |     this.log("warn", message, context);
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   info(message, context = {}) {
51 |     this.log("info", message, context);
52 |   }
53 | 
54 |   debug(message, context = {}) {
55 |     this.log("debug", message, context);
56 |   }
57 | 
58 |   logRequest(method, pathname, statusCode, duration, error = null) {
59 |     const context = {
60 |       request: { method, pathname },
61 |       response: { statusCode, duration },
62 |     };
63 | 
64 |     if (error) {
65 |       this.error(`Request failed: ${method} ${pathname}`, {
66 |         ...context,
67 |         error: { message: error.message, stack: error.stack },
68 |       });
69 |     } else if (statusCode >= 400) {
70 |       this.warn(`Request error: ${method} ${pathname}`, context);
71 |     } else {
72 |       this.info(`Request: ${method} ${pathname}`, context);
73 |     }
74 |   }
75 | }
76 | 
77 | const logger = new Logger();
78 | export default logger;
79 | export { Logger };
```

### FILE: apps/backend/src/utils/response-utils.js

```js
  1 | // Response utility functions
  2 | import { CONTENT_TYPES } from '../config/constants.js';
  3 | 
  4 | /**
  5 |  * Send JSON response
  6 |  */
  7 | export function sendJson(response, statusCode, payload) {
  8 |   const jsonString = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
  9 |   
 10 |   response.writeHead(statusCode, {
 11 |     'Content-Type': `${CONTENT_TYPES.JSON}; charset=utf-8`,
 12 |     'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(jsonString, 'utf8'),
 13 |     'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
 14 |     'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff'
 15 |   });
 16 |   
 17 |   response.end(jsonString);
 18 | }
 19 | 
 20 | /**
 21 |  * Send success response
 22 |  */
 23 | export function sendSuccess(response, data = null, message = 'Success') {
 24 |   const payload = {
 25 |     success: true,
 26 |     data,
 27 |     message,
 28 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
 29 |   };
 30 |   
 31 |   sendJson(response, 200, payload);
 32 | }
 33 | 
 34 | /**
 35 |  * Send created response (201)
 36 |  */
 37 | export function sendCreated(response, data = null, message = 'Created') {
 38 |   const payload = {
 39 |     success: true,
 40 |     data,
 41 |     message,
 42 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
 43 |   };
 44 | 
 45 |   sendJson(response, 201, payload);
 46 | }
 47 | 
 48 | /**
 49 |  * Send error response
 50 |  */
 51 | export function sendError(response, statusCode, message, errorCode = null) {
 52 |   const payload = {
 53 |     success: false,
 54 |     error: {
 55 |       message,
 56 |       code: errorCode,
 57 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
 58 |     }
 59 |   };
 60 |   
 61 |   sendJson(response, statusCode, payload);
 62 | }
 63 | 
 64 | /**
 65 |  * Send paginated response
 66 |  */
 67 | export function sendPaginated(response, data, pagination, message = 'Success') {
 68 |   const payload = {
 69 |     success: true,
 70 |     data,
 71 |     pagination: {
 72 |       page: pagination.page || 1,
 73 |       limit: pagination.limit || 10,
 74 |       total: pagination.total || 0,
 75 |       totalPages: Math.ceil(pagination.total / (pagination.limit || 10)),
 76 |       hasNext: pagination.hasNext || false,
 77 |       hasPrev: pagination.hasPrev || false
 78 |     },
 79 |     message,
 80 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
 81 |   };
 82 |   
 83 |   sendJson(response, 200, payload);
 84 | }
 85 | 
 86 | /**
 87 |  * Send file response
 88 |  */
 89 | export function sendFile(response, filePath, contentType, fileName = null) {
 90 |   const fs = require('fs');
 91 |   const path = require('path');
 92 |   
 93 |   try {
 94 |     const fileContent = fs.readFileSync(filePath);
 95 |     const baseName = fileName || path.basename(filePath);
 96 |     
 97 |     response.writeHead(200, {
 98 |       'Content-Type': contentType,
 99 |       'Content-Length': fileContent.length,
100 |       'Content-Disposition': `attachment; filename="${baseName}"`,
101 |       'Cache-Control': 'no-cache'
102 |     });
103 |     
104 |     response.end(fileContent);
105 |   } catch (error) {
106 |     sendError(response, 500, 'File not found or cannot be read', 'FILE_ERROR');
107 |   }
108 | }
109 | 
110 | /**
111 |  * Send stream response
112 |  */
113 | export function sendStream(response, stream, contentType = CONTENT_TYPES.JSON) {
114 |   response.writeHead(200, {
115 |     'Content-Type': contentType,
116 |     'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked',
117 |     'Cache-Control': 'no-cache'
118 |   });
119 |   
120 |   stream.pipe(response);
121 |   
122 |   stream.on('error', (error) => {
123 |     console.error('Stream error:', error);
124 |     if (!response.headersSent) {
125 |       sendError(response, 500, 'Stream error', 'STREAM_ERROR');
126 |     }
127 |   });
128 | }
129 | 
130 | /**
131 |  * Send SSE (Server-Sent Events) response
132 |  */
133 | export function sendSSE(response) {
134 |   response.writeHead(200, {
135 |     'Content-Type': 'text/event-stream',
136 |     'Cache-Control': 'no-cache',
137 |     'Connection': 'keep-alive',
138 |     'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
139 |   });
140 |   
141 |   return {
142 |     send: (data, event = null) => {
143 |       let message = '';
144 |       if (event) message += `event: ${event}\n`;
145 |       message += `data: ${JSON.stringify(data)}\n\n`;
146 |       response.write(message);
147 |     },
148 |     
149 |     close: () => {
150 |       response.end();
151 |     }
152 |   };
153 | }
154 | 
155 | /**
156 |  * Send redirect response
157 |  */
158 | export function sendRedirect(response, location, statusCode = 302) {
159 |   response.writeHead(statusCode, {
160 |     'Location': location,
161 |     'Content-Type': CONTENT_TYPES.TEXT
162 |   });
163 |   
164 |   response.end(`Redirecting to ${location}`);
165 | }
166 | 
167 | /**
168 |  * Send no content response
169 |  */
170 | export function sendNoContent(response, statusCode = 204) {
171 |   response.writeHead(statusCode, {
172 |     'Content-Length': '0'
173 |   });
174 |   
175 |   response.end();
176 | }
177 | 
178 | /**
179 |  * Send CORS preflight response
180 |  */
181 | export function sendPreflight(response) {
182 |   response.writeHead(204, {
183 |     'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
184 |     'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH',
185 |     'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With',
186 |     'Access-Control-Max-Age': '86400'
187 |   });
188 |   
189 |   response.end();
190 | }
191 | 
192 | /**
193 |  * Send health check response
194 |  */
195 | export function sendHealth(response, status = 'healthy', details = {}) {
196 |   const payload = {
197 |     status,
198 |     timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
199 |     uptime: process.uptime(),
200 |     version: process.env.npm_package_version || '1.0.0',
201 |     environment: process.env.NODE_ENV || 'development',
202 |     ...details
203 |   };
204 |   
205 |   const statusCode = status === 'healthy' ? 200 : 503;
206 |   sendJson(response, statusCode, payload);
207 | }
208 | 
209 | /**
210 |  * Send AI provider status response
211 |  */
212 | export function sendAIStatus(response, providers) {
213 |   const payload = {
214 |     success: true,
215 |     data: {
216 |       providers,
217 |       activeProvider: providers.find(p => p.available)?.name || null,
218 |       totalProviders: providers.length,
219 |       availableProviders: providers.filter(p => p.available).length,
220 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
221 |     }
222 |   };
223 |   
224 |   sendJson(response, 200, payload);
225 | }
226 | 
227 | /**
228 |  * Send validation error response
229 |  */
230 | export function sendValidationError(response, errors) {
231 |   const payload = {
232 |     success: false,
233 |     error: {
234 |       code: 'VALIDATION_ERROR',
235 |       message: 'Validation failed',
236 |       details: errors,
237 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
238 |     }
239 |   };
240 |   
241 |   sendJson(response, 400, payload);
242 | }
243 | 
244 | /**
245 |  * Send rate limit response
246 |  */
247 | export function sendRateLimit(response, retryAfter = null) {
248 |   const headers = {
249 |     'Content-Type': CONTENT_TYPES.JSON,
250 |     'X-RateLimit-Limit': '100',
251 |     'X-RateLimit-Remaining': '0',
252 |     'X-RateLimit-Reset': Math.ceil(Date.now() / 1000 + 3600).toString()
253 |   };
254 |   
255 |   if (retryAfter) {
256 |     headers['Retry-After'] = retryAfter.toString();
257 |   }
258 |   
259 |   const payload = {
260 |     success: false,
261 |     error: {
262 |       code: 'RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED',
263 |       message: 'Too many requests',
264 |       retryAfter: retryAfter || 3600,
265 |       timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
266 |     }
267 |   };
268 |   
269 |   response.writeHead(429, headers);
270 |   response.end(JSON.stringify(payload));
271 | }
272 | 
273 | export default {
274 |   sendJson,
275 |   sendSuccess,
276 |   sendCreated,
277 |   sendError,
278 |   sendPaginated,
279 |   sendFile,
280 |   sendStream,
281 |   sendSSE,
282 |   sendRedirect,
283 |   sendNoContent,
284 |   sendPreflight,
285 |   sendHealth,
286 |   sendAIStatus,
287 |   sendValidationError,
288 |   sendRateLimit
289 | };
290 |
```
