### FILE: apps/backend/src/utils/schema-extractor.js

Source path: `apps/backend/src/utils/schema-extractor.js`

```js
  1 | /**
  2 |  * Schema extraction utilities for AI interactions
  3 |  * Ensures only schema information (not actual data) is sent to AI services
  4 |  */
  5 | 
  6 | /**
  7 |  * Extract schema information for AI analysis
  8 |  */
  9 | export const extractSchemaForAI = (dataset, schema) => {
 10 |   // Classify columns properly
 11 |   const columns = (schema.columns || []).map(col => {
 12 |     const name = col.name || '';
 13 |     const type = col.type || 'string';
 14 |     
 15 |     let role = col.role || 'dimension';
 16 |     
 17 |     // Better classification for common column patterns
 18 |     if (type === 'number' || type === 'integer') {
 19 |       const lowerName = name.toLowerCase();
 20 |       if (lowerName.includes('salary') || 
 21 |           lowerName.includes('experience') ||
 22 |           lowerName.includes('revenue') ||
 23 |           lowerName.includes('amount') ||
 24 |           lowerName.includes('count') ||
 25 |           lowerName.includes('bonus') ||
 26 |           lowerName.includes('pay') ||
 27 |           lowerName.includes('cost') ||
 28 |           lowerName.includes('age')) {
 29 |         role = 'metric';
 30 |       } else if (lowerName.includes('id') || 
 31 |                  lowerName.includes('row') || 
 32 |                  lowerName.includes('index') ||
 33 |                  lowerName.includes('_id')) {
 34 |         role = 'excluded';
 35 |       }
 36 |     }
 37 |     
 38 |     return {
 39 |       name: col.name,
 40 |       type: col.type,
 41 |       role: role,
 42 |       sampleValues: col.sample ? Array.isArray(col.sample) ? col.sample.slice(0, 3) : [col.sample] : []
 43 |     };
 44 |   });
 45 | 
 46 |   return {
 47 |     dataset: {
 48 |       name: dataset.name,
 49 |       rowCount: dataset.rowCount || dataset.rows?.length || 0,
 50 |       columnCount: columns.length,
 51 |     },
 52 |     schema: {
 53 |       columns: columns,
 54 |       primaryDimension: columns.find(col => col.role === 'dimension'),
 55 |       secondaryDimension: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'dimension')[1] || null,
 56 |       primaryMetric: columns.find(col => col.role === 'metric'),
 57 |       secondaryMetric: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'metric')[1] || null,
 58 |     },
 59 |     dataSummary: {
 60 |       totalRows: dataset.rowCount || dataset.rows?.length || 0,
 61 |       totalColumns: columns.length,
 62 |       metrics: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'metric').map(c => c.name),
 63 |       dimensions: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'dimension').map(c => c.name),
 64 |       excluded: columns.filter(col => col.role === 'excluded').map(c => c.name),
 65 |     }
 66 |   };
 67 | };
 68 | 
 69 | export const sanitizeQueryContext = (context) => {
 70 |   // Remove any actual data rows from context
 71 |   const sanitized = { ...context };
 72 |   
 73 |   if (sanitized.dataset && sanitized.dataset.rows) {
 74 |     delete sanitized.dataset.rows;
 75 |   }
 76 |   
 77 |   if (sanitized.analyticsDataset && sanitized.analyticsDataset.rows) {
 78 |     delete sanitized.analyticsDataset.rows;
 79 |   }
 80 |   
 81 |   // Ensure we only have schema information
 82 |   if (sanitized.schema && sanitized.dataset) {
 83 |     sanitized.schemaOnly = extractSchemaForAI(sanitized.dataset, sanitized.schema);
 84 |   }
 85 |   
 86 |   return sanitized;
 87 | };
 88 | 
 89 | /**
 90 |  * Build schema-only prompt with better guidance for HR data
 91 |  */
 92 | export const buildSchemaOnlyPrompt = (query, schemaInfo) => {
 93 |   const { dataset, schema, dataSummary } = schemaInfo;
 94 |   
 95 |   const metrics = dataSummary.metrics || [];
 96 |   const dimensions = dataSummary.dimensions || [];
 97 |   const excluded = dataSummary.excluded || [];
 98 |   
 99 |   let prompt = `You are analyzing a dataset using SCHEMA-ONLY information. You do NOT have access to actual data values.
100 | 
101 | Dataset Information:
102 | - Name: ${dataset.name}
103 | - Total Rows: ${dataset.rowCount || 0}
104 | - Total Columns: ${dataset.columnCount || 0}
105 | 
106 | SCHEMA CLASSIFICATION:
107 | `;
108 |   
109 |   if (metrics.length > 0) {
110 |     prompt += `\nMETRIC COLUMNS (use for aggregation - SUM, AVG, COUNT, MIN, MAX):
111 | ${metrics.map(m => `  - ${m}`).join('\n')}`;
112 |   }
113 |   
114 |   if (dimensions.length > 0) {
115 |     prompt += `\nDIMENSION COLUMNS (use for grouping - GROUP BY):
116 | ${dimensions.map(d => `  - ${d}`).join('\n')}`;
117 |   }
118 |   
119 |   if (excluded.length > 0) {
120 |     prompt += `\nEXCLUDED COLUMNS (do NOT use in charts or queries):
121 | ${excluded.map(e => `  - ${e}`).join('\n')}`;
122 |   }
123 | 
124 |   prompt += `
125 | 
126 | COMMON ANALYSIS PATTERNS:
127 | - "Salary by country" → SELECT country, AVG(salary_usd) FROM data GROUP BY country
128 | - "Top experience levels" → SELECT country, MAX(experience) FROM data GROUP BY country
129 | - "Education distribution" → SELECT education, COUNT(*) FROM data GROUP BY education
130 | 
131 | CHART TYPE GUIDANCE:
132 | - bar: comparing values across categories (salary by country)
133 | - line: trends over time or sequence (if time/date column exists)
134 | - pie: proportions of a whole (education breakdown)
135 | - scatter: correlation between two numeric values (experience vs salary)
136 | 
137 | IMPORTANT RULES:
138 | 1. NEVER use excluded columns (id, row_id, index) in queries or charts
139 | 2. Only reference columns that exist in the schema above
140 | 3. Numeric columns are for metrics, string columns are for dimensions
141 | 4. Always match column names exactly (case-sensitive)
142 | 
143 | User Query: ${query}
144 | 
145 | Provide a helpful response with appropriate SQL query and chart suggestion.`;
146 | 
147 |   return prompt;
148 | };
149 | 
150 | export const validateSchemaOnlyContext = (context) => {
151 |   // Ensure no actual data is being sent to AI
152 |   const forbiddenKeys = ['rows', 'data', 'actualData', 'realData'];
153 |   const violations = [];
154 |   
155 |   const checkObject = (obj, path = '') => {
156 |     if (typeof obj !== 'object' || obj === null) return;
157 |     
158 |     for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(obj)) {
159 |       const currentPath = path ? `${path}.${key}` : key;
160 |       
161 |       if (forbiddenKeys.includes(key.toLowerCase())) {
162 |         violations.push(`Found potential data at path: ${currentPath}`);
163 |       }
164 |       
165 |       if (Array.isArray(value) && key.toLowerCase().includes('row')) {
166 |         violations.push(`Found potential row data at path: ${currentPath}`);
167 |       }
168 |       
169 |       if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
170 |         checkObject(value, currentPath);
171 |       }
172 |     }
173 |   };
174 |   
175 |   checkObject(context);
176 |   
177 |   return {
178 |     isValid: violations.length === 0,
179 |     violations,
180 |   };
181 | };
182 | 
```

```md
  1 | # 🎯 InsightFlow Backend - New Optimized Folder Structure
  2 | 
  3 | ## 📊 Architecture Overview
  4 | 
  5 | The backend has been reorganized into a **domain-driven, modular architecture** that separates concerns clearly and enables easy scaling.
  6 | 
  7 | ## 🏗️ Structure
  8 | 
  9 | ```
 10 | apps/backend/
 11 | ├── src/
 12 | │   ├── config/              # Configuration Layer
 13 | │   │   ├── environment.js   # Environment variables & validation
 14 | │   │   ├── constants.js     # Application constants
 15 | │   │   └── gemini-config.js # Gemini-specific config
 16 | │   │
 17 | │   ├── core/                # Server Core
 18 | │   │   └── server.js        # HTTP server setup & lifecycle
 19 | │   │
 20 | │   ├── database/            # Data Persistence Layer
 21 | │   │   └── dataset-repository.js
 22 | │   │
 23 | │   ├── services/            # Business Logic Layer
 24 | │   │   ├── ai/              # AI & LLM Integration
 25 | │   │   │   ├── ai-manager.js           # Master orchestrator
 26 | │   │   │   ├── providers/              # AI Provider implementations
 27 | │   │   │   │   ├── ollama-provider.js  # Llama 3.2 & NeuralChat 7B
 28 | │   │   │   │   ├── gemini-provider.js  # Google Gemini
 29 | │   │   │   │   ├── openai-provider.js  # OpenAI GPT-4
 30 | │   │   │   │   └── anthropic-provider.js # Anthropic Claude
 31 | │   │   │   └── utils/                 # AI utilities
 32 | │   │   │       ├── prompt-templates.js
 33 | │   │   │       ├── response-parser.js

 35 | │   │   │
 36 | │   │   ├── analytics/       # Data Analysis & Insights
 37 | │   │   │   ├── analytics-service.js
 38 | │   │   │   ├── schema-detector.js
 39 | │   │   │   ├── predictive-analytics.js
 40 | │   │   │   ├── schema-ai-service.js
 41 | │   │   │   └── schema-packet-builder.js
 42 | │   │   │
 43 | │   │   ├── data/            # Data Processing & ETL
 44 | │   │   │   ├── data-merger.js
 45 | │   │   │   ├── data-sampling-service.js
 46 | │   │   │   └── data-visualization-service.js

 58 | │   │   │

100 | ```
101 | 
102 | ## 🎯 Key Components
103 | 
104 | ### 1. Configuration Layer (`src/config/`)
105 | 
106 | **Purpose**: Centralized configuration management
107 | 
108 | **Key Files**:
109 | - `environment.js` - Loads and validates environment variables
110 | - `constants.js` - Application-wide constants (HTTP status, error codes, etc.)
111 | - `gemini-config.js` - Gemini-specific configuration
112 | 
113 | **Usage**:
114 | ```javascript
115 | import config from './config/environment.js';
116 | 
117 | console.log(config.server.port); // 3001
118 | console.log(config.ollama.baseUrl); // http://localhost:11434
119 | ```
120 | 
121 | ### 2. Core Server (`src/core/`)
122 | 
123 | **Purpose**: HTTP server creation and lifecycle management
124 | 
125 | **Key Features**:
126 | - Server creation and configuration
127 | - Graceful shutdown handling
128 | - Error handling middleware setup
129 | - Route setup
130 | 
131 | **Usage**:
132 | ```javascript
133 | import { createHttpServer, startServer } from './core/server.js';
134 | 
135 | const server = createHttpServer();
136 | await startServer(server, 3001);
137 | ```
138 | 
139 | ### 3. AI Services (`src/services/ai/`)
140 | 
141 | **Purpose**: AI provider abstraction and orchestration
142 | 
143 | **Architecture**:
144 | ```
145 | ai/
146 | ├── ai-manager.js          # Master orchestrator
147 | ├── providers/             # Provider implementations
148 | │   ├── ollama-provider.js # Local LLM (Llama 3.2, NeuralChat 7B)
149 | │   ├── gemini-provider.js # Google Gemini
150 | │   ├── openai-provider.js # OpenAI GPT-4
151 | │   └── anthropic-provider.js # Anthropic Claude
152 | └── utils/                 # Helper utilities
153 |     ├── prompt-templates.js
154 |     ├── response-parser.js
155 |     └── token-counter.js
156 | ```
157 | 
158 | **Key Features**:
159 | - **Automatic Provider Selection**: Chooses best available provider
160 | - **Fallback Chain**: Ollama → Gemini → OpenAI → Anthropic
161 | - **Health Monitoring**: Real-time provider status
162 | - **Unified Interface**: Same API across all providers
163 | 
164 | **Usage**:
165 | ```javascript
166 | import { aiManager } from './services/ai/ai-manager.js';
167 | 
168 | // Generate response
169 | const response = await aiManager.generateResponse('Analyze this data...');
170 | 
171 | // Chat
172 | const chatResponse = await aiManager.chat([
173 |   { role: 'user', content: 'Hello!' }
174 | ]);
175 | 
176 | // Get health status
177 | const health = await aiManager.health();
178 | ```
179 | 
180 | ### 4. Analytics Services (`src/services/analytics/`)
181 | 
182 | **Purpose**: Data analysis and insights generation
183 | 
184 | **Key Services**:
185 | - `analytics-service.js` - Statistical analysis
186 | - `schema-detector.js` - Smart schema detection
187 | - `predictive-analytics.js` - Forecasting and predictions
188 | - `schema-ai-service.js` - AI-powered schema analysis
189 | 
190 | ### 5. Data Services (`src/services/data/`)
191 | 
192 | **Purpose**: Data processing and transformation
193 | 
194 | **Key Services**:
195 | - `data-merger.js` - Multi-dataset merging
196 | - `data-sampling-service.js` - Data sampling strategies
197 | - `data-visualization-service.js` - Visualization helpers
198 | 
199 | ### 6. Export Services (`src/services/export/`)
200 | 
201 | **Purpose**: Report and export generation
202 | 
203 | **Key Services**:
204 | - `export-service.js` - Export orchestration
205 | - `report-generator.js` - PDF/Excel/Markdown report generation
206 | 
207 | ### 7. Routes (`src/routes/`)
208 | 
209 | **Purpose**: API endpoint handlers
210 | 
211 | **Key Routes**:
212 | - `ai.js` - `/api/ai/*` endpoints
213 | - `health.js` - `/api/health` endpoint
214 | - `datasets.js` - `/api/datasets/*` endpoints
215 | - `chat.js` - `/api/datasets/:id/chat` endpoint
216 | - `analytics.js` - `/api/datasets/:id/analyze` endpoint
217 | - `export.js` - `/api/datasets/:id/export` endpoint
218 | 
219 | ### 8. Middleware (`src/middleware/`)
220 | 
221 | **Purpose**: Request/response processing pipeline
222 | 
223 | **Key Middleware**:
224 | - `error-handler.js` - Global error handling
225 | - `cors.js` - CORS configuration
226 | - `request-logger.js` - Request logging
227 | - `validation.middleware.js` - Input validation
228 | 
229 | ## 🔄 AI Provider Architecture
230 | 
231 | ### Priority Order
232 | 1. **Ollama** (Primary) - Local inference, no API keys, privacy-focused
233 | 2. **Gemini** (Fallback 1) - Google's LLM, good performance
234 | 3. **OpenAI** (Fallback 2) - GPT-4, industry standard
235 | 4. **Anthropic** (Fallback 3) - Claude, excellent reasoning
236 | 
237 | ### Fallback Flow
238 | ```
239 | Request → Ollama
240 |            ↓ (failed)
241 |          Gemini
242 |            ↓ (failed)
243 |          OpenAI
244 |            ↓ (failed)
245 |          Anthropic
246 |            ↓ (failed)
247 |          Error: All providers failed
248 | ```
249 | 
250 | ### Provider Interface
251 | All providers implement the same interface:
252 | 
253 | ```javascript
254 | class AIProvider {
255 |   async initialize() { /* ... */ }
256 |   async generate(prompt, options) { /* ... */ }
257 |   async chat(messages, options) { /* ... */ }
258 |   async health() { /* ... */ }
259 |   async isAvailable() { /* ... */ }
260 |   getCapabilities() { /* ... */ }
261 | }
262 | ```
263 | 
264 | ## 📡 API Endpoints
265 | 
266 | ### Health & Status
267 | ```
268 | GET  /                           # Root endpoint
269 | GET  /api/health                 # Health check
270 | GET  /api/ai/status              # AI provider status
271 | GET  /api/ai/models              # Available models
272 | POST /api/ai/test                # Test AI generation
273 | ```
274 | 
275 | ### Dataset Operations
276 | ```
277 | POST /api/datasets/import         # Import dataset
278 | GET  /api/datasets/:id            # Get dataset info
279 | POST /api/datasets/:id/chat       # Chat with dataset
280 | GET  /api/datasets/:id/analyze    # AI analysis
281 | GET  /api/datasets/:id/schema     # Get schema
282 | GET  /api/datasets/:id/auto-charts # Auto-generate charts
283 | ```
284 | 
285 | ### Analytics
286 | ```
287 | GET  /api/analytics/:id/correlations  # Find correlations
288 | POST /api/analytics/:id/predict       # Predictive analysis
289 | ```
290 | 
291 | ### Export
292 | ```
293 | GET  /api/export/:id/pdf          # Export as PDF
294 | GET  /api/export/:id/excel        # Export as Excel
295 | GET  /api/export/:id/markdown     # Export as Markdown
296 | ```
297 | 
298 | ## ⚙️ Configuration
299 | 
300 | ### Environment Variables
301 | 
302 | ```env
303 | # Server
304 | PORT=3001
305 | NODE_ENV=development
306 | HOST=localhost
307 | 
308 | # Ollama (Primary - Local LLM)
309 | OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434
310 | OLLAMA_ENABLED=true
311 | OLLAMA_MODEL=llama3.2
312 | OLLAMA_CHAT_MODEL=neural-chat:7b
313 | OLLAMA_TIMEOUT_MS=120000
314 | OLLAMA_MAX_TOKENS=[REDACTED_SECRET]
315 | OLLAMA_TEMPERATURE=0.7
316 | 
317 | # Google Gemini (Fallback 1)
318 | GOOGLE_API_KEY=[REDACTED_SECRET]
319 | 
320 | # OpenAI (Fallback 2)
321 | OPENAI_API_KEY=[REDACTED_SECRET]
322 | 
323 | # Anthropic (Fallback 3)
324 | ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=[REDACTED_SECRET]
325 | 
326 | # AI Settings
327 | AI_PROVIDER_PRIORITY=ollama,gemini,openai,anthropic
328 | ENABLE_AI_FALLBACK=true
329 | LOCAL_AI_ONLY=false
330 | AI_TIMEOUT_MS=120000
331 | AI_MAX_TOKENS=[REDACTED_SECRET]
332 | AI_TEMPERATURE=0.7
333 | 
334 | # Database
335 | DATABASE_PATH=./data/insightflow.db
336 | DATA_DIR=./data
337 | 
338 | # CORS
339 | CORS_ORIGIN=*
340 | CORS_CREDENTIALS=false
341 | 
342 | # Logging
343 | LOG_LEVEL=info
344 | VERBOSE_LOGGING=true
345 | 
346 | # Features
347 | LOCAL_NLP_ENABLED=true
348 | AUTO_CHART_GENERATION=true
349 | CORRELATION_ANALYSIS=true
350 | OUTLIER_DETECTION=true
351 | CHAT_HISTORY_ENABLED=true
352 | SMARTCHART_ENABLED=true
353 | ```
354 | 
355 | ## 🚀 Getting Started
356 | 
357 | ### 1. Install Dependencies
358 | ```bash
359 | cd apps/backend
360 | npm install
361 | ```
362 | 
363 | ### 2. Configure Environment
364 | ```bash
365 | cp .env.example .env
366 | # Edit .env with your settings
367 | ```
368 | 
369 | ### 3. Start Ollama (in separate terminal)
370 | ```bash
371 | ollama serve
372 | ollama pull llama3.2
373 | ollama pull neural-chat:7b
374 | ```
375 | 
376 | ### 4. Start Backend
377 | ```bash
378 | npm run dev
379 | ```
380 | 
381 | ### 5. Test
382 | ```bash
383 | curl http://localhost:3001/api/health
384 | curl http://localhost:3001/api/ai/status
385 | ```
386 | 
387 | ## 📈 Benefits
388 | 
389 | | Aspect | Benefit |
390 | |--------|---------|
391 | | **Scalability** | Easy to add new providers or services |
392 | | **Maintainability** | Clear file hierarchy, easy to find code |
393 | | **Testability** | Modular structure enables unit testing |
394 | | **Performance** | Better tree-shaking in production builds |
395 | | **Debugging** | Clear stack traces and error context |
396 | | **Onboarding** | New developers can understand structure quickly |
397 | | **Flexibility** | Easy to swap implementations (e.g., AI providers) |
398 | | **Encapsulation** | Services are self-contained |
399 | 
400 | ## 🎓 Adding New Features
401 | 
402 | ### Add a New AI Provider
403 | 
404 | 1. Create `src/services/ai/providers/newprovider-provider.js`
405 | 2. Implement the provider interface
406 | 3. Add to `ai-manager.js` provider list
407 | 4. Update `.env` with config
408 | 5. Done! Automatic fallback support
409 | 
410 | ### Add a New Service
411 | 
412 | 1. Create in appropriate `src/services/` subdirectory
413 | 2. Follow existing patterns
414 | 3. Export as default or named export
415 | 4. Import in routes as needed
416 | 
417 | ### Add a New Route
418 | 
419 | 1. Create handler in `src/routes/`
420 | 2. Import in `src/routes/index.js`
421 | 3. Add to route setup function
422 | 
423 | ## ✅ Status
424 | 
425 | - ✅ Configuration Layer: **COMPLETE**
426 | - ✅ Core Server: **COMPLETE**
427 | - ✅ AI Services: **COMPLETE**
428 | - ✅ Routes: **COMPLETE**
429 | - ✅ Middleware: **COMPLETE**
430 | - ✅ Utilities: **COMPLETE**
431 | - 🟡 Service Migration: **IN PROGRESS**
432 | 
433 | ## 📝 Next Steps
434 | 
435 | 1. Move remaining services to proper directories
436 | 2. Update import statements in moved files
437 | 3. Remove old/duplicate files
438 | 4. Add unit tests
439 | 5. Add integration tests
440 | 6. Set up CI/CD pipeline
441 | 
442 | ## 📞 Support
443 | 
444 | If you encounter issues:
445 | 
446 | 1. Check `MIGRATION_GUIDE.md` for detailed instructions
447 | 2. Verify your `.env` configuration
448 | 3. Check logs for specific error messages
449 | 4. Test individual components in isolation
450 | 
451 | ---
452 | 
453 | **Last Updated**: 2026-05-09
454 | **Version**: 2.0.0
455 | **Status**: Production Ready (after migration completion)
456 | 
```

```js
 1 | import path from "node:path";
 2 | import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
 3 | import dotenv from "dotenv";
 4 | import { GoogleGenerativeAI } from "@google/generative-ai";
 5 | 
 6 | const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
 7 | const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
 8 | dotenv.config({ path: path.resolve(__dirname, "../../.env") });
 9 | 
10 | const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY;
11 | 
12 | if (!apiKey) {
13 |   console.error("❌ GEMINI_API_KEY not set");
14 |   process.exit(1);
15 | }
16 | 
17 | console.log(`✅ API Key found: ${apiKey.slice(0, 10)}...`);
18 | 
19 | const genAI = new GoogleGenerativeAI(apiKey);
20 | const model = genAI.getGenerativeModel({
21 |   model: "gemini-flash-latest",
22 |   generationConfig: {
23 |     maxOutputTokens: [REDACTED_SECRET],
24 |   },
25 | });
26 | 
27 | try {
28 |   console.log("[test] Calling Gemini API...");
29 |   const response = await model.generateContent("What is 2+2?");
30 |   console.log("[test] ✅ Response received:");
31 |   console.log(response.response.text());
32 | } catch (error) {
33 |   console.error("[test] ❌ Error:", error.message);
34 |   process.exit(1);
35 | }
36 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/README.md

Source path: `apps/frontend/README.md`

```md
 1 | # Frontend Structure
 2 | 
 3 | Path: `apps/frontend`
 4 | 
 5 | Local development runs on port `5173`. API requests should use relative `/api/*`
 6 | paths so Vite can proxy them to the backend on port `3001`.
 7 | 
 8 | ## Key Folders
 9 | 
10 | ```text
11 | public/                       Static assets
12 | src/
13 |   app/                        App bootstrap, router, providers
14 |   features/                   Dashboard, chat, data flows
15 |   shared/components/          Shared UI primitives and navigation
16 |   shared/hooks/               Reusable hooks
17 |   shared/layout/              App shell layout
18 |   shared/lib/                 Shared utility helpers
19 |   test/                       Vitest tests and setup
20 | ```
21 | 
22 | ## Placement Rules
23 | 
24 | - Put route wiring and providers in `src/app`.
25 | - Put domain-specific screens and logic in `src/features`.
26 | - Put reusable primitives and helpers in `src/shared`.
27 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/__tests__/ChatInterfaceCommands.test.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/__tests__/ChatInterfaceCommands.test.ts`

```ts
 1 | import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
 2 | import { localCommand } from "@/features/chat/components/ChatInterface";
 3 | 
 4 | const rows = [
 5 |   { country: "India", salary_usd: 50000, experience: 2 },
 6 |   { country: "USA", salary_usd: 90000, experience: 5 },
 7 |   { country: "India", salary_usd: 65000, experience: 3 },
 8 |   { country: "Canada", salary_usd: 120000, experience: 8 },
 9 | ];
10 | 
11 | describe("ChatInterface local command options", () => {
12 |   it("turns a bare numeric threshold into a useful metric answer", () => {
13 |     const command = localCommand("75000", rows);
14 | 
15 |     expect(command).toMatchObject({
16 |       action: "ANSWER",
17 |       schemaOnly: true,
18 |     });
19 |     expect(command?.message).toContain("2 rows");
20 |     expect(command?.message).toContain("Salary Usd");
21 |     expect(command?.message).toContain("75,000");
22 |   });
23 | 
24 |   it("maps generic chart options to a schema-aware chart", () => {
25 |     const command = localCommand("Generate Chart", rows);
26 | 
27 |     expect(command).toMatchObject({
28 |       action: "GENERATE_CHART",
29 |       chartSpec: {
30 |         type: "bar",
31 |         xKey: "country",
32 |         yKey: "salary_usd",
33 |         aggregation: "avg",
34 |       },
35 |     });
36 |   });
37 | 
38 |   it("answers data quality option prompts locally", () => {
39 |     const command = localCommand("Explain data quality", rows);
40 | 
41 |     expect(command).toMatchObject({
42 |       action: "ANSWER",
43 |       schemaOnly: true,
44 |     });
45 |     expect(command?.message).toContain("Data quality");
46 |     expect(command?.message).toContain("Completeness");
47 |   });
48 | });
49 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/__tests__/dataUploadFlow.test.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/__tests__/dataUploadFlow.test.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from "@testing-library/react";
 2 | import { describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
 3 | import UploadPage from "@/features/data/pages/UploadPage";
 4 | 
 5 | const uploadFiles = vi.fn(async () => undefined);
 6 | const navigate = vi.fn();
 7 | 
 8 | vi.mock("react-router-dom", async () => {
 9 |   const actual = await vi.importActual<typeof import("react-router-dom")>("react-router-dom");
10 |   return { ...actual, useNavigate: () => navigate };
11 | });
12 | 
13 | vi.mock("@/features/data/context/useData", () => ({
14 |   useData: () => ({
15 |     dataset: null,
16 |     analysis: null,
17 |     loadDemo: vi.fn(),
18 |     deleteDataset: vi.fn(),
19 |     uploadFiles,
20 |     retryHydrate: vi.fn(),
21 |     isProcessing: false,
22 |   }),
23 | }));
24 | 
25 | vi.mock("@/features/data/api/dataApi", () => ({
26 |   api: {
27 |     generateQRSession: vi.fn(async () => ({
28 |       sessionId: "qr-1",
29 |       uploadToken: [REDACTED_SECRET],
30 |       uploadUrl: "http://localhost/mobile-upload/qr-1",
31 |       qrDataUrl: "data:image/png;base64,abc",
32 |       workspaceName: "InsightFlow Workspace",
33 |       status: "waiting",
34 |       expiresAt: new Date().toISOString(),
35 |     })),
36 |     getQRSessionStatus: vi.fn(async () => ({
37 |       sessionId: "qr-1",
38 |       status: "waiting",
39 |       workspaceName: "InsightFlow Workspace",
40 |       files: [],
41 |       expiresAt: new Date().toISOString(),
42 |     })),
43 |   },
44 | }));
45 | 
46 | describe("upload/data flow", () => {
47 |   it("uploads a selected CSV file through the data context", async () => {
48 |     uploadFiles.mockClear();
49 |     navigate.mockClear();
50 |     render(<UploadPage />);
51 | 
52 |     const file = new File(["country,salary_usd\nIndia,50000"], "salary.csv", { type: "text/csv" });
53 |     const input = document.querySelector('input[type="file"]:not([multiple])') as HTMLInputElement;
54 | 
55 |     fireEvent.change(input, { target: { files: [file] } });
56 | 
57 |     await waitFor(() => expect(uploadFiles).toHaveBeenCalledWith([file]));
58 |     await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByText(/schema validation completed/i)).toBeInTheDocument());
59 |     expect(navigate).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
60 |     expect(screen.getByText(/Upload Data/)).toBeInTheDocument();
61 |   });
62 | });
63 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/__tests__/SchemaDashboardChat.test.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/__tests__/SchemaDashboardChat.test.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { fireEvent, render, screen, waitFor } from "@testing-library/react";
 2 | import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
 3 | import SchemaDashboardChat from "@/features/dashboard/components/SchemaDashboardChat";
 4 | import { api } from "@/features/data/api/dataApi";
 5 | 
 6 | vi.mock("@/features/data/api/dataApi", () => ({
 7 |   api: {
 8 |     sendDashboardCommand: vi.fn(async () => ({
 9 |       action: "GENERATE_CHART",
10 |       message: "Chart generated",
11 |       schemaOnly: true,
12 |       provider: "local-rules",
13 |       chartSpec: {
14 |         type: "bar",
15 |         title: "Average Salary by Country",
16 |         xKey: "country",
17 |         yKey: "salary_usd",
18 |         aggregation: "avg",
19 |       },
20 |     })),
21 |   },
22 | }));
23 | 
24 | const dataset = {
25 |   rows: [
26 |     { country: "India", salary_usd: 50000, experience: 2 },
27 |     { country: "USA", salary_usd: 90000, experience: 5 },
28 |   ],
29 |   columns: ["country", "salary_usd", "experience"],
30 | };
31 | 
32 | describe("SchemaDashboardChat", () => {
33 |   beforeEach(() => {
34 |     vi.clearAllMocks();
35 |   });
36 | 
37 |   it("renders schema-only/provider badges and dynamic suggestions", () => {
38 |     render(<SchemaDashboardChat dataset={dataset} onCommand={vi.fn()} />);
39 | 
40 |     expect(screen.getByText("Schema-only")).toBeInTheDocument();
41 |     expect(screen.getByText(/Provider:/)).toBeInTheDocument();
42 |     expect(screen.getByRole("button", { name: /Show average .* by .*/i })).toBeInTheDocument();
43 |   });
44 | 
45 |   it("sends suggestion and manual input commands", async () => {
46 |     const onCommand = vi.fn();
47 |     const onSend = vi.fn();
48 |     render(<SchemaDashboardChat dataset={dataset} onCommand={onCommand} onSend={onSend} />);
49 | 
50 |     fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole("button", { name: /Show average .* by .*/i }));
51 |     await waitFor(() => expect(onCommand).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1));
52 |     expect(onSend).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.stringMatching(/salary/i));
53 |     expect(screen.getByText(/Chart generated/)).toBeInTheDocument();
54 |     expect(screen.getByText("Provider: local-rules")).toBeInTheDocument();
55 | 
56 |     fireEvent.change(screen.getByPlaceholderText(/Ask:/), {
57 |       target: { value: "add KPI for highest salary_usd" },
58 |     });
59 |     fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole("button", { name: /send dashboard command/i }));
60 |     await waitFor(() => expect(onCommand).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2));
61 |   });
62 | 
63 |   it("shows a loading state while command is in flight", async () => {
64 |     vi.mocked(api.sendDashboardCommand).mockImplementationOnce(async () => {
65 |       await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 50));
66 |       return {
67 |         action: "ANSWER",
68 |         message: "Chart generated",
69 |         schemaOnly: true,
70 |         provider: "local-rules",
71 |       } as any;
72 |     });
73 |     render(<SchemaDashboardChat dataset={dataset} onCommand={vi.fn()} />);
74 | 
75 |     fireEvent.change(screen.getByPlaceholderText(/Ask:/), {
76 |       target: { value: "show chart" },
77 |     });
78 |     fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole("button", { name: /send dashboard command/i }));
79 | 
80 |     expect(document.querySelector(".animate-spin")).toBeTruthy();
81 |     await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByText(/Chart generated/)).toBeInTheDocument());
82 |   });
83 | });
84 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/__tests__/schemaLocalAnalytics.test.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/__tests__/schemaLocalAnalytics.test.ts`

```ts
 1 | import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
 2 | import {
 3 |   applyDashboardFilters,
 4 |   calculateChart,
 5 |   calculateKpi,
 6 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/schemaLocalAnalytics";
 7 | 
 8 | const rows = [
 9 |   { country: "India", salary_usd: 50000, experience: 2 },
10 |   { country: "USA", salary_usd: 90000, experience: 5 },
11 |   { country: "India", salary_usd: 65000, experience: 3 },
12 |   { country: "", salary_usd: null, experience: "" },
13 | ];
14 | 
15 | describe("schema local analytics", () => {
16 |   it("calculates KPI aggregations locally", () => {
17 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Rows", metric: "__row_count__", aggregation: "count" }).value).toBe(4);
18 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Countries", metric: "country", aggregation: "count_unique" }).value).toBe(2);
19 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Salary Sum", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "sum" }).value).toBe(205000);
20 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Salary Avg", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "avg" }).value).toBeCloseTo(68333.33, 1);
21 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Min", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "min" }).value).toBe(50000);
22 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Max", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "max" }).value).toBe(90000);
23 |     expect(calculateKpi(rows, { title: "Median", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "median" }).value).toBe(65000);
24 |   });
25 | 
26 |   it("groups, histograms, scatters, and recomputes after filters", () => {
27 |     const indiaRows = applyDashboardFilters(rows, [{ key: "country", value: "India" }]);
28 |     const indiaAverage = calculateKpi(indiaRows, { title: "India Avg", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "avg" });
29 |     const countryDistribution = calculateChart(rows, {
30 |       title: "Countries",
31 |       type: "bar",
32 |       xKey: "country",
33 |       yKey: "count",
34 |       aggregation: "count",
35 |     });
36 |     const histogram = calculateChart(rows, {
37 |       title: "Salary Histogram",
38 |       type: "histogram",
39 |       xKey: "salary_usd",
40 |       yKey: "count",
41 |       aggregation: "count",
42 |       limit: 4,
43 |     });
44 |     const scatter = calculateChart(rows, {
45 |       title: "Experience vs Salary",
46 |       type: "scatter",
47 |       xKey: "experience",
48 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
49 |       aggregation: "count",
50 |     });
51 | 
52 |     expect(indiaAverage.value).toBe(57500);
53 |     expect(countryDistribution.data).toEqual(expect.arrayContaining([
54 |       expect.objectContaining({ country: "India", value: 2 }),
55 |       expect.objectContaining({ country: "USA", value: 1 }),
56 |     ]));
57 |     expect(histogram.data.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
58 |     expect(scatter.data.every((point) => typeof point.x === "number" && typeof point.y === "number")).toBe(true);
59 |   });
60 | });
61 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/app/providers/AppErrorBoundary.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/app/providers/AppErrorBoundary.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { Component, ErrorInfo, ReactNode } from "react";
 2 | import StatusPanel from "@/shared/layout/StatusPanel";
 3 | 
 4 | interface AppErrorBoundaryProps {
 5 |   children: ReactNode;
 6 | }
 7 | 
 8 | interface AppErrorBoundaryState {
 9 |   hasError: boolean;
10 |   errorMessage: string;
11 | }
12 | 
13 | class AppErrorBoundary extends Component<AppErrorBoundaryProps, AppErrorBoundaryState> {
14 |   state: AppErrorBoundaryState = {
15 |     hasError: false,
16 |     errorMessage: "",
17 |   };
18 | 
19 |   static getDerivedStateFromError(error: Error): AppErrorBoundaryState {
20 |     return {
21 |       hasError: true,
22 |       errorMessage: error.message || "The application hit an unexpected error.",
23 |     };
24 |   }
25 | 
26 |   componentDidCatch(error: Error, errorInfo: ErrorInfo) {
27 |     console.error("Application error boundary caught an error:", error, errorInfo);
28 |   }
29 | 
30 |   render() {
31 |     if (this.state.hasError) {
32 |       return (
33 |         <StatusPanel
34 |           title="Application error"
35 |           message={this.state.errorMessage}
36 |           actionLabel="Reload App"
37 |           onAction={() => window.location.reload()}
38 |         />
39 |       );
40 |     }
41 | 
42 |     return this.props.children;
43 |   }
44 | }
45 | 
46 | export default AppErrorBoundary;
47 | 
```

 2 | import AnalyticsPage from "@/features/analytics/pages/AnalyticsPage";
 3 | import ChatPage from "@/features/chat/pages/ChatPage";
 4 | import LocalChatPage from "@/features/chat/pages/LocalChatPage";
 5 | import DashboardPage from "@/features/dashboard/pages/DashboardPage";
 6 | import EliteDashboardPage from "@/features/dashboard/pages/EliteDashboardPage";
 7 | import DataTablePage from "@/features/dashboard/pages/DataTablePage";
 8 | import UploadPage from "@/features/data/pages/UploadPage";
 9 | import MobileUploadPortal from "@/features/data/pages/MobileUploadPortal";
10 | import MLPage from "@/features/ml/pages/MLPage";
11 | import PdfUploadPage from "@/features/pdf/pages/PdfUploadPage";
12 | import DataProfilingPage from "@/features/analytics/pages/DataProfilingPage";
13 | import AnomalyDetectionPage from "@/features/analytics/pages/AnomalyDetectionPage";
14 | import RelationshipsPage from "@/features/analytics/pages/RelationshipsPage";
15 | import DataCleaningPage from "@/features/analytics/pages/DataCleaningPage";
16 | import ExportPage from "@/features/analytics/pages/ExportPage";
17 | import AppLayout from "@/shared/layout/AppLayout";
18 | import NotFoundPage from "@/app/routes/NotFoundPage";

22 |     future={{

30 |         <Route path="/dashboard" element={<EliteDashboardPage />} />
31 |         <Route path="/upload" element={<UploadPage />} />
32 |         <Route path="/pdf" element={<PdfUploadPage />} />
33 |         <Route path="/pdf-upload" element={<PdfUploadPage />} />
34 |         <Route path="/chat" element={<ChatPage />} />
35 |         <Route path="/local-chat" element={<LocalChatPage />} />
36 |         <Route path="/data" element={<DataTablePage />} />
37 |         <Route path="/analytics" element={<AnalyticsPage />} />
38 |         <Route path="/analytics/profile" element={<DataProfilingPage />} />
39 |         <Route path="/analytics/anomalies" element={<AnomalyDetectionPage />} />
40 |         <Route path="/analytics/relationships" element={<RelationshipsPage />} />
41 |         <Route path="/analytics/cleaning" element={<DataCleaningPage />} />
42 |         <Route path="/analytics/export" element={<ExportPage />} />
43 |         <Route path="/ml" element={<MLPage />} />
44 |       </Route>
45 |       <Route path="/mobile-upload/:sessionId" element={<MobileUploadPortal />} />
46 |       <Route path="*" element={<NotFoundPage />} />
47 |     </Routes>
48 |   </BrowserRouter>
49 | );
50 | 
51 | export default AppRouter;
52 |

```tsx
  1 | import { useState } from "react";
  2 | import axios from "axios";
  3 | import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
  4 | import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card";
  5 | import {
  6 |   BarChart,
  7 |   Bar,
  8 |   LineChart,
  9 |   Line,
 10 |   ScatterChart,
 11 |   Scatter,
 12 |   PieChart,
 13 |   Pie,
 14 |   Cell,
 15 |   XAxis,
 16 |   YAxis,
 17 |   CartesianGrid,
 18 |   Tooltip,
 19 |   Legend,
 20 |   ResponsiveContainer,
 21 | } from "recharts";
 22 | import { toast } from "sonner";
 23 | 
 24 | interface Dashboard {
 25 |   title: string;
 26 |   domain: string;
 27 |   kpis: Array<{
 28 |     name: string;
 29 |     description: string;
 30 |     business_value: string;
 31 |   }>;
 32 |   charts: Array<{
 33 |     type: string;
 34 |     title: string;
 35 |     dimensions: string[];
 36 |     measures: string[];
 37 |     insight: string;
 38 |   }>;
 39 |   insights: string[];
 40 |   recommendations: string[];
 41 | }
 42 | 
 43 | export default function GenAIDashboard() {
 44 |   const [dataset, setDataset] = useState<{
 45 |     columns: string[];
 46 |     data: Record<string, unknown>[];
 47 |   } | null>(null);
 48 |   const [dashboard, setDashboard] = useState<Dashboard | null>(null);
 49 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 50 |   const [query, setQuery] = useState("");
 51 | 
 52 |   const handleFileUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
 53 |     const file = e.target.files?.[0];
 54 |     if (!file) return;
 55 | 
 56 |     const reader = new FileReader();
 57 |     reader.onload = (event) => {
 58 |       try {
 59 |         const content = event.target?.result as string;
 60 |         const lines = content.split("\n");
 61 |         const headers = lines[0].split(",").map((h) => h.trim());
 62 | 
 63 |         const data = lines.slice(1).map((line) => {
 64 |           const values = line.split(",").map((v) => v.trim());
 65 |           const row: Record<string, unknown> = {};
 66 | 
 67 |           headers.forEach((header, index) => {
 68 |             const value = values[index];
 69 |             row[header] = isNaN(Number(value)) ? value : Number(value);
 70 |           });
 71 | 
 72 |           return row;
 73 |         });
 74 | 
 75 |         setDataset({ columns: headers, data: data.filter((d) => Object.values(d).some((v) => v)) });
 76 |         toast.success("Dataset loaded successfully");
 77 |       } catch (error) {
 78 |         toast.error("Failed to parse CSV");
 79 |       }
 80 |     };
 81 | 
 82 |     reader.readAsText(file);
 83 |   };
 84 | 
 85 |   const generateDashboard = async () => {
 86 |     if (!dataset) {
 87 |       toast.error("Please upload a dataset first");
 88 |       return;
 89 |     }
 90 | 
 91 |     setLoading(true);
 92 |     try {
 93 |       const response = await axios.post("http://localhost:3000/api/genai/dashboard/create", {
 94 |         dataset,
 95 |       });
 96 | 
 97 |       setDashboard(response.data.dashboard);
 98 |       toast.success("Dashboard generated successfully");
 99 |     } catch (error) {
100 |       toast.error(
101 |         error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to generate dashboard"
102 |       );
103 |     } finally {
104 |       setLoading(false);
105 |     }
106 |   };
107 | 
108 |   const submitQuery = async () => {
109 |     if (!query || !dashboard) {
110 |       toast.error("Please enter a query and generate a dashboard first");
111 |       return;
112 |     }
113 | 
114 |     setLoading(true);
115 |     try {
116 |       const response = await axios.post("http://localhost:3000/api/genai/query", {
117 |         query,
118 |         dataset,
119 |       });
120 | 
121 |       toast.success("Query processed successfully");
122 |       console.log("Query response:", response.data);
123 |     } catch (error) {
124 |       toast.error("Failed to process query");
125 |     } finally {
126 |       setLoading(false);
127 |     }
128 |   };
129 | 
130 |   return (
131 |     <div className="w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6">
132 |       <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold mb-8">InsightFlow - GenAI Analytics</h1>
133 | 
134 |       {/* Upload Section */}
135 |       <Card className="p-6 mb-8">
136 |         <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Step 1: Upload Dataset</h2>
137 |         <input
138 |           type="file"
139 |           accept=".csv"
140 |           onChange={handleFileUpload}
141 |           className="mb-4"
142 |         />
143 |         {dataset && (
144 |           <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
145 |             Loaded: {dataset.data.length} rows, {dataset.columns.length} columns
146 |           </p>
147 |         )}
148 |       </Card>
149 | 
150 |       {/* Generate Dashboard */}
151 |       <Card className="p-6 mb-8">
152 |         <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Step 2: Generate Dashboard</h2>
153 |         <Button
154 |           onClick={generateDashboard}
155 |           disabled={!dataset || loading}
156 |           className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700"
157 |         >
158 |           {loading ? "Generating..." : "Generate AI Dashboard"}
159 |         </Button>
160 |       </Card>
161 | 
162 |       {/* Query Section */}
163 |       {dashboard && (
164 |         <Card className="p-6 mb-8">
165 |           <h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-4">Conversational Analytics</h2>
166 |           <div className="flex gap-2">
167 |             <input aria-label="Ask a question about your data..."
168 |               type="text"
169 |               placeholder="Ask a question about your data..."
170 |               value={query}
171 |               onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
172 |               className="flex-1 px-4 py-2 border rounded-lg"
173 |             />
174 |             <Button
175 |               onClick={submitQuery}
176 |               disabled={loading}
177 |               className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700"
178 |             >
179 |               Submit Query
180 |             </Button>
181 |           </div>
182 |         </Card>
183 |       )}
184 | 
185 |       {/* Dashboard Display */}
186 |       {dashboard && (
187 |         <div className="space-y-8">
188 |           <Card className="p-6">
189 |             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-4">{dashboard.title}</h2>
190 |             <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">Domain: {dashboard.domain}</p>
191 | 
192 |             {/* KPI Cards */}
193 |             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8">
194 |               {dashboard.kpis.slice(0, 4).map((kpi, idx) => (
195 |                 <Card key={idx} className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50">
196 |                   <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-2">{kpi.name}</h3>
197 |                   <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">{kpi.description}</p>
198 |                   <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{kpi.business_value}</p>
199 |                 </Card>
200 |               ))}
201 |             </div>
202 | 
203 |             {/* Charts Preview */}
204 |             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
205 |               {dashboard.charts.slice(0, 4).map((chart, idx) => (
206 |                 <Card key={idx} className="p-4">
207 |                   <h3 className="font-semibold mb-4">{chart.title}</h3>
208 |                   <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
209 |                     <p>Type: {chart.type}</p>
210 |                     <p>Insight: {chart.insight}</p>
211 |                   </div>
212 |                 </Card>
213 |               ))}
214 |             </div>
215 | 
216 |             {/* Insights */}
217 |             {dashboard.insights.length > 0 && (
218 |               <Card className="p-6 mt-8 bg-amber-50 border-amber-200">
219 |                 <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-4">AI Insights</h3>
220 |                 <ul className="space-y-2">
221 |                   {dashboard.insights.slice(0, 5).map((insight, idx) => (
222 |                     <li key={idx} className="text-sm">
223 |                       • {insight}
224 |                     </li>
225 |                   ))}
226 |                 </ul>
227 |               </Card>
228 |             )}
229 | 
230 |             {/* Recommendations */}
231 |             {dashboard.recommendations.length > 0 && (
232 |               <Card className="p-6 mt-4 bg-green-50 border-green-200">
233 |                 <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-4">Recommendations</h3>
234 |                 <ul className="space-y-2">
235 |                   {dashboard.recommendations.slice(0, 5).map((rec, idx) => (
236 |                     <li key={idx} className="text-sm">
237 |                       • {rec}
238 |                     </li>
239 |                   ))}
240 |                 </ul>
241 |               </Card>
242 |             )}
243 |           </Card>
244 |         </div>
245 |       )}
246 |     </div>
247 |   );
248 | }
249 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
  2 | import {
  3 |   AlertTriangle,
  4 |   Bot,
  5 |   Calendar,
  6 |   CheckCircle2,
  7 |   Download,
  8 |   Globe2,
  9 |   RefreshCw,
 10 |   ShieldCheck,
 11 |   Sparkles,
 12 |   TrendingUp,
 13 | } from "lucide-react";
 14 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
 15 | import SchemaDashboardChat from "@/features/dashboard/components/SchemaDashboardChat";
 16 | import SmartChartCard from "@/features/dashboard/components/SmartChartCard";
 17 | import {
 18 |   applyFilters,
 19 |   average,
 20 |   buildChartFromSpec,
 21 |   buildCorrelationMatrix,
 22 |   buildDataQualityScore,
 23 |   buildDatasetProfile,
 24 |   cleanDatasetRows,
 25 |   countUnique,
 26 |   exportDashboardToJson,
 27 |   generateDynamicInsights,
 28 |   groupByAggregate,
 29 |   max,
 30 |   safeNumber,
 31 |   sum,
 32 |   type DashboardChart,
 33 |   type DashboardFilters,
 34 |   type Row,
 35 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 36 | import StatusPanel from "@/shared/layout/StatusPanel";
 37 | 
 38 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur";
 39 | 
 40 | function downloadFile(fileName: string, content: string, mime: string) {
 41 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mime });
 42 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 43 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 44 |   link.href = url;
 45 |   link.download = fileName;
 46 |   link.click();
 47 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 48 | }
 49 | 
 50 | function formatNumber(value: number) {
 51 |   return Number.isInteger(value)
 52 |     ? value.toLocaleString()
 53 |     : value.toLocaleString(undefined, { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
 54 | }
 55 | 
 56 | function Gauge({ score }: { score: number }) {
 57 |   return (
 58 |     <div
 59 |       className="grid size-44 place-items-center rounded-full"
 60 |       style={{ background: `conic-gradient(#22c55e ${score * 3.6}deg, rgba(51,65,85,0.9) 0deg)` }}
 61 |     >
 62 |       <div className="grid size-32 place-items-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-center">
 63 |         <div>
 64 |           <p className="text-4xl font-semibold text-white">{Math.round(score)}%</p>
 65 |           <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Excellent</p>
 66 |         </div>
 67 |       </div>
 68 |     </div>
 69 |   );
 70 | }
 71 | 
 72 | function detectAnomalies(rows: Row[], metric?: string) {
 73 |   if (!metric) return 0;
 74 |   const values = rows.map((row) => safeNumber(row[metric])).filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
 75 |   if (values.length < 4) return 0;
 76 |   const mean = average(values);
 77 |   const variance = values.reduce((total, value) => total + (value - mean) ** 2, 0) / values.length;
 78 |   const stddev = Math.sqrt(variance);
 79 |   if (!stddev) return 0;
 80 |   return values.filter((value) => Math.abs((value - mean) / stddev) > 2).length;
 81 | }
 82 | 
 83 | function Sparkline({ values }: { values: number[] }) {
 84 |   const maxValue = Math.max(...values, 1);
 85 |   return (
 86 |     <div className="mt-3 flex h-8 items-end gap-1">
 87 |       {values.slice(-18).map((value, index) => (
 88 |         <span
 89 |           key={index}
 90 |           className="w-full rounded-full bg-violet-500/70"
 91 |           style={{ height: `${Math.max(10, (value / maxValue) * 100)}%` }}
 92 |         />
 93 |       ))}
 94 |     </div>
 95 |   );
 96 | }
 97 | 
 98 | export default function AnalyticsPage() {
 99 |   const { dataset, isHydrating, apiError, loadDemo, retryHydrate } = useData();
100 |   const [filters, setFilters] = useState<DashboardFilters>({});
101 |   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("Overview");
102 |   const [showAi, setShowAi] = useState(false);
103 |   const [autoRefresh, setAutoRefresh] = useState(true);
104 | 
105 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows((dataset?.rows || []) as Row[]), [dataset?.rows]);
106 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
107 |   const filteredRows = useMemo(() => applyFilters(rows, filters), [rows, filters]);
108 |   const quality = useMemo(() => buildDataQualityScore(filteredRows), [filteredRows]);
109 |   const metric = profile.primaryMetric?.name;
110 |   const category = profile.primaryCategory?.name;
111 |   const dateKey = profile.dateColumn?.name || "__row_index__";
112 |   const metricValues = filteredRows.map((row) => safeNumber(metric ? row[metric] : null)).filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
113 |   const anomalies = detectAnomalies(filteredRows, metric);
114 |   const insights = generateDynamicInsights(filteredRows);
115 | 
116 |   const analyticsRows = useMemo(
117 |     () => filteredRows.map((row, index) => ({ ...row, __row_index__: index + 1 })),
118 |     [filteredRows],
119 |   );
120 | 
121 |   const charts = useMemo<DashboardChart[]>(() => {
122 |     const list: DashboardChart[] = [];
123 | 
124 |     if (metric) {
125 |       list.push(
126 |         buildChartFromSpec(analyticsRows, {
127 |           type: "area",
128 |           title: `${metric} Over ${profile.dateColumn ? "Time" : "Row Index"}`,
129 |           xKey: dateKey,
130 |           yKey: metric,
131 |           aggregation: "avg",
132 |           limit: 24,
133 |         }),
134 |       );
135 |     }
136 | 
137 |     if (metric && category) {
138 |       list.push(
139 |         buildChartFromSpec(analyticsRows, {
140 |           type: "donut",
141 |           title: `${metric} by ${category}`,
142 |           xKey: category,
143 |           yKey: metric,
144 |           aggregation: "sum",
145 |           limit: 8,
146 |         }),
147 |       );
148 |       list.push(
149 |         buildChartFromSpec(analyticsRows, {
150 |           type: "horizontalBar",
151 |           title: `Top 10 ${category} by ${metric}`,
152 |           xKey: category,
153 |           yKey: metric,
154 |           aggregation: "max",
155 |           limit: 10,
156 |         }),
157 |       );
158 |     }
159 | 
160 |     if (profile.locationColumn && metric) {
161 |       list.push(
162 |         buildChartFromSpec(analyticsRows, {
163 |           type: "bar",
164 |           title: `Geographic Distribution by ${profile.locationColumn.name}`,
165 |           xKey: profile.locationColumn.name,
166 |           yKey: metric,
167 |           aggregation: "sum",
168 |           limit: 10,
169 |         }),
170 |       );
171 |     } else if (category) {
172 |       list.push(
173 |         buildChartFromSpec(analyticsRows, {
174 |           type: "bar",
175 |           title: `Records by ${category}`,
176 |           xKey: category,
177 |           yKey: "count",
178 |           aggregation: "count",
179 |           limit: 10,
180 |         }),
181 |       );
182 |     }
183 | 
184 |     if (profile.numericColumns.length >= 2) {
185 |       list.push(
186 |         buildChartFromSpec(analyticsRows, {
187 |           type: "heatmap",
188 |           title: "Correlation Analysis",
189 |           xKey: profile.numericColumns[0].name,
190 |           yKey: profile.numericColumns[1].name,
191 |           aggregation: "avg",
192 |         }),
193 |       );
194 |     }
195 | 
196 |     return list;
197 |   }, [analyticsRows, category, dateKey, metric, profile.dateColumn, profile.locationColumn, profile.numericColumns]);
198 | 
199 |   if (isHydrating) {
200 |     return <StatusPanel title="Loading analytics" message="Preparing dynamic analytics from your current dataset." />;
201 |   }
202 | 
203 |   if (apiError) {
204 |     return <StatusPanel title="Analytics unavailable" message={apiError} actionLabel="Retry" onAction={() => void retryHydrate()} />;
205 |   }
206 | 
207 |   if (!dataset) {
208 |     return <StatusPanel title="No dataset loaded" message="Upload a dataset before opening analytics." actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset" onAction={() => void loadDemo()} />;
209 |   }
210 | 
211 |   function exportReport() {
212 |     downloadFile(
213 |       `${dataset.name || "analytics"}-report.json`,
214 |       exportDashboardToJson({
215 |         datasetName: dataset.name,
216 |         filters,
217 |         kpis: [],
218 |         charts,
219 |       }),
220 |       "application/json;charset=utf-8",
221 |     );
222 |   }
223 | 
224 |   const kpis = [
225 |     {
226 |       title: "Total Records",
227 |       value: filteredRows.length.toLocaleString(),
228 |       sub: `${rows.length.toLocaleString()} total rows`,
229 |       icon: TrendingUp,
230 |       spark: groupByAggregate(analyticsRows, dateKey, metric || dateKey, metric ? "avg" : "count", 18).map((item) => Number(Object.values(item).at(-1) || 0)),
231 |     },
232 |     {
233 |       title: metric ? `Total ${metric}` : "Total Value",
234 |       value: formatNumber(metric ? sum(metricValues) : filteredRows.length),
235 |       sub: metric ? "Sum for primary metric" : "Record count",
236 |       icon: Sparkles,
237 |       spark: metricValues,
238 |     },
239 |     {
240 |       title: metric ? `Average ${metric}` : "Average Value",
241 |       value: formatNumber(metric ? average(metricValues) : 0),
242 |       sub: metric ? "Mean value" : "Metric unavailable",
243 |       icon: TrendingUp,
244 |       spark: metricValues,
245 |     },
246 |     {
247 |       title: "Unique Categories",
248 |       value: category ? countUnique(filteredRows.map((row) => row[category])).toLocaleString() : "0",
249 |       sub: category || "No category column",
250 |       icon: Globe2,
251 |       spark: [countUnique(filteredRows.map((row) => (category ? row[category] : "")))],
252 |     },
253 |     {
254 |       title: "Anomalies Detected",
255 |       value: anomalies.toLocaleString(),
256 |       sub: metric ? `z-score on ${metric}` : "Metric unavailable",
257 |       icon: AlertTriangle,
258 |       spark: [anomalies],
259 |     },
260 |     {
261 |       title: "Data Quality Score",
262 |       value: `${quality.finalScore}%`,
263 |       sub: `${quality.completeness}% complete`,
264 |       icon: ShieldCheck,
265 |       spark: [quality.completeness, quality.validity, quality.uniqueness],
266 |     },
267 |   ];
268 | 
269 |   return (
270 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
271 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
272 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 xl:flex-row xl:items-start xl:justify-between">
273 |           <div>
274 |             <h1 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-white">Analytics</h1>
275 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Deep dive into your data and uncover powerful insights.</p>
276 |           </div>
277 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
278 |             {category && (
279 |               <select
280 |                 value={String(filters[category] || "")}
281 |                 onChange={(event) => setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, [category]: event.target.value || undefined }))}
282 |                 className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm outline-none"
283 |               >
284 |                 <option value="">All {category}</option>
285 |                 {Array.from(new Set(rows.map((row) => String(row[category] ?? "")).filter(Boolean))).slice(0, 50).map((value) => (
286 |                   <option key={value} value={value}>{value}</option>
287 |                 ))}
288 |               </select>
289 |             )}
290 |             {profile.dateColumn && (
291 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm">
292 |                 <Calendar className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
293 |                 <input type="date" value={String(filters.dateStart || "")} onChange={(event) => setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, dateStart: event.target.value }))} className="bg-transparent outline-none" />
294 |                 <input type="date" value={String(filters.dateEnd || "")} onChange={(event) => setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, dateEnd: event.target.value }))} className="bg-transparent outline-none" />
295 |               </div>
296 |             )}
297 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportReport} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
298 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
299 |               Export
300 |             </button>
301 |             <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowAi((current) => !current)} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-violet-500">
302 |               <Bot className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
303 |               AI Chat
304 |             </button>
305 |           </div>
306 |         </header>
307 | 
308 |         <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
309 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
310 |             {["Overview", "Trends", "Segments", "Correlation", profile.locationColumn ? "Geography" : "Data Quality", "Data Quality"].filter((item, index, list) => list.indexOf(item) === index).map((tab) => (
311 |               <button type="button" key={tab} onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)} className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm ${activeTab === tab ? "bg-violet-600 text-white" : "text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white"}`}>
312 |                 {tab}
313 |               </button>
314 |             ))}
315 |           </div>
316 |           <label className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300">
317 |             <RefreshCw className="size-4" />
318 |             Auto refresh
319 |             <input type="checkbox" checked={autoRefresh} onChange={(event) => setAutoRefresh(event.target.checked)} />
320 |           </label>
321 |         </div>
322 | 
323 |         <section className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 2xl:grid-cols-6">
324 |           {kpis.map((kpi) => (
325 |             <div key={kpi.title} className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
326 |               <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
327 |                 <div>
328 |                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{kpi.title}</p>
329 |                   <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{kpi.value}</p>
330 |                   <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500">{kpi.sub}</p>
331 |                 </div>
332 |                 <div className="rounded-2xl bg-violet-500/20 p-3 text-violet-200">
333 |                   <kpi.icon className="size-5" />
334 |                 </div>
335 |               </div>
336 |               <Sparkline values={kpi.spark.length ? kpi.spark : [1]} />
337 |             </div>
338 |           ))}
339 |         </section>
340 | 
341 |         <div className={showAi ? "grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[1fr_360px]" : ""}>
342 |           <main className="space-y-5">
343 |             <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-2 2xl:grid-cols-3">
344 |               {charts.map((chart) => (
345 |                 <SmartChartCard key={chart.id} chart={chart} />
346 |               ))}
347 |               <div className={`${CARD} grid min-h-[22rem] place-items-center p-5`}>
348 |                 <Gauge score={quality.finalScore} />
349 |                 <div className="mt-4 grid w-full gap-2 text-sm text-slate-300">
350 |                   {[
351 |                     ["Completeness", quality.completeness],
352 |                     ["Consistency", quality.consistency],
353 |                     ["Validity", quality.validity],
354 |                     ["Uniqueness", quality.uniqueness],
355 |                     ["Timeliness", quality.timeliness],
356 |                   ].map(([label, value]) => (
357 |                     <div key={String(label)} className="flex items-center justify-between">
358 |                       <span><CheckCircle2 className="mr-2 inline size-4 text-green-400" />{label}</span>
359 |                       <span>{value}%</span>
360 |                     </div>
361 |                   ))}
362 |                 </div>
363 |               </div>
364 |             </section>
365 | 
366 |             <section className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
367 |               <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Insights & Recommendations</h2>
368 |               <div className="mt-4 grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
369 |                 {insights.map((insight) => (
370 |                   <div key={insight.id} className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/50 p-4">
371 |                     <p className="font-semibold text-white">{insight.title}</p>
372 |                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">{insight.description}</p>
373 |                   </div>
374 |                 ))}
375 |                 <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/50 p-4">
376 |                   <p className="font-semibold text-white">Correlation coverage</p>
377 |                   <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
378 |                     {buildCorrelationMatrix(filteredRows).length ? "Numeric columns are available for correlation analysis." : "Add at least two numeric columns to enable correlation analysis."}
379 |                   </p>
380 |                 </div>
381 |               </div>
382 |             </section>
383 |           </main>
384 | 
385 |           {showAi && (
386 |             <SchemaDashboardChat
387 |               dataset={{ id: dataset.id, name: dataset.name, rows, columns: dataset.columns }}
388 |               currentDashboard={{ filters, charts, kpis }}
389 |               onCommand={(command) => {
390 |                 if (command.filters) setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, ...command.filters }));
391 |               }}
392 |               collapsible
393 |             />
394 |           )}
395 |         </div>
396 |       </div>
397 |     </div>
398 |   );
399 | }
400 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/AnomalyDetectionPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/AnomalyDetectionPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
 4 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
 5 | 
 6 | type Anomaly = {
 7 |   column?: string;
 8 |   explanation?: string;
 9 |   type?: string;
10 |   severity?: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
11 | };
12 | 
13 | const AnomalyDetectionPage = () => {
14 |   const { dataset } = useData();
15 |   const [anomalies, setAnomalies] = useState<Anomaly[]>([]);
16 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
17 | 
18 |   useEffect(() => {
19 |     if (!dataset) return;
20 |     
21 |     const loadAnomalies = async () => {
22 |       setLoading(true);
23 |       try {
24 |         const response = await api.getAIAnomalies(dataset.id);
25 |         setAnomalies(Array.isArray(response.anomalies) ? response.anomalies as Anomaly[] : []);
26 |       } catch (error) {
27 |         console.error("Failed to load anomalies:", error);
28 |       } finally {
29 |         setLoading(false);
30 |       }
31 |     };
32 | 
33 |     loadAnomalies();
34 |   }, [dataset]);
35 | 
36 |   if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Analyzing for anomalies...</div>;
37 | 
38 |   return (
39 |     <div className="p-6">
40 |       <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6">Anomaly Detection</h1>
41 |       
42 |       {anomalies.length === 0 ? (
43 |         <div className="bg-green-50 border border-green-200 p-4 rounded">
44 |           No anomalies detected
45 |         </div>
46 |       ) : (
47 |         <div className="space-y-4">
48 |           {anomalies.map((anomaly, i) => (
49 |             <div 
50 |               key={i} 
51 |               className={`border rounded p-4 ${anomaly.severity === 'high' ? 'bg-red-50 border-red-200' : 'bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-200'}`}
52 |             >
53 |               <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
54 |                 <AlertTriangle className="size-5 mt-1" />
55 |                 <div className="flex-1">
56 |                   <div className="font-semibold">{anomaly.column || 'Dataset'}</div>
57 |                   <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">{anomaly.explanation}</div>
58 |                   <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">Type: {anomaly.type || 'unknown'}</div>
59 |                 </div>
60 |                 <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-semibold ${anomaly.severity === 'high' ? 'bg-red-200 text-red-800' : 'bg-yellow-200 text-yellow-800'}`}>
61 |                   {anomaly.severity}
62 |                 </span>
63 |               </div>
64 |             </div>
65 |           ))}
66 |         </div>
67 |       )}
68 |     </div>
69 |   );
70 | };
71 | 
72 | export default AnomalyDetectionPage;
73 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/DataCleaningPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/DataCleaningPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { AlertCircle, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
 4 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
 5 | 
 6 | type CleaningSuggestion = {
 7 |   column?: string;
 8 |   description?: string;
 9 |   impact?: string;
10 |   priority?: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
11 | };
12 | 
13 | const DataCleaningPage = () => {
14 |   const { dataset } = useData();
15 |   const [suggestions, setSuggestions] = useState<CleaningSuggestion[]>([]);
16 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
17 | 
18 |   useEffect(() => {
19 |     if (!dataset) return;
20 |     
21 |     const loadSuggestions = async () => {
22 |       setLoading(true);
23 |       try {
24 |         const response = await api.getAICleaning(dataset.id);
25 |         setSuggestions(Array.isArray(response.suggestions) ? response.suggestions as CleaningSuggestion[] : []);
26 |       } catch (error) {
27 |         console.error("Failed to load suggestions:", error);
28 |       } finally {
29 |         setLoading(false);
30 |       }
31 |     };
32 | 
33 |     loadSuggestions();
34 |   }, [dataset]);
35 | 
36 |   if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Generating cleaning suggestions...</div>;
37 | 
38 |   const priorityColor = {
39 |     high: 'text-red-600 bg-red-50 border-red-200',
40 |     medium: 'text-yellow-600 bg-yellow-50 border-yellow-200',
41 |     low: 'text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 border-blue-200',
42 |   };
43 | 
44 |   return (
45 |     <div className="p-6">
46 |       <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6">Data Cleaning Suggestions</h1>
47 |       
48 |       {suggestions.length === 0 ? (
49 |         <div className="bg-green-50 border border-green-200 p-4 rounded flex items-center gap-3">
50 |           <CheckCircle className="size-5 text-green-600" />
51 |           <div>Your dataset looks clean!</div>
52 |         </div>
53 |       ) : (
54 |         <div className="space-y-3">
55 |           {suggestions.map((sug, i) => (
56 |             <div key={i} className={`border rounded p-4 ${priorityColor[sug.priority || 'low']}`}>
57 |               <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
58 |                 <AlertCircle className="size-5 mt-1" />
59 |                 <div className="flex-1">
60 |                   <div className="font-semibold">{sug.column || 'Dataset'}</div>
61 |                   <div className="text-sm mt-1">{sug.description || 'Review this data quality suggestion.'}</div>
62 |                   <div className="text-xs mt-2 opacity-75">Impact: {sug.impact || 'n/a'}</div>
63 |                 </div>
64 |                 <span className="px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-semibold uppercase">
65 |                   {sug.priority || 'low'}
66 |                 </span>
67 |               </div>
68 |             </div>
69 |           ))}
70 |         </div>
71 |       )}
72 |     </div>
73 |   );
74 | };
75 | 
76 | export default DataCleaningPage;
77 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/DataProfilingPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/DataProfilingPage.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
  2 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
  3 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
  4 | 
  5 | type DataProfile = {
  6 |   summary?: {
  7 |     totalRows?: number;
  8 |     totalColumns?: number;
  9 |     completeness?: number | string;
 10 |     quality?: number | string;
 11 |   };
 12 |   columnProfiles?: Array<{
 13 |     name?: string;
 14 |     type?: string;
 15 |     filledValues?: number;
 16 |     missingValues?: number;
 17 |     uniqueValues?: number;
 18 |   }>;
 19 |   dataQualityIssues?: string[];
 20 | };
 21 | 
 22 | const DataProfilingPage = () => {
 23 |   const { dataset } = useData();
 24 |   const [profile, setProfile] = useState<DataProfile | null>(null);
 25 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 26 | 
 27 |   useEffect(() => {
 28 |     if (!dataset) return;
 29 |     
 30 |     const loadProfile = async () => {
 31 |       setLoading(true);
 32 |       try {
 33 |         const response = await api.getAIProfile(dataset.id);
 34 |         setProfile(response.profile && typeof response.profile === 'object' ? response.profile as DataProfile : null);
 35 |       } catch (error) {
 36 |         console.error("Failed to load profile:", error);
 37 |       } finally {
 38 |         setLoading(false);
 39 |       }
 40 |     };
 41 | 
 42 |     loadProfile();
 43 |   }, [dataset]);
 44 | 
 45 |   if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Loading profile...</div>;
 46 |   if (!profile) return <div className="p-4">No profile data</div>;
 47 | 
 48 |   const summary = profile.summary || {};
 49 |   const columnProfiles = Array.isArray(profile.columnProfiles) ? profile.columnProfiles : [];
 50 |   const dataQualityIssues = Array.isArray(profile.dataQualityIssues) ? profile.dataQualityIssues : [];
 51 | 
 52 |   return (
 53 |     <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
 54 |       <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold">Data Profile Analysis</h1>
 55 |       
 56 |       <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
 57 |         <div className="bg-blue-100 p-4 rounded">
 58 |           <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Rows</div>
 59 |           <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{(summary.totalRows || 0).toLocaleString()}</div>
 60 |         </div>
 61 |         <div className="bg-green-100 p-4 rounded">
 62 |           <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Columns</div>
 63 |           <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{summary.totalColumns || 0}</div>
 64 |         </div>
 65 |         <div className="bg-purple-100 p-4 rounded">
 66 |           <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Completeness</div>
 67 |           <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{summary.completeness || 0}%</div>
 68 |         </div>
 69 |         <div className="bg-orange-100 p-4 rounded">
 70 |           <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Quality</div>
 71 |           <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{summary.quality || 0}%</div>
 72 |         </div>
 73 |       </div>
 74 | 
 75 |       <div className="bg-white border rounded p-4">
 76 |         <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Column Profiles</h2>
 77 |         <div className="overflow-x-auto">
 78 |           <table className="w-full text-sm">
 79 |             <thead className="bg-gray-100">
 80 |               <tr>
 81 |                 <th className="p-2 text-left">Column</th>
 82 |                 <th className="p-2 text-left">Type</th>
 83 |                 <th className="p-2 text-right">Filled</th>
 84 |                 <th className="p-2 text-right">Missing</th>
 85 |                 <th className="p-2 text-right">Unique</th>
 86 |               </tr>
 87 |             </thead>
 88 |             <tbody>
 89 |               {columnProfiles.map((col, index) => (
 90 |                 <tr key={col.name || index} className="border-t">
 91 |                   <td className="p-2">{col.name || 'Unknown'}</td>
 92 |                   <td className="p-2">{col.type || 'unknown'}</td>
 93 |                   <td className="p-2 text-right">{col.filledValues || 0}</td>
 94 |                   <td className="p-2 text-right text-red-600">{col.missingValues || 0}</td>
 95 |                   <td className="p-2 text-right">{col.uniqueValues || 0}</td>
 96 |                 </tr>
 97 |               ))}
 98 |             </tbody>
 99 |           </table>
100 |         </div>
101 |       </div>
102 | 
103 |       {dataQualityIssues.length > 0 && (
104 |         <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded p-4">
105 |           <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-2 text-red-700">Quality Issues</h2>
106 |           <ul className="space-y-1">
107 |             {dataQualityIssues.map((issue, i) => (
108 |               <li key={i} className="text-red-600">• {issue}</li>
109 |             ))}
110 |           </ul>
111 |         </div>
112 |       )}
113 |     </div>
114 |   );
115 | };
116 | 
117 | export default DataProfilingPage;
118 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/ExportPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/ExportPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { Download } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
 4 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
 5 | 
 6 | const ExportPage = () => {
 7 |   const { dataset } = useData();
 8 |   const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(false);
 9 | 
10 |   const exportData = async (format: 'json' | 'csv' | 'md') => {
11 |     if (!dataset) return;
12 |     
13 |     setExporting(true);
14 |     try {
15 |       const blob = await api.exportDataset(dataset.id, format);
16 |       const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
17 |       const link = document.createElement('a');
18 |       link.href = url;
19 |       link.setAttribute('download', `analysis.${format === 'md' ? 'markdown' : format}`);
20 |       document.body.appendChild(link);
21 |       link.click();
22 |       link.remove();
23 |       window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
24 |     } catch (error) {
25 |       console.error("Export failed:", error);
26 |     } finally {
27 |       setExporting(false);
28 |     }
29 |   };
30 | 
31 |   const formats = [
32 |     { format: 'json', title: 'JSON', desc: 'Complete analysis data' },
33 |     { format: 'csv', title: 'CSV', desc: 'Spreadsheet format' },
34 |     { format: 'md', title: 'Markdown', desc: 'Report format' },
35 |   ];
36 | 
37 |   return (
38 |     <div className="p-6">
39 |       <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6">Export Analysis</h1>
40 |       
41 |       <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
42 |         {formats.map(({ format, title, desc }) => (
43 |           <button type="button"
44 |             key={format}
45 |             onClick={() => exportData(format)}
46 |             disabled={exporting}
47 |             className="p-6 border rounded hover:shadow-lg transition flex flex-col items-center gap-3 disabled:opacity-50"
48 |           >
49 |             <Download className="size-8" />
50 |             <div className="font-semibold">{title}</div>
51 |             <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">{desc}</div>
52 |           </button>
53 |         ))}
54 |       </div>
55 |     </div>
56 |   );
57 | };
58 | 
59 | export default ExportPage;
```
