### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/RelationshipsPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/analytics/pages/RelationshipsPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { TrendingUp } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
 4 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
 5 | 
 6 | type Relationship = {
 7 |   column1?: string;
 8 |   column2?: string;
 9 |   correlation?: number | string;
10 |   direction?: string;
11 |   strength?: 'strong' | 'moderate' | 'weak' | string;
12 | };
13 | 
14 | const RelationshipsPage = () => {
15 |   const { dataset } = useData();
16 |   const [relationships, setRelationships] = useState<Relationship[]>([]);
17 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
18 | 
19 |   useEffect(() => {
20 |     if (!dataset) return;
21 |     
22 |     const loadRelationships = async () => {
23 |       setLoading(true);
24 |       try {
25 |         const response = await api.getAIRelationships(dataset.id);
26 |         setRelationships(Array.isArray(response.relationships) ? response.relationships as Relationship[] : []);
27 |       } catch (error) {
28 |         console.error("Failed to load relationships:", error);
29 |       } finally {
30 |         setLoading(false);
31 |       }
32 |     };
33 | 
34 |     loadRelationships();
35 |   }, [dataset]);
36 | 
37 |   if (loading) return <div className="p-4">Analyzing relationships...</div>;
38 | 
39 |   const getStrengthColor = (strength?: string) => {
40 |     switch (strength) {
41 |       case 'strong':
42 |         return 'bg-green-200 text-green-800';
43 |       case 'moderate':
44 |         return 'bg-yellow-200 text-yellow-800';
45 |       default:
46 |         return 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-800';
47 |     }
48 |   };
49 | 
50 |   return (
51 |     <div className="p-6">
52 |       <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6">Column Relationships</h1>
53 |       
54 |       {relationships.length === 0 ? (
55 |         <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 p-4 rounded">
56 |           No significant relationships found
57 |         </div>
58 |       ) : (
59 |         <div className="grid gap-4">
60 |           {relationships.map((rel, i) => (
61 |             <div key={i} className="border rounded p-4 hover:shadow-lg transition">
62 |               <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
63 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
64 |                   <TrendingUp className="size-5 text-blue-600" />
65 |                   <span className="font-semibold">{rel.column1} ↔ {rel.column2}</span>
66 |                 </div>
67 |                 <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-semibold ${getStrengthColor(rel.strength)}`}>
68 |                   {rel.strength || 'unknown'}
69 |                 </span>
70 |               </div>
71 |               <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-sm">
72 |                 <div>
73 |                   <div className="text-gray-600">Correlation</div>
74 |                   <div className="text-lg font-bold">{rel.correlation ?? 'n/a'}</div>
75 |                 </div>
76 |                 <div>
77 |                   <div className="text-gray-600">Direction</div>
78 |                   <div className="text-lg font-bold">{rel.direction || 'n/a'}</div>
79 |                 </div>
80 |                 <div>
81 |                   <div className="text-gray-600">Strength</div>
82 |                   <div className="text-lg font-bold">{rel.strength || 'unknown'}</div>
83 |                 </div>
84 |               </div>
85 |             </div>
86 |           ))}
87 |         </div>
88 |       )}
89 |     </div>
90 |   );
91 | };
92 | 
93 | export default RelationshipsPage;
94 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/chat/components/ChatInterface.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/chat/components/ChatInterface.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from "react";
  2 | import { Link } from "react-router-dom";
  3 | import {
  4 |   BarChart3,
  5 |   Bot,
  6 |   Brain,
  7 |   Database,
  8 |   Download,
  9 |   FileText,
 10 |   Filter,
 11 |   Grid3X3,
 12 |   Paperclip,
 13 |   Send,
 14 |   Settings,
 15 |   Share2,
 16 |   ShieldCheck,
 17 |   Sparkles,
 18 |   Table2,
 19 |   Trophy,
 20 | } from "lucide-react";
 21 | import { api, type DashboardCommandResponse } from "@/features/data/api/dataApi";
 22 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
 23 | import SmartChartCard from "@/features/dashboard/components/SmartChartCard";
 24 | import type { Aggregation } from "@/features/dashboard/types/dashboardTypes";
 25 | import { generateDynamicQuestionSuggestions } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dynamicQuestionSuggestions";
 26 | import {
 27 |   buildChartFromSpec,
 28 |   buildDataQualityScore,
 29 |   buildDatasetProfile,
 30 |   buildDefaultCharts,
 31 |   buildKpiFromSpec,
 32 |   buildKpis,
 33 |   cleanDatasetRows,
 34 |   generateDynamicInsights,
 35 |   safeNumber,
 36 |   type DashboardChart,
 37 |   type DashboardKpi,
 38 |   type Row,
 39 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 40 | import {
 41 |   loadDashboardState,
 42 |   saveDashboardState,
 43 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardStateStorage";
 44 | 
 45 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur";
 46 | 
 47 | type LocalMessage = {
 48 |   id: string;
 49 |   role: "user" | "assistant";
 50 |   content: string;
 51 |   chart?: DashboardChart;
 52 |   kpis?: DashboardKpi[];
 53 |   sql?: string;
 54 |   takeaway?: string;
 55 | };
 56 | 
 57 | function normalize(value: string) {
 58 |   return value.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_").replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
 59 | }
 60 | 
 61 | function titleCase(value: string) {
 62 |   return value.replace(/[_-]+/g, " ").replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
 63 | }
 64 | 
 65 | function formatNumber(value: number) {
 66 |   return value.toLocaleString(undefined, { maximumFractionDigits: value % 1 === 0 ? 0 : 2 });
 67 | }
 68 | 
 69 | function findColumn(columns: string[], text: string) {
 70 |   const normalizedText = normalize(text);
 71 |   return (
 72 |     columns.find((column) => normalize(column) === normalizedText) ||
 73 |     columns.find((column) => normalizedText.includes(normalize(column))) ||
 74 |     columns.find((column) => normalize(column).includes(normalizedText))
 75 |   );
 76 | }
 77 | 
 78 | function makeMessageId() {
 79 |   return globalThis.crypto?.randomUUID?.() || `message-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2)}`;
 80 | }
 81 | 
 82 | function firstGroupedChart(rows: Row[], query: string) {
 83 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
 84 |   const columns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name);
 85 |   const lower = query.toLowerCase();
 86 |   const metric =
 87 |     columns.find((column) => lower.includes(normalize(column).replace(/_/g, " "))) ||
 88 |     profile.primaryMetric?.name ||
 89 |     profile.numericColumns[0]?.name;
 90 |   const category =
 91 |     profile.categoryColumns.find((column) => lower.includes(normalize(column.name).replace(/_/g, " ")))?.name ||
 92 |     profile.primaryCategory?.name ||
 93 |     profile.columns.find((column) => column.type === "string")?.name;
 94 | 
 95 |   if (!metric || !category) return null;
 96 | 
 97 |   const aggregation: Aggregation = /total|sum|revenue|sales|units/i.test(lower) ? "sum" : "avg";
 98 |   return {
 99 |     type: "bar" as const,
100 |     title: `${aggregation === "sum" ? "Total" : "Average"} ${titleCase(metric)} by ${titleCase(category)}`,
101 |     xKey: category,
102 |     yKey: metric,
103 |     aggregation,
104 |     limit: 10,
105 |   };
106 | }
107 | 
108 | function summarizeDataset(rows: Row[]) {
109 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
110 |   const quality = buildDataQualityScore(rows);
111 |   const metric = profile.primaryMetric?.name;
112 |   const category = profile.primaryCategory?.name;
113 |   const parts = [
114 |     `This dataset has ${rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows and ${profile.columns.length} columns.`,
115 |     `Data quality score is ${Math.round(quality.finalScore)}%.`,
116 |   ];
117 | 
118 |   if (metric) parts.push(`Primary metric detected: ${titleCase(metric)}.`);
119 |   if (category) parts.push(`Primary grouping column detected: ${titleCase(category)}.`);
120 | 
121 |   return parts.join(" ");
122 | }
123 | 
124 | function dataDictionary(rows: Row[]) {
125 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
126 |   return profile.columns
127 |     .slice(0, 8)
128 |     .map((column) => {
129 |       const completeness = Math.max(0, 100 - column.missingPct);
130 |       const role = column.name === profile.primaryMetric?.name ? "primary metric" : column.name === profile.primaryCategory?.name ? "primary category" : column.type;
131 |       return `${column.name}: ${role}, ${completeness}% complete, ${column.uniqueCount} unique values`;
132 |     })
133 |     .join("\n");
134 | }
135 | 
136 | function anomalySummary(rows: Row[]) {
137 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
138 |   const metric = profile.primaryMetric?.name || profile.numericColumns[0]?.name;
139 |   if (!metric) return "No numeric column was available for anomaly detection.";
140 | 
141 |   const values = rows
142 |     .map((row, index) => ({ index, value: safeNumber(row[metric]) }))
143 |     .filter((entry) => Number.isFinite(entry.value));
144 |   if (values.length < 3) return `Not enough numeric values in ${metric} to flag anomalies confidently.`;
145 | 
146 |   const mean = values.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + entry.value, 0) / values.length;
147 |   const variance = values.reduce((sum, entry) => sum + Math.pow(entry.value - mean, 2), 0) / values.length;
148 |   const stdDev = Math.sqrt(variance);
149 |   if (!stdDev) return `${titleCase(metric)} has no meaningful spread, so no anomalies were detected.`;
150 | 
151 |   const unusual = values
152 |     .map((entry) => ({ ...entry, z: Math.abs((entry.value - mean) / stdDev) }))
153 |     .filter((entry) => entry.z >= 1.5)
154 |     .sort((a, b) => b.z - a.z)
155 |     .slice(0, 3);
156 | 
157 |   if (!unusual.length) return `No strong anomalies detected in ${titleCase(metric)}.`;
158 |   return `Potential anomalies in ${titleCase(metric)}: ${unusual
159 |     .map((entry) => `row ${entry.index + 1} (${entry.value.toLocaleString()})`)
160 |     .join(", ")}.`;
161 | }
162 | 
163 | function thresholdSummary(query: string, rows: Row[]) {
164 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
165 |   const metric = profile.primaryMetric?.name || profile.numericColumns[0]?.name;
166 |   if (!metric) return null;
167 | 
168 |   const plainNumber = query.trim().match(/^\$?([\d,]+(?:\.\d+)?)$/);
169 |   const comparison = query.match(/\b(above|over|greater than|more than|at least|>=|below|under|less than|<=)\s+\$?([\d,]+(?:\.\d+)?)/i);
170 |   if (!plainNumber && !comparison) return null;
171 | 
172 |   const rawValue = plainNumber?.[1] || comparison?.[2];
173 |   const threshold = rawValue ? safeNumber(rawValue) : null;
174 |   if (threshold === null) return null;
175 | 
176 |   const operatorText = comparison?.[1]?.toLowerCase() || "at least";
177 |   const isUpperBound = ["below", "under", "less than", "<="].includes(operatorText);
178 |   const matchedRows = rows.filter((row) => {
179 |     const value = safeNumber(row[metric]);
180 |     if (value === null) return false;
181 |     return isUpperBound ? value <= threshold : value >= threshold;
182 |   });
183 | 
184 |   const share = rows.length ? Math.round((matchedRows.length / rows.length) * 1000) / 10 : 0;
185 |   return `${matchedRows.length.toLocaleString()} rows have ${titleCase(metric)} ${isUpperBound ? "at or below" : "at or above"} ${formatNumber(threshold)} (${share}% of ${rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows).`;
186 | }
187 | 
188 | export function localCommand(query: string, rows: Row[]): DashboardCommandResponse | null {
189 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
190 |   const columns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name);
191 |   const lower = query.toLowerCase();
192 |   const metric =
193 |     columns.find((column) => lower.includes(normalize(column).replace(/_/g, " "))) ||
194 |     profile.primaryMetric?.name;
195 |   const category =
196 |     profile.categoryColumns.find((column) => lower.includes(normalize(column.name).replace(/_/g, " ")))?.name ||
197 |     profile.primaryCategory?.name;
198 |   const thresholdAnswer = thresholdSummary(query, rows);
199 | 
200 |   if (thresholdAnswer) {
201 |     return { action: "ANSWER", message: thresholdAnswer, schemaOnly: true };
202 |   }
203 | 
204 |   if (/filter\s+(.+?)\s*=\s*(.+)$/i.test(query)) {
205 |     const match = query.match(/filter\s+(.+?)\s*=\s*(.+)$/i);
206 |     const column = match ? findColumn(columns, match[1]) : undefined;
207 |     if (column && match) {
208 |       return { action: "FILTER", message: `Filtered ${column} to ${match[2].trim()}.`, filters: { [column]: match[2].trim() }, schemaOnly: true };
209 |     }
210 |   }
211 | 
212 |   if (/^filter data$|apply filters/i.test(lower)) {
213 |     const categoryColumn = profile.primaryCategory?.name || profile.categoryColumns[0]?.name;
214 |     const topValue = categoryColumn ? rows.find((row) => row[categoryColumn] != null)?.[categoryColumn] : undefined;
215 |     if (categoryColumn && topValue != null) {
216 |       return {
217 |         action: "FILTER",
218 |         message: `Applied a sample filter: ${categoryColumn} = ${String(topValue)}.`,
219 |         filters: { [categoryColumn]: String(topValue) },
220 |         schemaOnly: true,
221 |       };
222 |     }
223 |     return { action: "ANSWER", message: "No categorical column is available for a safe sample filter.", schemaOnly: true };
224 |   }
225 | 
226 |   if (/build dashboard|dashboard automatically|dashboard$/.test(lower)) {
227 |     const chartSpec = firstGroupedChart(rows, query);
228 |     return {
229 |       action: chartSpec ? "GENERATE_CHART" : "GENERATE_KPI",
230 |       message: chartSpec
231 |         ? "Built a starter dashboard with local KPI cards and a schema-aware chart."
232 |         : "Built starter KPI cards from the available schema.",
233 |       chartSpec: chartSpec || undefined,
234 |       schemaOnly: true,
235 |     };
236 |   }
237 | 
238 |   if (/generate chart|create chart|new chart/.test(lower)) {
239 |     const chartSpec = firstGroupedChart(rows, query);
240 |     return chartSpec
241 |       ? { action: "GENERATE_CHART", message: `Generated ${chartSpec.title}.`, chartSpec, schemaOnly: true }
242 |       : { action: "ANSWER", message: "No metric/category pair was available for a chart.", schemaOnly: true };
243 |   }
244 | 
245 |   if (/kpi|cards/.test(lower)) {
246 |     return { action: "GENERATE_KPI", message: "Generated schema-aware KPI cards.", schemaOnly: true };
247 |   }
248 | 
249 |   if (/summarize|summary|takeaway/.test(lower)) {
250 |     return { action: "ANSWER", message: summarizeDataset(rows), schemaOnly: true };
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   if (/data quality|quality score|completeness|missing|duplicate/.test(lower)) {
254 |     const quality = buildDataQualityScore(rows);
255 |     return {
256 |       action: "ANSWER",
257 |       message: `Data quality is ${Math.round(quality.finalScore)}%. Completeness is ${Math.round(quality.completeness)}%, uniqueness is ${Math.round(quality.uniqueness)}%, and ${quality.missingCells.toLocaleString()} cells are missing.`,
258 |       schemaOnly: true,
259 |     };
260 |   }
261 | 
262 |   if (/anomal/.test(lower)) {
263 |     return { action: "ANSWER", message: anomalySummary(rows), schemaOnly: true };
264 |   }
265 | 
266 |   if (/data dictionary|explain columns|columns and values/.test(lower)) {
267 |     return { action: "ANSWER", message: dataDictionary(rows), schemaOnly: true };
268 |   }
269 | 
270 |   if (/group|aggregate/.test(lower)) {
271 |     const chartSpec = firstGroupedChart(rows, query);
272 |     return chartSpec
273 |       ? { action: "GENERATE_CHART", message: `Grouped ${chartSpec.yKey} by ${chartSpec.xKey}.`, chartSpec, schemaOnly: true }
274 |       : { action: "ANSWER", message: "No metric/category pair was available for grouping.", schemaOnly: true };
275 |   }
276 | 
277 |   if (/sql preview|view sql|sql for this dataset/.test(lower)) {
278 |     const chartSpec = firstGroupedChart(rows, query);
279 |     return chartSpec
280 |       ? { action: "GENERATE_CHART", message: "Generated SQL preview for a grouped dataset query.", chartSpec, schemaOnly: true }
281 |       : { action: "ANSWER", message: "SELECT *\nFROM dataset\nLIMIT 25;", schemaOnly: true };
282 |   }
283 | 
284 |   if (/pie|donut/.test(lower) && category) {
285 |     return {
286 |       action: "GENERATE_CHART",
287 |       message: `Generated records by ${category}.`,
288 |       chartSpec: { type: lower.includes("pie") ? "pie" : "donut", title: `Records by ${titleCase(category)}`, xKey: category, yKey: "count", aggregation: "count", limit: 8 },
289 |       schemaOnly: true,
290 |     };
291 |   }
292 | 
293 |   if (/distribution|histogram/.test(lower) && metric) {
294 |     return {
295 |       action: "GENERATE_CHART",
296 |       message: `Generated ${metric} distribution.`,
297 |       chartSpec: { type: "histogram", title: `${titleCase(metric)} Distribution`, xKey: "range", yKey: metric, aggregation: "count", limit: 8 },
298 |       schemaOnly: true,
299 |     };
300 |   }
301 | 
302 |   if (/scatter| vs /.test(lower)) {
303 |     const match = lower.match(/show\s+(.+?)\s+vs\s+(.+?)(\s+as\s+scatter|$)/);
304 |     const xKey = match ? findColumn(columns, match[2]) : profile.secondaryMetric?.name;
305 |     const yKey = match ? findColumn(columns, match[1]) : metric;
306 |     if (xKey && yKey) {
307 |       return {
308 |         action: "GENERATE_CHART",
309 |         message: `Generated ${yKey} vs ${xKey}.`,
310 |         chartSpec: { type: "scatter", title: `${titleCase(yKey)} vs ${titleCase(xKey)}`, xKey, yKey, aggregation: "avg", limit: 200 },
311 |         schemaOnly: true,
312 |       };
313 |     }
314 |   }
315 | 
316 |   if (/chart|average|avg|by/.test(lower) && metric && category) {
317 |     return {
318 |       action: "GENERATE_CHART",
319 |       message: `Generated average ${metric} by ${category}.`,
320 |       chartSpec: { type: "bar", title: `Average ${titleCase(metric)} by ${titleCase(category)}`, xKey: category, yKey: metric, aggregation: "avg", limit: 10 },
321 |       schemaOnly: true,
322 |     };
323 |   }
324 | 
325 |   return null;
326 | }
327 | 
328 | function sqlPreview(command: DashboardCommandResponse) {
329 |   if (command.chartSpec) {
330 |     return `SELECT ${command.chartSpec.xKey}, ${command.chartSpec.aggregation}(${command.chartSpec.yKey}) AS value\nFROM dataset\nGROUP BY ${command.chartSpec.xKey}\nORDER BY value DESC\nLIMIT ${command.chartSpec.limit || 10};`;
331 |   }
332 |   if (command.filters) {
333 |     const [column, value] = Object.entries(command.filters)[0] || [];
334 |     return column ? `SELECT * FROM dataset\nWHERE ${column} = '${value}';` : undefined;
335 |   }
336 |   return undefined;
337 | }
338 | 
339 | function safeBuildChart(rows: Row[], chartSpec: NonNullable<DashboardCommandResponse["chartSpec"]>) {
340 |   try {
341 |     return buildChartFromSpec(rows, chartSpec);
342 |   } catch {
343 |     return undefined;
344 |   }
345 | }
346 | 
347 | function safeBuildKpis(rows: Row[], command: DashboardCommandResponse, query: string) {
348 |   try {
349 |     if (command.kpiSpec) return [buildKpiFromSpec(rows, command.kpiSpec)];
350 |     if (/kpi|cards|dashboard/i.test(query)) return buildKpis(rows).slice(0, 5);
351 |   } catch {
352 |     return undefined;
353 |   }
354 | 
355 |   return undefined;
356 | }
357 | 
358 | export default function ChatInterface() {
359 |   const { dataset } = useData();
360 |   const [input, setInput] = useState("");
361 |   const [messages, setMessages] = useState<LocalMessage[]>([]);
362 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
363 |   const bottomRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
364 | 
365 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows((dataset?.rows || []) as Row[]), [dataset?.rows]);
366 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
367 |   const quality = useMemo(() => buildDataQualityScore(rows), [rows]);
368 |   const suggestions = useMemo(() => generateDynamicQuestionSuggestions({ id: dataset?.id, name: dataset?.name, rows, columns: dataset?.columns }, 5), [dataset, rows]);
369 | 
370 |   useEffect(() => {
371 |     bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView?.({ behavior: "smooth" });
372 |   }, [messages, loading]);
373 | 
374 |   function pushAssistant(content: string) {
375 |     setMessages((current) => [
376 |       ...current,
377 |       {
378 |         id: makeMessageId(),
379 |         role: "assistant",
380 |         content,
381 |       },
382 |     ]);
383 |   }
384 | 
385 |   async function sendPrompt(prompt = input) {
386 |     const query = prompt.trim();
387 |     if (!query || !dataset?.id || loading) return;
388 | 
389 |     setInput("");
390 |     setLoading(true);
391 |     setMessages((current) => [...current, { id: makeMessageId(), role: "user", content: query }]);
392 | 
393 |     const planned = localCommand(query, rows);
394 | 
395 |     try {
396 |       if (planned || /chart|kpi|filter|dashboard|distribution|scatter|pie|donut/i.test(query)) {
397 |         const response = await api.sendDashboardCommand(dataset.id, query, { schemaOnly: true });
398 |         const command = response.action === "ANSWER" && planned ? planned : response.chartSpec || response.kpiSpec || response.filters ? response : planned;
399 | 
400 |         if (command) {
401 |           const chart = command.chartSpec ? safeBuildChart(rows, command.chartSpec) : undefined;
402 |           const kpis = safeBuildKpis(rows, command, query);
403 |           setMessages((current) => [
404 |             ...current,
405 |             {
406 |               id: makeMessageId(),
407 |               role: "assistant",
408 |               content: command.message || "Generated a schema-aware response.",
409 |               chart,
410 |               kpis,
411 |               sql: sqlPreview(command),
412 |               takeaway: chart ? `The chart was calculated locally from ${rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows.` : undefined,
413 |             },
414 |           ]);
415 |           return;
416 |         }
417 |       }
418 | 
419 |       const response = await api.sendSchemaChat(dataset.id, query);
420 |       setMessages((current) => [
421 |         ...current,
422 |         {
423 |           id: makeMessageId(),
424 |           role: "assistant",
425 |           content: response.assistantMessage.content,
426 |           takeaway: "Schema-only answer. Raw rows were not sent to the LLM.",
427 |         },
428 |       ]);
429 |     } catch (error) {
430 |       if (planned) {
431 |         const chart = planned.chartSpec ? safeBuildChart(rows, planned.chartSpec) : undefined;
432 |         const kpis = safeBuildKpis(rows, planned, query);
433 |         setMessages((current) => [
434 |           ...current,
435 |           {
436 |             id: makeMessageId(),
437 |             role: "assistant",
438 |             content: planned.message || "Generated locally from schema.",
439 |             chart,
440 |             kpis,
441 |             sql: sqlPreview(planned),
442 |             takeaway: "Local fallback used; values were calculated in the browser.",
443 |           },
444 |         ]);
445 |       } else {
446 |         setMessages((current) => [
447 |           ...current,
448 |           {
449 |             id: makeMessageId(),
450 |             role: "assistant",
451 |             content: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "I could not process that request.",
452 |           },
453 |         ]);
454 |       }
455 |     } finally {
456 |       setLoading(false);
457 |     }
458 |   }
459 | 
460 |   function addToDashboard(message: LocalMessage) {
461 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
462 |     const state = loadDashboardState(dataset.id);
463 |     saveDashboardState(dataset.id, {
464 |       ...state,
465 |       manualCharts: message.chart ? [message.chart, ...state.manualCharts] : state.manualCharts,
466 |       manualKpis: message.kpis ? [...message.kpis, ...state.manualKpis] : state.manualKpis,
467 |     });
468 |   }
469 | 
470 |   async function shareChat() {
471 |     const summary = messages.map((message) => `${message.role}: ${message.content}`).join("\n\n");
472 |     await navigator.clipboard?.writeText(summary || "InsightFlow AI Chat");
473 |     pushAssistant("Conversation summary copied to clipboard.");
474 |   }
475 | 
476 |   function exportChat() {
477 |     const blob = JSON.stringify({ dataset: dataset?.name, messages }, null, 2);
478 |     const url = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([blob], { type: "application/json" }));
479 |     const link = document.createElement("a");
480 |     link.href = url;
481 |     link.download = `${dataset?.name || "chat"}-conversation.json`;
482 |     link.click();
483 |     URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
484 |     pushAssistant("Conversation exported as JSON.");
485 |   }
486 | 
487 |   function openAttachmentGuidance() {
488 |     pushAssistant("Use the Upload or PDF Intelligence page to attach CSV, Excel, JSON, or PDF files. I will analyze the active dataset here after it is loaded.");
489 |   }
490 | 
491 |   function showSettingsSummary() {
492 |     pushAssistant("Current AI chat settings: schema-only mode, local chart/KPI calculation, Qwen3:8B provider when backend AI is available, and browser fallback when it is not.");
493 |   }
494 | 
495 |   const visibleMessages = messages.length ? messages : [];
496 |   const schemaPreview = profile.columns.slice(0, 6);
497 |   const insights = generateDynamicInsights(rows);
498 | 
499 |   return (
500 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
501 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
502 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 xl:flex-row xl:items-start xl:justify-between">
503 |           <div>
504 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
505 |               <span className="font-semibold text-white">{dataset?.name}</span>
506 |               <span>-</span>
507 |               <span>{rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
508 |             </div>
509 |             <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-semibold text-white">AI Chat</h1>
510 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Ask questions, generate charts, and build insights from your data.</p>
511 |           </div>
512 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
513 |             <button type="button" onClick={shareChat} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm">
514 |               <Share2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
515 |               Share
516 |             </button>
517 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportChat} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm">
518 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
519 |               Export
520 |             </button>
521 |             <div className="rounded-xl border border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-blue-100">
522 |               <span className="mr-2 inline-block size-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" />
523 |               Qwen3:8B Online
524 |             </div>
525 |             <button type="button" onClick={showSettingsSummary} aria-label="Show AI chat settings" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2">
526 |               <Settings className="size-5" />
527 |             </button>
528 |           </div>
529 |         </header>
530 | 
531 |         <div className="grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[1fr_350px]">
532 |           <main className={`${CARD} flex min-h-[calc(100vh-10rem)] flex-col overflow-hidden`}>
533 |             <div className="border-b border-slate-700/60 p-5">
534 |               <div className="flex gap-4">
535 |                 <div className="grid size-16 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-blue-600">
536 |                   <Sparkles className="size-8 text-white" />
537 |                 </div>
538 |                 <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
539 |                   <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
540 |                     <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white">Hi! I'm your AI Data Analyst</h2>
541 |                     <span className="rounded-full bg-violet-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase text-violet-200">Beta</span>
542 |                   </div>
543 |                   <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">I can answer schema questions, generate local charts and KPIs, filter records, and explain data quality.</p>
544 |                   <div className="mt-4 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
545 |                     {suggestions.map((suggestion) => (
546 |                       <button type="button" key={suggestion} onClick={() => void sendPrompt(suggestion)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800">
547 |                         {suggestion}
548 |                       </button>
549 |                     ))}
550 |                   </div>
551 |                 </div>
552 |               </div>
553 |             </div>
554 | 
555 |             <div className="flex-1 space-y-5 overflow-y-auto p-5">
556 |               {visibleMessages.map((message) => (
557 |                 <div key={message.id} className={`flex ${message.role === "user" ? "justify-end" : "justify-start"}`}>
558 |                   <div className={`max-w-4xl ${message.role === "user" ? "text-right" : "text-left"}`}>
559 |                     <div className={`inline-block rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-sm ${message.role === "user" ? "bg-violet-600 text-white" : "border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 text-slate-100"}`}>
560 |                       {message.content}
561 |                     </div>
562 | 
563 |                     {message.chart && (
564 |                       <div className="mt-3 text-left">
565 |                         <SmartChartCard chart={message.chart} />
566 |                       </div>
567 |                     )}
568 | 
569 |                     {message.kpis?.length ? (
570 |                       <div className="mt-3 grid gap-3 text-left sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-5">
571 |                         {message.kpis.map((kpi) => (
572 |                           <div key={kpi.id} className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 p-4">
573 |                             <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">{kpi.title}</p>
574 |                             <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{kpi.value}</p>
575 |                             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500">{kpi.subtitle}</p>
576 |                           </div>
577 |                         ))}
578 |                       </div>
579 |                     ) : null}
580 | 
581 |                     {message.sql && (
582 |                       <pre className="mt-3 overflow-auto rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/80 p-4 text-left text-xs text-cyan-100">{message.sql}</pre>
583 |                     )}
584 | 
585 |                     {message.takeaway && (
586 |                       <div className="mt-3 rounded-2xl border border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/10 p-3 text-left text-sm text-blue-100">
587 |                         <Brain className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
588 |                         {message.takeaway}
589 |                       </div>
590 |                     )}
591 | 
592 |                     {(message.chart || message.kpis?.length) && (
593 |                       <button type="button" onClick={() => addToDashboard(message)} className="mt-3 rounded-xl border border-violet-500/50 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-violet-200">
594 |                         <Grid3X3 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
595 |                         Add to Dashboard
596 |                       </button>
597 |                     )}
598 |                   </div>
599 |                 </div>
600 |               ))}
601 | 
602 |               {loading && (
603 |                 <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-300">
604 |                   <Bot className="mr-2 inline size-4 animate-pulse text-violet-300" />
605 |                   Thinking in schema-only mode...
606 |                 </div>
607 |               )}
608 |               <div ref={bottomRef} />
609 |             </div>
610 | 
611 |             <div className="border-t border-slate-700/60 p-4">
612 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-violet-500/60 bg-slate-950/80 p-3 shadow-[0_0_24px_rgba(124,58,237,0.2)]">
613 |                 <textarea
614 |                   value={input}
615 |                   onChange={(event) => setInput(event.target.value)}
616 |                   onKeyDown={(event) => {
617 |                     if (event.key === "Enter" && !event.shiftKey) {
618 |                       event.preventDefault();
619 |                       void sendPrompt();
620 |                     }
621 |                   }}
622 |                   placeholder="Ask anything about your data, charts, filters, or KPIs..."
623 |                   className="h-20 w-full resize-none bg-transparent p-2 text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500"
624 |                 />
625 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
626 |                   <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-xs text-slate-300">
627 |                     <span className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2"><Database className="mr-2 inline size-4" />Schema only</span>
628 |                     <span className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2">Qwen3:8B</span>
629 |                   </div>
630 |                   <div className="flex gap-2">
631 |                     <button type="button" onClick={openAttachmentGuidance} aria-label="Attach data guidance" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-3"><Paperclip className="size-4" /></button>
632 |                     <button type="button" onClick={() => void sendPrompt("Generate chart")} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-3"><BarChart3 className="size-4" /></button>
633 |                     <button type="button" onClick={() => void sendPrompt("Filter data")} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-3"><Filter className="size-4" /></button>
634 |                     <button type="button" onClick={() => void sendPrompt("Summarize dataset")} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 p-3"><Table2 className="size-4" /></button>
635 |                     <button type="button" disabled={!input.trim() || loading} onClick={() => void sendPrompt()} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 p-3 disabled:opacity-50"><Send className="size-4" /></button>
636 |                   </div>
637 |                 </div>
638 |               </div>
639 |             </div>
640 |           </main>
641 | 
642 |           <aside className="space-y-4">
643 |             <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
644 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
645 |                 <div className="grid size-12 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-200">
646 |                   <FileText className="size-6" />
647 |                 </div>
648 |                 <div className="min-w-0">
649 |                   <p className="truncate font-semibold text-white">{dataset?.name}</p>
650 |                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows - {profile.columns.length} columns</p>
651 |                 </div>
652 |               </div>
653 |               <Link to="/data" className="mt-4 block rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 px-4 py-2 text-center text-sm text-slate-100">
654 |                 View Data Table
655 |               </Link>
656 |             </div>
657 | 
658 |             <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
659 |               <h3 className="font-semibold text-white">Schema Summary</h3>
660 |               <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
661 |                 {schemaPreview.map((column) => (
662 |                   <div key={column.name} className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_80px_64px] gap-2 text-sm">
663 |                     <span className="truncate text-slate-200">{column.name}</span>
664 |                     <span className="text-slate-400">{column.type}</span>
665 |                     <span className="text-green-300">{Math.max(0, 100 - column.missingPct)}%</span>
666 |                   </div>
667 |                 ))}
668 |               </div>
669 |             </div>
670 | 
671 |             <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
672 |               <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
673 |                 <h3 className="font-semibold text-white">Data Quality</h3>
674 |                 <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-green-300">Excellent</span>
675 |               </div>
676 |               <div className="grid place-items-center">
677 |                 <div
678 |                   className="grid size-32 place-items-center rounded-full"
679 |                   style={{ background: `conic-gradient(#22c55e ${quality.finalScore * 3.6}deg, rgba(51,65,85,0.9) 0deg)` }}
680 |                 >
681 |                   <div className="grid size-24 place-items-center rounded-full bg-slate-950">
682 |                     <span className="text-3xl font-semibold">{Math.round(quality.finalScore)}%</span>
683 |                   </div>
684 |                 </div>
685 |               </div>
686 |             </div>
687 | 
688 |             <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
689 |               <h3 className="font-semibold text-white">Quick Actions</h3>
690 |               <div className="mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
691 |                 {["Generate Chart", "Build Dashboard", "Find Anomalies", "Summarize Dataset"].map((action) => (
692 |                   <button type="button" key={action} onClick={() => void sendPrompt(action)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 p-3 text-left text-xs text-slate-200">
693 |                     {action}
694 |                   </button>
695 |                 ))}
696 |               </div>
697 |             </div>
698 | 
699 |             <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
700 |               <h3 className="font-semibold text-white">Conversation Tools</h3>
701 |               <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
702 |                 {[
703 |                   ["Filter Data", "Apply filters and conditions"],
704 |                   ["Group & Aggregate", "Group by columns and aggregate"],
705 |                   ["Data Dictionary", "Explain columns and values"],
706 |                   ["SQL Preview", "View SQL for this dataset"],
707 |                 ].map(([title, subtitle]) => (
708 |                   <button type="button" key={title} onClick={() => void sendPrompt(title)} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 p-3 text-left">
709 |                     <p className="text-sm text-slate-200">{title}</p>
710 |                     <p className="text-xs text-slate-500">{subtitle}</p>
711 |                   </button>
712 |                 ))}
713 |               </div>
714 |             </div>
715 | 
716 |             <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
717 |               <h3 className="font-semibold text-white">Key Takeaways</h3>
718 |               <div className="mt-3 space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
719 |                 {insights.slice(0, 3).map((insight) => (
720 |                   <p key={insight.id}>
721 |                     <Trophy className="mr-2 inline size-4 text-amber-300" />
722 |                     {insight.description}
723 |                   </p>
724 |                 ))}
725 |                 <p>
726 |                   <ShieldCheck className="mr-2 inline size-4 text-green-300" />
727 |                   Schema-only mode is active.
728 |                 </p>
729 |               </div>
730 |             </div>
731 |           </aside>
732 |         </div>
733 |       </div>
734 |     </div>
735 |   );
736 | }
737 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/chat/components/LocalAIChatInterface.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/chat/components/LocalAIChatInterface.tsx`

  1 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2 | import { AnimatePresence, motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { Send, User, Settings, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { useLocalData } from '@/features/data/context/localDataContext';
  5 | 
  6 | const suggestedQueries = [
  7 |   'Show me the data summary',
  8 |   'What are the top values?',
  9 |   'Count records by category',
 10 |   'Calculate average values',
 11 | ];
 12 | 
 13 | const LocalAIChatInterface = () => {
 14 |   const { localDataset, chatMessages, isProcessing, sendLocalQuery } = useLocalData();
 15 |   const [input, setInput] = useState('');
 16 |   const bottomRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 17 | 
 18 |   useEffect(() => {
 19 |     bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
 20 |   }, [chatMessages]);
 21 | 
 22 |   const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
 23 |     e.preventDefault();
 24 |     if (!input.trim() || isProcessing) return;
 25 |     void sendLocalQuery(input.trim());
 26 |     setInput('');
 27 |   };
 28 | 
 29 |   return (
 30 |     <div className="mx-10 my-10 flex h-[calc(100vh-14rem)] flex-col overflow-hidden border border-border bg-card">
 31 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border px-6 py-4">
 32 |         <div>
 33 |           <div>
 34 |             <h2 className="text-2xl uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-foreground">Local AI Interface</h2>
 35 |             <p className="mt-2 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-muted-foreground">
 36 |               {localDataset ? `Analyzing: ${localDataset.name} (${localDataset.rowCount.toLocaleString()} rows)` : 'Upload data to start'}
 37 |             </p>
 38 |           </div>
 39 |         </div>
 40 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
 41 |           <div className="flex items-center gap-2 border border-success bg-success/10 px-4 py-3 text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-success">
 42 |             <Shield className="size-4" />
 43 |             <span>Data Never Leaves Your System</span>
 44 |           </div>
 45 |           <Settings className="size-5 text-muted-foreground" />
 46 |         </div>
 47 |       </div>
 48 | 
 49 |       <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-8 py-6 space-y-8">
 50 |         {chatMessages.length === 0 && (
 51 |           <motion.div
 52 |             initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
 53 |             animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
 54 |             className="flex h-full flex-col items-center justify-center text-center"
 55 |           >
 56 |             <h3 className="text-3xl uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-foreground mb-4">Local AI Ready</h3>
 57 |             <p className="mb-6 max-w-3xl text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-muted-foreground">
 58 |               Your data stays on your system. Only the schema is sent to AI for SQL generation.
 59 |             </p>
 60 |             {localDataset && (
 61 |               <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 justify-center max-w-lg">
 62 |                 {suggestedQueries.map((query) => (
 63 |                   <button type="button"
 64 |                     key={query}
 65 |                     onClick={() => {
 66 |                       void sendLocalQuery(query);
 67 |                     }}
 68 |                     className="border border-border px-4 py-2 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-foreground transition-colors hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground"
 69 |                   >
 70 |                     {query}
 71 |                   </button>
 72 |                 ))}
 73 |               </div>
 74 |             )}
 75 |           </motion.div>
 76 |         )}
 77 | 
 78 |         <AnimatePresence>
 79 |           {chatMessages.map((msg) => (
 80 |             <motion.div
 81 |               key={msg.id}
 82 |               initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
 83 |               animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 84 |               className={`flex gap-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : ''}`}
 85 |             >
 86 |               <div className={`max-w-2xl space-y-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-right' : ''}`}>
 87 |                 <div className={`text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.12em] ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'text-accent' : 'text-muted-foreground'}`}>
 88 |                   {msg.role === 'user' ? 'You' : 'Local AI'}
 89 |                 </div>
 90 |                 <div
 91 |                   className={`inline-block border border-border px-6 py-5 text-left text-sm leading-8 ${
 92 |                     msg.role === 'user'
 93 |                       ? 'bg-card text-foreground'
 94 |                       : 'bg-card text-foreground'
 95 |                   }`}
 96 |                 >
 97 |                   {msg.content}
 98 |                 </div>
 99 |                 {msg.sql && (
100 |                   <div className="w-full border border-border bg-secondary/50 p-4 text-xs font-mono text-foreground">
101 |                     <p className="terminal-label mb-2">Generated SQL</p>
102 |                     <pre className="whitespace-pre-wrap">{msg.sql}</pre>
103 |                   </div>
104 |                 )}
105 |               </div>
106 |               {msg.role === 'user' && (
107 |                 <div className="mt-1 flex size-7 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center border border-border bg-secondary">
108 |                   <User className="size-3.5 text-secondary-foreground" />
109 |                 </div>
110 |               )}
111 |             </motion.div>
112 |           ))}
113 |         </AnimatePresence>
114 | 
115 |         {isProcessing && (
116 |           <motion.div
117 |             initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
118 |             animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
119 |             className="flex gap-3"
120 |           >
121 |             <div className="border border-border bg-secondary px-4 py-2.5">
122 |               <div className="flex gap-1">
123 |                 <span className="size-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0ms' }} />
124 |                 <span className="size-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '150ms' }} />
125 |                 <span className="size-1.5 rounded-full bg-muted-foreground animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '300ms' }} />
126 |               </div>
127 |             </div>
128 |           </motion.div>
129 |         )}
130 | 
131 |         <div ref={bottomRef} />
132 |       </div>
133 | 
134 |       <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="border-t border-border px-8 py-6">
135 |         <div className="flex gap-3">
136 |           <input
137 |             value={input}
138 |             onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
139 |             placeholder={localDataset ? "Enter query about your data..." : 'Upload a dataset first'}
140 |             disabled={!localDataset || isProcessing}
141 |             className="terminal-input flex-1 disabled:opacity-50"
142 |           />
143 |           <button
144 |             type="submit"
145 |             disabled={!input.trim() || !localDataset || isProcessing}
146 |             className="flex h-14 w-16 items-center justify-center border border-border bg-primary text-primary-foreground transition-colors hover:bg-secondary hover:text-secondary-foreground disabled:opacity-50"
147 |           >
148 |             <Send className="size-4" />
149 |           </button>
150 |         </div>
151 |         <div className="mt-4 flex items-center justify-between text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-muted-foreground">
152 |           <span>Schema-only AI processing</span>
153 |           <span className="text-success">Privacy: Data never transmitted</span>
154 |         </div>
155 |       </form>
156 |     </div>
157 |   );
158 | };
159 | 
160 | export default LocalAIChatInterface;

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/chat/pages/ChatPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/chat/pages/ChatPage.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useEffect } from 'react';
 2 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
 3 | import ChatInterface from '@/features/chat/components/ChatInterface';
 4 | import StatusPanel from '@/shared/layout/StatusPanel';
 5 | 
 6 | const ChatPage = () => {
 7 |   const { dataset, isHydrating, apiError, loadDemo, retryHydrate } = useData();
 8 | 
 9 |   useEffect(() => {
10 |     if (!dataset && !isHydrating) {
11 |       void loadDemo().catch(() => undefined);
12 |     }
13 |   }, [dataset, isHydrating, loadDemo]);
14 | 
15 |   if (isHydrating) {
16 |     return (
17 |       <StatusPanel
18 |         title="Loading chat"
19 |         message="Preparing the local analytics service before opening the chat interface."
20 |       />
21 |     );
22 |   }
23 | 
24 |   if (apiError) {
25 |     return (
26 |       <StatusPanel
27 |         title="Chat unavailable"
28 |         message={apiError}
29 |         actionLabel="Retry"
30 |         onAction={() => {
31 |           void retryHydrate();
32 |         }}
33 |       />
34 |     );
35 |   }
36 | 
37 |   if (!dataset) {
38 |     return (
39 |       <StatusPanel
40 |         title="No dataset loaded"
41 |         message="Load the demo dataset or upload a file before opening chat."
42 |         actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset"
43 |         onAction={() => {
44 |           void loadDemo().catch(() => undefined);
45 |         }}
46 |       />
47 |     );
48 |   }
49 | 
50 |   return <ChatInterface />;
51 | };
52 | 
53 | export default ChatPage;
54 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsChart.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useEffect, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react';
  2 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { Download, SlidersHorizontal } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { toPng } from 'html-to-image';
  5 | import {
  6 |   ResponsiveContainer, AreaChart, Area, BarChart, Bar, LineChart, Line,
  7 |   XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, PieChart, Pie, Cell, ScatterChart,
  8 |   Scatter, RadarChart, PolarGrid, PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar,
  9 |   ComposedChart, Legend,
 10 | } from 'recharts';
 11 | import { ChartConfig } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
 12 | import { Input } from '@/shared/components/ui/input';
 13 | import {
 14 |   Sheet,
 15 |   SheetContent,
 16 |   SheetDescription,
 17 |   SheetHeader,
 18 |   SheetTitle,
 19 |   SheetTrigger,
 20 | } from '@/shared/components/ui/sheet';
 21 | import { Switch } from '@/shared/components/ui/switch';
 22 | 
 23 | const PALETTES = {
 24 |   blue: ['#dbeafe', '#93c5fd', '#60a5fa', '#3b82f6', '#1d4ed8'],
 25 |   green: ['#dcfce7', '#86efac', '#4ade80', '#22c55e', '#15803d'],
 26 |   purple: ['#f3e8ff', '#d8b4fe', '#c084fc', '#a855f7', '#7e22ce'],
 27 |   orange: ['#ffedd5', '#fdba74', '#fb923c', '#f97316', '#c2410c'],
 28 | } as const;
 29 | 
 30 | type PaletteKey = keyof typeof PALETTES;
 31 | type LocalChartType = ChartConfig['type'];
 32 | 
 33 | interface CustomTooltipProps {
 34 |   active?: boolean;
 35 |   payload?: Array<{ value?: string | number; dataKey?: string; color?: string }>;
 36 |   label?: string | number;
 37 | }
 38 | 
 39 | const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }: CustomTooltipProps) => {
 40 |   if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
 41 |   return (
 42 |     <div className="rounded-lg border border-border bg-card px-3 py-2 shadow-md">
 43 |       <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{label}</p>
 44 |       {payload.map((p, i) => (
 45 |         <p key={i} className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
 46 |           {typeof p.value === 'number' ? p.value.toLocaleString() : p.value}
 47 |         </p>
 48 |       ))}
 49 |     </div>
 50 |   );
 51 | };
 52 | 
 53 | interface AnalyticsChartProps {
 54 |   config: ChartConfig;
 55 |   index: number;
 56 | }
 57 | 
 58 | const AnalyticsChart = ({ config, index }: AnalyticsChartProps) => {
 59 |   const chartRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 60 |   const [chartType, setChartType] = useState<LocalChartType>(config.type);
 61 |   const [xLabel, setXLabel] = useState(config.xLabel || config.xKey);
 62 |   const [yLabel, setYLabel] = useState(config.yLabel || config.yKey);
 63 |   const [palette, setPalette] = useState<PaletteKey>('blue');
 64 |   const [showGrid, setShowGrid] = useState(true);
 65 |   const [showLegend, setShowLegend] = useState(chartType === 'pie');
 66 |   const [curved, setCurved] = useState(true);
 67 | 
 68 |   const colors = PALETTES[palette];
 69 |   const isPieChart = chartType === 'pie';
 70 |   const chartData = useMemo(() => {
 71 |     const data = config.data || [];
 72 |     if (chartType === 'bar' || chartType === 'pie') {
 73 |       return [...data].sort((a, b) => Number(b[config.yKey] ?? 0) - Number(a[config.yKey] ?? 0));
 74 |     }
 75 |     return data;
 76 |   }, [config.data, chartType, config.yKey]);
 77 |   const hasRenderableChart = Array.isArray(chartData) && chartData.length > 0 && Boolean(config.xKey) && Boolean(config.yKey);
 78 | 
 79 |   useEffect(() => {
 80 |     setShowLegend(chartType === 'pie');
 81 |   }, [chartType]);
 82 | 
 83 |   const exportPng = async () => {
 84 |     if (!chartRef.current) return;
 85 |     try {
 86 |       const url = await toPng(chartRef.current, { backgroundColor: '#ffffff', pixelRatio: 2 });
 87 |       const a = document.createElement('a');
 88 |       a.href = url;
 89 |       a.download = `${config.title.replace(/\s+/g, '_').toLowerCase()}.png`;
 90 |       a.click();
 91 |     } catch (e) {
 92 |       const errorMsg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : 'Unknown error occurred';
 93 |       console.error('Export failed:', errorMsg);
 94 |       alert(`Failed to export chart: ${errorMsg}`);
 95 |     }
 96 |   };
 97 | 
 98 |   const renderChart = () => {
 99 |     const commonProps = { data: chartData };
100 |     const curveType = curved ? 'monotone' : 'linear';
101 |     const grid = showGrid ? <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="hsl(215 20% 90%)" vertical={false} /> : null;
102 |     const legend = showLegend ? (
103 |       <Legend
104 |         wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: '12px', paddingTop: '16px' }}
105 |         iconSize={16}
106 |         iconType="circle"
107 |         align="center"
108 |         verticalAlign="bottom"
109 |       />
110 |     ) : null;
111 | 
112 |     const axisStyle = { fontSize: 12, fill: 'hsl(215 16% 47%)' };
113 | 
114 |     switch (chartType) {
115 |       case 'area':
116 |         return (
117 |           <AreaChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
118 |             <defs>
119 |               <linearGradient id={`gradient-${index}`} x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
120 |                 <stop offset="5%" stopColor={colors[3]} stopOpacity={0.4} />
121 |                 <stop offset="95%" stopColor={colors[3]} stopOpacity={0.05} />
122 |               </linearGradient>
123 |             </defs>
124 |             {grid}
125 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
126 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
127 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
128 |             {legend}
129 |             <Area type={curveType} dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} fill={`url(#gradient-${index})`} strokeWidth={2} />
130 |           </AreaChart>
131 |         );
132 |       case 'histogram':
133 |       case 'bar':
134 |         return (
135 |           <BarChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
136 |             {grid}
137 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
138 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
139 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
140 |             {legend}
141 |             <Bar dataKey={config.yKey} fill={colors[3]} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
142 |           </BarChart>
143 |         );
144 |       case 'line':
145 |         return (
146 |           <LineChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
147 |             {grid}
148 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
149 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
150 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
151 |             {legend}
152 |             <Line type={curveType} dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} strokeWidth={2} dot={{ fill: colors[3], strokeWidth: 0, r: 4 }} />
153 |           </LineChart>
154 |         );
155 |       case 'scatter':
156 |         return (
157 |           <ScatterChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
158 |             {grid}
159 |             <XAxis type="number" dataKey={config.xKey} name={xLabel} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
160 |             <YAxis type="number" dataKey={config.yKey} name={yLabel} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
161 |             <Tooltip cursor={{ strokeDasharray: '3 3' }} content={<CustomTooltip />} />
162 |             {legend}
163 |             <Scatter data={chartData} fill={colors[3]} />
164 |           </ScatterChart>
165 |         );
166 |       case 'radar':
167 |         return (
168 |           <RadarChart outerRadius="70%" data={chartData} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 }}>
169 |             <PolarGrid stroke="hsl(215 20% 90%)" />
170 |             <PolarAngleAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={{ fill: 'hsl(215 16% 47%)', fontSize: 12 }} />
171 |             <PolarRadiusAxis tick={{ fill: 'hsl(215 16% 47%)', fontSize: 11 }} />
172 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
173 |             {legend}
174 |             <Radar dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} fill={colors[3]} fillOpacity={0.3} />
175 |           </RadarChart>
176 |         );
177 |       case 'composed':
178 |         return (
179 |           <ComposedChart {...commonProps} margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 40, left: 40 }}>
180 |             {grid}
181 |             <XAxis dataKey={config.xKey} tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
182 |             <YAxis tick={axisStyle} axisLine={false} tickLine={false} />
183 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
184 |             {legend}
185 |             <Bar dataKey={config.yKey} fill={colors[2]} radius={[4, 4, 0, 0]} />
186 |             <Line type={curveType} dataKey={config.yKey} stroke={colors[3]} strokeWidth={2} dot={false} />
187 |           </ComposedChart>
188 |         );
189 |       case 'pie':
190 |         return (
191 |           <PieChart margin={{ top: 20, right: 20, bottom: 20, left: 20 }}>
192 |             <Pie data={chartData} dataKey={config.yKey} nameKey={config.xKey} cx="50%" cy="50%" innerRadius={50} outerRadius={80}>
193 |               {chartData.map((_, i) => (
194 |                 <Cell key={i} fill={colors[i % colors.length]} />
195 |               ))}
196 |             </Pie>
197 |             <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
198 |             {legend}
199 |           </PieChart>
200 |         );
201 |       default:
202 |         return (
203 |           <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-muted-foreground">
204 |             Unsupported chart type: {chartType}
205 |           </div>
206 |         );
207 |     }
208 |   };
209 | 
210 |   const renderedChart = renderChart();
211 | 
212 |   if (!renderedChart || !chartData || chartData.length === 0) {
213 |     return (
214 |       <motion.div
215 |         initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
216 |         animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
217 |         whileHover={{ y: -2 }}
218 |         transition={{ delay: index * 0.05, duration: 0.3 }}
219 |         className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card p-5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md"
220 |         ref={chartRef}
221 |       >
222 |         <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
223 |           <div>
224 |             <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider">Chart</p>
225 |             <h3 className="mt-1 text-base font-semibold text-foreground">{config.title}</h3>
226 |           </div>
227 |         </div>
228 |         <div className="h-72 flex items-center justify-center text-muted-foreground">
229 |           No data available for this chart
230 |         </div>
231 |       </motion.div>
232 |     );
233 |   }
234 | 
235 |   return (
236 |     hasRenderableChart ? (
237 |     <motion.div
238 |       initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
239 |       animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
240 |       whileHover={{ y: -2 }}
241 |       transition={{ delay: index * 0.05, duration: 0.3 }}
242 |       className="group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card p-5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md"
243 |       ref={chartRef}
244 |     >
245 |       <div className="mb-4 flex items-center justify-between">
246 |         <div>
247 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider">Chart</p>
248 |           <h3 className="mt-1 text-base font-semibold text-foreground">{config.title}</h3>
249 |         </div>
250 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
251 |           <Sheet>
252 |             <SheetTrigger asChild>
253 |               <button
254 |                 type="button"
255 |                 className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg p-2 text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
256 |                 title="Customize chart"
257 |               >
258 |                 <SlidersHorizontal className="size-4" />
259 |               </button>
260 |             </SheetTrigger>
261 |             <SheetContent side="right" className="w-full overflow-y-auto sm:max-w-md">
262 |               <SheetHeader className="pb-4">
263 |                 <SheetTitle className="text-lg font-semibold">Chart Settings</SheetTitle>
264 |                 <SheetDescription className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
265 |                   Customize chart type, colors, and display options.
266 |                 </SheetDescription>
267 |               </SheetHeader>
268 | 
269 |               <div className="space-y-6">
270 |                 <div className="space-y-3">
271 |                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">Chart Type</p>
272 |                   <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
273 |                     {(['bar', 'line', 'area', 'pie', 'scatter', 'radar', 'composed'] as LocalChartType[]).map((type) => (
274 |                       <button
275 |                         key={type}
276 |                         type="button"
277 |                         onClick={() => setChartType(type)}
278 |                         className={`rounded-lg border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
279 |                           chartType === type 
280 |                             ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary' 
281 |                             : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'
282 |                         }`}
283 |                       >
284 |                         {type}
285 |                       </button>
286 |                     ))}
287 |                   </div>
288 |                 </div>
289 | 
290 |                 <div className="space-y-3">
291 |                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">Color Palette</p>
292 |                   <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
293 |                     {(Object.keys(PALETTES) as PaletteKey[]).map((key) => (
294 |                       <button
295 |                         key={key}
296 |                         type="button"
297 |                         onClick={() => setPalette(key)}
298 |                         className={`flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
299 |                           palette === key 
300 |                             ? 'border-primary bg-primary/10 text-foreground' 
301 |                             : 'border-border text-muted-foreground hover:border-primary/50'
302 |                         }`}
303 |                       >
304 |                         <span className="flex gap-1">
305 |                           {PALETTES[key].slice(0, 3).map((color) => (
306 |                             <span key={color} className="size-3 rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: color }} />
307 |                           ))}
308 |                         </span>
309 |                         <span className="capitalize">{key}</span>
310 |                       </button>
311 |                     ))}
312 |                   </div>
313 |                 </div>
314 | 
315 |                 <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2">
316 |                   <div className="space-y-2">
317 |                     <p className="text-sm font-medium">X Label</p>
318 |                     <Input
319 |                       value={xLabel}
320 |                       onChange={(e) => setXLabel(e.target.value)}
321 |                       className="rounded-lg border-border"
322 |                     />
323 |                   </div>
324 |                   <div className="space-y-2">
325 |                     <p className="text-sm font-medium">Y Label</p>
326 |                     <Input
327 |                       value={yLabel}
328 |                       onChange={(e) => setYLabel(e.target.value)}
329 |                       className="rounded-lg border-border"
330 |                     />
331 |                   </div>
332 |                 </div>
333 | 
334 |                 <div className="space-y-3">
335 |                   <p className="text-sm font-medium">Display Options</p>
336 |                   <div className="space-y-3">
337 |                     <label className="flex items-center justify-between">
338 |                       <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Show Grid</span>
339 |                       <Switch checked={showGrid} onCheckedChange={setShowGrid} />
340 |                     </label>
341 |                     <label className="flex items-center justify-between">
342 |                       <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Show Legend</span>
343 |                       <Switch checked={showLegend} onCheckedChange={setShowLegend} />
344 |                     </label>
345 |                     <label className="flex items-center justify-between">
346 |                       <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Smooth Curves</span>
347 |                       <Switch checked={curved} onCheckedChange={setCurved} />
348 |                     </label>
349 |                   </div>
350 |                 </div>
351 |               </div>
352 |             </SheetContent>
353 |           </Sheet>
354 | 
355 |           <button
356 |             type="button"
357 |             onClick={exportPng}
358 |             className="rounded-lg p-2 text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
359 |             title="Download as PNG"
360 |           >
361 |             <Download className="size-4" />
362 |           </button>
363 |         </div>
364 |       </div>
365 |       <div className="h-72">
366 |         <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
367 |           {renderedChart}
368 |         </ResponsiveContainer>
369 |       </div>
370 |     </motion.div>
371 |     ) : null
372 |   );
373 | };
374 | 
375 | export default AnalyticsChart;
376 | 
```
