### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsSidebar.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsSidebar.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useState, useCallback, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
  2 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { X, Send, Bot, BarChart3, Loader2, RefreshCw, Filter, PieChart, LineChart, BarChart3 as BarIcon } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { ChartConfig, Dataset } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
  5 | import { api } from '@/features/data/api/dataApi';
  6 | 
  7 | interface AnalyticsSidebarProps {
  8 |   isOpen: boolean;
  9 |   onClose: () => void;
 10 |   dataset: Dataset | null;
 11 |   charts: ChartConfig[];
 12 |   onAddChart?: (chart: ChartConfig) => void;
 13 |   onReplaceLatestChart?: (chart: ChartConfig) => void;
 14 |   onRemoveLatestChart?: () => void;
 15 |   onFilterChange?: (filters: Record<string, string>) => void;
 16 | }
 17 | 
 18 | interface ChatMessage {
 19 |   id: string;
 20 |   role: 'user' | 'assistant';
 21 |   content: string;
 22 |   type?: 'text' | 'chart' | 'insight' | 'action' | 'error';
 23 |   chartConfig?: ChartConfig;
 24 |   chartAction?: 'generate' | 'modify' | 'delete';
 25 |   insightData?: InsightData;
 26 |   model?: string;
 27 |   provider?: string;
 28 | }
 29 | 
 30 | interface InsightData {
 31 |   metric?: string;
 32 |   value?: string | number;
 33 |   change?: number;
 34 |   trend?: 'up' | 'down' | 'stable';
 35 |   comparisons?: string[];
 36 | }
 37 | 
 38 | const DEFAULT_ANALYTICS_MESSAGES: ChatMessage[] = [
 39 |   {
 40 |     id: '1',
 41 |     role: 'assistant',
 42 |     content: `Hi! I'm your AI analytics assistant with full dashboard control. I use neural-chat:7b when available and can:
 43 | 
 44 | Chart Commands:
 45 | - "Create a bar chart for salary by country"
 46 | - "Change chart to line"
 47 | - "Show scatter plot"
 48 | - "Delete last chart"
 49 | 
 50 | Data Commands:
 51 | - "Filter by country = USA"
 52 | - "Show only senior roles"
 53 | - "Clear all filters"
 54 | 
 55 | Analysis Commands:
 56 | - "Show top 5 by revenue"
 57 | - "Compare metrics"
 58 | - "What are the trends?"
 59 | 
 60 | What would you like to do?`,
 61 |     type: 'text',
 62 |   },
 63 | ];
 64 | 
 65 | const AnalyticsSidebar = ({ isOpen, onClose, dataset, charts: _charts, onAddChart, onReplaceLatestChart, onRemoveLatestChart, onFilterChange }: AnalyticsSidebarProps) => {
 66 |   const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>(DEFAULT_ANALYTICS_MESSAGES);
 67 |   const [input, setInput] = useState('');
 68 |   const [isProcessing, setIsProcessing] = useState(false);
 69 |   const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
 70 | 
 71 |   const scrollToBottom = () => {
 72 |     messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
 73 |   };
 74 | 
 75 |   useEffect(() => {
 76 |     scrollToBottom();
 77 |   }, [messages]);
 78 | 
 79 |   const applyDashboardCommand = async (query: string) => {
 80 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
 81 | 
 82 |     const userMessage: ChatMessage = {
 83 |       id: Date.now().toString(),
 84 |       role: "user",
 85 |       content: query,
 86 |       type: "text",
 87 |     };
 88 | 
 89 |     setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMessage]);
 90 |     setIsProcessing(true);
 91 | 
 92 |     try {
 93 |       const command = await api.sendDashboardCommand(dataset.id, query);
 94 | 
 95 |       let type: ChatMessage["type"] = "text";
 96 | 
 97 |       if (command.action === "GENERATE_CHART" && command.chart) {
 98 |         onAddChart?.(command.chart);
 99 |         type = "chart";
100 |       }
101 | 
102 |       if (command.action === "MODIFY_CHART" && command.chart) {
103 |         onReplaceLatestChart?.(command.chart);
104 |         type = "chart";
105 |       }
106 | 
107 |       if (command.action === "DELETE_CHART") {
108 |         onRemoveLatestChart?.();
109 |         type = "action";
110 |       }
111 | 
112 |       if (command.action === "FILTER" && command.filters) {
113 |         onFilterChange?.(command.filters);
114 |         type = "action";
115 |       }
116 | 
117 |       if (command.action === "CLEAR_FILTERS") {
118 |         onFilterChange?.({});
119 |         type = "action";
120 |       }
121 | 
122 |       if (command.action === "GENERATE_KPI") {
123 |         type = "insight";
124 |       }
125 | 
126 |       const kpiText = command.kpis?.length
127 |         ? "\n\n" + command.kpis.map((k) => `• ${k.title}: ${k.value}`).join("\n")
128 |         : "";
129 | 
130 |       const assistantMessage: ChatMessage = {
131 |         id: (Date.now() + 1).toString(),
132 |         role: "assistant",
133 |         type,
134 |         content: [
135 |           command.message,
136 |           kpiText,
137 |           command.schemaOnly ? "\n\nSchema-only mode: raw rows were not sent to AI." : "",
138 |           command.model ? `\nModel: ${command.model}` : "",
139 |           command.aiError ? `\nFallback used: ${command.aiError}` : "",
140 |         ].join(""),
141 |         chartConfig: command.chart,
142 |       };
143 | 
144 |       setMessages((prev) => [...prev, assistantMessage]);
145 |     } catch (error) {
146 |       setMessages((prev) => [
147 |         ...prev,
148 |         {
149 |           id: (Date.now() + 1).toString(),
150 |           role: "assistant",
151 |           type: "text",
152 |           content: "Sorry, I could not control the dashboard for that request.",
153 |         },
154 |       ]);
155 |     } finally {
156 |       setIsProcessing(false);
157 |     }
158 |   };
159 | 
160 |   const handleQuery = useCallback(async () => {
161 |     if (!input.trim() || !dataset) return;
162 |     const q = input.trim();
163 |     setInput('');
164 |     await applyDashboardCommand(q);
165 |   }, [input, dataset]);
166 | 
167 |   const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
168 |     if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
169 |       e.preventDefault();
170 |       handleQuery();
171 |     }
172 |   };
173 | 
174 |   if (!isOpen) return null;
175 | 
176 |   return (
177 |     <motion.div
178 |       initial={{ x: '100%' }}
179 |       animate={{ x: 0 }}
180 |       exit={{ x: '100%' }}
181 |       transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }}
182 |       className="fixed right-4 top-4 h-[calc(100vh-2rem)] w-full max-w-md rounded-2xl border border-border/50 bg-card z-50 flex flex-col shadow-xl"
183 |     >
184 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border/50 p-4">
185 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
186 |           <div className="flex size-9 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10">
187 |             <Bot className="size-5 text-primary" />
188 |           </div>
189 |           <div>
190 |             <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">AI Assistant</p>
191 |             <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
192 |               <span className="size-2 rounded-full bg-green-500 animate-pulse"></span>
193 |               <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Online</p>
194 |             </div>
195 |           </div>
196 |         </div>
197 |         <button type="button"
198 |           onClick={onClose}
199 |           className="rounded-full p-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted transition-all"
200 |         >
201 |           <X className="size-5" />
202 |         </button>
203 |       </div>
204 | 
205 |       <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4">
206 |         {messages.map((msg) => (
207 |           <motion.div
208 |             key={msg.id}
209 |             initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}
210 |             animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
211 |             className={`flex gap-3 ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}
212 |           >
213 |             {msg.role === 'assistant' && (
214 |               <div className="flex size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10 shrink-0">
215 |                 <Bot className="size-4 text-primary" />
216 |               </div>
217 |             )}
218 |             <div
219 |               className={`max-w-[85%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
220 |                 msg.role === 'user'
221 |                   ? 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground'
222 |                   : 'border border-border/50 bg-muted/30'
223 |               }`}
224 |             >
225 |               <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm">{msg.content}</div>
226 |               {msg.chartConfig && (
227 |                 <div className="mt-2 pt-2 border-t border-border/30">
228 |                   <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-primary">
229 |                     <BarChart3 className="size-3" />
230 |                     Chart generated
231 |                   </div>
232 |                 </div>
233 |               )}
234 |               {msg.model && (
235 |                 <div className="mt-2 text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
236 |                   Model: {msg.model}
237 |                 </div>
238 |               )}
239 |             </div>
240 |             {msg.role === 'user' && (
241 |               <div className="flex size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-muted shrink-0">
242 |                 <span className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">You</span>
243 |               </div>
244 |             )}
245 |           </motion.div>
246 |         ))}
247 |         
248 |         {isProcessing && (
249 |           <div className="flex gap-3 justify-start">
250 |             <div className="flex size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10">
251 |               <Bot className="size-4 text-primary" />
252 |             </div>
253 |             <div className="border border-border/50 bg-muted/30 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
254 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
255 |                 <Loader2 className="size-4 animate-spin" />
256 |                 Processing...
257 |               </div>
258 |             </div>
259 |           </div>
260 |         )}
261 |         
262 |         <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
263 |       </div>
264 | 
265 |       <div className="border-t border-border/50 p-4">
266 |         <div className="flex gap-3 items-center">
267 |           <input
268 |             type="text"
269 |             value={input}
270 |             onChange={(e) => setInput(e.target.value)}
271 |             onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
272 |             placeholder="Ask anything..."
273 |             className="flex-1 bg-muted/50 border border-border/50 rounded-full px-4 py-2.5 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all"
274 |             disabled={isProcessing}
275 |           />
276 |           <button type="button"
277 |             onClick={handleQuery}
278 |             disabled={!input.trim() || isProcessing || !dataset}
279 |             className="rounded-full size-10 bg-primary flex items-center justify-center text-white hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
280 |           >
281 |             {isProcessing ? (
282 |               <Loader2 className="size-4 animate-spin" />
283 |             ) : (
284 |               <Send className="size-4" />
285 |             )}
286 |           </button>
287 |         </div>
288 |         
289 |         {dataset && (
290 |           <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
291 |             <button type="button"
292 |               onClick={() => setInput('Create bar chart')}
293 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
294 |             >
295 |               <BarIcon className="size-3" /> Bar
296 |             </button>
297 |             <button type="button"
298 |               onClick={() => setInput('Create line chart')}
299 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
300 |             >
301 |               <LineChart className="size-3" /> Line
302 |             </button>
303 |             <button type="button"
304 |               onClick={() => setInput('Create pie chart')}
305 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
306 |             >
307 |               <PieChart className="size-3" /> Pie
308 |             </button>
309 |             <button type="button"
310 |               onClick={() => setInput('Filter by country = USA')}
311 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
312 |             >
313 |               <Filter className="size-3" /> Filter
314 |             </button>
315 |             <button type="button"
316 |               onClick={() => setInput('Clear filters')}
317 |               className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground bg-muted/50 px-2 py-1 rounded-full transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"
318 |             >
319 |               <RefreshCw className="size-3" /> Clear
320 |             </button>
321 |           </div>
322 |         )}
323 |       </div>
324 |     </motion.div>
325 |   );
326 | };
327 | 
328 | export default AnalyticsSidebar;
329 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DashboardFilters.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DashboardFilters.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useMemo } from 'react';
  2 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
  3 | import { X, CalendarIcon } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { format } from 'date-fns';
  5 | import { Button } from '@/shared/components/ui/button';
  6 | import { Calendar } from '@/shared/components/ui/calendar';
  7 | import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/shared/components/ui/popover';
  8 | import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/shared/components/ui/select';
  9 | import { Badge } from '@/shared/components/ui/badge';
 10 | import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/utils';
 11 | import { Dataset } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
 12 | 
 13 | export interface FilterState {
 14 |   dateRange: { from?: Date; to?: Date };
 15 |   columns: Record<string, string>;
 16 | }
 17 | 
 18 | interface DashboardFiltersProps {
 19 |   dataset: Dataset;
 20 |   filters: FilterState;
 21 |   onChange: (filters: FilterState) => void;
 22 | }
 23 | 
 24 | const DashboardFilters = ({ dataset, filters, onChange }: DashboardFiltersProps) => {
 25 |   const stringColumns = useMemo(
 26 |     () => dataset.columns.filter((column) => column.type === 'string'),
 27 |     [dataset.columns],
 28 |   );
 29 | 
 30 |   const uniqueValues = useMemo(() => {
 31 |     const map: Record<string, string[]> = {};
 32 | 
 33 |     stringColumns.forEach((column) => {
 34 |       map[column.name] = [...new Set(dataset.rows.map((row) => String(row[column.name] ?? '')))]
 35 |         .filter(Boolean)
 36 |         .sort();
 37 |     });
 38 | 
 39 |     return map;
 40 |   }, [dataset.rows, stringColumns]);
 41 | 
 42 |   const activeCount =
 43 |     (filters.dateRange.from || filters.dateRange.to ? 1 : 0) +
 44 |     Object.values(filters.columns).filter(Boolean).length;
 45 | 
 46 |   const clearAll = () => onChange({ dateRange: { from: undefined, to: undefined }, columns: {} });
 47 | 
 48 |   const setColumnFilter = (columnName: string, value: string) =>
 49 |     onChange({ ...filters, columns: { ...filters.columns, [columnName]: value } });
 50 | 
 51 |   const removeColumnFilter = (columnName: string) => {
 52 |     const nextColumns = { ...filters.columns };
 53 |     delete nextColumns[columnName];
 54 |     onChange({ ...filters, columns: nextColumns });
 55 |   };
 56 | 
 57 |   return (
 58 |     <motion.div
 59 |       initial={{ opacity: 0, y: -8 }}
 60 |       animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
 61 |       className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card/50 p-3"
 62 |     >
 63 |       <Popover>
 64 |         <PopoverTrigger asChild>
 65 |           <Button
 66 |             variant="outline"
 67 |             size="sm"
 68 |             className={cn(
 69 |               'h-9 gap-2 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm border-border/50 bg-background/80 hover:bg-muted transition-all',
 70 |               filters.dateRange.from && 'border-primary/50 text-primary bg-primary/5',
 71 |             )}
 72 |           >
 73 |             <CalendarIcon className="size-4" />
 74 |             {filters.dateRange.from
 75 |               ? `${format(filters.dateRange.from, 'MMM d')}${filters.dateRange.to ? ` - ${format(filters.dateRange.to, 'MMM d')}` : ''}`
 76 |               : 'Date range'}
 77 |           </Button>
 78 |         </PopoverTrigger>
 79 |         <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
 80 |           <Calendar
 81 |             mode="range"
 82 |             selected={{ from: filters.dateRange.from, to: filters.dateRange.to }}
 83 |             onSelect={(range) =>
 84 |               onChange({ ...filters, dateRange: { from: range?.from, to: range?.to } })
 85 |             }
 86 |             numberOfMonths={2}
 87 |             className="p-2"
 88 |           />
 89 |         </PopoverContent>
 90 |       </Popover>
 91 | 
 92 |       {stringColumns.map((column) => (
 93 |         <Select
 94 |           key={column.name}
 95 |           value={filters.columns[column.name] || ''}
 96 |           onValueChange={(value) => setColumnFilter(column.name, value)}
 97 |         >
 98 |           <SelectTrigger
 99 |             className={cn(
100 |               'h-9 w-auto min-w-[130px] gap-2 font-medium text-sm border-border/50 bg-background/80 rounded-lg',
101 |               filters.columns[column.name] && 'border-primary/50 text-primary bg-primary/5',
102 |             )}
103 |           >
104 |             <SelectValue placeholder={column.name} />
105 |           </SelectTrigger>
106 |           <SelectContent>
107 |             {uniqueValues[column.name]?.map((value) => (
108 |               <SelectItem key={value} value={value} className="text-sm">
109 |                 {value}
110 |               </SelectItem>
111 |             ))}
112 |           </SelectContent>
113 |         </Select>
114 |       ))}
115 | 
116 |       {activeCount > 0 && (
117 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-2">
118 |           {Object.entries(filters.columns)
119 |             .filter(([, value]) => value)
120 |             .map(([columnName, value]) => (
121 |               <Badge
122 |                 key={columnName}
123 |                 variant="secondary"
124 |                 className="gap-1.5 rounded-full border border-border/50 bg-background/80 px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/80"
125 |                 onClick={() => removeColumnFilter(columnName)}
126 |               >
127 |                 <span className="text-muted-foreground">{columnName}:</span> {value}
128 |                 <X className="size-3" />
129 |               </Badge>
130 |             ))}
131 |           <Button
132 |             variant="ghost"
133 |             size="sm"
134 |             onClick={clearAll}
135 |             className="h-8 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted rounded-lg"
136 |           >
137 |             Clear
138 |           </Button>
139 |         </div>
140 |       )}
141 |     </motion.div>
142 |   );
143 | };
144 | 
145 | export default DashboardFilters;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DataQualityPanel.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/DataQualityPanel.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { AlertTriangle, CheckCircle2, AlertCircle, XCircle, ShieldCheck, ShieldAlert, ShieldX } from 'lucide-react';
  2 | import { DataQualityReport } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
  3 | import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/utils';
  4 | 
  5 | interface DataQualityPanelProps {
  6 |   qualityReport: DataQualityReport | null;
  7 | }
  8 | 
  9 | const DataQualityPanel = ({ qualityReport }: DataQualityPanelProps) => {
 10 |   if (!qualityReport) return null;
 11 | 
 12 |   const { summary, issues, columnStats } = qualityReport;
 13 | 
 14 |   const getSeverityIcon = (severity: string) => {
 15 |     switch (severity) {
 16 |       case 'critical': return <XCircle className="size-4 text-red-500" />;
 17 |       case 'high': return <AlertCircle className="size-4 text-amber-500" />;
 18 |       case 'medium': return <AlertTriangle className="size-4 text-yellow-500" />;
 19 |       default: return <AlertCircle className="size-4 text-muted-foreground" />;
 20 |     }
 21 |   };
 22 | 
 23 |   const getScoreColor = (score: number) => {
 24 |     if (score >= 90) return 'text-green-600';
 25 |     if (score >= 70) return 'text-amber-600';
 26 |     return 'text-red-600';
 27 |   };
 28 | 
 29 |   const getScoreIcon = (score: number) => {
 30 |     if (score >= 90) return <ShieldCheck className="size-5 text-green-600" />;
 31 |     if (score >= 70) return <ShieldAlert className="size-5 text-amber-600" />;
 32 |     return <ShieldX className="size-5 text-red-600" />;
 33 |   };
 34 | 
 35 |   return (
 36 |     <div className="rounded-xl border border-border/50 bg-card p-5 shadow-sm">
 37 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between pb-4 border-b border-border/50">
 38 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
 39 |           {getScoreIcon(summary.qualityScore)}
 40 |           <div>
 41 |             <p className="text-base font-semibold text-foreground">Data Quality Report</p>
 42 |             <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Automated validation results</p>
 43 |           </div>
 44 |         </div>
 45 |         <div className="text-right">
 46 |           <p className={cn('text-3xl font-bold', getScoreColor(summary.qualityScore))}>
 47 |             {summary.qualityScore}%
 48 |           </p>
 49 |           <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Quality Score</p>
 50 |         </div>
 51 |       </div>
 52 | 
 53 |       <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 py-4">
 54 |         <div className={cn(
 55 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 56 |           summary.duplicates > 0 ? 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 57 |         )}>
 58 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Duplicates</p>
 59 |           <p className={cn(
 60 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 61 |             summary.duplicates > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'
 62 |           )}>
 63 |             {summary.duplicates}
 64 |           </p>
 65 |         </div>
 66 |         <div className={cn(
 67 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 68 |           summary.outliers > 0 ? 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 69 |         )}>
 70 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Outliers</p>
 71 |           <p className={cn(
 72 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 73 |             summary.outliers > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'
 74 |           )}>
 75 |             {summary.outliers}
 76 |           </p>
 77 |         </div>
 78 |         <div className={cn(
 79 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 80 |           summary.missingValues > 0 ? 'border-amber-200 bg-amber-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 81 |         )}>
 82 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Missing</p>
 83 |           <p className={cn(
 84 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 85 |             summary.missingValues > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'
 86 |           )}>
 87 |             {summary.missingValues}
 88 |           </p>
 89 |         </div>
 90 |         <div className={cn(
 91 |           'rounded-lg border p-3',
 92 |           summary.invalidValues > 0 ? 'border-red-200 bg-red-50' : 'border-green-200 bg-green-50'
 93 |         )}>
 94 |           <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Invalid</p>
 95 |           <p className={cn(
 96 |             'text-xl font-semibold mt-1',
 97 |             summary.invalidValues > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-green-600'
 98 |           )}>
 99 |             {summary.invalidValues}
100 |           </p>
101 |         </div>
102 |       </div>
103 | 
104 |       {issues.length > 0 && (
105 |         <div className="pt-4 border-t border-border/50">
106 |           <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-3">Detected Issues</p>
107 |           <div className="space-y-2">
108 |             {issues.slice(0, 6).map((issue, idx) => (
109 |               <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-3 text-sm">
110 |                 {getSeverityIcon(issue.severity)}
111 |                 <span className="text-foreground flex-1">{issue.message}</span>
112 |                 <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">({issue.count})</span>
113 |               </div>
114 |             ))}
115 |             {issues.length > 6 && (
116 |               <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center pt-2">+{issues.length - 6} more issues</p>
117 |             )}
118 |           </div>
119 |         </div>
120 |       )}
121 | 
122 |       {columnStats.some(c => c.missing > 0 || c.outliers > 0 || c.invalid > 0) && (
123 |         <div className="pt-4 border-t border-border/50 mt-4">
124 |           <p className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground mb-3">Column Statistics</p>
125 |           <div className="overflow-x-auto">
126 |             <table className="w-full text-sm">
127 |               <thead>
128 |                 <tr className="text-left text-muted-foreground">
129 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Column</th>
130 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Type</th>
131 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Missing</th>
132 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Outliers</th>
133 |                   <th className="pb-2 font-medium">Invalid</th>
134 |                 </tr>
135 |               </thead>
136 |               <tbody>
137 |                 {columnStats.filter(c => c.missing > 0 || c.outliers > 0 || c.invalid > 0).map((col, idx) => (
138 |                   <tr key={idx} className="border-t border-border/50">
139 |                     <td className="py-2 text-foreground font-medium">{col.name}</td>
140 |                     <td className="py-2 text-muted-foreground">{col.type}</td>
141 |                     <td className={col.missing > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'}>{col.missing}</td>
142 |                     <td className={col.outliers > 0 ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-green-600'}>{col.outliers}</td>
143 |                     <td className={col.invalid > 0 ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-green-600'}>{col.invalid}</td>
144 |                   </tr>
145 |                 ))}
146 |               </tbody>
147 |             </table>
148 |           </div>
149 |         </div>
150 |       )}
151 |     </div>
152 |   );
153 | };
154 | 
155 | export default DataQualityPanel;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/ExportMenu.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/ExportMenu.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { useState } from 'react';
 2 | import { Download, FileText, FileSpreadsheet, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { Button } from '@/shared/components/ui/button';
 4 | import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuSeparator } from '@/shared/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
 5 | import { toast } from 'sonner';
 6 | 
 7 | export function ExportMenu({ dataset, charts, insights, disabled }) {
 8 |   const [exporting, setExporting] = useState(null);
 9 | 
10 |   const exportToFormat = async (format) => {
11 |     if (!dataset) {
12 |       toast.error('No data to export');
13 |       return;
14 |     }
15 | 
16 |     setExporting(format);
17 |     
18 |     try {
19 |       const response = await fetch('/api/automation/report', {
20 |         method: 'POST',
21 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
22 |         body: JSON.stringify({
23 |           name: dataset.name,
24 |           rows: dataset.rows,
25 |           columns: dataset.columns,
26 |           insights,
27 |           charts,
28 |           format
29 |         })
30 |       });
31 | 
32 |       if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Export failed');
33 | 
34 |       const blob = await response.blob();
35 |       const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
36 |       const a = document.createElement('a');
37 |       a.href = url;
38 |       a.download = `${dataset.name || 'report'}.${format}`;
39 |       a.click();
40 |       URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
41 |       
42 |       toast.success(`Exported as ${format.toUpperCase()}`);
43 |     } catch (error) {
44 |       console.error('Export error:', error);
45 |       toast.error('Export failed');
46 |     } finally {
47 |       setExporting(null);
48 |     }
49 |   };
50 | 
51 |   return (
52 |     <DropdownMenu>
53 |       <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
54 |         <Button variant="outline" size="sm" disabled={disabled || exporting !== null}>
55 |           {exporting ? <Loader2 className="mr-2 size-4 animate-spin" /> : <Download className="mr-2 size-4" />}
56 |           Export
57 |         </Button>
58 |       </DropdownMenuTrigger>
59 |       <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
60 |         <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => exportToFormat('html')}>
61 |           <FileText className="mr-2 size-4" />
62 |           HTML Report
63 |         </DropdownMenuItem>
64 |         <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => exportToFormat('pdf')}>
65 |           <FileText className="mr-2 size-4" />
66 |           PDF Document
67 |         </DropdownMenuItem>
68 |         <DropdownMenuSeparator />
69 |         <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => exportToFormat('excel')}>
70 |           <FileSpreadsheet className="mr-2 size-4" />
71 |           Excel Spreadsheet
72 |         </DropdownMenuItem>
73 |       </DropdownMenuContent>
74 |     </DropdownMenu>
75 |   );
76 | }
77 | 
78 | export default ExportMenu;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/KPICard.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/KPICard.tsx`

```tsx
 1 | import { motion } from 'framer-motion';
 2 | import { TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus, DollarSign, Package, Percent, Star, Table2, Columns3, BarChart3, ArrowUpRight, ArrowDownRight, Shield, Globe, Code, AlertTriangle, Siren } from 'lucide-react';
 3 | import { KPI } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
 4 | import { cn } from '@/shared/lib/utils';
 5 | 
 6 | const iconMap: Record<string, React.ElementType> = {
 7 |   dollar: DollarSign,
 8 |   package: Package,
 9 |   percent: Percent,
10 |   star: Star,
11 |   rows: Table2,
12 |   columns: Columns3,
13 |   chart: BarChart3,
14 |   shield: Shield,
15 |   globe: Globe,
16 |   code: Code,
17 |   alert: AlertTriangle,
18 |   risk: Siren,
19 | };
20 | 
21 | const statusColors: Record<string, string> = {
22 |   good: 'border-success/40 bg-success/10 text-success',
23 |   warning: 'border-yellow-500/40 bg-yellow-500/10 text-yellow-500',
24 |   critical: 'border-destructive/40 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive',
25 | };
26 | 
27 | const trendColors: Record<string, string> = {
28 |   up: 'text-success',
29 |   down: 'text-destructive',
30 |   stable: 'text-muted-foreground',
31 | };
32 | 
33 | interface KPICardProps {
34 |   kpi: KPI;
35 |   index: number;
36 | }
37 | 
38 | const KPICard = ({ kpi, index }: KPICardProps) => {
39 |   const Icon = iconMap[kpi.icon] || DollarSign;
40 |   const trend = kpi.trend ?? 'stable';
41 |   const TrendIcon = trend === 'up' ? TrendingUp : trend === 'down' ? TrendingDown : Minus;
42 |   const isPositive = (kpi.change ?? 0) >= 0;
43 |   const sparklineValues = kpi.sparkline ?? [];
44 |   const maxValue = sparklineValues.length > 0 ? Math.max(...sparklineValues) : 0;
45 |   const minValue = sparklineValues.length > 0 ? Math.min(...sparklineValues) : 0;
46 |   const range = maxValue - minValue || 1;
47 |   const points = sparklineValues.map((value, pointIndex) => {
48 |     const x = sparklineValues.length === 1 ? 100 : (pointIndex / Math.max(sparklineValues.length - 1, 1)) * 100;
49 |     const y = 28 - (((value - minValue) / range) * 24);
50 |     return `${x},${y}`;
51 |   }).join(' ');
52 | 
53 |   const colorSchemes = [
54 |     { bg: 'bg-blue-50', border: 'border-blue-100', icon: 'text-blue-600', trend: 'text-blue-600', trendBg: 'bg-blue-50' },
55 |     { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', border: 'border-emerald-100', icon: 'text-emerald-600', trend: 'text-emerald-600', trendBg: 'bg-emerald-50' },
56 |     { bg: 'bg-violet-50', border: 'border-violet-100', icon: 'text-violet-600', trend: 'text-violet-600', trendBg: 'bg-violet-50' },
57 |     { bg: 'bg-amber-50', border: 'border-amber-100', icon: 'text-amber-600', trend: 'text-amber-600', trendBg: 'bg-amber-50' },
58 |   ];
59 |   const scheme = colorSchemes[index % colorSchemes.length];
60 | 
61 |   return (
62 |     <motion.div
63 |       initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 16 }}
64 |       animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
65 |       transition={{ delay: index * 0.05, duration: 0.3 }}
66 |       whileHover={{ y: -2 }}
67 |       className={cn(
68 |         'group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border bg-card p-5 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:shadow-md',
69 |         scheme.border
70 |       )}
71 |     >
72 |       <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
73 |         <div className={cn('flex size-10 items-center justify-center rounded-lg', scheme.bg)}>
74 |           <Icon className={cn('size-5', scheme.icon)} />
75 |         </div>
76 |         {kpi.change !== undefined && (
77 |           <div className={cn('flex items-center gap-1 rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium', scheme.trendBg, scheme.trend)}>
78 |             {isPositive ? (
79 |               <ArrowUpRight className="size-3" />
80 |             ) : (
81 |               <ArrowDownRight className="size-3" />
82 |             )}
83 |             <span>{Math.abs(kpi.change ?? 0)}%</span>
84 |           </div>
85 |         )}
86 |       </div>
87 |       
88 |       <div className="mt-4">
89 |         <p className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">{kpi.title}</p>
90 |         <p className="mt-1 text-2xl font-semibold text-foreground">{kpi.value}</p>
91 |       </div>
92 |     </motion.div>
93 |   );
94 | };
95 | 
96 | export default KPICard;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/LlamaQueryBuilder.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/LlamaQueryBuilder.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2 | import { Send, Loader2, AlertCircle, BarChart3, Database, Zap } from 'lucide-react';
  3 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from '@/shared/components/ui/card';
  4 | import { Button } from '@/shared/components/ui/button';
  5 | import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from '@/shared/components/ui/alert';
  6 | import { Textarea } from '@/shared/components/ui/textarea';
  7 | import { Badge } from '@/shared/components/ui/badge';
  8 | 
  9 | export function LlamaQueryBuilder({ dataset, className }) {
 10 |   const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
 11 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 12 |   const [result, setResult] = useState(null);
 13 |   const [error, setError] = useState(null);
 14 |   const [llamaStatus, setLlamaStatus] = useState(null);
 15 | 
 16 |   useEffect(() => {
 17 |     checkLlamaStatus();
 18 |   }, []);
 19 | 
 20 |   const checkLlamaStatus = async () => {
 21 |     try {
 22 |       const res = await fetch('/api/llama/status');
 23 |       const data = await res.json();
 24 |       setLlamaStatus(data);
 25 |     } catch (err) {
 26 |       setLlamaStatus({ ollama_running: false, error: err.message });
 27 |     }
 28 |   };
 29 | 
 30 |   const handleSubmit = async () => {
 31 |     if (!query.trim() || !dataset?.rows?.length) return;
 32 | 
 33 |     setLoading(true);
 34 |     setError(null);
 35 |     setResult(null);
 36 | 
 37 |     try {
 38 |       const response = await fetch('/api/llama/query', {
 39 |         method: 'POST',
 40 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
 41 |         body: JSON.stringify({
 42 |           query: query.trim(),
 43 |           rows: dataset.rows,
 44 |           columns: dataset.columns,
 45 |           name: dataset.name,
 46 |         }),
 47 |       });
 48 | 
 49 |       const data = await response.json();
 50 | 
 51 |       if (!data.success) {
 52 |         setError(data.error);
 53 |         return;
 54 |       }
 55 | 
 56 |       setResult(data);
 57 |     } catch (err) {
 58 |       setError(err.message);
 59 |     } finally {
 60 |       setLoading(false);
 61 |     }
 62 |   };
 63 | 
 64 |   const getConfidenceColor = (confidence) => {
 65 |     if (confidence >= 0.8) return 'text-green-600';
 66 |     if (confidence >= 0.6) return 'text-yellow-600';
 67 |     return 'text-red-600';
 68 |   };
 69 | 
 70 |   const getConfidenceLabel = (confidence) => {
 71 |     if (confidence >= 0.8) return 'High';
 72 |     if (confidence >= 0.6) return 'Medium';
 73 |     return 'Low';
 74 |   };
 75 | 
 76 |   const exampleQueries = [
 77 |     'Show top 10 products by revenue',
 78 |     'Compare sales by region',
 79 |     'Trend of orders over time',
 80 |     'Average salary by department',
 81 |     'Count customers per country',
 82 |   ];
 83 | 
 84 |   return (
 85 |     <div className={`space-y-4 ${className || ''}`}>
 86 |       <Card>
 87 |         <CardHeader className="pb-3">
 88 |           <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
 89 |             <div>
 90 |               <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
 91 |                 <Zap className="size-5 text-purple-500" />
 92 |                 Llama 3.2 Query
 93 |               </CardTitle>
 94 |               <CardDescription>
 95 |                 Natural language analytics with dual-layer validation
 96 |               </CardDescription>
 97 |             </div>
 98 |             <Badge
 99 |               variant={llamaStatus?.ollama_running ? 'default' : 'destructive'}
100 |               className={llamaStatus?.ollama_running ? 'bg-green-500' : ''}
101 |             >
102 |               {llamaStatus?.ollama_running ? 'Online' : 'Offline'}
103 |             </Badge>
104 |           </div>
105 |         </CardHeader>
106 |         <CardContent className="space-y-4">
107 |           {!llamaStatus?.ollama_running && (
108 |             <Alert variant="destructive">
109 |               <AlertCircle className="size-4" />
110 |               <AlertTitle>Llama 3.2 not available</AlertTitle>
111 |               <AlertDescription>
112 |                 Install Ollama from https://ollama.ai then run: ollama pull llama3.2
113 |               </AlertDescription>
114 |             </Alert>
115 |           )}
116 | 
117 |           <div className="space-y-2">
118 |             <Textarea
119 |               value={query}
120 |               onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
121 |               placeholder="Ask anything about your data..."
122 |               className="min-h-[100px]"
123 |               disabled={!llamaStatus?.ollama_running || loading}
124 |             />
125 |             <div className="flex gap-2">
126 |               <Button
127 |                 onClick={handleSubmit}
128 |                 disabled={loading || !query.trim() || !dataset?.rows?.length || !llamaStatus?.ollama_running}
129 |                 className="flex-1"
130 |               >
131 |                 {loading ? (
132 |                   <>
133 |                     <Loader2 className="mr-2 size-4 animate-spin" />
134 |                     Processing...
135 |                   </>
136 |                 ) : (
137 |                   <>
138 |                     <Send className="mr-2 size-4" />
139 |                     Analyze
140 |                   </>
141 |                 )}
142 |               </Button>
143 |               <Button
144 |                 variant="outline"
145 |                 onClick={() => setQuery('')}
146 |                 disabled={loading}
147 |               >
148 |                 Clear
149 |               </Button>
150 |             </div>
151 |           </div>
152 | 
153 |           {!query && (
154 |             <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
155 |               <p className="mb-2">Try example queries:</p>
156 |               <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
157 |                 {exampleQueries.map((ex, i) => (
158 |                   <Badge
159 |                     key={i}
160 |                     variant="outline"
161 |                     className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted"
162 |                     onClick={() => setQuery(ex)}
163 |                   >
164 |                     {ex}
165 |                   </Badge>
166 |                 ))}
167 |               </div>
168 |             </div>
169 |           )}
170 | 
171 |           {error && (
172 |             <Alert variant="destructive">
173 |               <AlertCircle className="size-4" />
174 |               <AlertDescription>{error}</AlertDescription>
175 |             </Alert>
176 |           )}
177 | 
178 |           {result && (
179 |             <div className="space-y-4 pt-2">
180 |               <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
181 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
182 |                   <span className="text-muted-foreground">Confidence:</span>
183 |                   <span className={`font-bold ${getConfidenceColor(result.metadata?.overall_confidence)}`}>
184 |                     {getConfidenceLabel(result.metadata?.overall_confidence)} (
185 |                     {((result.metadata?.overall_confidence || 0) * 100).toFixed(0)}%)
186 |                   </span>
187 |                 </div>
188 |                 {result.metadata?.errors_corrected > 0 && (
189 |                   <Badge variant="outline">
190 |                     {result.metadata.errors_corrected} corrections
191 |                   </Badge>
192 |                 )}
193 |               </div>
194 | 
195 |               {result.chart && (
196 |                 <Card>
197 |                   <CardHeader className="pb-2">
198 |                     <CardTitle className="text-base flex items-center gap-2">
199 |                       <BarChart3 className="size-4" />
200 |                       {result.chart.title}
201 |                     </CardTitle>
202 |                   </CardHeader>
203 |                   <CardContent>
204 |                     <div className="space-y-1">
205 |                       {result.chart.data?.slice(0, 8).map((item, i) => (
206 |                         <div
207 |                           key={i}
208 |                           className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm"
209 |                         >
210 |                           <span className="truncate max-w-[150px]">
211 |                             {item[result.chart.xKey] || item.name || 'Unknown'}
212 |                           </span>
213 |                           <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
214 |                             <div
215 |                               className="h-2 bg-purple-500 rounded"
216 |                               style={{
217 |                                 width: `${Math.min(
218 |                                   100,
219 |                                   ((item.value || item.count) /
220 |                                     (result.chart.data[0]?.value || 1)) *
221 |                                     100
222 |                                 )}px`,
223 |                               }}
224 |                             />
225 |                             <span className="font-mono w-20 text-right">
226 |                               {item.value?.toLocaleString() ||
227 |                                 item.count?.toLocaleString()}
228 |                             </span>
229 |                           </div>
230 |                         </div>
231 |                       ))}
232 |                     </div>
233 |                   </CardContent>
234 |                 </Card>
235 |               )}
236 | 
237 |               {result.sql && (
238 |                 <div className="p-3 bg-muted rounded-lg text-xs font-mono overflow-x-auto">
239 |                   <pre className="text-green-600">{result.sql}</pre>
240 |                 </div>
241 |               )}
242 | 
243 |               {result.analysis && (
244 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-xs">
245 |                   <Badge variant="outline">
246 |                     Intent: {result.analysis.intent}
247 |                   </Badge>
248 |                   <Badge variant="outline">
249 |                     Column: {result.analysis.primary_column}
250 |                   </Badge>
251 |                   <Badge variant="outline">
252 |                     Agg: {result.analysis.aggregation}
253 |                   </Badge>
254 |                   <Badge variant="outline">
255 |                     Chart: {result.chart?.type}
256 |                   </Badge>
257 |                 </div>
258 |               )}
259 |             </div>
260 |           )}
261 |         </CardContent>
262 |       </Card>
263 |     </div>
264 |   );
265 | }
266 | 
267 | export default LlamaQueryBuilder;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/RecommendationsPanel.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/RecommendationsPanel.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
  2 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
  3 | import { Lightbulb, AlertTriangle, TrendingUp, BarChart3, RefreshCw, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
  4 | import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/shared/components/ui/card';
  5 | import { Badge } from '@/shared/components/ui/badge';
  6 | import { Button } from '@/shared/components/ui/button';
  7 | import { ScrollArea } from '@/shared/components/ui/scroll-area';
  8 | import { toast } from 'sonner';
  9 | 
 10 | export function RecommendationsPanel() {
 11 |   const { dataset: activeDataset } = useData();
 12 |   const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState([]);
 13 |   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
 14 |   const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(null);
 15 | 
 16 |   const fetchRecommendations = async () => {
 17 |     if (!activeDataset?.rows?.length) return;
 18 |     
 19 |     setLoading(true);
 20 |     try {
 21 |       const response = await fetch('/api/automation/analyze', {
 22 |         method: 'POST',
 23 |         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
 24 |         body: JSON.stringify({
 25 |           name: activeDataset.name,
 26 |           rows: activeDataset.rows,
 27 |           columns: activeDataset.columns
 28 |         })
 29 |       });
 30 | 
 31 |       if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Analysis failed');
 32 |       
 33 |       const data = await response.json();
 34 |       setRecommendations(data.recommendations || []);
 35 |     } catch (error) {
 36 |       console.error('Recommendations error:', error);
 37 |       toast.error('Failed to generate recommendations');
 38 |     } finally {
 39 |       setLoading(false);
 40 |     }
 41 |   };
 42 | 
 43 |   useEffect(() => {
 44 |     if (activeDataset?.rows?.length) {
 45 |       fetchRecommendations();
 46 |     }
 47 |   }, [activeDataset?.id]);
 48 | 
 49 |   const getIcon = (type) => {
 50 |     switch (type) {
 51 |       case 'outlier': return <AlertTriangle className="size-4 text-amber-500" />;
 52 |       case 'distribution': return <BarChart3 className="size-4 text-blue-500" />;
 53 |       case 'data_quality': return <AlertTriangle className="size-4 text-red-500" />;
 54 |       case 'correlation': return <TrendingUp className="size-4 text-green-500" />;
 55 |       case 'missing_data': return <AlertTriangle className="size-4 text-orange-500" />;
 56 |       default: return <Lightbulb className="size-4 text-yellow-500" />;
 57 |     }
 58 |   };
 59 | 
 60 |   const getPriorityColor = (priority) => {
 61 |     switch (priority) {
 62 |       case 'high': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-900 dark:text-red-200';
 63 |       case 'medium': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-900 dark:text-amber-200';
 64 |       default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200';
 65 |     }
 66 |   };
 67 | 
 68 |   if (!activeDataset) {
 69 |     return (
 70 |       <Card>
 71 |         <CardHeader>
 72 |           <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
 73 |             <Lightbulb className="size-5" />
 74 |             Recommendations
 75 |           </CardTitle>
 76 |         </CardHeader>
 77 |         <CardContent>
 78 |           <p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">Upload a dataset to get AI-powered recommendations.</p>
 79 |         </CardContent>
 80 |       </Card>
 81 |     );
 82 |   }
 83 | 
 84 |   return (
 85 |     <Card>
 86 |       <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2">
 87 |         <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-base">
 88 |           <Lightbulb className="size-5" />
 89 |           AI Recommendations
 90 |         </CardTitle>
 91 |         <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={fetchRecommendations} disabled={loading}>
 92 |           {loading ? <Loader2 className="size-4 animate-spin" /> : <RefreshCw className="size-4" />}
 93 |         </Button>
 94 |       </CardHeader>
 95 |       <CardContent>
 96 |         {loading ? (
 97 |           <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8">
 98 |             <Loader2 className="size-6 animate-spin text-muted-foreground" />
 99 |           </div>
100 |         ) : recommendations.length === 0 ? (
101 |           <p className="text-muted-foreground text-sm">No recommendations available.</p>
102 |         ) : (
103 |           <ScrollArea className="h-[300px] pr-4">
104 |             <div className="space-y-2">
105 |               {recommendations.slice(0, 10).map((rec, index) => (
106 |                 <div
107 |                   key={index}
108 |                   className="rounded-lg border p-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50"
109 |                   onClick={() => setExpanded(expanded === index ? null : index)}
110 |                 >
111 |                   <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
112 |                     {getIcon(rec.type)}
113 |                     <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
114 |                       <p className="font-medium text-sm">{rec.title}</p>
115 |                       <p className="text-muted-foreground text-xs mt-1">{rec.message}</p>
116 |                       {rec.action && expanded === index && (
117 |                         <p className="text-muted-foreground text-xs mt-2 italic">{rec.action}</p>
118 |                       )}
119 |                     </div>
120 |                     <Badge variant="outline" className={getPriorityColor(rec.priority)}>
121 |                       {rec.priority}
122 |                     </Badge>
123 |                   </div>
124 |                 </div>
125 |               ))}
126 |             </div>
127 |           </ScrollArea>
128 |         )}
129 |       </CardContent>
130 |     </Card>
131 |   );
132 | }
133 | 
134 | export default RecommendationsPanel;
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/SchemaDashboardChat.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/SchemaDashboardChat.tsx`

```tsx
  1 | import { useMemo, useState } from "react";
  2 | import {
  3 |   Bot,
  4 |   BrainCircuit,
  5 |   Loader2,
  6 |   MessageSquareText,
  7 |   Send,
  8 |   ShieldCheck,
  9 |   Sparkles,
 10 |   Wand2,
 11 |   Wrench,
 12 | } from "lucide-react";
 13 | import { generateDynamicQuestionSuggestions } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dynamicQuestionSuggestions";
 14 | import type { useDashboardAiController } from "@/features/dashboard/hooks/useDashboardAiController";
 15 | import { api } from "@/features/data/api/dataApi";
 16 | 
 17 | type DatasetLike = {
 18 |   id?: string;
 19 |   name?: string;
 20 |   rows?: any[];
 21 |   columns?: any[];
 22 | };
 23 | 
 24 | type Props = {
 25 |   dataset: DatasetLike;
 26 |   controller?: ReturnType<typeof useDashboardAiController>;
 27 |   currentDashboard?: unknown;
 28 |   onCommand: (command: any) => void;
 29 |   onSend?: (query: string) => void;
 30 |   collapsible?: boolean;
 31 | };
 32 | 
 33 | const modes = [
 34 |   { id: "Build", icon: Wand2, prompt: "Build dashboard automatically" },
 35 |   { id: "Fix", icon: Wrench, prompt: "fix dashboard and generate 7 useful charts" },
 36 |   { id: "Explain", icon: MessageSquareText, prompt: "Explain this dashboard" },
 37 |   { id: "Train", icon: BrainCircuit, prompt: "Train memory from this dashboard pattern" },
 38 | ] as const;
 39 | 
 40 | export default function SchemaDashboardChat({
 41 |   dataset,
 42 |   controller,
 43 |   currentDashboard,
 44 |   onCommand,
 45 |   onSend,
 46 | }: Props) {
 47 |   const [input, setInput] = useState("");
 48 |   const [localLoading, setLocalLoading] = useState(false);
 49 |   const [provider, setProvider] = useState("schema-safe");
 50 |   const [activeMode, setActiveMode] =
 51 |     useState<(typeof modes)[number]["id"]>("Build");
 52 |   const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Array<{ role: "user" | "assistant"; content: string }>>([
 53 |     {
 54 |       role: "assistant",
 55 |       content:
 56 |         "Schema-trained assistant ready. I can build, fix, explain, or train dashboard patterns without sending raw rows to the LLM.",
 57 |     },
 58 |   ]);
 59 |   const loading = controller?.loading || localLoading;
 60 |   const visibleMessages = controller?.messages || messages;
 61 | 
 62 |   const suggestions = useMemo(() => {
 63 |     const dynamic = generateDynamicQuestionSuggestions(dataset as any, 8);
 64 | 
 65 |     const fixed = [
 66 |       "Build dashboard automatically",
 67 |       "fix dashboard and generate 7 useful charts",
 68 |       "Show average salary_usd by country",
 69 |       "Create pie chart of education",
 70 |       "Show salary_usd distribution",
 71 |       "Add KPI for highest salary_usd",
 72 |       "Show salary_usd vs experience as scatter",
 73 |       "Filter country = USA",
 74 |     ];
 75 | 
 76 |     const averageAlreadySuggested = dynamic.some((prompt) => /show average/i.test(prompt));
 77 |     const merged = [
 78 |       ...(dynamic || []),
 79 |       ...fixed.filter((prompt) => !(averageAlreadySuggested && /show average/i.test(prompt))),
 80 |     ];
 81 | 
 82 |     return [...new Set(merged)].slice(0, 10);
 83 |   }, [dataset]);
 84 | 
 85 |   const dashboardChartCount = useMemo(() => {
 86 |     const dashboard = currentDashboard as { charts?: unknown[] } | undefined;
 87 |     return Array.isArray(dashboard?.charts) ? dashboard.charts.length : 0;
 88 |   }, [currentDashboard]);
 89 | 
 90 |   async function submit(explicitQuery?: string) {
 91 |     const query = (explicitQuery || input).trim();
 92 |     if (!query || loading) return;
 93 | 
 94 |     setInput("");
 95 |     setLocalLoading(true);
 96 | 
 97 |     if (!controller) {
 98 |       setMessages((current) => [...current, { role: "user", content: query }]);
 99 |     }
100 | 
101 |     let resultMessage = "";
102 |     try {
103 |       if (controller) {
104 |         if (/explain|why|summary|describe/i.test(query)) {
105 |           await controller.askChat(query);
106 |         } else {
107 |           await controller.runCommand(query);
108 |         }
109 |       } else {
110 |         onSend?.(query);
111 |         const command = await api.sendDashboardCommand(
112 |           dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
113 |           query,
114 |           currentDashboard,
115 |           { rows: dataset?.rows || [], columns: dataset?.columns || [] },
116 |         );
117 |         setProvider(command.provider || "schema-safe");
118 |         onCommand(command);
119 |         resultMessage = command.message || "";
120 |       }
121 | 
122 |       if (!controller) {
123 |         setMessages((current) => [
124 |           ...current,
125 |           {
126 |             role: "assistant",
127 |             content:
128 |               resultMessage ||
129 |               (!controller && /explain|why|summary|describe/i.test(query)
130 |                 ? "Explanation request sent to schema chat."
131 |                 : "Dashboard command sent. Values will be calculated locally."),
132 |           },
133 |         ]);
134 |       }
135 |     } catch (error) {
136 |       if (!controller) {
137 |         setMessages((current) => [
138 |           ...current,
139 |           {
140 |             role: "assistant",
141 |             content: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Command failed.",
142 |           },
143 |         ]);
144 |       }
145 |     } finally {
146 |       setLocalLoading(false);
147 |     }
148 |   }
149 | 
150 |   return (
151 |     <aside className="sticky top-5 h-fit rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/70 bg-slate-950/90 shadow-2xl shadow-black/30 backdrop-blur">
152 |       <div className="border-b border-slate-800 p-4">
153 |         <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
154 |           <div className="grid size-11 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-violet-600/20 text-violet-200">
155 |             <Bot className="size-5" />
156 |           </div>
157 | 
158 |           <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
159 |             <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-white">Schema AI Studio</h3>
160 |             <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-400">{dataset?.name || "Current dataset"}</p>
161 |           </div>
162 | 
163 |           <span className="rounded-full border border-emerald-500/40 bg-emerald-500/10 px-2 py-1 text-[11px] text-emerald-200">
164 |             Schema-only
165 |           </span>
166 |         </div>
167 | 
168 |         <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
169 |           {modes.map((mode) => {
170 |             const Icon = mode.icon;
171 | 
172 |             return (
173 |               <button
174 |                 key={mode.id}
175 |                 type="button"
176 |                 onClick={() => {
177 |                   setActiveMode(mode.id);
178 |                   void submit(mode.prompt);
179 |                 }}
180 |                 className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-xl border px-3 py-1.5 text-xs transition ${
181 |                   activeMode === mode.id
182 |                     ? "border-violet-500/60 bg-violet-500/15 text-violet-100"
183 |                     : "border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 hover:border-violet-500/60"
184 |                 }`}
185 |               >
186 |                 <Icon className="size-3.5" />
187 |                 {mode.id}
188 |               </button>
189 |             );
190 |           })}
191 |         </div>
192 |       </div>
193 | 
194 |       <div className="border-b border-slate-800 p-4">
195 |         <div className="mb-2 flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-300">
196 |           <Sparkles className="size-3.5 text-violet-300" />
197 |           Trained prompts
198 |         </div>
199 | 
200 |         <div className="grid gap-2">
201 |           {suggestions.map((prompt) => (
202 |             <button
203 |               key={prompt}
204 |               type="button"
205 |               onClick={() => submit(prompt)}
206 |               disabled={loading}
207 |               className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900/80 px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs text-slate-300 transition hover:border-violet-500/60 hover:bg-violet-500/10 hover:text-violet-100 disabled:opacity-50"
208 |             >
209 |               {prompt}
210 |             </button>
211 |           ))}
212 |         </div>
213 |       </div>
214 | 
215 |       {controller?.dashboardHealth && (
216 |         <div className="border-b border-slate-800 px-4 py-3">
217 |           <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
218 |             <span className="text-slate-400">Guardian health</span>
219 |             <span className={controller.dashboardHealth.status === "failed" ? "text-red-300" : controller.dashboardHealth.status === "warning" ? "text-amber-300" : "text-emerald-300"}>
220 |               {controller.dashboardHealth.status} {controller.dashboardHealth.score}/100
221 |             </span>
222 |           </div>
223 |           <div className="mt-2 h-2 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-800">
224 |             <div
225 |               className="h-full rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-400 to-cyan-400"
226 |               style={{ width: `${Math.max(12, Math.min(100, controller.dashboardHealth.score || 0))}%` }}
227 |             />
228 |           </div>
229 |         </div>
230 |       )}
231 | 
232 |       <div className="max-h-72 space-y-3 overflow-y-auto p-4">
233 |         {visibleMessages.map((message, index) => (
234 |           <div
235 |             key={`${(message as any).id || message.role}-${index}`}
236 |             className={
237 |               message.role === "user"
238 |                 ? "ml-6 rounded-2xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-white"
239 |                 : "mr-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-200"
240 |             }
241 |           >
242 |             {message.content}
243 |           </div>
244 |         ))}
245 | 
246 |         {loading && (
247 |           <div className="mr-6 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-800 bg-slate-900 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
248 |             <Loader2 className="size-4 animate-spin" />
249 |             Processing schema-safe command...
250 |           </div>
251 |         )}
252 |       </div>
253 | 
254 |       <div className="border-t border-slate-800 p-4">
255 |         <form
256 |           className="flex gap-2"
257 |           onSubmit={(event) => {
258 |             event.preventDefault();
259 |             void submit();
260 |           }}
261 |         >
262 |           <input
263 |             value={input}
264 |             onChange={(event) => setInput(event.target.value)}
265 |             placeholder="Ask: build the strict salary dashboard"
266 |             className="min-w-0 flex-1 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500 focus:border-violet-500"
267 |           />
268 | 
269 |           <button
270 |             type="submit"
271 |             aria-label="Send dashboard command"
272 |             disabled={loading || !input.trim()}
273 |             className="grid size-10 place-items-center rounded-xl bg-violet-600 text-white transition hover:bg-violet-500 disabled:opacity-50"
274 |           >
275 |             <Send className="size-4" />
276 |           </button>
277 |         </form>
278 | 
279 |         <div className="mt-3 flex items-center justify-between text-[11px] text-slate-500">
280 |           <span>Mode: {activeMode}</span>
281 |           <span>{controller?.error ? "Backend fallback active" : dashboardChartCount ? `${dashboardChartCount} charts` : `Provider: ${provider}`}</span>
282 |         </div>
283 | 
284 |         <div className="mt-2 flex items-center gap-1 text-[11px] text-emerald-300">
285 |           <ShieldCheck className="size-3.5" />
286 |           Schema-only AI enabled
287 |         </div>
288 |       </div>
289 |     </aside>
290 |   );
291 | }
292 | 
```

```tsx
  1 | import { Fragment, useMemo, useRef } from "react";

  3 |   Area,

  6 |   BarChart,
  7 |   CartesianGrid,
  8 |   Cell,
  9 |   ComposedChart,
 10 |   Legend,
 11 |   Line,
 12 |   LineChart,
 13 |   Pie,
 14 |   PieChart,
 15 |   PolarAngleAxis,
 16 |   PolarGrid,
 17 |   PolarRadiusAxis,
 18 |   Radar,
 19 |   RadarChart,
 20 |   ResponsiveContainer,
 21 |   Scatter,
 22 |   ScatterChart,
 23 |   Tooltip,
 24 |   XAxis,
 25 |   YAxis,
 26 | } from "recharts";
 27 | import { Download, MoreHorizontal, Trash2, Copy, AlertCircle } from "lucide-react";
 28 | import { Button } from "@/shared/components/ui/button";
 29 | import {
 30 |   DropdownMenu,
 31 |   DropdownMenuContent,
 32 |   DropdownMenuItem,
 33 |   DropdownMenuTrigger,
 34 | } from "@/shared/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
 35 | import type { ChartType } from "@/features/dashboard/types/dashboardTypes";
 36 | import type { DashboardChart } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 37 | 
 38 | const COLORS = ["#7c3aed", "#2563eb", "#06b6d4", "#22c55e", "#f59e0b", "#ef4444"];
 39 | 
 40 | type Props = {
 41 |   chart: DashboardChart;
 42 |   availableTypes?: ChartType[];
 43 |   onTypeChange?: (type: ChartType) => void;
 44 |   onRemove?: () => void;
 45 |   onDuplicate?: () => void;
 46 | };
 47 | 
 48 | function downloadTextFile(name: string, content: string, type: string) {
 49 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type });
 50 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 51 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 52 |   link.href = url;
 53 |   link.download = name;
 54 |   link.click();
 55 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 56 | }
 57 | 
 58 | async function downloadSvgOrPng(root: HTMLDivElement | null, fileName: string, kind: "svg" | "png") {
 59 |   const svg = root?.querySelector("svg");
 60 |   if (!svg) return;
 61 | 
 62 |   const serializer = new XMLSerializer();
 63 |   const svgText = serializer.serializeToString(svg);
 64 | 
 65 |   if (kind === "svg") {
 66 |     downloadTextFile(`${fileName}.svg`, svgText, "image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8");
 67 |     return;
 68 |   }
 69 | 
 70 |   const encoded = `data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,${encodeURIComponent(svgText)}`;
 71 |   const image = new Image();
 72 | 
 73 |   await new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
 74 |     image.onload = () => resolve();
 75 |     image.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Failed to render chart image."));
 76 |     image.src = encoded;
 77 |   });
 78 | 
 79 |   const canvas = document.createElement("canvas");
 80 |   canvas.width = Math.max(svg.clientWidth, 900);
 81 |   canvas.height = Math.max(svg.clientHeight, 520);
 82 |   const context = canvas.getContext("2d");
 83 |   if (!context) return;
 84 |   context.fillStyle = "#081121";
 85 |   context.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
 86 |   context.drawImage(image, 0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
 87 |   canvas.toBlob((blob) => {
 88 |     if (!blob) return;
 89 |     const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 90 |     const link = document.createElement("a");
 91 |     link.href = url;
 92 |     link.download = `${fileName}.png`;
 93 |     link.click();
 94 |     URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 95 |   });
 96 | }
 97 | 
 98 | function HeatmapChart({ data }: { data: Array<Record<string, string | number>> }) {
 99 |   const xLabels = Array.from(new Set(data.map((item) => String(item.x))));
100 |   const yLabels = Array.from(new Set(data.map((item) => String(item.y))));
101 | 
102 |   const getColor = (value: number) => {
103 |     const opacity = Math.min(Math.abs(value), 1);
104 |     return value >= 0
105 |       ? `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${0.12 + opacity * 0.68})`
106 |       : `rgba(239, 68, 68, ${0.12 + opacity * 0.68})`;
107 |   };
108 | 
109 |   return (
110 |     <div className="grid gap-2">
111 |       <div
112 |         className="grid gap-2"
113 |         style={{ gridTemplateColumns: `120px repeat(${xLabels.length}, minmax(0, 1fr))` }}
114 |       >
115 |         <div />
116 |         {xLabels.map((label) => (
117 |           <div key={label} className="truncate px-1 text-center text-xs text-slate-400">
118 |             {label}
119 |           </div>
120 |         ))}
121 |         {yLabels.map((rowLabel) => (
122 |           <Fragment key={rowLabel}>
123 |             <div key={`${rowLabel}-label`} className="truncate px-1 py-2 text-xs text-slate-300">
124 |               {rowLabel}
125 |             </div>
126 |             {xLabels.map((columnLabel) => {
127 |               const cell = data.find(
128 |                 (item) => String(item.x) === columnLabel && String(item.y) === rowLabel,
129 |               );
130 |               const value = Number(cell?.value ?? 0);
131 | 
132 |               return (
133 |                 <div
134 |                   key={`${rowLabel}-${columnLabel}`}
135 |                   className="flex h-12 items-center justify-center rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 text-xs font-medium text-white"
136 |                   style={{ background: getColor(value) }}
137 |                   title={`${rowLabel} x ${columnLabel}: ${value}`}
138 |                 >
139 |                   {value.toFixed(2)}
140 |                 </div>
141 |               );
142 |             })}
143 |           </Fragment>
144 |         ))}
145 |       </div>
146 |     </div>
147 |   );
148 | }
149 | 
150 | export default function SmartChartCard({
151 |   chart,
152 |   availableTypes = [
153 |     "bar",
154 |     "horizontalBar",
155 |     "line",
156 |     "area",
157 |     "pie",
158 |     "donut",
159 |     "histogram",
160 |     "scatter",
161 |     "radar",
162 |     "composed",
163 |     "heatmap",
164 |   ],
165 |   onTypeChange,
166 |   onRemove,
167 |   onDuplicate,
168 | }: Props) {
169 |   const rootRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null);
170 |   const empty = !chart.data?.length;
171 | 
172 |   const pieData = useMemo(
173 |     () =>
174 |       chart.data.map((entry, index) => ({
175 |         ...entry,
176 |         fill: COLORS[index % COLORS.length],
177 |       })),
178 |     [chart.data],
179 |   );
180 | 
181 |   const fileName = chart.title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-");
182 | 
183 |   return (
184 |     <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-4 shadow-xl backdrop-blur">
185 |       <div className="mb-4 flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
186 |         <div className="min-w-0">
187 |           <h3 className="truncate text-sm font-semibold text-white">{chart.title}</h3>
188 |           <p className="truncate text-xs text-slate-400">
189 |             {chart.subtitle || `${chart.aggregation.toUpperCase()} - ${chart.xKey} / ${chart.yKey}`}
190 |           </p>
191 |         </div>
192 | 
193 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
194 |           <select
195 |             value={chart.type}
196 |             onChange={(event) => onTypeChange?.(event.target.value as ChartType)}
197 |             className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-200 outline-none"
198 |           >
199 |             {availableTypes.map((type) => (
200 |               <option key={type} value={type}>
201 |                 {type === "horizontalBar" ? "horizontal bar" : type}
202 |               </option>
203 |             ))}
204 |           </select>
205 | 
206 |           <DropdownMenu>
207 |             <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
208 |               <Button
209 |                 variant="outline"
210 |                 size="icon"
211 |                 className="size-9 rounded-xl border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950 text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800"
212 |               >
213 |                 <MoreHorizontal className="size-4" />
214 |               </Button>
215 |             </DropdownMenuTrigger>
216 |             <DropdownMenuContent align="end" className="border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 text-slate-200">
217 |               <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => downloadSvgOrPng(rootRef.current, fileName, "png")}>
218 |                 <Download className="mr-2 size-4" />
219 |                 Download PNG
220 |               </DropdownMenuItem>
221 |               <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => downloadSvgOrPng(rootRef.current, fileName, "svg")}>
222 |                 <Download className="mr-2 size-4" />
223 |                 Download SVG
224 |               </DropdownMenuItem>
225 |               <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onDuplicate}>
226 |                 <Copy className="mr-2 size-4" />
227 |                 Duplicate chart
228 |               </DropdownMenuItem>
229 |               <DropdownMenuItem onClick={onRemove} className="text-red-300 focus:text-red-200">
230 |                 <Trash2 className="mr-2 size-4" />
231 |                 Remove chart
232 |               </DropdownMenuItem>
233 |             </DropdownMenuContent>
234 |           </DropdownMenu>
235 |         </div>
236 |       </div>
237 | 
238 |       {chart.warning && (
239 |         <div className="mb-3 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-amber-500/30 bg-amber-500/10 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-amber-200">
240 |           <AlertCircle className="size-4" />
241 |           {chart.warning}
242 |         </div>
243 |       )}
244 | 
245 |       {empty ? (
246 |         <div className="flex h-72 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-dashed border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/40 text-sm text-slate-400">
247 |           Not enough data to render this chart.
248 |         </div>
249 |       ) : chart.type === "heatmap" ? (
250 |         <div className="min-h-[18rem] overflow-auto rounded-2xl bg-slate-950/30 p-2">
251 |           <HeatmapChart data={chart.data} />
252 |         </div>
253 |       ) : (
254 |         <div ref={rootRef} className="h-72">
255 |           <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height="100%">
256 |             {chart.type === "line" ? (
257 |               <LineChart data={chart.data}>
258 |                 <CartesianGrid stroke="#1e293b" strokeDasharray="3 3" />
259 |                 <XAxis dataKey={chart.xKey} stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} />
260 |                 <YAxis stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} />
261 |                 <Tooltip />
262 |                 <Line type="monotone" dataKey={chart.yKey} stroke="#7c3aed" strokeWidth={3} dot={false} />
263 |               </LineChart>
264 |             ) : chart.type === "area" ? (
265 |               <AreaChart data={chart.data}>
266 |                 <defs>
267 |                   <linearGradient id={`${chart.id}-gradient`} x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1">
268 |                     <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#7c3aed" stopOpacity={0.7} />
269 |                     <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#7c3aed" stopOpacity={0.05} />
270 |                   </linearGradient>
271 |                 </defs>
272 |                 <CartesianGrid stroke="#1e293b" strokeDasharray="3 3" />
273 |                 <XAxis dataKey={chart.xKey} stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} />
274 |                 <YAxis stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} />
275 |                 <Tooltip />
276 |                 <Area
277 |                   type="monotone"
278 |                   dataKey={chart.yKey}
279 |                   stroke="#7c3aed"
280 |                   fill={`url(#${chart.id}-gradient)`}
281 |                   strokeWidth={2.5}
282 |                 />
283 |               </AreaChart>
284 |             ) : chart.type === "pie" || chart.type === "donut" ? (
285 |               <PieChart>
286 |                 <Pie
287 |                   data={pieData}
288 |                   dataKey={chart.yKey}
289 |                   nameKey={chart.xKey}
290 |                   innerRadius={chart.type === "donut" ? 60 : 0}
291 |                   outerRadius={88}
292 |                   paddingAngle={2}
293 |                 >
294 |                   {pieData.map((entry, index) => (
295 |                     <Cell key={`${entry[chart.xKey]}-${index}`} fill={entry.fill as string} />
296 |                   ))}
297 |                 </Pie>
298 |                 <Tooltip />
299 |                 <Legend />
300 |               </PieChart>
301 |             ) : chart.type === "scatter" ? (
302 |               <ScatterChart>
303 |                 <CartesianGrid stroke="#1e293b" strokeDasharray="3 3" />
304 |                 <XAxis dataKey={chart.xKey} stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} type="number" />
305 |                 <YAxis dataKey={chart.yKey} stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} type="number" />
306 |                 <Tooltip cursor={{ strokeDasharray: "3 3" }} />
307 |                 <Scatter data={chart.data} fill="#06b6d4" />
308 |               </ScatterChart>
309 |             ) : chart.type === "radar" ? (
310 |               <RadarChart data={chart.data}>
311 |                 <PolarGrid stroke="#334155" />
312 |                 <PolarAngleAxis dataKey={chart.xKey} stroke="#cbd5e1" />
313 |                 <PolarRadiusAxis stroke="#64748b" />
314 |                 <Radar dataKey={chart.yKey} stroke="#7c3aed" fill="#7c3aed" fillOpacity={0.45} />
315 |                 <Tooltip />
316 |               </RadarChart>
317 |             ) : chart.type === "composed" ? (
318 |               <ComposedChart data={chart.data}>
319 |                 <CartesianGrid stroke="#1e293b" strokeDasharray="3 3" />
320 |                 <XAxis dataKey={chart.xKey} stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} />
321 |                 <YAxis stroke="#94a3b8" fontSize={11} />
322 |                 <Tooltip />
323 |                 <Bar dataKey={chart.yKey} fill="#2563eb" radius={[8, 8, 0, 0]} />
324 |                 <Line type="monotone" dataKey={chart.yKey} stroke="#7c3aed" strokeWidth={2} />
325 |               </ComposedChart>
326 |             ) : (
327 |               <BarChart
328 |                 data={chart.data}
329 |                 layout={chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? "vertical" : "horizontal"}
330 |                 margin={{ left: chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? 24 : 0 }}
331 |               >
332 |                 <CartesianGrid stroke="#1e293b" strokeDasharray="3 3" />
333 |                 <XAxis
334 |                   type={chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? "number" : "category"}
335 |                   dataKey={chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? undefined : chart.xKey}
336 |                   stroke="#94a3b8"
337 |                   fontSize={11}
338 |                 />
339 |                 <YAxis
340 |                   type={chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? "category" : "number"}
341 |                   dataKey={chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? chart.xKey : undefined}
342 |                   stroke="#94a3b8"
343 |                   fontSize={11}
344 |                   width={chart.type === "horizontalBar" ? 110 : 32}
345 |                 />
346 |                 <Tooltip />
347 |                 <Bar dataKey={chart.yKey} fill="#7c3aed" radius={[8, 8, 0, 0]} />
348 |               </BarChart>
349 |             )}
350 |           </ResponsiveContainer>
351 |         </div>
352 |       )}
353 |     </div>
354 |   );
355 | }
356 |
```
