```tsx
  1 | import { useEffect, useMemo, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
  2 | import { useData } from '@/features/data/context/useData';
  3 | import KPICard from '@/features/dashboard/components/KPICard';
  4 | import AnalyticsChart from '@/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsChart';
  5 | import DashboardFilters, { FilterState } from '@/features/dashboard/components/DashboardFilters';
  6 | import DataQualityPanel from '@/features/dashboard/components/DataQualityPanel';
  7 | import AnalyticsSidebar from '@/features/dashboard/components/AnalyticsSidebar';
  8 | import { generateDemoKPIs, generateDemoCharts, ChartConfig, KPI, analyzeDataQuality } from '@/features/data/model/dataStore';
  9 | import { Download, RotateCcw, Sparkles, Layers, MessageSquare } from 'lucide-react';
 10 | import { exportDatasetCSV } from '@/features/data/utils/exportUtils';
 11 | import { AnimatePresence, motion } from 'framer-motion';
 12 | import StatusPanel from '@/shared/layout/StatusPanel';
 13 | 
 14 | const DashboardPage = () => {
 15 |   const { dataset, analysis, isHydrating, apiError, loadDemo, resetAppState, retryHydrate } = useData();
 16 |   const [filters, setFilters] = useState<FilterState>({
 17 |     dateRange: {},
 18 |     columns: {},
 19 |   });
 20 |   const [showSidebar, setShowSidebar] = useState(false);
 21 |   const [aiGeneratedCharts, setAiGeneratedCharts] = useState<ChartConfig[]>([]);
 22 | 
 23 |   const handleChartGenerated = useCallback((chart: ChartConfig) => {
 24 |     setAiGeneratedCharts(prev => {
 25 |       const exists = prev.some(c => c.title === chart.title && c.xKey === chart.xKey && c.yKey === chart.yKey && c.type === chart.type);
 26 |       if (exists) return prev;
 27 |       return [...prev, chart];
 28 |     });
 29 |   }, []);
 30 | 
 31 |   const handleChartModified = useCallback((chart: ChartConfig) => {
 32 |     setAiGeneratedCharts(prev => {
 33 |       if (prev.length === 0) return [chart];
 34 |       return [...prev.slice(0, -1), chart];
 35 |     });
 36 |   }, []);
 37 | 
 38 |   const handleChartDeleted = useCallback(() => {
 39 |     setAiGeneratedCharts(prev => prev.slice(0, -1));
 40 |   }, []);
 41 | 
 42 |   const handleClearGeneratedCharts = useCallback(() => {
 43 |     setAiGeneratedCharts([]);
 44 |   }, []);
 45 | 
 46 |   const handleFilterChange = useCallback((newFilters: Record<string, string>) => {
 47 |     setFilters(prev => ({
 48 |       ...prev,
 49 |       columns: newFilters
 50 |     }));
 51 |   }, []);
 52 | 
 53 |   const dateColumnName = useMemo(
 54 |     () => (Array.isArray(dataset?.columns) ? dataset.columns : []).find((column) => column.type === 'date')?.name,
 55 |     [dataset],
 56 |   );
 57 | 
 58 |   useEffect(() => {
 59 |     if (!dataset && !isHydrating) {
 60 |       void loadDemo().catch(() => undefined);
 61 |     }
 62 |   }, [dataset, isHydrating, loadDemo]);
 63 | 
 64 |   const filteredDataset = useMemo(() => {
 65 |     if (!dataset) return null;
 66 | 
 67 |     const rows = Array.isArray(dataset.rows) ? dataset.rows : [];
 68 |     const filtered = rows.filter((row) => {
 69 |       for (const [col, value] of Object.entries(filters.columns)) {
 70 |         if (value && String(row[col]) !== value) return false;
 71 |       }
 72 | 
 73 |       if (dateColumnName && (filters.dateRange.from || filters.dateRange.to)) {
 74 |         const rawValue = row[dateColumnName];
 75 |         const parsedDate = rawValue == null ? Number.NaN : Date.parse(String(rawValue));
 76 | 
 77 |         if (Number.isNaN(parsedDate)) {
 78 |           return false;
 79 |         }
 80 | 
 81 |         if (filters.dateRange.from && parsedDate < filters.dateRange.from.getTime()) {
 82 |           return false;
 83 |         }
 84 | 
 85 |         if (filters.dateRange.to) {
 86 |           const endOfDay = new Date(filters.dateRange.to);
 87 |           endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 88 |           if (parsedDate > endOfDay.getTime()) {
 89 |             return false;
 90 |           }
 91 |         }
 92 |       }
 93 | 
 94 |       return true;
 95 |     });
 96 |     return { ...dataset, rows: filtered, rowCount: filtered.length };
 97 |   }, [dataset, filters, dateColumnName]);
 98 | 
 99 |   const kpis = useMemo(() => {
100 |     if (!filteredDataset) return [];
101 |     if (analysis?.insights && analysis.insights.length > 0) {
102 |       const aiKPIs: KPI[] = [];
103 |       analysis.insights.forEach((insight: Record<string, unknown>) => {
104 |         if (insight.type === 'summary' && insight.metrics) {
105 |           const metrics = insight.metrics as Record<string, unknown>;
106 |           if (metrics.totalRecords !== undefined) {
107 |             aiKPIs.push({ title: 'Total Records', value: String(metrics.totalRecords), icon: 'rows' });
108 |           }
109 |           if (metrics.totalValue !== undefined) {
110 |             aiKPIs.push({ title: `Total ${metrics.primaryMetric || 'Value'}`, value: String(metrics.totalValue), icon: 'chart' });
111 |           }
112 |           if (metrics.averageValue !== undefined) {
113 |             aiKPIs.push({ title: `Avg ${metrics.primaryMetric || 'Value'}`, value: String(metrics.averageValue), icon: 'chart' });
114 |           }
115 |         }
116 |         if (insight.type === 'top_performer' && insight.category) {
117 |           aiKPIs.push({ title: `Top Performer`, value: String(insight.category), icon: 'star' });
118 |         }
119 |       });
120 |       if (aiKPIs.length > 0) return aiKPIs;
121 |     }
122 |     return generateDemoKPIs(filteredDataset);
123 |   }, [filteredDataset, analysis]);
124 | 
125 |   const charts = useMemo(() => {
126 |     if (!filteredDataset) return [];
127 |     const baseCharts = analysis?.chartRecommendations && analysis.chartRecommendations.length > 0
128 |       ? analysis.chartRecommendations as ChartConfig[]
129 |       : generateDemoCharts(filteredDataset);
130 |     
131 |     if (aiGeneratedCharts.length > 0) {
132 |       const combined = [...baseCharts, ...aiGeneratedCharts];
133 |       // Deduplicate by title, xKey, and yKey
134 |       const seen = new Set<string>();
135 |       return combined.filter(chart => {
136 |         const key = `${chart.title}|${chart.xKey}|${chart.yKey}`;
137 |         if (seen.has(key)) return false;
138 |         seen.add(key);
139 |         return true;
140 |       });
141 |     }
142 |     return baseCharts;
143 |   }, [filteredDataset, analysis, aiGeneratedCharts]);
144 | 
145 |   const qualityReport = useMemo(() => {
146 |     if (!dataset) return null;
147 |     return analyzeDataQuality(dataset);
148 |   }, [dataset]);
149 | 
150 |   if (isHydrating) {
151 |     return (
152 |       <StatusPanel
153 |         title="Loading dashboard"
154 |         message="Connecting to the local API and restoring your dataset."
155 |       />
156 |     );
157 |   }
158 | 
159 |   if (apiError) {
160 |     return (
161 |       <StatusPanel
162 |         title="Dashboard unavailable"
163 |         message={apiError}
164 |         actionLabel="Retry"
165 |         onAction={() => {
166 |           void retryHydrate();
167 |         }}
168 |       />
169 |     );
170 |   }
171 | 
172 |   if (!dataset || !filteredDataset) {
173 |     return (
174 |       <StatusPanel
175 |         title="No dataset loaded"
176 |         message="Load the demo dataset or upload a file to start using the dashboard."
177 |         actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset"
178 |         onAction={() => {
179 |           void loadDemo().catch(() => undefined);
180 |         }}
181 |       />
182 |     );
183 |   }
184 | 
185 |   return (
186 |     <div className="min-h-screen bg-background p-8 space-y-6">
187 |       <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
188 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
189 |           <div>
190 |             <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-1">
191 |               {analysis && (
192 |                 <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-primary text-xs font-medium">
193 |                   <Sparkles className="size-3" />
194 |                   AI Insights
195 |                 </span>
196 |               )}
197 |             </div>
198 |             <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground">
199 |               {dataset.name}
200 |             </h2>
201 |             <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
202 |               {analysis ? (
203 |                 <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
204 |                   <Layers className="size-4" />
205 |                   {analysis.dataTypeLabel} • {filteredDataset.rowCount.toLocaleString()} records
206 |                 </span>
207 |               ) : (
208 |                 `Analyzing ${dataset.name} • ${filteredDataset.rowCount.toLocaleString()} records`
209 |               )}
210 |             </p>
211 |           </div>
212 |         </div>
213 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
214 |           <button type="button"
215 |             onClick={() => exportDatasetCSV(filteredDataset)}
216 |             className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-muted/50 transition-all text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"
217 |           >
218 |             <Download className="size-4" />
219 |             Export
220 |           </button>
221 |           <button type="button"
222 |             onClick={() => {
223 |               void resetAppState();
224 |             }}
225 |             className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg bg-card border border-border/50 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-muted/50 transition-all text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"
226 |           >
227 |             <RotateCcw className="size-4" />
228 |             Reset
229 |           </button>
230 |         </div>
231 |       </div>
232 | 
233 |       <DashboardFilters dataset={dataset} filters={filters} onChange={setFilters} />
234 | 
235 |       {qualityReport && qualityReport.summary.qualityScore < 100 && (
236 |         <DataQualityPanel qualityReport={qualityReport} />
237 |       )}
238 | 
239 |       <div className="space-y-4">
240 |         <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Key Metrics</h3>
241 |         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
242 |           {kpis.map((kpi, index) => (
243 |             <KPICard key={kpi.title} kpi={kpi} index={index} />
244 |           ))}
245 |         </div>
246 |       </div>
247 | 
248 |       <div className="space-y-4">
249 |         <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
250 |           <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground">Visualizations</h3>
251 |           <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
252 |             {charts.length} chart{charts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
253 |           </span>
254 |         </div>
255 |         <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5">
256 |           {charts.map((chart, index) => (
257 |             <AnalyticsChart key={chart.title} config={chart} index={index} />
258 |           ))}
259 |         </div>
260 |       </div>
261 | 
262 |       <AnimatePresence>
263 |         {showSidebar && (
264 |           <AnalyticsSidebar 
265 |             isOpen={showSidebar} 
266 |             onClose={() => setShowSidebar(false)}
267 |             dataset={filteredDataset}
268 |             charts={charts}
269 |             onAddChart={handleChartGenerated}
270 |             onReplaceLatestChart={handleChartModified}
271 |             onRemoveLatestChart={handleChartDeleted}
272 |             onFilterChange={handleFilterChange}
273 |           />
274 |         )}
275 |       </AnimatePresence>
276 | 
277 |       {!showSidebar && (
278 |         <motion.button
279 |           initial={{ scale: 0, opacity: 0 }}
280 |           animate={{ scale: 1, opacity: 1 }}
281 |           whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
282 |           whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
283 |           onClick={() => setShowSidebar(true)}
284 |           className="fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-40 flex size-12 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary/25 hover:shadow-primary/40 transition-all"
285 |         >
286 |           <MessageSquare className="size-5" />
287 |         </motion.button>
288 |       )}
289 |     </div>
290 |   );
291 | };
292 | 
293 | export default DashboardPage;

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/pages/DataTablePage.tsx

  1 | import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
  2 | import {
  3 |   AlertTriangle,
  4 |   ArrowDown,
  5 |   ArrowUp,
  6 |   ArrowUpDown,
  7 |   Bot,
  8 |   CheckCircle2,
  9 |   ChevronLeft,
 10 |   ChevronRight,
 11 |   Columns3,
 12 |   Download,
 13 |   FileSpreadsheet,
 14 |   Filter,
 15 |   MoreVertical,
 16 |   Pencil,
 17 |   RefreshCw,
 18 |   Search,
 19 |   Send,
 20 |   Sparkles,
 21 |   Table2,
 22 |   Trash2,
 23 |   Wand2,
 24 |   X,
 25 | } from "lucide-react";
 26 | import { useData } from "@/features/data/context/useData";
 27 | import type { Dataset } from "@/features/data/model/dataStore";
 28 | import {
 29 |   applyFilters,
 30 |   buildDataQualityScore,
 31 |   buildDatasetProfile,
 32 |   cleanDatasetRows,
 33 |   exportRowsToCsv,
 34 |   safeNumber,
 35 |   type DashboardFilterCondition,
 36 |   type DashboardFilters,
 37 |   type FilterOperator,
 38 |   type Row,
 39 | } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 40 | import StatusPanel from "@/shared/layout/StatusPanel";
 41 | 
 42 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur";
 43 | const PAGE_SIZES = [10, 25, 50, 100];
 44 | const OPERATORS: Array<{ value: FilterOperator; label: string }> = [
 45 |   { value: "equals", label: "Equals" },
 46 |   { value: "not_equals", label: "Not equals" },
 47 |   { value: "contains", label: "Contains" },
 48 |   { value: "gt", label: "Greater than" },
 49 |   { value: "gte", label: "Greater or equal" },
 50 |   { value: "lt", label: "Less than" },
 51 |   { value: "lte", label: "Less or equal" },
 52 | ];
 53 | 
 54 | function downloadFile(fileName: string, content: string, mime: string) {
 55 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mime });
 56 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 57 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 58 |   link.href = url;
 59 |   link.download = fileName;
 60 |   link.click();
 61 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 62 | }
 63 | 
 64 | function QualityRing({ score }: { score: number }) {
 65 |   return (
 66 |     <div
 67 |       className="grid size-24 place-items-center rounded-full"
 68 |       style={{ background: `conic-gradient(#22c55e ${score * 3.6}deg, rgba(51,65,85,0.9) 0deg)` }}
 69 |     >
 70 |       <div className="grid size-16 place-items-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-center">
 71 |         <span className="text-xl font-bold text-white">{Math.round(score)}%</span>
 72 |       </div>
 73 |     </div>
 74 |   );
 75 | }
 76 | 
 77 | function normalizeText(value: unknown) {
 78 |   return String(value ?? "").trim().replace(/\s+/g, " ");
 79 | }
 80 | 
 81 | function cleanRowsForPreview(rows: Row[]) {
 82 |   const cleaned: Row[] = [];
 83 |   let trimmedCells = 0;
 84 |   let removedEmptyRows = 0;
 85 | 
 86 |   rows.forEach((row) => {
 87 |     const next: Row = {};
 88 |     let hasValue = false;
 89 | 
 90 |     Object.entries(row).forEach(([key, value]) => {
 91 |       if (key.startsWith("__")) {
 92 |         next[key] = value;
 93 |         return;
 94 |       }
 95 |       const nextValue = typeof value === "string" ? normalizeText(value) : value;
 96 |       if (typeof value === "string" && nextValue !== value) trimmedCells += 1;
 97 |       if (nextValue !== null && nextValue !== undefined && String(nextValue).trim()) hasValue = true;
 98 |       next[key] = nextValue;
 99 |     });
100 | 
101 |     if (hasValue) cleaned.push(next);
102 |     else removedEmptyRows += 1;
103 |   });
104 | 
105 |   return { rows: cleaned, trimmedCells, removedEmptyRows };
106 | }
107 | 
108 | export default function DataTablePage() {
109 |   const {
110 |     dataset,
111 |     isHydrating,
112 |     apiError,
113 |     loadDemo,
114 |     retryHydrate,
115 |     replaceDatasetLocally,
116 |   } = useData();
117 | 
118 |   const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
119 |   const [sortCol, setSortCol] = useState<string | null>(null);
120 |   const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState<"asc" | "desc">("asc");
121 |   const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
122 |   const [pageSize, setPageSize] = useState(25);
123 |   const [selectedRows, setSelectedRows] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
124 |   const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
125 |   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<"all" | "flagged" | "cleaned" | "schema">("all");
126 |   const [showAdvancedFilter, setShowAdvancedFilter] = useState(false);
127 |   const [showColumns, setShowColumns] = useState(false);
128 |   const [filterDraft, setFilterDraft] = useState({ column: "", operator: "equals" as FilterOperator, value: "" });
129 |   const [filters, setFilters] = useState<DashboardFilters>({ conditions: [] });
130 |   const [cleanPreview, setCleanPreview] = useState<ReturnType<typeof cleanRowsForPreview> | null>(null);
131 |   const [assistantNote, setAssistantNote] = useState("Ready to inspect this table.");
132 | 
133 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows((dataset?.rows || []) as Row[]), [dataset?.rows]);
134 |   const indexedRows = useMemo(
135 |     () => rows.map((row, index) => ({ ...row, __displayId: String(row.__rowId ?? index), __displayIndex: index + 1 })),
136 |     [rows],
137 |   );
138 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
139 |   const quality = useMemo(() => buildDataQualityScore(rows), [rows]);
140 |   const columns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name);
141 | 
142 |   useEffect(() => {
143 |     setVisibleColumns(new Set(columns));
144 |     setSelectedRows(new Set());
145 |     setFilters({ conditions: [] });
146 |     setPage(0);
147 |   }, [dataset?.id]);
148 | 
149 |   const filteredRows = useMemo(() => {
150 |     const tableFilters = activeTab === "flagged"
151 |       ? {
152 |           ...filters,
153 |           conditions: [
154 |             ...((filters.conditions || []) as DashboardFilterCondition[]),
155 |           ],
156 |         }
157 |       : filters;
158 | 
159 |     let next = applyFilters(indexedRows, tableFilters);
160 | 
161 |     if (activeTab === "flagged") {
162 |       next = next.filter((row) => columns.some((column) => row[column] === null || row[column] === undefined || String(row[column]).trim() === ""));
163 |     }
164 | 
165 |     if (search.trim()) {
166 |       const query = search.trim().toLowerCase();
167 |       next = next.filter((row) => columns.some((column) => String(row[column] ?? "").toLowerCase().includes(query)));
168 |     }
169 | 
170 |     return next;
171 |   }, [activeTab, columns, filters, indexedRows, search]);
172 | 
173 |   const sortedRows = useMemo(() => {
174 |     if (!sortCol) return filteredRows;
175 |     return [...filteredRows].sort((left, right) => {
176 |       const leftNumber = safeNumber(left[sortCol]);
177 |       const rightNumber = safeNumber(right[sortCol]);
178 |       const comparison =
179 |         leftNumber !== null && rightNumber !== null
180 |           ? leftNumber - rightNumber
181 |           : String(left[sortCol] ?? "").localeCompare(String(right[sortCol] ?? ""));
182 |       return sortDir === "asc" ? comparison : -comparison;
183 |     });
184 |   }, [filteredRows, sortCol, sortDir]);
185 | 
186 |   const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(sortedRows.length / pageSize));
187 |   const pageRows = sortedRows.slice(page * pageSize, (page + 1) * pageSize);
188 |   const visibleColumnList = columns.filter((column) => visibleColumns.has(column));
189 |   const duplicateCount = useMemo(() => {
190 |     const seen = new Map<string, number>();
191 |     rows.forEach((row) => {
192 |       const signature = JSON.stringify(row);
193 |       seen.set(signature, (seen.get(signature) || 0) + 1);
194 |     });
195 |     return Array.from(seen.values()).reduce((total, count) => total + Math.max(count - 1, 0), 0);
196 |   }, [rows]);
197 | 
198 |   if (isHydrating) {
199 |     return <StatusPanel title="Loading table" message="Preparing your dataset rows." />;
200 |   }
201 | 
202 |   if (apiError) {
203 |     return <StatusPanel title="Table unavailable" message={apiError} actionLabel="Retry" onAction={() => void retryHydrate()} />;
204 |   }
205 | 
206 |   if (!dataset) {
207 |     return <StatusPanel title="No dataset loaded" message="Upload a file or load demo data before opening the table." actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset" onAction={() => void loadDemo()} />;
208 |   }
209 | 
210 |   function setSort(column: string) {
211 |     if (sortCol === column) {
212 |       setSortDir((current) => (current === "asc" ? "desc" : "asc"));
213 |     } else {
214 |       setSortCol(column);
215 |       setSortDir("asc");
216 |     }
217 |     setPage(0);
218 |   }
219 | 
220 |   function rowKey(row: Row) {
221 |     return String(row.__displayId);
222 |   }
223 | 
224 |   function toggleSelect(row: Row) {
225 |     const key = rowKey(row);
226 |     setSelectedRows((current) => {
227 |       const next = new Set(current);
228 |       if (next.has(key)) next.delete(key);
229 |       else next.add(key);
230 |       return next;
231 |     });
232 |   }
233 | 
234 |   function selectPageRows(checked: boolean) {
235 |     setSelectedRows((current) => {
236 |       const next = new Set(current);
237 |       pageRows.forEach((row) => {
238 |         if (checked) next.add(rowKey(row));
239 |         else next.delete(rowKey(row));
240 |       });
241 |       return next;
242 |     });
243 |   }
244 | 
245 |   function applyAdvancedFilter() {
246 |     if (!filterDraft.column || !filterDraft.value.trim()) return;
247 |     const condition: DashboardFilterCondition = {
248 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
249 |       column: filterDraft.column,
250 |       operator: filterDraft.operator,
251 |       value: filterDraft.value.trim(),
252 |     };
253 |     setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, conditions: [...(current.conditions || []), condition] }));
254 |     setFilterDraft({ column: columns[0] || "", operator: "equals", value: "" });
255 |     setShowAdvancedFilter(false);
256 |     setPage(0);
257 |   }
258 | 
259 |   function removeCondition(id: string) {
260 |     setFilters((current) => ({ ...current, conditions: (current.conditions || []).filter((condition) => condition.id !== id) }));
261 |   }
262 | 
263 |   function exportVisibleRows() {
264 |     const rowsToExport = sortedRows.map((row) =>
265 |       Object.fromEntries(visibleColumnList.map((column) => [column, row[column]])),
266 |     );
267 |     downloadFile(`${dataset.name || "dataset"}-table.csv`, exportRowsToCsv(rowsToExport as Row[]), "text/csv;charset=utf-8");
268 |   }
269 | 
270 |   function deleteSelectedRows() {
271 |     if (!selectedRows.size) return;
272 |     if (!window.confirm(`Delete ${selectedRows.size} selected row(s) from the current table view?`)) return;
273 |     const nextRows = indexedRows.filter((row) => !selectedRows.has(rowKey(row))).map(({ __displayId, __displayIndex, ...row }) => row);
274 |     const nextDataset: Dataset = { ...dataset, rows: nextRows as Dataset["rows"], rowCount: nextRows.length };
275 |     replaceDatasetLocally(nextDataset);
276 |     setSelectedRows(new Set());
277 |   }
278 | 
279 |   function applyCleanPreview() {
280 |     if (!cleanPreview) return;
281 |     const nextDataset: Dataset = { ...dataset, rows: cleanPreview.rows as Dataset["rows"], rowCount: cleanPreview.rows.length };
282 |     replaceDatasetLocally(nextDataset);
283 |     setCleanPreview(null);
284 |     setAssistantNote(`Applied cleaning: trimmed ${cleanPreview.trimmedCells} cells and removed ${cleanPreview.removedEmptyRows} empty rows.`);
285 |   }
286 | 
287 |   const typeCounts = {
288 |     numeric: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "number").length,
289 |     text: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "string").length,
290 |     date: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "date").length,
291 |     boolean: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "boolean").length,
292 |   };
293 | 
294 |   return (
295 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
296 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
297 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
298 |           <div>
299 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
300 |               <span className="font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</span>
301 |               <span>-</span>
302 |               <span>{rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
303 |             </div>
304 |             <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-semibold text-white">Data Table</h1>
305 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Explore, clean, filter, and manage your data.</p>
306 |           </div>
307 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
308 |             <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
309 |               <Sparkles className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
310 |               Ask AI
311 |             </button>
312 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportVisibleRows} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
313 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
314 |               Export
315 |             </button>
316 |             <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2 hover:bg-slate-800">
317 |               <MoreVertical className="size-5" />
318 |             </button>
319 |           </div>
320 |         </header>
321 | 
322 |         <div className="grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[1fr_350px]">
323 |           <main className="space-y-5">
324 |             <section className={`${CARD} p-5`}>
325 |               <div className="grid gap-5 xl:grid-cols-[1fr_280px_120px] xl:items-center">
326 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-5">
327 |                   <div className="grid size-24 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-blue-600">
328 |                     <FileSpreadsheet className="size-11 text-white" />
329 |                   </div>
330 |                   <div>
331 |                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
332 |                       <h2 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</h2>
333 |                       <Pencil className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
334 |                       <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-green-300">Ready</span>
335 |                     </div>
336 |                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
337 |                       CSV - {rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows - {columns.length.toLocaleString()} columns - Uploaded {new Date(dataset.uploadedAt).toLocaleString()}
338 |                     </p>
339 |                     <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-400">Manage this dataset with table operations and local analytics checks.</p>
340 |                   </div>
341 |                 </div>
342 | 
343 |                 <div className="space-y-2">
344 |                   {[
345 |                     ["Numeric", typeCounts.numeric, "#2563eb"],
346 |                     ["Text", typeCounts.text, "#7c3aed"],
347 |                     ["Date", typeCounts.date, "#06b6d4"],
348 |                     ["Boolean", typeCounts.boolean, "#22c55e"],
349 |                   ].map(([label, value, color]) => (
350 |                     <div key={label as string} className="grid grid-cols-[72px_1fr_44px] items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-300">
351 |                       <span>{label}</span>
352 |                       <div className="h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-800">
353 |                         <div
354 |                           className="h-2 rounded-full"
355 |                           style={{ width: `${columns.length ? (Number(value) / columns.length) * 100 : 0}%`, background: String(color) }}
356 |                         />
357 |                       </div>
358 |                       <span>{Number(value)}</span>
359 |                     </div>
360 |                   ))}
361 |                 </div>
362 | 
363 |                 <QualityRing score={quality.finalScore} />
364 |               </div>
365 |             </section>
366 | 
367 |             <section className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-6">
368 |               {[
369 |                 ["Total Rows", rows.length, "100% valid"],
370 |                 ["Columns", columns.length, "Detected"],
371 |                 ["Numeric Columns", typeCounts.numeric, `${columns.length ? Math.round((typeCounts.numeric / columns.length) * 100) : 0}%`],
372 |                 ["Text Columns", typeCounts.text, `${columns.length ? Math.round((typeCounts.text / columns.length) * 100) : 0}%`],
373 |                 ["Missing Values", quality.missingCells, `${quality.completeness}% complete`],
374 |                 ["Data Quality", `${quality.finalScore}%`, "Excellent"],
375 |               ].map(([title, value, subtitle], index) => (
376 |                 <div key={String(title)} className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
377 |                   <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
378 |                     <div>
379 |                       <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{title}</p>
380 |                       <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{String(value)}</p>
381 |                       <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500">{subtitle}</p>
382 |                     </div>
383 |                     <div className={`rounded-2xl p-3 ${index === 4 ? "bg-red-500/20 text-red-300" : "bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300"}`}>
384 |                       {index === 4 ? <AlertTriangle className="size-5" /> : <Table2 className="size-5" />}
385 |                     </div>
386 |                   </div>
387 |                 </div>
388 |               ))}
389 |             </section>
390 | 
391 |             <section className={`${CARD} overflow-hidden`}>
392 |               <div className="border-b border-slate-700/60 p-2">
393 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
394 |                   {[
395 |                     ["all", "All Rows", sortedRows.length],
396 |                     ["flagged", "Flagged", quality.missingCells],
397 |                     ["cleaned", "Cleaned", cleanPreview?.rows.length || rows.length],
398 |                     ["schema", "Schema", columns.length],
399 |                   ].map(([key, label, count]) => (
400 |                     <button type="button"
401 |                       key={String(key)}
402 |                       onClick={() => setActiveTab(key as typeof activeTab)}
403 |                       className={`rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-sm transition ${
404 |                         activeTab === key ? "bg-violet-600 text-white" : "text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white"
405 |                       }`}
406 |                     >
407 |                       {label} <span className="ml-2 rounded-full bg-slate-800 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs">{String(count)}</span>
408 |                     </button>
409 |                   ))}
410 |                 </div>
411 |               </div>
412 | 
413 |               <div className="space-y-3 border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4">
414 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
415 |                   <div className="relative min-w-[260px] flex-1">
416 |                     <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 size-4 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-500" />
417 |                     <input
418 |                       value={search}
419 |                       onChange={(event) => {
420 |                         setSearch(event.target.value);
421 |                         setPage(0);
422 |                       }}
423 |                       placeholder="Search all columns..."
424 |                       className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm text-white outline-none"
425 |                     />
426 |                   </div>
427 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowAdvancedFilter((current) => !current)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
428 |                     <Filter className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
429 |                     Advanced Filter
430 |                   </button>
431 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setSort(columns[0] || "")} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
432 |                     <ArrowUpDown className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
433 |                     Sort
434 |                   </button>
435 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowColumns((current) => !current)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
436 |                     <Columns3 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
437 |                     Columns
438 |                   </button>
439 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setCleanPreview(cleanRowsForPreview(rows))} className="rounded-xl border border-violet-500/50 bg-violet-500/15 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-violet-100 hover:bg-violet-500/25">
440 |                     <Wand2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
441 |                     AI Clean / Enrich
442 |                   </button>
443 |                   <button type="button" onClick={deleteSelectedRows} className="rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-200 hover:bg-red-500/20">
444 |                     <Trash2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
445 |                     Row Actions
446 |                   </button>
447 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => { setSearch(""); setFilters({ conditions: [] }); setSelectedRows(new Set()); setPage(0); }} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-slate-800">
448 |                     <RefreshCw className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
449 |                     Reset
450 |                   </button>
451 |                 </div>
452 | 
453 |                 {showAdvancedFilter && (
454 |                   <div className="grid gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 p-3 md:grid-cols-[1fr_180px_1fr_auto]">
455 |                     <select value={filterDraft.column} onChange={(event) => setFilterDraft((current) => ({ ...current, column: event.target.value }))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none">
456 |                       <option value="">Column</option>
457 |                       {columns.map((column) => <option key={column} value={column}>{column}</option>)}
458 |                     </select>
459 |                     <select value={filterDraft.operator} onChange={(event) => setFilterDraft((current) => ({ ...current, operator: event.target.value as FilterOperator }))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none">
460 |                       {OPERATORS.map((operator) => <option key={operator.value} value={operator.value}>{operator.label}</option>)}
461 |                     </select>
462 |                     <input value={filterDraft.value} onChange={(event) => setFilterDraft((current) => ({ ...current, value: event.target.value }))} placeholder="Value" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none" />
463 |                     <button type="button" onClick={applyAdvancedFilter} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Apply</button>
464 |                   </div>
465 |                 )}
466 | 
467 |                 {showColumns && (
468 |                   <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 p-3">
469 |                     {columns.map((column) => (
470 |                       <label key={column} className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-200">
471 |                         <input
472 |                           type="checkbox"
473 |                           checked={visibleColumns.has(column)}
474 |                           onChange={(event) => {
475 |                             setVisibleColumns((current) => {
476 |                               const next = new Set(current);
477 |                               if (event.target.checked) next.add(column);
478 |                               else next.delete(column);
479 |                               return next;
480 |                             });
481 |                           }}
482 |                         />
483 |                         {column}
484 |                       </label>
485 |                     ))}
486 |                   </div>
487 |                 )}
488 | 
489 |                 <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
490 |                   <span>Active Filters:</span>
491 |                   {(filters.conditions || []).length ? (
492 |                     filters.conditions?.map((condition) => (
493 |                       <button type="button" key={condition.id} onClick={() => removeCondition(condition.id)} className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-slate-200">
494 |                         {condition.column} {condition.operator} {condition.value}
495 |                         <X className="ml-2 inline size-3" />
496 |                       </button>
497 |                     ))
498 |                   ) : (
499 |                     <span className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-1 text-xs">No filters applied</span>
500 |                   )}
501 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setFilters({ conditions: [] })} className="rounded-full border border-violet-500/40 px-3 py-1 text-xs text-violet-200">Clear all</button>
502 |                 </div>
503 |               </div>
504 | 
505 |               {activeTab === "schema" ? (
506 |                 <div className="overflow-x-auto">
507 |                   <table className="w-full min-w-[800px] text-left text-sm">
508 |                     <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
509 |                       <tr>
510 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Column</th>
511 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Type</th>
512 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Role</th>
513 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Missing %</th>
514 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Unique</th>
515 |                         <th className="px-4 py-3">Sample Values</th>
516 |                       </tr>
517 |                     </thead>
518 |                     <tbody>
519 |                       {profile.columns.map((column) => (
520 |                         <tr key={column.name} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200">
521 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{column.name}</td>
522 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.type}</td>
523 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.role}</td>
524 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.missingPct}%</td>
525 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.uniqueCount}</td>
526 |                           <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-400">{column.sampleValues.join(", ") || "-"}</td>
527 |                         </tr>
528 |                       ))}
529 |                     </tbody>
530 |                   </table>
531 |                 </div>
532 |               ) : (
533 |                 <>
534 |                   <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-700/60 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
535 |                     <label className="flex items-center gap-3">
536 |                       <input
537 |                         type="checkbox"
538 |                         checked={pageRows.length > 0 && pageRows.every((row) => selectedRows.has(rowKey(row)))}
539 |                         onChange={(event) => selectPageRows(event.target.checked)}
540 |                       />
541 |                       {selectedRows.size} of {sortedRows.length} rows selected
542 |                     </label>
543 |                     <span>{sortedRows.length.toLocaleString()} rows - {visibleColumnList.length} columns</span>
544 |                   </div>
545 |                   <div className="overflow-x-auto">
546 |                     <table className="w-full min-w-[900px] text-left text-sm">
547 |                       <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
548 |                         <tr>
549 |                           <th className="px-4 py-3"></th>
550 |                           <th className="px-4 py-3">#</th>
551 |                           {visibleColumnList.map((column) => {
552 |                             const columnProfile = profile.columns.find((item) => item.name === column);
553 |                             return (
554 |                               <th key={column} className="px-4 py-3">
555 |                                 <button type="button" onClick={() => setSort(column)} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-left">
556 |                                   {column}
557 |                                   <span className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px]">{columnProfile?.type || "string"}</span>
558 |                                   {sortCol === column ? (sortDir === "asc" ? <ArrowUp className="size-3" /> : <ArrowDown className="size-3" />) : <ArrowUpDown className="size-3" />}
559 |                                 </button>
560 |                               </th>
561 |                             );
562 |                           })}
563 |                           <th className="px-4 py-3"></th>
564 |                         </tr>
565 |                       </thead>
566 |                       <tbody>
567 |                         {pageRows.map((row) => (
568 |                           <tr key={rowKey(row)} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800/40">
569 |                             <td className="px-4 py-3"><input type="checkbox" checked={selectedRows.has(rowKey(row))} onChange={() => toggleSelect(row)} /></td>
570 |                             <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-500">{String(row.__displayIndex)}</td>
571 |                             {visibleColumnList.map((column) => (
572 |                               <td key={column} className="max-w-[240px] truncate px-4 py-3">{String(row[column] ?? "") || "-"}</td>
573 |                             ))}
574 |                             <td className="px-4 py-3"><MoreVertical className="size-4 text-slate-500" /></td>
575 |                           </tr>
576 |                         ))}
577 |                       </tbody>
578 |                     </table>
579 |                   </div>
580 |                   <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 border-t border-slate-700/60 p-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
581 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-slate-400">
582 |                       <span>Rows per page</span>
583 |                       <select value={pageSize} onChange={(event) => { setPageSize(Number(event.target.value)); setPage(0); }} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 px-3 py-2 text-slate-100">
584 |                         {PAGE_SIZES.map((size) => <option key={size} value={size}>{size}</option>)}
585 |                       </select>
586 |                     </div>
587 |                     <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
588 |                       <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">Showing {sortedRows.length ? page * pageSize + 1 : 0} to {Math.min((page + 1) * pageSize, sortedRows.length)} of {sortedRows.length}</span>
589 |                       <button type="button" disabled={page === 0} onClick={() => setPage((current) => Math.max(current - 1, 0))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2 disabled:opacity-40"><ChevronLeft className="size-4" /></button>
590 |                       <span className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm">{page + 1}</span>
591 |                       <button type="button" disabled={page >= totalPages - 1} onClick={() => setPage((current) => Math.min(current + 1, totalPages - 1))} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2 disabled:opacity-40"><ChevronRight className="size-4" /></button>
592 |                     </div>
593 |                   </div>
594 |                 </>
595 |               )}
596 |             </section>
597 |           </main>
598 | 
599 |           <aside className={`${CARD} h-fit p-5`}>
600 |             <div className="mb-5 flex items-start justify-between">
601 |               <div>
602 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
603 |                   <Bot className="size-5 text-violet-300" />
604 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">AI Table Assistant</h2>
605 |                   <span className="rounded-full bg-violet-500/20 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] uppercase text-violet-200">Beta</span>
606 |                 </div>
607 |                 <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">Smart insights and actions for the current visible table.</p>
608 |               </div>
609 |             </div>
610 | 
611 |             <div className="space-y-2">
612 |               {[
613 |                 ["Find duplicates", `${duplicateCount} duplicate rows found`],
614 |                 ["Detect missing values", `${quality.missingCells} missing cells detected`],
615 |                 ["Summarize columns", `${columns.length} columns profiled`],
616 |                 ["Create chart from selected rows", `${selectedRows.size} rows selected`],
617 |                 ["Clean text values", "Trim and normalize whitespace"],
618 |               ].map(([label, note]) => (
619 |                 <button type="button" key={label} onClick={() => setAssistantNote(note)} className="w-full rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-3 text-left text-sm text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800">
620 |                   {label}
621 |                 </button>
622 |               ))}
623 |             </div>
624 | 
625 |             <div className="mt-5 space-y-3">
626 |               <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-white">Quick Insights</h3>
627 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-green-500/25 bg-green-500/10 p-4 text-sm text-green-100">
628 |                 <CheckCircle2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
629 |                 {quality.missingCells ? `${quality.missingCells} missing cells need review.` : "No missing values detected."}
630 |               </div>
631 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-blue-500/25 bg-blue-500/10 p-4 text-sm text-blue-100">
632 |                 {profile.primaryCategory ? `${profile.primaryCategory.uniqueCount} unique ${profile.primaryCategory.name} values found.` : "No categorical column detected."}
633 |               </div>
634 |             </div>
635 | 
636 |             <div className="mt-5">
637 |               <div className="mb-2 flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
638 |                 <span className="text-white">Data Health</span>
639 |                 <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-green-300">Excellent</span>
640 |               </div>
641 |               <div className="h-2 rounded-full bg-slate-800">
642 |                 <div className="h-2 rounded-full bg-green-400" style={{ width: `${quality.finalScore}%` }} />
643 |               </div>
644 |               <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500">{assistantNote}</p>
645 |             </div>
646 | 
647 |             <div className="mt-8 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/70 p-2">
648 |               <input aria-label="Ask anything about this table..." placeholder="Ask anything about this table..." className="min-w-0 flex-1 bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-slate-500" />
649 |               <button type="button" className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 p-3"><Send className="size-4" /></button>
650 |             </div>
651 |             <p className="mt-4 text-center text-xs text-slate-500">AI can make mistakes. Verify important results.</p>
652 |           </aside>
653 |         </div>
654 |       </div>
655 | 
656 |       {cleanPreview && (
657 |         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/60 p-4">
658 |           <div className={`${CARD} w-full max-w-xl p-5`}>
659 |             <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
660 |               <div>
661 |                 <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white">Cleaning Preview</h2>
662 |                 <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Review local cleaning operations before applying them.</p>
663 |               </div>
664 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => setCleanPreview(null)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2"><X className="size-4" /></button>
665 |             </div>
666 |             <div className="mt-5 grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-3">
667 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-4"><p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Trimmed cells</p><p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold">{cleanPreview.trimmedCells}</p></div>
668 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-4"><p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Empty rows</p><p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold">{cleanPreview.removedEmptyRows}</p></div>
669 |               <div className="rounded-2xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-4"><p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Result rows</p><p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold">{cleanPreview.rows.length}</p></div>
670 |             </div>
671 |             <div className="mt-5 flex justify-end gap-2">
672 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => setCleanPreview(null)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Cancel</button>
673 |               <button type="button" onClick={applyCleanPreview} className="rounded-xl bg-violet-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm">Apply Cleaning</button>
674 |             </div>
675 |           </div>
676 |         </div>
677 |       )}
678 |     </div>
679 |   );
680 | }
681 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/pages/EliteDashboardPage.tsx

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/pages/EliteDashboardPage.tsx`

 46 | const CARD = "rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 shadow-xl backdrop-blur";
 47 | const CHART_TYPES: ChartType[] = [
 48 |   "bar",
 49 |   "line",
 50 |   "area",
 51 |   "pie",
 52 |   "donut",
 53 |   "histogram",
 54 |   "scatter",
 55 |   "radar",
 56 |   "composed",
 57 |   "heatmap",

 60 | function downloadFile(fileName: string, content: string, mime: string) {
 61 |   const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mime });
 62 |   const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
 63 |   const link = document.createElement("a");
 64 |   link.href = url;
 65 |   link.download = fileName;
 66 |   link.click();
 67 |   URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
 68 | }
 69 | 
 70 | function formatDate(value?: Date | string | null) {
 71 |   if (!value) return "Just now";
 72 |   const date = new Date(value);
 73 |   return Number.isFinite(date.getTime()) ? date.toLocaleString() : "Just now";
 74 | }
 75 | 
 76 | function fileType(datasetName?: string, sourceType?: string) {
 77 |   if (sourceType === "pdf") return "PDF";
 78 |   const ext = datasetName?.split(".").pop()?.toUpperCase();
 79 |   return ext && ext.length <= 5 ? ext : "CSV";
 80 | }
 81 | 
 82 | function QualityRing({ score }: { score: number }) {
 83 |   return (
 84 |     <div
 85 |       className="grid size-20 place-items-center rounded-full"
 86 |       style={{
 87 |         background: `conic-gradient(#22c55e ${score * 3.6}deg, rgba(51,65,85,0.9) 0deg)`,
 88 |       }}
 89 |     >
 90 |       <div className="grid size-14 place-items-center rounded-full bg-slate-950 text-center">
 91 |         <span className="text-lg font-bold text-white">{Math.round(score)}%</span>
 92 |       </div>
 93 |     </div>
 94 |   );
 95 | }
 96 | 
 97 | function KpiCard({ kpi, index }: { kpi: DashboardKpi; index: number }) {
 98 |   const colors = ["bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-300", "bg-violet-500/20 text-violet-300", "bg-cyan-500/20 text-cyan-300", "bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-300", "bg-red-500/20 text-red-300", "bg-green-500/20 text-green-300"];
 99 | 
100 |   return (
101 |     <div className={`${CARD} p-4`}>
102 |       <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
103 |         <div>
104 |           <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{kpi.title}</p>
105 |           <p className="mt-2 text-2xl font-semibold text-white">{kpi.value}</p>
106 |           <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-slate-500">{kpi.subtitle}</p>
107 |         </div>
108 |         <div className={`rounded-2xl p-3 ${colors[index % colors.length]}`}>
109 |           <Database className="size-5" />
110 |         </div>
111 |       </div>
112 |     </div>
113 |   );
114 | }
