```tsx
116 | export default function EliteDashboardPage() {
117 |   const { dataset, isHydrating, apiError, loadDemo, retryHydrate, deleteDataset } = useData();
118 |   const [filters, setFilters] = useState<DashboardFilters>({});
119 |   const [manualCharts, setManualCharts] = useState<DashboardChart[]>([]);
120 |   const [manualKpis, setManualKpis] = useState<DashboardKpi[]>([]);
121 |   const [hiddenChartIds, setHiddenChartIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
122 |   const [chartTypeOverrides, setChartTypeOverrides] = useState<Record<string, ChartType>>({});
123 |   const [showSchema, setShowSchema] = useState(false);
124 |   const [dashboardMode, setDashboardMode] = useState<"Executive" | "Analyst" | "Story">("Executive");
125 | 
126 |   const rawRows = useMemo<Row[]>(() => (dataset?.rows || []) as Row[], [dataset?.rows]);
127 |   const rows = useMemo(() => cleanDatasetRows(rawRows), [rawRows]);
128 |   const profile = useMemo(() => buildDatasetProfile(rows), [rows]);
129 |   const quality = useMemo(() => buildDataQualityScore(rows), [rows]);
130 |   const filteredRows = useMemo(() => applyFilters(rows, filters), [rows, filters]);
131 |   const defaultKpis = useMemo(() => buildKpis(filteredRows), [filteredRows]);
132 |   const tableColumns = profile.columns.map((column) => column.name);
133 |   const schemaDashboard = useSchemaTrainedDashboard({
134 |     datasetId: dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
135 |     datasetName: dataset?.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
136 |     rows,
137 |     columns: dataset?.columns || tableColumns,
138 |     dictionaryRows: (dataset as any)?.dictionaryRows || (dataset as any)?.dataDictionary || [],
139 |     autoLoad: Boolean(rows.length),
140 |   });
141 |   const aiController = useDashboardAiController({
142 |     dataset: {
143 |       id: dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
144 |       name: dataset?.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
145 |       rows,
146 |       columns: dataset?.columns || tableColumns,
147 |     },
148 |     initialDashboard: {
149 |       kpis: schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs as any,
150 |       charts: schemaDashboard.chartSpecs as any,
151 |       source: schemaDashboard.provider,
152 |     },
153 |     initialFilters: filters,
154 |   });
155 | 
156 |   useEffect(() => {
157 |     const current = JSON.stringify(filters);
158 |     const next = JSON.stringify(aiController.filters);
159 |     if (current !== next) setFilters(aiController.filters);
160 |   }, [aiController.filters, filters]);
161 | 
162 |   useEffect(() => {
163 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
164 |     const stored = loadDashboardState(dataset.id);
165 |     setFilters(stored.filters);
166 |     setManualCharts(stored.manualCharts);
167 |     setManualKpis(stored.manualKpis);
168 |     setHiddenChartIds(new Set());
169 |     setChartTypeOverrides({});
170 |   }, [dataset?.id]);
171 | 
172 |   useEffect(() => {
173 |     if (!dataset?.id) return;
174 |     saveDashboardState(dataset.id, { filters, manualCharts, manualKpis });
175 |   }, [dataset?.id, filters, manualCharts, manualKpis]);
176 | 
177 |   const trainedCharts = useMemo(
178 |     () =>
179 |       schemaDashboard.chartSpecs
180 |         .map((spec) =>
181 |           buildChartFromSpec(filteredRows, {
182 |             ...spec,
183 |             type: chartTypeOverrides[spec.id || spec.title] || spec.type,
184 |           } as any),
185 |         )
186 |         .filter(Boolean),
187 |     [chartTypeOverrides, filteredRows, schemaDashboard.chartSpecs],
188 |   );
189 | 
190 |   const charts = useMemo(() => {
191 |     const aiCharts = aiController.charts.length ? aiController.charts : trainedCharts;
192 |     const merged = [...manualCharts, ...aiCharts]
193 |       .filter(Boolean)
194 |       .filter((chart) => !hiddenChartIds.has(chart.id));
195 | 
196 |     const seen = new Set<string>();
197 | 
198 |     return merged
199 |       .filter((chart) => {
200 |         const key = `${chart.title}|${chart.type}|${chart.xKey}|${chart.yKey}`;
201 |         if (seen.has(key)) return false;
202 |         seen.add(key);
203 |         return true;
204 |       })
205 |       .slice(0, 7);
206 |   }, [aiController.charts, hiddenChartIds, manualCharts, trainedCharts]);
207 | 
208 |   const trainedKpis = useMemo(
209 |     () =>
210 |       schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs
211 |         .map((spec) => buildKpiFromSpec(filteredRows, spec as any))
212 |         .filter(Boolean),
213 |     [filteredRows, schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs],
214 |   );
215 | 
216 |   const kpis = useMemo(
217 |     () => [...(aiController.kpis.length ? aiController.kpis : trainedKpis.length ? trainedKpis : defaultKpis), ...manualKpis].slice(0, 8),
218 |     [aiController.kpis, defaultKpis, manualKpis, trainedKpis],
219 |   );
220 |   const primaryFilter = profile.primaryCategory;
221 |   const dateColumn = profile.dateColumn;
222 | 
223 |   if (isHydrating) {
224 |     return <StatusPanel title="Loading dashboard" message="Preparing your analytics workspace." />;
225 |   }
226 | 
227 |   if (apiError) {
228 |     return <StatusPanel title="Dashboard unavailable" message={apiError} actionLabel="Retry" onAction={() => void retryHydrate()} />;
229 |   }
230 | 
231 |   if (!dataset) {
232 |     return (
233 |       <StatusPanel
234 |         title="No dataset loaded"
235 |         message="Upload a dataset to build a schema-aware dashboard, or load the demo dataset to explore the interface."
236 |         actionLabel="Load Demo Dataset"
237 |         onAction={() => void loadDemo()}
238 |       />
239 |     );
240 |   }
241 | 
242 |   function updateChartType(chart: DashboardChart, type: ChartType) {
243 |     const converted = buildChartFromSpec(filteredRows, { ...chart, type });
244 |     aiController.convertChart(chart.id, type);
245 |     setManualCharts((current) =>
246 |       current.some((item) => item.id === chart.id)
247 |         ? current.map((item) => (item.id === chart.id ? converted : item))
248 |         : current,
249 |     );
250 |     setChartTypeOverrides((current) => ({ ...current, [chart.id]: type }));
251 |   }
252 | 
253 |   function removeChart(chart: DashboardChart) {
254 |     setManualCharts((current) => current.filter((item) => item.id !== chart.id));
255 |     setHiddenChartIds((current) => new Set([...current, chart.id]));
256 |   }
257 | 
258 |   function duplicateChart(chart: DashboardChart) {
259 |     setManualCharts((current) => [{ ...chart, id: crypto.randomUUID(), title: `${chart.title} Copy` }, ...current]);
260 |   }
261 | 
262 |   function exportCsv() {
263 |     downloadFile(`${dataset.name || "dataset"}-filtered.csv`, exportRowsToCsv(filteredRows), "text/csv;charset=utf-8");
264 |   }
265 | 
266 |   function exportJson() {
267 |     downloadFile(
268 |       `${dataset.name || "dashboard"}-dashboard.json`,
269 |       exportDashboardToJson({
270 |         datasetName: dataset.name,
271 |         filters,
272 |         kpis,
273 |         charts,
274 |       }),
275 |       "application/json;charset=utf-8",
276 |     );
277 |   }
278 | 
279 |   async function shareDashboard() {
280 |     const summary = [
281 |       `Dataset: ${dataset.name}`,
282 |       `Rows: ${filteredRows.length}/${rows.length}`,
283 |       `Columns: ${profile.columns.length}`,
284 |       `Quality: ${quality.finalScore}%`,
285 |       `Filters: ${Object.entries(filters).filter(([key, value]) => key !== "conditions" && value).map(([key, value]) => `${key}=${String(value)}`).join(", ") || "none"}`,
286 |       `Charts: ${charts.map((chart) => chart.title).join(", ") || "none"}`,
287 |     ].join("\n");
288 | 
289 |     await navigator.clipboard?.writeText(summary);
290 |   }
291 | 
292 |   function resetDashboard() {
293 |     setFilters({});
294 |     aiController.setFilters({});
295 |     setManualCharts([]);
296 |     setManualKpis([]);
297 |     setHiddenChartIds(new Set());
298 |     setChartTypeOverrides({});
299 |   }
300 | 
301 |   function applyAiDashboardCommand(command: any) {
302 |     if (!command) return;
303 | 
304 |     if (command.action === "GENERATE_DASHBOARD") {
305 |       const plan = command.dashboardPlan || command.dashboard;
306 | 
307 |       if (plan?.charts?.length || plan?.kpis?.length) {
308 |         schemaDashboard.applyCommand(command);
309 | 
310 |         setManualCharts([]);
311 |         setManualKpis([]);
312 |         setHiddenChartIds(new Set());
313 | 
314 |         return;
315 |       }
316 |     }
317 | 
318 |     schemaDashboard.applyCommand(command);
319 |     aiController.applyCommand(command);
320 |   }
321 | 
322 |   return (
323 |     <div className="min-h-screen px-4 py-6 text-white lg:px-6">
324 |       <div className="mx-auto max-w-[1800px] space-y-5">
325 |         <header className="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
326 |           <div>
327 |             <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-400">
328 |               <span className="font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</span>
329 |               <span>-</span>
330 |               <span className="rounded-full border border-slate-700 bg-slate-900 px-2 py-1 text-xs">{filteredRows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
331 |             </div>
332 |             <h1 className="mt-2 text-3xl font-semibold tracking-normal text-white">Dashboard</h1>
333 |             <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-slate-400">Auto-generated insights from your current dataset schema.</p>
334 |           </div>
335 | 
336 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
337 |             <button type="button" onClick={shareDashboard} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
338 |               <Share2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
339 |               Share
340 |             </button>
341 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportCsv} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
342 |               <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
343 |               Export CSV
344 |             </button>
345 |             <button type="button" onClick={exportJson} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
346 |               <FileText className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
347 |               JSON
348 |             </button>
349 |             <button type="button" onClick={() => void deleteDataset()} className="rounded-xl border border-red-500/40 bg-red-500/10 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-200 hover:bg-red-500/20">
350 |               <Trash2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
351 |               Delete
352 |             </button>
353 |             <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-2 text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
354 |               <MoreVertical className="size-5" />
355 |             </button>
356 |           </div>
357 |         </header>
358 | 
359 |         <section className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 p-3">
360 |           <div className="flex rounded-xl border border-slate-700/70 bg-slate-950/70 p-1">
361 |             {(["Executive", "Analyst", "Story"] as const).map((mode) => (
362 |               <button
363 |                 key={mode}
364 |                 type="button"
365 |                 onClick={() => setDashboardMode(mode)}
366 |                 className={[
367 |                   "min-w-24 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition",
368 |                   dashboardMode === mode
369 |                     ? "bg-violet-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-violet-900/30"
370 |                     : "text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white",
371 |                 ].join(" ")}
372 |               >
373 |                 {mode}
374 |               </button>
375 |             ))}
376 |           </div>
377 |           <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-400">
378 |             <span className="rounded-full border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 px-3 py-1 text-emerald-200">
379 |               {schemaDashboard.chartSpecs.length || charts.length} charts
380 |             </span>
381 |             {schemaDashboard.memoryMatch && (
382 |               <span className="rounded-full border border-cyan-500/30 bg-cyan-500/10 px-3 py-1 text-cyan-200">
383 |                 trained memory matched
384 |               </span>
385 |             )}
386 |             {schemaDashboard.loading && <span>Training dashboard...</span>}
387 |           </div>
388 |         </section>
389 | 
390 |         <div className="grid gap-5 2xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1fr)_460px]">
391 |           <main className="space-y-5">
392 |             <section className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
393 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-200">
394 |                 <Calendar className="size-4 text-slate-400" />
395 |                 {dateColumn ? (
396 |                   <>
397 |                     <input
398 |                       type="date"
399 |                       value={String(filters.dateStart || "")}
400 |                       onChange={(event) => {
401 |                         const next = { ...filters, dateStart: event.target.value };
402 |                         setFilters(next);
403 |                         aiController.setFilters(next);
404 |                       }}
405 |                       className="bg-transparent outline-none"
406 |                     />
407 |                     <span className="text-slate-500">to</span>
408 |                     <input
409 |                       type="date"
410 |                       value={String(filters.dateEnd || "")}
411 |                       onChange={(event) => {
412 |                         const next = { ...filters, dateEnd: event.target.value };
413 |                         setFilters(next);
414 |                         aiController.setFilters(next);
415 |                       }}
416 |                       className="bg-transparent outline-none"
417 |                     />
418 |                   </>
419 |                 ) : (
420 |                   <span>All rows</span>
421 |                 )}
422 |               </div>
423 | 
424 |               {primaryFilter && (
425 |                 <select
426 |                   value={String(filters[primaryFilter.name] || "")}
427 |                   onChange={(event) => {
428 |                     const next = { ...filters, [primaryFilter.name]: event.target.value || undefined };
429 |                     setFilters(next);
430 |                     aiController.setFilters(next);
431 |                   }}
432 |                   className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 outline-none"
433 |                 >
434 |                   <option value="">All {primaryFilter.name}</option>
435 |                   {getUniqueValues(rows, primaryFilter.name, 50).map((value) => (
436 |                     <option key={value} value={value}>
437 |                       {value}
438 |                     </option>
439 |                   ))}
440 |                 </select>
441 |               )}
442 | 
443 |               <button type="button" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
444 |                 <Plus className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
445 |                 Add Filter
446 |               </button>
447 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => { setFilters({}); aiController.setFilters({}); }} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/70 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
448 |                 <RefreshCw className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
449 |                 Reset
450 |               </button>
451 |             </section>
452 | 
453 |             <section className={`${CARD} border-violet-500/60 bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-600/25 via-slate-900/80 to-blue-600/10 p-5`}>
454 |               <div className="flex flex-col gap-5 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
455 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
456 |                   <div className="grid size-20 place-items-center rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-600 to-blue-600 shadow-lg shadow-violet-600/20">
457 |                     <FileSpreadsheet className="size-9 text-white" />
458 |                   </div>
459 |                   <div>
460 |                     <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
461 |                       <h2 className="text-3xl font-semibold text-white">{dataset.name}</h2>
462 |                       <span className="rounded-full bg-green-500/15 px-3 py-1 text-xs font-semibold text-green-300">Ready</span>
463 |                     </div>
464 |                     <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-3 text-sm text-slate-300">
465 |                       <span>{rows.length.toLocaleString()} rows</span>
466 |                       <span>{profile.columns.length.toLocaleString()} columns</span>
467 |                       <span>{fileType(dataset.fileName || dataset.name, dataset.sourceType)}</span>
468 |                       <span>Uploaded {formatDate(dataset.uploadedAt)}</span>
469 |                     </div>
470 |                     <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-slate-400">Schema-aware dashboard with locally calculated values.</p>
471 |                   </div>
472 |                 </div>
473 | 
474 |                 <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
475 |                   <div>
476 |                     <p className="text-xs text-slate-400">Data Quality Score</p>
477 |                     <QualityRing score={quality.finalScore} />
478 |                   </div>
479 |                   <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowSchema(true)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
480 |                     <Table2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
481 |                     View Schema
482 |                   </button>
483 |                 </div>
484 |               </div>
485 |             </section>
486 | 
487 |             <section className="grid gap-3 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 2xl:grid-cols-6">
488 |               {kpis.slice(0, 6).map((kpi, index) => (
489 |                 <KpiCard key={`${kpi.id}-${index}`} kpi={kpi} index={index} />
490 |               ))}
491 |             </section>
492 | 
493 |             <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-2 2xl:grid-cols-3">
494 |               {charts.length ? (
495 |                 charts.slice(0, 9).map((chart) => (
496 |                   <SmartChartCard
497 |                     key={chart.id}
498 |                     chart={chart}
499 |                     availableTypes={CHART_TYPES}
500 |                     onTypeChange={(type) => updateChartType(chart, type)}
501 |                     onRemove={() => removeChart(chart)}
502 |                     onDuplicate={() => duplicateChart(chart)}
503 |                   />
504 |                 ))
505 |               ) : (
506 |                 <div className={`${CARD} col-span-full p-10 text-center text-slate-400`}>
507 |                   Not enough data to render charts yet.
508 |                 </div>
509 |               )}
510 |             </section>
511 | 
512 |             <section className={`${CARD} overflow-hidden`}>
513 |               <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4 sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between">
514 |                 <div>
515 |                   <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-white">Data Preview</h2>
516 |                   <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">{filteredRows.length.toLocaleString()} filtered rows x {tableColumns.length} columns</p>
517 |                 </div>
518 |                 <div className="flex gap-2">
519 |                   <Link to="/data" className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
520 |                     <Table2 className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
521 |                     View Full Table
522 |                   </Link>
523 |                   <button type="button" onClick={exportCsv} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-950/60 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-800">
524 |                     <Download className="mr-2 inline size-4" />
525 |                     Download
526 |                   </button>
527 |                 </div>
528 |               </div>
529 | 
530 |               <div className="overflow-x-auto">
531 |                 <table className="w-full min-w-[760px] text-left text-sm">
532 |                   <thead className="bg-slate-950/60 text-xs text-slate-400">
533 |                     <tr>
534 |                       <th className="px-4 py-3">#</th>
535 |                       {tableColumns.slice(0, 7).map((column) => (
536 |                         <th key={column} className="px-4 py-3">
537 |                           {column}
538 |                         </th>
539 |                       ))}
540 |                     </tr>
541 |                   </thead>
542 |                   <tbody>
543 |                     {filteredRows.slice(0, 8).map((row, index) => (
544 |                       <tr key={index} className="border-t border-slate-800/80 text-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-800/40">
545 |                         <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-500">{index + 1}</td>
546 |                         {tableColumns.slice(0, 7).map((column) => (
547 |                           <td key={column} className="max-w-[220px] truncate px-4 py-3">
548 |                             {String(row[column] ?? "") || "-"}
549 |                           </td>
550 |                         ))}
551 |                       </tr>
552 |                     ))}
553 |                   </tbody>
554 |                 </table>
555 |               </div>
556 |             </section>
557 |           </main>
558 | 
559 |           <SchemaDashboardChat
560 |             dataset={{
561 |               id: dataset?.id || "local-dataset",
562 |               name: dataset?.name || "Uploaded Dataset",
563 |               rows,
564 |               columns: dataset?.columns || tableColumns,
565 |             }}
566 |             currentDashboard={{
567 |               kpis: schemaDashboard.kpiSpecs,
568 |               charts: schemaDashboard.chartSpecs,
569 |               filters: schemaDashboard.filters,
570 |             }}
571 |             controller={aiController}
572 |             onCommand={applyAiDashboardCommand}
573 |             onSend={(query) => {
574 |               if (/explain|why|summary|describe/i.test(query)) {
575 |                 void schemaDashboard.sendChat(query);
576 |               } else {
577 |                 void schemaDashboard.sendCommand(query);
578 |               }
579 |             }}
580 |           />
581 |         </div>
582 |       </div>
583 | 
584 |       {showSchema && (
585 |         <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 grid place-items-center bg-black/60 p-4">
586 |           <div className={`${CARD} max-h-[80vh] w-full max-w-4xl overflow-hidden`}>
587 |             <div className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-700/60 p-4">
588 |               <div>
589 |                 <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-white">Dataset Schema</h2>
590 |                 <p className="text-sm text-slate-400">Column types, inferred roles, missing values, and examples.</p>
591 |               </div>
592 |               <button type="button" onClick={() => setShowSchema(false)} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-700 bg-slate-950 p-2 text-slate-200">
593 |                 <X className="size-4" />
594 |               </button>
595 |             </div>
596 |             <div className="max-h-[65vh] overflow-auto">
597 |               <table className="w-full min-w-[720px] text-left text-sm">
598 |                 <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-slate-950 text-xs text-slate-400">
599 |                   <tr>
600 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Column</th>
601 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Type</th>
602 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Role</th>
603 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Missing</th>
604 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Unique</th>
605 |                     <th className="px-4 py-3">Samples</th>
606 |                   </tr>
607 |                 </thead>
608 |                 <tbody>
609 |                   {profile.columns.map((column) => (
610 |                     <tr key={column.name} className="border-t border-slate-800 text-slate-200">
611 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{column.name}</td>
612 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.type}</td>
613 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.role}</td>
614 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.missingPct}%</td>
615 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3">{column.uniqueCount}</td>
616 |                       <td className="px-4 py-3 text-slate-400">{column.sampleValues.join(", ") || "-"}</td>
617 |                     </tr>
618 |                   ))}
619 |                 </tbody>
620 |               </table>
621 |             </div>
622 |           </div>
623 |         </div>
624 |       )}
625 | 
626 |       <div className="fixed bottom-4 right-4 hidden items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-slate-700/60 bg-slate-900/90 px-3 py-2 text-xs text-slate-400 shadow-xl backdrop-blur md:flex">
627 |         <ShieldCheck className="size-4 text-green-400" />
628 |         Schema-only AI enabled
629 |       </div>
630 |     </div>
631 |   );
632 | }
633 |
```

```ts
  1 | import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
  2 | import {
  3 |   applyFilters,
  4 |   buildChartFromSpec,
  5 |   buildDatasetProfile,
  6 |   buildDefaultCharts,
  7 |   buildKpiFromSpec,
  8 |   cleanDatasetRows,
  9 | } from "./dashboardAnalytics";
 10 | 
 11 | const rows = [
 12 |   { country: "India", education: "Bachelors", salary_usd: 100, experience: 2, languages: "Rust, JavaScript", frameworks: "React, Vue" },
 13 |   { country: "India", education: "Masters", salary_usd: 200, experience: 4, languages: "Rust, Python", frameworks: "React" },
 14 |   { country: "USA", education: "Masters", salary_usd: 300, experience: 6, languages: "JavaScript", frameworks: "Django, React" },
 15 |   { column: "salary_usd", type: "number", description: "dictionary row", _sourceFile: "data_dictionary.csv" },
 16 | ];
 17 | 
 18 | describe("dashboardAnalytics", () => {
 19 |   it("removes dictionary rows and calculates KPI values locally", () => {
 20 |     const clean = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 21 | 
 22 |     expect(clean.length).toBe(3);
 23 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Total Rows", metric: "__row_count__", aggregation: "count" }).rawValue).toBe(3);
 24 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Median Salary", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "median" }).rawValue).toBe(200);
 25 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Highest Salary", metric: "salary_usd", aggregation: "max" }).rawValue).toBe(300);
 26 |     expect(buildKpiFromSpec(clean, { title: "Countries", metric: "country", aggregation: "count_unique" }).rawValue).toBe(2);
 27 |   });
 28 | 
 29 |   it("calculates average salary by country correctly", () => {
 30 |     const chart = buildChartFromSpec(cleanDatasetRows(rows), {
 31 |       title: "Average Salary by Country",
 32 |       type: "bar",
 33 |       xKey: "country",
 34 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 35 |       aggregation: "avg",
 36 |       limit: 10,
 37 |     });
 38 | 
 39 |     expect(chart.data.find((item) => item.country === "India")?.salary_usd).toBe(150);
 40 |     expect(chart.data.find((item) => item.country === "USA")?.salary_usd).toBe(300);
 41 |   });
 42 | 
 43 |   it("builds histogram and scatter chart data", () => {
 44 |     const clean = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 45 |     const histogram = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 46 |       title: "Salary Distribution",
 47 |       type: "histogram",
 48 |       xKey: "salary_usd",
 49 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 50 |       aggregation: "count",
 51 |       limit: 4,
 52 |     });
 53 |     const scatter = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 54 |       title: "Salary vs Experience",
 55 |       type: "scatter",
 56 |       xKey: "experience",
 57 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 58 |       aggregation: "count",
 59 |       limit: 10,
 60 |     });
 61 | 
 62 |     expect(histogram.data.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item.count || 0), 0)).toBe(3);
 63 |     expect(scatter.data).toHaveLength(3);
 64 |   });
 65 | 
 66 |   it("splits multi-value languages and frameworks", () => {
 67 |     const clean = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 68 |     const languages = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 69 |       title: "Average Salary by Language",
 70 |       type: "bar",
 71 |       xKey: "languages",
 72 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 73 |       aggregation: "avg",
 74 |       splitValues: true,
 75 |       limit: 10,
 76 |     });
 77 |     const frameworks = buildChartFromSpec(clean, {
 78 |       title: "Average Salary by Framework",
 79 |       type: "bar",
 80 |       xKey: "frameworks",
 81 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 82 |       aggregation: "avg",
 83 |       splitValues: true,
 84 |       limit: 10,
 85 |     });
 86 | 
 87 |     expect(languages.data.find((item) => item.languages === "Rust")?.salary_usd).toBe(150);
 88 |     expect(languages.data.find((item) => item.languages === "JavaScript")?.salary_usd).toBe(200);
 89 |     expect(frameworks.data.find((item) => item.frameworks === "React")?.salary_usd).toBe(200);
 90 |   });
 91 | 
 92 |   it("filters rows before chart calculation", () => {
 93 |     const filtered = applyFilters(cleanDatasetRows(rows), { country: "India" });
 94 |     const chart = buildChartFromSpec(filtered, {
 95 |       title: "Average Salary by Country",
 96 |       type: "bar",
 97 |       xKey: "country",
 98 |       yKey: "salary_usd",
 99 |       aggregation: "avg",
100 |       limit: 10,
101 |     });
102 | 
103 |     expect(filtered.length).toBe(2);
104 |     expect(chart.data).toHaveLength(1);
105 |     expect(chart.data[0].salary_usd).toBe(150);
106 |   });
107 | 
108 |   it("keeps sales metrics numeric in small datasets", () => {
109 |     const salesRows = [
110 |       { month: "Jan", category: "Electronics", region: "North", revenue: 1200, units_sold: 12, profit_margin: 24 },
111 |       { month: "Feb", category: "Furniture", region: "South", revenue: 850, units_sold: 8, profit_margin: 18 },
112 |       { month: "Mar", category: "Electronics", region: "West", revenue: 1500, units_sold: 15, profit_margin: 30 },
113 |       { month: "Apr", category: "Office", region: "North", revenue: 620, units_sold: 7, profit_margin: 16 },
114 |       { month: "May", category: "Furniture", region: "East", revenue: 930, units_sold: 9, profit_margin: 21 },
115 |     ];
116 | 
117 |     const profile = buildDatasetProfile(salesRows);
118 |     const charts = buildDefaultCharts(salesRows);
119 | 
120 |     expect(profile.numericColumns.map((column) => column.name)).toEqual([
121 |       "revenue",
122 |       "units_sold",
123 |       "profit_margin",
124 |     ]);
125 |     expect(profile.primaryMetric?.name).toBe("revenue");
126 |     expect(profile.primaryCategory?.name).toBe("category");
127 |     expect(charts.some((chart) => chart.title === "Average Revenue by Category")).toBe(true);
128 |   });
129 | });
130 |
```

```ts
   1 | import type {
   2 |   Aggregation,
   3 |   ChartSpec,
   4 |   ChartType,
   5 |   KpiSpec,
   6 | } from "@/features/dashboard/types/dashboardTypes";
   7 | 
   8 | export type RowValue = string | number | boolean | null | undefined;
   9 | export type Row = Record<string, RowValue>;
  10 | 
  11 | export type ColumnType = "number" | "string" | "date" | "boolean" | "unknown";
  12 | export type ColumnRole =
  13 |   | "metric"
  14 |   | "category"
  15 |   | "date"
  16 |   | "id"
  17 |   | "location"
  18 |   | "boolean"
  19 |   | "text";
  20 | 
  21 | export type FilterOperator =
  22 |   | "equals"
  23 |   | "not_equals"
  24 |   | "contains"
  25 |   | "gt"
  26 |   | "gte"
  27 |   | "lt"
  28 |   | "lte";
  29 | 
  30 | export interface DashboardFilterCondition {
  31 |   id: string;

  35 | }
  36 |

  43 |

  52 | }
  53 | 
  54 | export interface DatasetProfile {

  65 | }
  66 | 
  67 | export interface DashboardChart extends ChartSpec {

  73 |

  82 | 
  83 | export interface DataQualityScore {

  90 |   textColumns: number;

  99 |   finalScore: number;
 100 | }
 101 | 
 102 | export interface InsightCard {
 103 |   id: string;
 104 |   title: string;
 105 |   description: string;
 106 |   tone: "good" | "warning" | "critical" | "info";
 107 | }
 108 | 
 109 | const METRIC_HINTS = [
 110 |   "salary",
 111 |   "revenue",
 112 |   "amount",
 113 |   "value",
 114 |   "score",
 115 |   "marks",
 116 |   "stress",
 117 |   "anxiety",
 118 |   "rating",
 119 |   "profit",
 120 |   "margin",
 121 |   "sales",
 122 |   "sold",
 123 |   "units",
 124 |   "quantity",
 125 |   "cost",
 126 |   "price",
 127 |   "income",
 128 | ];
 129 | 
 130 | const CATEGORY_HINTS = [
 131 |   "country",
 132 |   "region",
 133 |   "product",
 134 |   "education",
 135 |   "department",
 136 |   "gender",
 137 |   "platform",
 138 |   "status",
 139 |   "name",
 140 |   "category",
 141 |   "segment",
 142 |   "city",
 143 |   "state",
 144 | ];
 145 | 
 146 | const LOCATION_HINTS = ["country", "region", "state", "city", "location", "market"];
 147 | 
 148 | function normalizeName(value: unknown) {
 149 |   return String(value ?? "")
 150 |     .trim()
 151 |     .toLowerCase()
 152 |     .replace(/^[\ufeff\s]+/, "")
 153 |     .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "_")
 154 |     .replace(/^_+|_+$/g, "");
 155 | }
 156 | 
 157 | function titleCase(value: string) {
 158 |   return value
 159 |     .replace(/[_-]+/g, " ")
 160 |     .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
 161 |     .trim()
 162 |     .replace(/\b\w/g, (char) => char.toUpperCase());
 163 | }
 164 | 
 165 | function round(value: number, digits = 2) {
 166 |   if (!Number.isFinite(value)) return 0;
 167 |   return Number(value.toFixed(digits));
 168 | }
 169 | 
 170 | function isMissing(value: unknown) {
 171 |   return value === null || value === undefined || String(value).trim() === "";
 172 | }
 173 | 
 174 | function isDateLike(value: unknown) {
 175 |   if (value instanceof Date && !Number.isNaN(value.getTime())) return true;
 176 |   if (typeof value !== "string") return false;
 177 |   const text = value.trim();
 178 |   if (!text || !/\d/.test(text)) return false;
 179 |   return Number.isFinite(Date.parse(text));
 180 | }
 181 | 
 182 | function isBooleanLike(value: unknown) {
 183 |   if (typeof value === "boolean") return true;
 184 |   if (typeof value !== "string") return false;
 185 |   return ["true", "false", "yes", "no", "0", "1"].includes(value.trim().toLowerCase());
 186 | }
 187 | 
 188 | function formatMetric(value: number | string, format: KpiSpec["format"] = "number") {
 189 |   if (typeof value === "string") return value;
 190 |   if (format === "currency") {
 191 |     return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-US", {
 192 |       style: "currency",
 193 |       currency: "USD",
 194 |       maximumFractionDigits: 2,
 195 |     }).format(value);
 196 |   }
 197 |   if (format === "percent") {
 198 |     return `${round(value, 1)}%`;
 199 |   }
 200 |   return Number.isInteger(value)
 201 |     ? value.toLocaleString()
 202 |     : value.toLocaleString(undefined, { maximumFractionDigits: 2 });
 203 | }
 204 | 
 205 | export function safeNumber(value: unknown): number | null {
 206 |   if (typeof value === "number" && Number.isFinite(value)) return value;
 207 | 
 208 |   const cleaned = String(value ?? "")
 209 |     .replace(/[^0-9.+-]/g, "");
 210 | 
 211 |   if (!cleaned || cleaned === "-" || cleaned.toLowerCase() === "nan") {
 212 |     return null;
 213 |   }
 214 | 
 215 |   const parsed = Number(cleaned);
 216 |   return Number.isFinite(parsed) ? parsed : null;
 217 | }
 218 | 
 219 | export function cleanDatasetRows(rows: Row[] = []) {
 220 |   return rows.filter((row) => {
 221 |     if (!row || typeof row !== "object") return false;
 222 | 
 223 |     const keys = Object.keys(row).map(normalizeName);
 224 |     const sourceFile = String(row._source_file ?? row._sourceFile ?? row.source ?? "").toLowerCase();
 225 |     const schemaShape =
 226 |       keys.includes("column") &&
 227 |       (keys.includes("type") || keys.includes("data_type")) &&
 228 |       (keys.includes("description") || keys.includes("definition"));
 229 | 
 230 |     return !schemaShape && !sourceFile.includes("dictionary");
 231 |   });
 232 | }
 233 | 
 234 | export function inferColumnTypes(rows: Row[] = []) {
 235 |   const columnNames = Array.from(
 236 |     new Set(rows.flatMap((row) => Object.keys(row || {})).filter((key) => !key.startsWith("__"))),
 237 |   );
 238 | 
 239 |   return Object.fromEntries(
 240 |     columnNames.map((name) => {
 241 |       const values = rows.map((row) => row[name]).filter((value) => !isMissing(value)).slice(0, 500);
 242 |       if (!values.length) return [name, "unknown" satisfies ColumnType];
 243 | 
 244 |       const numericRatio = values.filter((value) => safeNumber(value) !== null).length / values.length;
 245 |       const dateRatio = values.filter((value) => isDateLike(value)).length / values.length;
 246 |       const booleanRatio = values.filter((value) => isBooleanLike(value)).length / values.length;
 247 | 
 248 |       let type: ColumnType = "string";
 249 |       if (numericRatio >= 0.85) type = "number";
 250 |       else if (dateRatio >= 0.75) type = "date";
 251 |       else if (booleanRatio >= 0.9) type = "boolean";
 252 | 
 253 |       return [name, type];
 254 |     }),
 255 |   ) as Record<string, ColumnType>;
 256 | }
 257 | 
 258 | export function inferColumnRoles(
 259 |   rows: Row[] = [],
 260 |   columnTypes = inferColumnTypes(rows),
 261 | ) {
 262 |   const totalRows = rows.length || 1;
 263 | 
 264 |   return Object.fromEntries(
 265 |     Object.entries(columnTypes).map(([name, type]) => {
 266 |       const normalized = normalizeName(name);
 267 |       const values = rows.map((row) => row[name]).filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
 268 |       const uniqueCount = new Set(values.map((value) => String(value).trim())).size;
 269 | 
 270 |       let role: ColumnRole = "text";
 271 | 
 272 |       if (/^(id|uuid|row_id|index|serial|sr_no)$/.test(normalized) || normalized.endsWith("_id")) {
 273 |         role = "id";
 274 |       } else if (type === "date" || /date|time|year|month|created|updated/.test(normalized)) {
 275 |         role = "date";
 276 |       } else if (LOCATION_HINTS.some((hint) => normalized.includes(hint))) {
 277 |         role = "location";
 278 |       } else if (type === "boolean") {
 279 |         role = "boolean";
 280 |       } else if (type === "number") {
 281 |         const hasMetricHint = METRIC_HINTS.some((hint) => normalized.includes(hint));
 282 |         role = hasMetricHint || uniqueCount > Math.max(12, totalRows * 0.04) ? "metric" : "category";
 283 |       } else if (uniqueCount <= Math.max(30, totalRows * 0.2)) {
 284 |         role = "category";
 285 |       }
 286 | 
 287 |       return [name, role];
 288 |     }),
 289 |   ) as Record<string, ColumnRole>;
 290 | }
 291 | 
 292 | export interface InferredColumns {
 293 |   types: Record<string, ColumnType>;
 294 |   roles: Record<string, ColumnRole>;
 295 | }
 296 | 
 297 | export function inferColumns(rows: Row[]): InferredColumns {
 298 |   const types = inferColumnTypes(rows);
 299 |   const roles = inferColumnRoles(rows, types);
 300 |   return { types, roles };
 301 | }
 302 | 
 303 | export interface PickedColumns {
 304 |   dimension?: ColumnProfile;
 305 |   secondDimension?: ColumnProfile;
 306 |   metric?: ColumnProfile;
 307 |   secondMetric?: ColumnProfile;
 308 |   date?: ColumnProfile;
 309 | }
 310 | 
 311 | export function pickColumns(rows: Row[]): PickedColumns {
 312 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
 313 |   return {
 314 |     dimension: profile.primaryCategory,
 315 |     secondDimension: profile.secondaryCategory,
 316 |     metric: profile.primaryMetric,
 317 |     secondMetric: profile.secondaryMetric,
 318 |     date: profile.dateColumn,
 319 |   };
 320 | }
 321 | 
 322 | export const uniqueValues = getUniqueValues;
 323 | 
 324 | export function getUniqueValues(rows: Row[], column: string, limit = 8) {
 325 |   const counts = new Map<string, number>();
 326 | 
 327 |   for (const row of rows) {
 328 |     const value = String(row[column] ?? "").trim();
 329 |     if (!value) continue;
 330 |     counts.set(value, (counts.get(value) || 0) + 1);
 331 |   }
 332 | 
 333 |   return Array.from(counts.entries())
 334 |     .sort((left, right) => right[1] - left[1])
 335 |     .slice(0, limit)
 336 |     .map(([value]) => value);
 337 | }
 338 | 
 339 | function buildColumnProfiles(rows: Row[]) {
 340 |   const types = inferColumnTypes(rows);
 341 |   const roles = inferColumnRoles(rows, types);
 342 | 
 343 |   return Object.keys(types).map((name) => {
 344 |     const values = rows.map((row) => row[name]);
 345 |     const present = values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value));
 346 |     const missingCount = values.length - present.length;
 347 | 
 348 |     return {
 349 |       name,
 350 |       type: types[name],
 351 |       role: roles[name],
 352 |       uniqueCount: new Set(present.map((value) => String(value).trim())).size,
 353 |       missingCount,
 354 |       missingPct: rows.length ? round((missingCount / rows.length) * 100, 1) : 0,
 355 |       sampleValues: getUniqueValues(rows, name, 5),
 356 |     } satisfies ColumnProfile;
 357 |   });
 358 | }
 359 | 
 360 | export function buildDatasetProfile(rows: Row[] = []): DatasetProfile {
 361 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 362 |   const columns = buildColumnProfiles(cleanRows);
 363 |   const numericColumns = columns.filter((column) => column.role === "metric");
 364 |   const categoryColumns = columns.filter((column) =>
 365 |     ["category", "location", "boolean"].includes(column.role),
 366 |   );
 367 | 
 368 |   const primaryMetric =
 369 |     numericColumns.find((column) =>
 370 |       METRIC_HINTS.some((hint) => normalizeName(column.name).includes(hint)),
 371 |     ) || numericColumns[0];
 372 |   const secondaryMetric = numericColumns.find((column) => column.name !== primaryMetric?.name);
 373 |   const primaryCategory =
 374 |     categoryColumns.find((column) =>
 375 |       CATEGORY_HINTS.some((hint) => normalizeName(column.name).includes(hint)),
 376 |     ) || categoryColumns[0];
 377 |   const secondaryCategory = categoryColumns.find((column) => column.name !== primaryCategory?.name);
 378 |   const dateColumn = columns.find((column) => column.role === "date");
 379 |   const locationColumn = columns.find((column) => column.role === "location");
 380 | 
 381 |   return {
 382 |     columns,
 383 |     totalRows: cleanRows.length,
 384 |     primaryMetric,
 385 |     secondaryMetric,
 386 |     primaryCategory,
 387 |     secondaryCategory,
 388 |     dateColumn,
 389 |     locationColumn,
 390 |     numericColumns,
 391 |     categoryColumns,
 392 |   };
 393 | }
 394 | 
 395 | export function applyFilters(rows: Row[], filters: DashboardFilters = {}) {
 396 |   const conditions = filters.conditions || [];
 397 | 
 398 |   return rows.filter((row) => {
 399 |     for (const [key, rawValue] of Object.entries(filters)) {
 400 |       if (
 401 |         key === "conditions" ||
 402 |         key === "dateStart" ||
 403 |         key === "dateEnd" ||
 404 |         rawValue === undefined ||
 405 |         rawValue === ""
 406 |       ) {
 407 |         continue;
 408 |       }
 409 | 
 410 |       const cell = String(row[key] ?? "").toLowerCase();
 411 |       const expected = String(rawValue).toLowerCase();
 412 | 
 413 |       if (cell !== expected) return false;
 414 |     }
 415 | 
 416 |     for (const condition of conditions) {
 417 |       const rawCell = row[condition.column];
 418 |       const cellText = String(rawCell ?? "").toLowerCase();
 419 |       const compareText = condition.value.toLowerCase();
 420 |       const cellNumber = safeNumber(rawCell);
 421 |       const compareNumber = safeNumber(condition.value);
 422 | 
 423 |       if (condition.operator === "equals" && cellText !== compareText) return false;
 424 |       if (condition.operator === "not_equals" && cellText === compareText) return false;
 425 |       if (condition.operator === "contains" && !cellText.includes(compareText)) return false;
 426 |       if (condition.operator === "gt" && !(cellNumber !== null && compareNumber !== null && cellNumber > compareNumber)) return false;
 427 |       if (condition.operator === "gte" && !(cellNumber !== null && compareNumber !== null && cellNumber >= compareNumber)) return false;
 428 |       if (condition.operator === "lt" && !(cellNumber !== null && compareNumber !== null && cellNumber < compareNumber)) return false;
 429 |       if (condition.operator === "lte" && !(cellNumber !== null && compareNumber !== null && cellNumber <= compareNumber)) return false;
 430 |     }
 431 | 
 432 |     const dateKey = Object.keys(row).find((key) => /date|time|year|month/i.test(key));
 433 |     if (dateKey && (filters.dateStart || filters.dateEnd)) {
 434 |       const dateValue = new Date(String(row[dateKey] ?? "")).getTime();
 435 |       if (!Number.isFinite(dateValue)) return false;
 436 |       if (filters.dateStart && dateValue < new Date(filters.dateStart).getTime()) return false;
 437 |       if (filters.dateEnd && dateValue > new Date(filters.dateEnd).getTime()) return false;
 438 |     }
 439 | 
 440 |     return true;
 441 |   });
 442 | }
 443 | 
 444 | export function sum(values: unknown[]) {
 445 |   return round(
 446 |     values
 447 |       .map((value) => safeNumber(value))
 448 |       .filter((value): value is number => value !== null)
 449 |       .reduce((total, value) => total + value, 0),
 450 |   );
 451 | }
 452 | 
 453 | export function average(values: unknown[]) {
 454 |   const numeric = values
 455 |     .map((value) => safeNumber(value))
 456 |     .filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
 457 |   return numeric.length ? round(sum(numeric) / numeric.length) : 0;
 458 | }
 459 | 
 460 | export function median(values: unknown[]) {
 461 |   const numeric = values
 462 |     .map((value) => safeNumber(value))
 463 |     .filter((value): value is number => value !== null)
 464 |     .sort((left, right) => left - right);
 465 |   if (!numeric.length) return 0;
 466 |   const middle = Math.floor(numeric.length / 2);
 467 |   return numeric.length % 2
 468 |     ? round(numeric[middle])
 469 |     : round((numeric[middle - 1] + numeric[middle]) / 2);
 470 | }
 471 | 
 472 | export function min(values: unknown[]) {
 473 |   const numeric = values
 474 |     .map((value) => safeNumber(value))
 475 |     .filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
 476 |   return numeric.length ? round(Math.min(...numeric)) : 0;
 477 | }
 478 | 
 479 | export function max(values: unknown[]) {
 480 |   const numeric = values
 481 |     .map((value) => safeNumber(value))
 482 |     .filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
 483 |   return numeric.length ? round(Math.max(...numeric)) : 0;
 484 | }
 485 | 
 486 | export function countUnique(values: unknown[]) {
 487 |   return new Set(
 488 |     values
 489 |       .map((value) => String(value ?? "").trim())
 490 |       .filter(Boolean),
 491 |   ).size;
 492 | }
 493 | 
 494 | function aggregateValues(values: unknown[], aggregation: Aggregation | "count_unique") {
 495 |   if (aggregation === "count") {
 496 |     return values.filter((value) => !isMissing(value)).length;
 497 |   }
 498 |   if (aggregation === "sum") return sum(values);
 499 |   if (aggregation === "avg") return average(values);
 500 |   if (aggregation === "min") return min(values);
 501 |   if (aggregation === "max") return max(values);
 502 |   if (aggregation === "median") return median(values);
 503 |   return countUnique(values);
 504 | }
 505 | 
 506 | export function groupByAggregate(
 507 |   rows: Row[],
 508 |   xKey: string,
 509 |   yKey: string,
 510 |   aggregation: Aggregation,
 511 |   limit = 10,
 512 | ) {
 513 |   const groups = new Map<string, unknown[]>();
 514 | 
 515 |   for (const row of rows) {
 516 |     const label = String(row[xKey] ?? "Unknown").trim() || "Unknown";
 517 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
 518 |     groups.get(label)?.push(aggregation === "count" ? label : row[yKey]);
 519 |   }
 520 | 
 521 |   return Array.from(groups.entries())
 522 |     .map(([label, values]) => ({
 523 |       [xKey]: label,
 524 |       [aggregation === "count" ? "count" : yKey]: round(aggregateValues(values, aggregation)),
 525 |     }))
 526 |     .sort((left, right) => Number(Object.values(right).at(-1) ?? 0) - Number(Object.values(left).at(-1) ?? 0))
 527 |     .slice(0, limit);
 528 | }
 529 | 
 530 | export function buildHistogram(rows: Row[], key: string, bins = 8) {
 531 |   const values = rows
 532 |     .map((row) => safeNumber(row[key]))
 533 |     .filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
 534 | 
 535 |   if (!values.length) return [];
 536 | 
 537 |   const minValue = Math.min(...values);
 538 |   const maxValue = Math.max(...values);
 539 | 
 540 |   if (minValue === maxValue) {
 541 |     return [{ range: String(minValue), count: values.length }];
 542 |   }
 543 | 
 544 |   const step = (maxValue - minValue) / bins;
 545 |   const buckets = Array.from({ length: bins }, (_, index) => ({
 546 |     start: minValue + index * step,
 547 |     end: index === bins - 1 ? maxValue : minValue + (index + 1) * step,
 548 |     count: 0,
 549 |   }));
 550 | 
 551 |   for (const value of values) {
 552 |     const bucketIndex = Math.min(Math.floor((value - minValue) / step), bins - 1);
 553 |     buckets[bucketIndex].count += 1;
 554 |   }
 555 | 
 556 |   return buckets.map((bucket) => ({
 557 |     range: `${round(bucket.start)}-${round(bucket.end)}`,
 558 |     count: bucket.count,
 559 |   }));
 560 | }
 561 | 
 562 | export function buildScatterData(rows: Row[], xKey: string, yKey: string, limit = 250) {
 563 |   const validRows = rows
 564 |     .map((row, index) => ({
 565 |       [xKey]: safeNumber(row[xKey]),
 566 |       [yKey]: safeNumber(row[yKey]),
 567 |       index: index + 1,
 568 |     }))
 569 |     .filter(
 570 |       (row): row is Record<string, number> =>
 571 |         typeof row[xKey] === "number" && typeof row[yKey] === "number",
 572 |     );
 573 | 
 574 |   if (validRows.length <= limit) return validRows;
 575 | 
 576 |   const step = Math.max(Math.floor(validRows.length / limit), 1);
 577 |   return validRows.filter((_, index) => index % step === 0).slice(0, limit);
 578 | }
 579 | 
 580 | export function buildCorrelationMatrix(rows: Row[], numericColumns?: string[]) {
 581 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(rows);
 582 |   const columns = numericColumns?.length
 583 |     ? numericColumns
 584 |     : profile.numericColumns.map((column) => column.name).slice(0, 6);
 585 | 
 586 |   const correlation = (leftKey: string, rightKey: string) => {
 587 |     const paired = rows
 588 |       .map((row) => [safeNumber(row[leftKey]), safeNumber(row[rightKey])] as const)
 589 |       .filter((pair): pair is readonly [number, number] => pair[0] !== null && pair[1] !== null);
 590 | 
 591 |     if (paired.length < 2) return 0;
 592 | 
 593 |     const leftValues = paired.map((pair) => pair[0]);
 594 |     const rightValues = paired.map((pair) => pair[1]);
 595 |     const leftMean = average(leftValues);
 596 |     const rightMean = average(rightValues);
 597 | 
 598 |     let numerator = 0;
 599 |     let leftVariance = 0;
 600 |     let rightVariance = 0;
 601 | 
 602 |     paired.forEach(([left, right]) => {
 603 |       numerator += (left - leftMean) * (right - rightMean);
 604 |       leftVariance += (left - leftMean) ** 2;
 605 |       rightVariance += (right - rightMean) ** 2;
 606 |     });
 607 | 
 608 |     const denominator = Math.sqrt(leftVariance * rightVariance);
 609 |     return denominator ? round(numerator / denominator, 2) : 0;
 610 |   };
 611 | 
 612 |   return columns.flatMap((xKey) =>
 613 |     columns.map((yKey) => ({
 614 |       x: xKey,
 615 |       y: yKey,
 616 |       value: xKey === yKey ? 1 : correlation(xKey, yKey),
 617 |     })),
 618 |   );
 619 | }
 620 | 
 621 | function inferValidityScore(rows: Row[], columns: ColumnProfile[]) {
 622 |   if (!rows.length || !columns.length) return 100;
 623 | 
 624 |   let validChecks = 0;
 625 |   let totalChecks = 0;
 626 | 
 627 |   for (const column of columns) {
 628 |     if (!["number", "date", "boolean"].includes(column.type)) continue;
 629 | 
 630 |     for (const row of rows) {
 631 |       const value = row[column.name];
 632 |       if (isMissing(value)) continue;
 633 |       totalChecks += 1;
 634 | 
 635 |       if (
 636 |         (column.type === "number" && safeNumber(value) !== null) ||
 637 |         (column.type === "date" && isDateLike(value)) ||
 638 |         (column.type === "boolean" && isBooleanLike(value))
 639 |       ) {
 640 |         validChecks += 1;
 641 |       }
 642 |     }
 643 |   }
 644 | 
 645 |   return totalChecks ? round((validChecks / totalChecks) * 100, 1) : 100;
 646 | }
 647 | 
 648 | export function buildDataQualityScore(rows: Row[] = []) {
 649 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 650 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(cleanRows);
 651 |   const totalColumns = profile.columns.length;
 652 |   const totalRows = cleanRows.length;
 653 |   const totalCells = totalRows * Math.max(totalColumns, 1);
 654 |   const missingCells = profile.columns.reduce((total, column) => total + column.missingCount, 0);
 655 |   const duplicateRows = (() => {
 656 |     const signatures = new Map<string, number>();
 657 |     cleanRows.forEach((row) => {
 658 |       const signature = JSON.stringify(row);
 659 |       signatures.set(signature, (signatures.get(signature) || 0) + 1);
 660 |     });
 661 |     return Array.from(signatures.values())
 662 |       .filter((count) => count > 1)
 663 |       .reduce((total, count) => total + count - 1, 0);
 664 |   })();
 665 | 
 666 |   const completeness = totalCells ? round(((totalCells - missingCells) / totalCells) * 100, 1) : 100;
 667 |   const uniqueness = totalRows ? round(((totalRows - duplicateRows) / totalRows) * 100, 1) : 100;
 668 |   const validity = inferValidityScore(cleanRows, profile.columns);
 669 |   const consistency = round((completeness + validity) / 2, 1);
 670 |   const timeliness = profile.dateColumn ? validity : 100;
 671 |   const finalScore = round(
 672 |     completeness * 0.35 +
 673 |       uniqueness * 0.2 +
 674 |       validity * 0.2 +
 675 |       consistency * 0.15 +
 676 |       timeliness * 0.1,
 677 |     1,
 678 |   );
 679 | 
 680 |   return {
 681 |     totalRows,
 682 |     totalColumns,
 683 |     missingCells,
 684 |     duplicateRows,
 685 |     validRows: Math.max(totalRows - duplicateRows, 0),
 686 |     numericColumns: profile.numericColumns.length,
 687 |     textColumns: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "string").length,
 688 |     categoricalColumns: profile.categoryColumns.length,
 689 |     dateColumns: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "date").length,
 690 |     booleanColumns: profile.columns.filter((column) => column.type === "boolean").length,
 691 |     completeness,
 692 |     consistency,
 693 |     validity,
 694 |     uniqueness,
 695 |     timeliness,
 696 |     finalScore,
 697 |   } satisfies DataQualityScore;
 698 | }
 699 | 
 700 | function buildTrendData(rows: Row[], xKey: string, yKey: string, aggregation: Aggregation = "sum") {
 701 |   const groups = new Map<string, unknown[]>();
 702 | 
 703 |   for (const row of rows) {
 704 |     const raw = row[xKey];
 705 |     const label = xKey === "__row_index__"
 706 |       ? String(row.__row_index__ ?? "")
 707 |       : isDateLike(raw)
 708 |       ? new Date(String(raw)).toISOString().slice(0, 10)
 709 |       : String(raw ?? "");
 710 |     if (!label) continue;
 711 |     if (!groups.has(label)) groups.set(label, []);
 712 |     groups.get(label)?.push(row[yKey]);
 713 |   }
 714 | 
 715 |   return Array.from(groups.entries())
 716 |     .map(([label, values]) => ({
 717 |       [xKey]: label,
 718 |       [yKey]: round(aggregateValues(values, aggregation)),
 719 |     }))
 720 |     .sort((left, right) => String(left[xKey]).localeCompare(String(right[xKey])))
 721 |     .slice(-24);
 722 | }
 723 | 
 724 | function buildRowIndexRows(rows: Row[]) {
 725 |   return rows.map((row, index) => ({
 726 |     ...row,
 727 |     __row_index__: index + 1,
 728 |   }));
 729 | }
 730 | 
 731 | function expandMultiValueRows(rows: Row[], xKey: string) {
 732 |   const expanded: Row[] = [];
 733 |   for (const row of rows) {
 734 |     const raw = row[xKey];
 735 |     const parts = String(raw ?? "")
 736 |       .split(/[;,|]/g)
 737 |       .map((part) => part.trim())
 738 |       .filter(Boolean);
 739 |     if (parts.length > 1) {
 740 |       for (const part of parts) {
 741 |         expanded.push({ ...row, [xKey]: part });
 742 |       }
 743 |     } else {
 744 |       expanded.push(row);
 745 |     }
 746 |   }
 747 |   return expanded;
 748 | }
 749 | 
 750 | function makeChart(spec: ChartSpec, data: Array<Record<string, string | number>>, warning?: string): DashboardChart {
 751 |   return {
 752 |     id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 753 |     ...spec,
 754 |     subtitle: `${spec.aggregation.toUpperCase()} - ${titleCase(spec.xKey)} vs ${titleCase(spec.yKey)}`,
 755 |     data,
 756 |     warning,
 757 |   };
 758 | }
 759 | 
 760 | export function buildChartFromSpec(rows: Row[], chartSpec: ChartSpec): DashboardChart {
 761 |   const withIndex = buildRowIndexRows(cleanDatasetRows(rows));
 762 |   const limit = chartSpec.limit ?? 10;
 763 |   const xKey = chartSpec.xKey || "__row_index__";
 764 |   const yKey = chartSpec.yKey || "count";
 765 | 
 766 |   if (!withIndex.length) {
 767 |     return makeChart(chartSpec, [], "Not enough data to render this chart.");
 768 |   }
 769 | 
 770 |   const chartRows = chartSpec.splitValues ? expandMultiValueRows(withIndex, xKey) : withIndex;
 771 | 
 772 |   if (chartSpec.type === "histogram") {
 773 |     return makeChart(
 774 |       { ...chartSpec, xKey: "range", yKey: "count" },
 775 |       buildHistogram(chartRows, yKey === "count" ? xKey : yKey),
 776 |       undefined,
 777 |     );
 778 |   }
 779 | 
 780 |   if (chartSpec.type === "scatter") {
 781 |     return makeChart(chartSpec, buildScatterData(chartRows, xKey, yKey, 240));
 782 |   }
 783 | 
 784 |   if (chartSpec.type === "heatmap") {
 785 |     return makeChart(chartSpec, buildCorrelationMatrix(chartRows));
 786 |   }
 787 | 
 788 |   if (chartSpec.type === "line" || chartSpec.type === "area") {
 789 |     const resolvedXKey = xKey === "__row_index__" ? "__row_index__" : xKey;
 790 |     const trendRows = buildTrendData(chartRows, resolvedXKey, yKey, chartSpec.aggregation);
 791 |     return makeChart({ ...chartSpec, xKey: resolvedXKey }, trendRows);
 792 |   }
 793 | 
 794 |   return makeChart(
 795 |     chartSpec,
 796 |     groupByAggregate(chartRows, xKey, yKey === "count" ? xKey : yKey, chartSpec.aggregation, limit),
 797 |   );
 798 | }
 799 | 
 800 | export function buildKpiFromSpec(rows: Row[], kpiSpec: KpiSpec): DashboardKpi {
 801 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 802 |   const quality = buildDataQualityScore(cleanRows);
 803 |   let rawValue: number | string = 0;
 804 | 
 805 |   if (kpiSpec.metric === "__row_count__" || !kpiSpec.metric) {
 806 |     rawValue = cleanRows.length;
 807 |   } else if (kpiSpec.metric === "__quality_score__") {
 808 |     rawValue = quality.finalScore;
 809 |   } else {
 810 |     rawValue = aggregateValues(
 811 |       cleanRows.map((row) => row[kpiSpec.metric!]),
 812 |       kpiSpec.aggregation || "count",
 813 |     );
 814 |   }
 815 | 
 816 |   return {
 817 |     ...kpiSpec,
 818 |     id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 819 |     rawValue,
 820 |     value: formatMetric(rawValue, kpiSpec.format),
 821 |     subtitle: kpiSpec.metric === "__quality_score__" ? "Data quality" : `${(kpiSpec.aggregation || "count").toUpperCase()} - ${titleCase(kpiSpec.metric || "Rows")}`,
 822 |     status: typeof rawValue === "number" && rawValue < 0 ? "critical" : "good",
 823 |   };
 824 | }
 825 | 
 826 | export function buildKpis(rows: Row[]) {
 827 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 828 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(cleanRows);
 829 |   const quality = buildDataQualityScore(cleanRows);
 830 |   const kpis: DashboardKpi[] = [
 831 |     buildKpiFromSpec(cleanRows, { title: "Total Rows", metric: "__row_count__", aggregation: "count", format: "number" }),
 832 |     buildKpiFromSpec(cleanRows, {
 833 |       title: "Attributes / Columns",
 834 |       metric: "__row_count__",
 835 |       aggregation: "count",
 836 |       format: "number",
 837 |     }),
 838 |     {
 839 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 840 |       title: "Numeric Columns",
 841 |       metric: "__numeric_columns__",
 842 |       aggregation: "count",
 843 |       format: "number",
 844 |       rawValue: profile.numericColumns.length,
 845 |       value: profile.numericColumns.length.toLocaleString(),
 846 |       subtitle: "Metric-ready columns",
 847 |     },
 848 |     {
 849 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 850 |       title: "Categorical Columns",
 851 |       metric: "__categorical_columns__",
 852 |       aggregation: "count",
 853 |       format: "number",
 854 |       rawValue: profile.categoryColumns.length,
 855 |       value: profile.categoryColumns.length.toLocaleString(),
 856 |       subtitle: "Segment columns",
 857 |     },
 858 |     {
 859 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 860 |       title: "Missing Values",
 861 |       metric: "__missing_values__",
 862 |       aggregation: "count",
 863 |       format: "number",
 864 |       rawValue: quality.missingCells,
 865 |       value: quality.missingCells.toLocaleString(),
 866 |       subtitle: `${quality.completeness}% complete`,
 867 |       status: quality.missingCells > 0 ? "warning" : "good",
 868 |     },
 869 |     buildKpiFromSpec(cleanRows, {
 870 |       title: "Data Quality Score",
 871 |       metric: "__quality_score__",
 872 |       aggregation: "avg",
 873 |       format: "percent",
 874 |     }),
 875 |   ];
 876 | 
 877 |   kpis[1] = {
 878 |     ...kpis[1],
 879 |     rawValue: profile.columns.length,
 880 |     value: profile.columns.length.toLocaleString(),
 881 |     subtitle: "Detected columns",
 882 |   };
 883 | 
 884 |   if (profile.primaryMetric) {
 885 |     kpis.push(
 886 |       buildKpiFromSpec(cleanRows, {
 887 |         title: `Highest ${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)}`,
 888 |         metric: profile.primaryMetric.name,
 889 |         aggregation: "max",
 890 |         format: "number",
 891 |       }),
 892 |     );
 893 |   }
 894 | 
 895 |   return kpis;
 896 | }
 897 | 
 898 | export function buildDefaultCharts(rows: Row[]) {
 899 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
 900 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(cleanRows);
 901 |   const withIndex = buildRowIndexRows(cleanRows);
 902 |   const charts: DashboardChart[] = [];
 903 | 
 904 |   if (!withIndex.length) return charts;
 905 | 
 906 |   if (profile.primaryMetric && profile.primaryCategory) {
 907 |     charts.push(
 908 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 909 |         type: "bar",
 910 |         title: `Average ${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} by ${titleCase(profile.primaryCategory.name)}`,
 911 |         xKey: profile.primaryCategory.name,
 912 |         yKey: profile.primaryMetric.name,
 913 |         aggregation: "avg",
 914 |         limit: 10,
 915 |       }),
 916 |     );
 917 |   }
 918 | 
 919 |   if (profile.primaryMetric) {
 920 |     charts.push(
 921 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 922 |         type: "histogram",
 923 |         title: `${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} Distribution`,
 924 |         xKey: "range",
 925 |         yKey: profile.primaryMetric.name,
 926 |         aggregation: "count",
 927 |         limit: 8,
 928 |       }),
 929 |     );
 930 |   }
 931 | 
 932 |   if (profile.primaryCategory) {
 933 |     charts.push(
 934 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 935 |         type: "donut",
 936 |         title: `Records by ${titleCase(profile.primaryCategory.name)}`,
 937 |         xKey: profile.primaryCategory.name,
 938 |         yKey: "count",
 939 |         aggregation: "count",
 940 |         limit: 8,
 941 |       }),
 942 |     );
 943 |   }
 944 | 
 945 |   if (profile.primaryMetric) {
 946 |     charts.push(
 947 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 948 |         type: "line",
 949 |         title: profile.dateColumn
 950 |           ? `${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} Over Time`
 951 |           : `${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} Trend (By Row Index)`,
 952 |         xKey: profile.dateColumn?.name || "__row_index__",
 953 |         yKey: profile.primaryMetric.name,
 954 |         aggregation: "avg",
 955 |         limit: 24,
 956 |       }),
 957 |     );
 958 |   }
 959 | 
 960 |   if (profile.primaryMetric && profile.secondaryMetric) {
 961 |     charts.push(
 962 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 963 |         type: "scatter",
 964 |         title: `${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} vs ${titleCase(profile.secondaryMetric.name)}`,
 965 |         xKey: profile.secondaryMetric.name,
 966 |         yKey: profile.primaryMetric.name,
 967 |         aggregation: "avg",
 968 |         limit: 200,
 969 |       }),
 970 |     );
 971 |   }
 972 | 
 973 |   if (profile.primaryMetric && profile.primaryCategory) {
 974 |     charts.push(
 975 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 976 |         type: "horizontalBar",
 977 |         title: `Top ${titleCase(profile.primaryCategory.name)} by ${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)}`,
 978 |         xKey: profile.primaryCategory.name,
 979 |         yKey: profile.primaryMetric.name,
 980 |         aggregation: "max",
 981 |         limit: 10,
 982 |       }),
 983 |     );
 984 |   }
 985 | 
 986 |   if (profile.numericColumns.length >= 2) {
 987 |     charts.push(
 988 |       buildChartFromSpec(withIndex, {
 989 |         type: "heatmap",
 990 |         title: "Correlation Analysis",
 991 |         xKey: profile.numericColumns[0].name,
 992 |         yKey: profile.numericColumns[1].name,
 993 |         aggregation: "avg",
 994 |       }),
 995 |     );
 996 |   }
 997 | 
 998 |   return charts.filter((chart, index, list) => {
 999 |     const signature = `${chart.title}|${chart.type}|${chart.xKey}|${chart.yKey}`;
1000 |     return list.findIndex((candidate) => `${candidate.title}|${candidate.type}|${candidate.xKey}|${candidate.yKey}` === signature) === index;
1001 |   });
1002 | }
1003 | 
1004 | export const buildSevenCharts = buildDefaultCharts;
1005 | 
1006 | export function generateDynamicInsights(rows: Row[]): InsightCard[] {
1007 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
1008 |   const profile = buildDatasetProfile(cleanRows);
1009 |   const quality = buildDataQualityScore(cleanRows);
1010 |   const insights: InsightCard[] = [];
1011 | 
1012 |   if (profile.primaryMetric && profile.primaryCategory) {
1013 |     const grouped = groupByAggregate(cleanRows, profile.primaryCategory.name, profile.primaryMetric.name, "avg", 1)[0];
1014 |     if (grouped) {
1015 |       insights.push({
1016 |         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1017 |         title: `${titleCase(String(grouped[profile.primaryCategory.name]))} leads`,
1018 |         description: `Highest average ${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} is ${grouped[profile.primaryMetric.name]}.`,
1019 |         tone: "good",
1020 |       });
1021 |     }
1022 |   }
1023 | 
1024 |   insights.push({
1025 |     id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1026 |     title: `Data quality is ${quality.finalScore >= 85 ? "strong" : "mixed"}`,
1027 |     description: `${quality.completeness}% completeness and ${quality.uniqueness}% uniqueness across the dataset.`,
1028 |     tone: quality.finalScore >= 85 ? "good" : "warning",
1029 |   });
1030 | 
1031 |   if (profile.primaryMetric) {
1032 |     const values = cleanRows
1033 |       .map((row) => safeNumber(row[profile.primaryMetric!.name]))
1034 |       .filter((value): value is number => value !== null);
1035 |     const mean = average(values);
1036 |     const deviations = values.filter((value) => Math.abs(value - mean) > Math.max(mean * 0.8, 1)).length;
1037 |     insights.push({
1038 |       id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1039 |       title: "Anomaly watch",
1040 |       description: `${deviations} records in ${titleCase(profile.primaryMetric.name)} stand far from the average.`,
1041 |       tone: deviations > 0 ? "warning" : "info",
1042 |     });
1043 |   }
1044 | 
1045 |   return insights.slice(0, 4);
1046 | }
1047 | 
1048 | export function exportRowsToCsv(rows: Row[]) {
1049 |   const cleanRows = cleanDatasetRows(rows);
1050 |   const columns = Array.from(
1051 |     new Set(cleanRows.flatMap((row) => Object.keys(row)).filter((key) => !key.startsWith("__"))),
1052 |   );
1053 | 
1054 |   const lines = [
1055 |     columns.join(","),
1056 |     ...cleanRows.map((row) =>
1057 |       columns
1058 |         .map((column) => `"${String(row[column] ?? "").replace(/"/g, '""')}"`)
1059 |         .join(","),
1060 |     ),
1061 |   ];
1062 | 
1063 |   return lines.join("\n");
1064 | }
1065 | 
1066 | export function exportDashboardToJson(input: {
1067 |   datasetName: string;
1068 |   filters: DashboardFilters;
1069 |   kpis: DashboardKpi[];
1070 |   charts: DashboardChart[];
1071 | }) {
1072 |   return JSON.stringify(input, null, 2);
1073 | }
1074 | 
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardController.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardController.ts`

```ts
  1 | export interface DashboardCommand {
  2 |   action: 'SHOW_ALL' | 'SHOW_CHART' | 'FILTER' | 'GENERATE_CHART' | 'MODIFY_CHART' | 'ANSWER' | 'DELETE' | 'CLEAR' | 'COMPARE' | 'TREND';
  3 |   charts?: string[];
  4 |   filter?: Record<string, string>;
  5 |   chart?: string | {
  6 |     type: string;
  7 |     x: string;
  8 |     y: string;
  9 |     aggregation?: string;
 10 |   };
 11 |   changes?: Record<string, unknown>;
 12 |   message?: string;
 13 | }
 14 | 
 15 | export function processQuery(query: string, datasetColumns: string[]): DashboardCommand {
 16 |   const q = query.toLowerCase();
 17 |   const cols = datasetColumns.map(c => c.toLowerCase());
 18 |   
 19 |   if (q.includes('delete') || q.includes('remove chart')) {
 20 |     return { action: 'DELETE' };
 21 |   }
 22 |   
 23 |   if (q.includes('clear') && (q.includes('filter') || q.includes('all') || q.includes('reset'))) {
 24 |     return { action: 'CLEAR' };
 25 |   }
 26 |   
 27 |   if (q.includes('show all') || q.includes('all chart') || q.includes('everything') || q.includes('full dashboard') || q.includes('reset')) {
 28 |     return { action: 'SHOW_ALL' };
 29 |   }
 30 |   
 31 |   const filterPatterns = [
 32 |     /filter\s+(?:by|on)\s+(\w+)\s*[=:]\s*(.+)/i,
 33 |     /show\s+only\s+(\w+)\s*[=:]\s*(.+)/i,
 34 |     /where\s+(\w+)\s*[=:]\s*(.+)/i,
 35 |   ];
 36 |   
 37 |   for (const pattern of filterPatterns) {
 38 |     const match = query.match(pattern);
 39 |     if (match) {
 40 |       const colName = match[1].trim();
 41 |       const colValue = match[2].trim().replace(/["']/g, '');
 42 |       const foundCol = cols.find(c => c.includes(colName.toLowerCase()));
 43 |       if (foundCol) {
 44 |         return { action: 'FILTER', filter: { [foundCol]: colValue } };
 45 |       }
 46 |     }
 47 |   }
 48 |   
 49 |   if (q.includes('salary') && q.includes('country')) {
 50 |     return { action: 'SHOW_CHART', charts: ['salary_by_country'] };
 51 |   }
 52 |   if (q.includes('experience') && q.includes('country')) {
 53 |     return { action: 'SHOW_CHART', charts: ['experience_by_country'] };
 54 |   }
 55 |   if (q.includes('language') || q.includes('popular')) {
 56 |     return { action: 'SHOW_CHART', charts: ['language_frequency'] };
 57 |   }
 58 |   if (q.includes('education')) {
 59 |     return { action: 'SHOW_CHART', charts: ['education_distribution', 'salary_by_education'] };
 60 |   }
 61 |   if (q.includes('salary') && (q.includes('experience') || q.includes('vs') || q.includes('compare'))) {
 62 |     return { action: 'SHOW_CHART', charts: ['salary_vs_experience'] };
 63 |   }
 64 |   
 65 |   let chartType = 'bar';
 66 |   let chartX = cols[0];
 67 |   let chartY = cols.find(c => c.includes('salary') || c.includes('revenue') || c.includes('value')) || cols[1];
 68 |   
 69 |   if (q.includes('line')) chartType = 'line';
 70 |   else if (q.includes('pie') || q.includes('distribution') || q.includes('percentage')) chartType = 'pie';
 71 |   else if (q.includes('scatter') || q.includes('correlation')) chartType = 'scatter';
 72 |   else if (q.includes('area')) chartType = 'area';
 73 |   else if (q.includes('radar')) chartType = 'radar';
 74 |   
 75 |   const byMatch = q.match(/by\s+(\w+)/);
 76 |   if (byMatch) {
 77 |     const target = byMatch[1].toLowerCase();
 78 |     const found = cols.find(c => c.includes(target));
 79 |     if (found) chartX = found;
 80 |   }
 81 |   
 82 |   const forMatch = q.match(/for\s+(\w+)/);
 83 |   if (forMatch) {
 84 |     const target = forMatch[1].toLowerCase();
 85 |     const found = cols.find(c => c.includes(target));
 86 |     if (found) chartY = found;
 87 |   }
 88 |   
 89 |   if (q.includes('bar') || q.includes('chart') || q.includes('graph') || q.includes('visual')) {
 90 |     if (q.includes('change') || q.includes('modify') || q.includes('switch') || q.includes('convert')) {
 91 |       return { action: 'MODIFY_CHART', chart: 'current', changes: { type: chartType } };
 92 |     }
 93 |     return { action: 'GENERATE_CHART', chart: { type: chartType, x: chartX, y: chartY } };
 94 |   }
 95 |   
 96 |   if (q.includes('change') || q.includes('modify') || q.includes('convert') || q.includes('switch') || q.includes('make it') || q.includes('transform')) {
 97 |     const chartMatch = q.match(/(?:chart|graph|to)\s+(\w+)/);
 98 |     if (chartMatch) {
 99 |       const newType = q.includes('line') ? 'line' : q.includes('pie') ? 'pie' : q.includes('bar') ? 'bar' : q.includes('scatter') ? 'scatter' : q.includes('area') ? 'area' : 'bar';
100 |       return { action: 'MODIFY_CHART', chart: 'current', changes: { type: newType } };
101 |     }
102 |     return { action: 'MODIFY_CHART', chart: 'current', changes: { type: chartType } };
103 |   }
104 |   
105 |   if (q.includes('trend') || q.includes('over time') || q.includes('growth') || q.includes('timeline')) {
106 |     return { action: 'TREND' };
107 |   }
108 |   
109 |   if (q.includes('compare') || q.includes('versus') || q.includes('vs')) {
110 |     return { action: 'COMPARE' };
111 |   }
112 |   
113 |   if (q.includes('what') || q.includes('how') || q.includes('explain') || q.includes('describe') || q.includes('tell me')) {
114 |     let msg = 'Here are some things I can do:\n';
115 |     msg += '• "Show all charts" - Display entire dashboard\n';
116 |     msg += '• "Show salary by country" - Display specific chart\n';
117 |     msg += '• "Create bar chart" - Generate new chart\n';
118 |     msg += '• "Filter by country = USA" - Apply filters\n';
119 |     msg += '• "Change to line chart" - Modify existing chart\n';
120 |     msg += '• "Delete chart" - Remove last chart\n';
121 |     msg += '• "Clear filters" - Reset all filters\n';
122 |     return { action: 'ANSWER', message: msg };
123 |   }
124 |   
125 |   return { action: 'ANSWER', message: `I understood "${query}" but couldn't map it to a dashboard action. Try: "show all charts", "create bar chart", "filter by country = USA", etc.` };
126 | }
```

### FILE: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardStateStorage.ts

Source path: `apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardStateStorage.ts`

```ts
 1 | import type { DashboardChart, DashboardFilters, DashboardKpi } from "@/features/dashboard/utils/dashboardAnalytics";
 2 | 
 3 | export type StoredDashboardState = {
 4 |   filters: DashboardFilters;
 5 |   manualCharts: DashboardChart[];
 6 |   manualKpis: DashboardKpi[];
 7 | };
 8 | 
 9 | function getKey(datasetId?: string) {
10 |   return datasetId ? `insightflow-dashboard-state:${datasetId}` : "";
11 | }
12 | 
13 | export function loadDashboardState(datasetId?: string): StoredDashboardState {
14 |   if (!datasetId || typeof window === "undefined") {
15 |     return { filters: {}, manualCharts: [], manualKpis: [] };
16 |   }
17 | 
18 |   try {
19 |     const raw = window.localStorage.getItem(getKey(datasetId));
20 |     if (!raw) return { filters: {}, manualCharts: [], manualKpis: [] };
21 |     const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Partial<StoredDashboardState>;
22 |     return {
23 |       filters: parsed.filters || {},
24 |       manualCharts: Array.isArray(parsed.manualCharts) ? parsed.manualCharts : [],
25 |       manualKpis: Array.isArray(parsed.manualKpis) ? parsed.manualKpis : [],
26 |     };
27 |   } catch {
28 |     return { filters: {}, manualCharts: [], manualKpis: [] };
29 |   }
30 | }
31 | 
32 | export function saveDashboardState(datasetId: string | undefined, state: StoredDashboardState) {
33 |   if (!datasetId || typeof window === "undefined") return;
34 |   window.localStorage.setItem(getKey(datasetId), JSON.stringify(state));
35 | }
36 | 
```
